italian-soul-machine-siena-italy.intro_html:
Italian Soul Machine – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Siena, Italy

Italian Soul Machine curates an impeccable fusion of live soul, funk, and R&B for the most discerning weddings and events throughout Italy.

Exceptional musicianship, an atmosphere of refined joy.

The quintessential sound for your most cherished celebrations in Italy.

Our ensemble features an extraordinary female vocalist, a captivating saxophone, and a pulsating rhythm section of bass, guitar, and drums.

We are regularly engaged to perform at prestigious venues such as La Torre sulla via Francigena in Florence and Tenuta La Presa in Caprino Veronese, Italy.

Composed entirely of professional artists, we specialize as an Italian wedding band, yet also offer elegant and engaging entertainment for every occasion: weddings, conventions, corporate events, and private soirées.

Our extensive repertoire spans the refined classics of Soul Motown, R&B, Swing, and Jazz, the spirited Dance & Disco of the ’70s and ’80s, and the most contemporary hits.

In recent years, we have brought our music to the most exquisite destinations across Italy: Tuscany and Umbria, the Amalfi Coast and Campania, Lazio, the splendid Italian lakes—including Lake Garda and Lake Como—Milan, and the islands of Sicily and Sardinia.

Entrust us to make your event truly unforgettable.

Bespoke Line‑Up Options:

  • 4‑Piece Band
  • 5‑Piece Band
  • Option to discuss smaller or larger ensembles

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 2 hours before the start of the event.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 1.5 hours

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes, we can learn up to four songs, as long as they are communicated one month in advance.

string-quartet-italy-sparkle-strings.intro_html:
Sparkle Strings – An Exquisite String Quartet from Puglia, Italy

Sparkle Strings is a distinguished string quartet, meticulously dedicated to delivering impeccable entertainment for the most discerning events. With years of performance mastery, this refined ensemble has curated an eclectic repertoire that gracefully spans eras and genres. Alongside cherished classical masterpieces, these accomplished musicians offer Bridgerton-inspired arrangements, cinematic scores, and contemporary selections—an ideal choice for couples seeking the very essence of refined wedding music in Italy. The quartet is regularly engaged for exclusive celebrations at Villa Miani in Rome, Chiostro Dei Domenicani in Lecce, Villa Cenci in Cisternino, and Agriturismo Masseria Salamina in Brindisi.
string-quartet-italy-sparkle-strings.description_html:
Rooted in Puglia, Sparkle Strings performs throughout Italy and beyond for weddings, private soirees, and corporate affairs. Always impeccably attired, the quartet elevates any event to an extraordinary level—perfect for luxury and high-end occasions where consummate professionalism and exquisite skill are paramount. The ensemble comprises an all-female string formation (four violinists or three violinists with a cellist). Their gowns are a curated selection from a stunning catalogue, shared upon confirmation, ensuring the performance harmonises flawlessly with the event’s palette and ambiance. ✨ Explore their dazzling 2026 dress collection: Download the catalogue here 💃

The musicians may perform seated or standing, even upon raised podiums, transforming each moment into a theatrical experience of powerful visual and musical impact. Typically, the group provides musical accompaniment during the ceremony and cocktail hour, followed by two to three dramatic shows during dinner or reception—including a dress change. With carefully timed intervals, they cover an approximate five- to six-hour timeframe. Their bespoke repertoire embraces classical, pop, and vibrant dance selections, and they welcome special requests. A violin duo version is also available, perfectly suited for ceremony, cocktail hour, and dinner.

Audio service, travel, and all logistical details are arranged with effortless precision. Based in Puglia, the quartet is available to travel upon request. For those seeking one of Italy’s most refined string quartets, Sparkle Strings awaits your enquiry.

urban-groove-collective-florence-italy.intro_html:
Urban Groove Collective – An Exquisite Ensemble for Refined Celebrations, Based in Florence, Italy

Urban Groove Collective is directed by Sara, an Italian singer-pianist and art director who was honoured with the Italian Wedding Awards 2021 for musical entertainment. She founded her own ensemble in 2020, drawing upon two decades of expertise in the world of entertainment and collaborating with a distinguished roster of musicians from Tuscany. The group is celebrated for its captivating contemporary repertoire, impeccably suited to any occasion. They are frequently engaged to perform at weddings and exclusive events at Tenuta Corbinaia in Florence, Italy.

Urban Groove Collective has performed at private events for an illustrious clientele including Bulgari, Panerai, Jimmy Choo, Dstrezzed, Cantine Ruffino, The Mall, I Gigli, Rinascente, Renault, and other luxury houses. Sara aspires to curate a bespoke experience that aligns perfectly with your singular vision, supported by her team of forty musicians and artists. Their passion is to guide your guests on an emotional journey, weaving seamlessly between jubilant and tender moments, leaving indelible memories. The ensemble endeavours to be artists who inspire smiles and stir the soul, offering transformative experiences that linger long after the final note. As a collective, they are delighted to accompany couples from the ceremony through to the celebration. Below are examples of the refined services they offer, each tailored to elevate any event.
urban-groove-collective-florence-italy.description_html:
Package 1

Ceremony: String duet (violin and cello) with the option to include an additional vocalist
Aperitif: Digital piano in a white shell with a female voice, either acoustic or accompanied by backing tracks. Song requests are welcomed and often cherished by guests (up to 2 hours). Alternatively, a female DJ and saxophone duo can set the tone
Dinner: Background music
Party: DJ set until 1 a.m.

Included Equipment (up to 100 guests):
- Speaker for the ceremony with wireless microphone for the celebrant
- PA systems for the aperitif, dinner (including a wireless microphone for speeches) and party
- Speaker for the cake-cutting moment
- Basic disco lights, two mini moving heads and a hazer
- One technician for technical support

Package 2

Ceremony & Aperitif: String quartet
Dinner: Background music with two 15-minute performances by a female vocalist, accompanied by a digital piano in a white shell and electric violin
Party: Roaming show band for one hour featuring a female vocalist, saxophone, LED violin and percussion, followed by a DJ set until 1 a.m.

Included Equipment (up to 100 guests):
- Same as above
- One technician included

Package 3

Ceremony & Aperitif: String quartet
Dinner: Background music with two 15-minute performances featuring both a female and male vocalist, accompanied by a digital piano in a white shell
Party: Full roaming show band for one hour including two female vocalists, a male vocalist, a Black vocalist, saxophone, LED violin and percussion. Followed by a DJ set until 1 a.m.

Included Equipment (up to 100 guests):
- Same as above
- Two to three technicians provided depending on the event’s scale

All Packages Include

  • One custom-learned song outside the standard repertoire
  • Standard wedding coverage from 4 p.m. to 1 a.m. (9 hours)
  • Setup completed 2 hours before the start of the service
  • Full coordination of musicians by Sara, from the ceremony through to the DJ set
  • Travel expenses

Additional Info

  • SIAE tax (Italian Society of Authors and Publishers) is not included
  • Extra time beyond 1 a.m. can be arranged
  • A staff meal is requested for each musician
  • Overnight accommodation to be agreed upon, depending on the venue’s distance from Florence

Line-up Options

  • Singing Pianist
  • Essential Showband
  • Full Showband
  • String Quartet
  • DJ Live (with Sax, Singer, Percussion or Violin)
  • Aperitif Lounge Band
  • Italian Folk Band

wedding-sax-dj-pisa-italy-jo.intro_html:
Jo Sax & DJ — An Exquisite Union of Saxophone and Sound Curated from Pisa, Italy

✨ What discerning clients cherish most: dance floors animated until the final note, impeccably tailored musical journeys, a breathtaking saxophone performance, refined crowd engagement, seamless coverage from ceremony to soirée, and a presence that is both gracious and profoundly professional.

Pisa—cradle of the luminous Piazza dei Miracoli—is where Jo Sax first drew breath. Driven by an enduring devotion to music and an extraordinary gift for listening, he chose the saxophone as his instrument of expression. From this foundation emerged a singular concept: the fusion of live saxophone with the art of the DJ, weaving together the most captivating genres to conjure atmospheres that are at once immersive and exquisitely joyful.

I am regularly entrusted with weddings and celebrations at Tenuta Montenero in Perugia, Tenuta Mocajo in Tuscany, and Villa Boscarello in Trequanda, Italy.

For many seasons, Jo Sax & DJ has graced weddings, private clubs, intimate soirées, and corporate gatherings—predominantly across Italy, yet always available to venture wherever professionalism and refined celebration are required.

His repertoire is exceptionally diverse, and his cultivated ear enables him to improvise a luminous melody in a matter of seconds. To engage Jo Sax & DJ is to place your event in the hands of a curator dedicated to crafting an unforgettable experience—one filled with music, passion, and joyous elegance. Every stage of your occasion will be attended to with meticulous care.

Below are but a few of the distinguished venues where I have had the privilege to perform:

wedding-band-italy-puppets.intro_html:
The Puppets — an exquisite wedding band based in Bologna and Tuscany, curating refined live music experiences for discerning celebrations throughout Italy.

Guests are captivated by the band’s high-energy performances, impeccable vocals, seamless crowd engagement, and polished medleys. A sophisticated fusion of live musicianship and modern production, The Puppets deliver an atmosphere of unparalleled vibrancy and elegance.

This charismatic pop cover ensemble, rooted in Northern Italy, is sought after for the most exclusive weddings, corporate galas, and private soirees where an impeccably curated evening and a full dance floor are essential.

Their philosophy is elegantly simple: to elevate every occasion through joyful, uplifting live music.

The Puppets have performed at the most prestigious clubs across Europe and entertained at countless weddings and private celebrations worldwide. Highlights include being personally invited by fashion luminaries Tommy Hilfiger and Philipp Plein to animate their birthday festivities, and a seven-year residency as the principal band at the grandest luxury resort in Sharm El Sheikh, Egypt, for their New Year’s Eve galas. They are regularly booked for destination weddings at Island Club on the Athens Riviera, Villa Cimbrone in Ravello, and Palazzo di Cuzzano in Bologna.

The band’s extensive repertoire spans 1970s disco, rock ’n’ roll, cherished Italian evergreens, and unforgettable 1980s and 1990s dance hits. Their signature distinction, however, is a Top 40 setlist — meticulously refreshed with today’s most compelling dance and pop anthems — and their reputation as Italy’s finest party mash-up ensemble.

The vocal synergy of Martina and Francesco, each a refined performer in their own right, creates a dynamic stage presence reminiscent of an elite dance house club. Their impeccable blend elevates the live show into a truly immersive experience.

Their services are further enhanced by a bespoke DJ offering and comprehensive sound and lighting production, included within every quotation unless otherwise specified. For those seeking an even more extraordinary affair, The Puppets can expand upon request to include multiple vocalists and a horn section — saxophone, trumpet, or trombone — as well as professional dancers to perform alongside the band, all available for additional fees. They also possess extensive experience curating Jewish wedding celebrations, artfully performing “Hava Nagila” and seamlessly integrating traditional songs requested by the couple through their state-of-the-art sound system.

The ensemble is in demand throughout Italy, having performed at exclusive destination weddings in Bologna, Milan, Rome, Tuscany, Lake Como, Lake Garda, Venice, Parma, Genoa, Padua, Verona, and Pisa. Their most recent triumph saw them enchant Natalie and David’s three-day wedding at the magnificent Villa Cimbrone on the Amalfi Coast.

Please also inquire about the other distinguished local musicians we collaborate with — a guitarist, harpist, jazz band, or saxophonist — to compose the most refined musical package for your wedding or event.

In Italiano

In oltre quindici anni di attività si sono esibiti nei più prestigiosi locali d’Italia ed hanno partecipato ad innumerevoli eventi privati e convention (BMW, Diadora, Nissan) vantando inoltre esibizioni in vari paesi europei (Austria, Germania, Francia) ed a Sharm El Sheik presso il prestigioso villaggio vacanze Domina Coral Bay.

Il loro repertorio spazia dai classici successi disco dance anni '70 al rock and roll, dagli evergreen italiani agli indimenticabili anni ‘80. Ma il vero punto di forza della loro trascinante scaletta è la House Music che va dagli anni 90 alle hit del momento in un susseguirsi di musica e coreografie che permette alla band di soddisfare le esigenze delle platee più differenti tra loro.

Anche la sonorità della band è chiaramente dance in virtù della console DJ ed effettistica sul palco utilizzata a rotazione da ogni singolo elemento del gruppo. La presenza sul palco dei due cantanti Martina e Francesco rende lo spettacolo un qualcosa che oltre che essere ascoltato merita di essere visto in quanto i 2 si rivelano ben presto dei veri e propri intrattenitori grazie alla consolidata esperienza in numerose discoteche del nord Italia in veste di Vocalist. Di fatto una band che conia perfettamente in una unica dimensione la forza dell’impatto live ed il coinvolgimento tipico delle discoteche e della dance music.

wedding-duo-milan-forever-young.intro_html:
Forever Young Duo – An Exquisite Wedding & Event Ensemble Based in Milan, Italy

What discerning clients most cherish about Forever Young Duo: impeccable professionalism and warmth, remarkably talented artistry, refined versatility, an enchanting atmosphere, guests captivated and delighted, unreservedly recommended.

The distinguished Forever Young Duo features the luminous vocals of Carol and the masterful guitar and loop station artistry of Alex. This curated duo offers a bespoke musical experience, tailored with impeccable attention to your event’s unique character.

The pair is extraordinarily adaptable and gracious, delighted to discuss their refined set list, extensive repertoire, and performance style with you, ensuring every detail is perfectly aligned with your vision. Forever Young Duo provides expert, concierge-level guidance on the ideal musical ambience for your occasion, collaborating seamlessly to achieve an exquisite result.

We are regularly engaged to perform at esteemed venues such as Hotel Villa Cipressi on Lake Como and Residence Oldofredi in Brescia, Italy—testament to our standing among the most sought-after ensembles.

The duo possesses an innate ability to read the room and refine their performance in real time, responding to the atmosphere with effortless grace—making them the definitive choice for any distinguished celebration.

Forever Young Duo curates a vast and varied repertoire spanning multiple eras and genres, from timeless jazz and swing to contemporary pop and chart-topping hits. For larger events, the ensemble can be expanded into an exceptional four-piece band; inquiries are warmly welcomed.

With years of impeccable experience, Forever Young Duo has cultivated an illustrious roster of international clientele, including Conrad Hilton (Bora Bora), Four Seasons (Bahrain), Intercontinental (Dubai), Porsche (Dubai), Formula 1 – GP Monza (Italy), Heineken (Italy), Bushido Buddha-bar (Bahrain), Gallery 21 (Bahrain), TAG Heuer, Hyundai, and Anantara Dhigu Resort (Maldives).

These artists truly know how to elevate an event, inspiring even the most reserved guests to rise and dance with joy.

Below is a curated selection of locations where we have been privileged to perform for weddings and celebrations:

  • Residence Oldofredi, Monte Isola
  • Tenuta La Presa, Caprino Veronese
  • Hotel Villa Cipressi, Varenna, Lecco
  • Verbania, Verbano-Cusio-Ossola
  • La Villa Hotel, Asti, Piedmont, Italy
  • Tuoro sul Trasimeno, Perugia, Italy
  • Villa Lario, Lake Como, Italy
  • Hotel Du Lac, Bellagio
  • Limonta, Lecco, Italy
  • Colico, Lecco, Italy
  • Terzo di Danciano, Arezzo, Italy

If you seek to secure one of Italy’s most refined wedding and party duos, we invite you to reach out to Forever Young Duo without hesitation.

Refined Inquiries from Esteemed Clients

Given that the wedding is more than a year away, we have not yet finalised precise timings. We anticipate the ceremony at 2 pm, with music and dancing continuing until approximately midnight. Does this schedule suit your ensemble? (Asked by Richard on 5 January 2026)

Response from Forever Young Duo: The proposed timings are perfectly suitable and align seamlessly with our musical offering. The only clarification we seek is whether the ceremony will take place at the same venue or at a separate location.

wedding-band-arezzo-italy-slipstream.intro_html:
Slipstream – An Exquisite Wedding Band from Arezzo, Italy

Selecting the perfect ensemble for life’s most momentous occasion is a refined art. Slipstream curates an unparalleled musical experience: a three-piece band with over 500 concerts, international tours, and VIP weddings, performing the most celebrated pop-rock repertoire from the 1950s through contemporary masterpieces. Every performance is bespoke, ensuring your celebration is nothing short of impeccable.

Slipstream is Tuscany’s preeminent live band, specialised in weddings and luxury events, with an international presence. Comprising three musicians whose careers include tours, charting albums and singles, contracts with Costa Cruises and premier resorts, television appearances, and profound expertise in the entertainment industry, the band has become synonymous with talent and unwavering professionalism. They offer a curated selection of pop, blues, rock, folk, dance, and indie hits spanning seven decades. Yet above all, they listen attentively to every client’s desires, tailoring the playlist to create a uniquely refined atmosphere.

Choose from a selection of bespoke packages, tailor the setlist to your taste, and entrust us with the timing—we guarantee an impeccable result. Demands are often secured up to 18 months in advance for the most coveted dates, and with over twenty enquiries each weekend during the peak season (May through September), early engagement is strongly advised.

Slipstream has been exclusively booked for weddings and events at an extraordinary array of distinguished venues:

wedding-band-arezzo-italy-slipstream.faq_html:
<details><summary>WHAT KIND OF MUSIC DO YOU PROPOSE?</summary>The Slipstream set has been carefully chosen over years of performing. The set includes the best hits from the 50/60s onwards, and represents a perfect balance between contemporary and classic.

The band spends hours in the studio in between performances ensuring the latest hits are as exceptional as the classics! Please see the Playlist page for a full up to date list.



</details><details><summary>GOT OUR OWN SONG. COULD YOU PLAY IT?</summary>We know that above all, music is nothing but personal. If you have a song that absolutely must be included on your wedding day, and it suits the type of sound the band plays, just ask.

Due to the band’s busy diary, this must be done at least 1 month in advance. We will do our best to do that, and in case that particular tune doesn’t work with our stuff, no worries, we’ll find a way for you to listen to it!



</details><details><summary>DON’T LIKE A COUPLE OF SONGS IN YOUR LIST, CAN WE CUT ‘EM?</summary>Yes, absolutely. Weddings are special occasions, and we are happy to work with clients throughout contact until the big day to really tailor the set towards you.

The playlist is varied enough to cater towards a crowd of any age, so if you feel like some songs absolutely must be played, or just ain’t right for your event, feel free to tell us. Again, don’t forget to let us know at least 30 days before.



</details><details><summary>WE’D LOVE TO HAVE A DJ FOR THE PARTY. CAN YOU PROVIDE IT? DOES IT AFFECT YOUR PERFORMANCE?</summary>The band offers a DJ service, and this means we will have only one set of PA equipment and lighting for the party set and DJ, and lots more room for dancing! The band is happy to share the stage with any other performer booked for the event, by the way. Up to you!



</details><details><summary>YOUR ON-STAGE LOOK?</summary>Actually, we can dress up with classic suits, with party dresses, jeans & t-shirts. You decide the dress-code, the band won’t let you down. We will provide a minimum of two clothes changing during the day, if more than one service is selected.



</details><details><summary>DOES THE BAND DEAL DIRECTLY WITH VENUES?</summary>The band would be more than happy to speak with any venue regarding arrangements or technicalities.



</details><details><summary>GONNA GET MARRIED IN GREECE. CAN YOU TRAVEL?</summary>Of course. One of the perks of being in a band is the opportunity to travel high and low throughout the world, as long as all expenses are covered. For events where flying is necessary, the band have a technical specification rider – a local company must be sourced to provide the equipment.



</details><details><summary>THE DAY HAS COME. WHAT HAPPENS NOW?</summary>Slipstream require at least 2 hours before guests arrive (if possible) to ensure a full soundcheck. The band will agree a suitable time with the client, and arrive at least 1 hour before soundcheck to load in and acclimatise with the venue.

After soundcheck, unless otherwise instructed, the band will return to the hotel to change clothes and refresh (unless asked to provide entertainment during that time).

If the event is in close proximity to Cortona and the band is not staying at a hotel, a private space is required to act as a base, ideally with changing and shower facilities. Prior to any performance, the band will be on site and ready one hour before the established time.



</details><details><summary>IF WE WANT YOU TO PLAY LONGER?</summary>Well, there’s a whole book to write about it. We have been on the road for years and years and we know you wish the party never stop, but we have our own iron rule:

Any additional entertainment outside of the agreed times will result in an additional charge for each hour of 20% on the total amount agreed, with a minimum payment of one additional hour. We really needed to state this: we handled too many bad situations.



</details><details><summary>ANY ACCOMMODATION NEEDED?</summary>It can take up to 2 hours to pack down the full band setup after a show, which often means a very late finish. If the event is based further than 3 hours away from Cortona, Italy (our hometown), we stay in hotels at our own cost.

Our quoted price is always VAT and accommodation inclusive; there are no hidden fees. If you want us for more than one day, then we will need a triple room – we have no particular demands, just a room with three beds.



</details><details><summary>REGARDING FOOD AND DRINK?</summary>Yes please. Slipstream are very self-sufficient and easy going, but basic meal for three is required, along with cold refreshments.



</details><details><summary>THERE'LL BE ANIMALS WITH US. IS IT A PROBLEM?</summary>Oh, we do love animals very much, don’t worry. Slipstream are animal-friendly.



</details><details><summary>CAN YOU MOVE YOUR SETS? DO YOU NEED A STAGE?</summary>A stage always looks better, but it’s not necessary for the band to perform. A minimum floor space of around 4 metres wide by 3 metres deep is advised.

Usually we propose more than one set, so, of course we can move. We can provide 3 separate setups (i.e. one for the ceremony, one for the aperitif and the other one for the party).



</details><details><summary>NEED STAGE LIGHTS?</summary>Lighting is recommended to create a focal point for the event, but not a necessity. Slipstream offer lighting of any size to suit any venue, but if you prefer to arrange this either directly with the venue, or with a 3rd party supplier, that’ll be okay.



</details><details><summary>ANYTHING WE SHOULD KNOW ABOUT POWER REQUIREMENTS?</summary>Our set up is based on the latest technology to reduce the power output as much as possible. A minimum of three main’s power sources is advised within 5 metres (Slipstream come equipped with all necessary extension cables under 5m).

Exact requirements change event to event, so please get in touch should you be unsure or require exact specifications.



</details><details><summary>HOW MANY EQUIPMENT SETUPS CAN YOU PROVIDE?</summary>We provide up to three full equipment & stage lighting setups. If your event is distributed on more than three different areas of the venue, our crew will take care of moving one or two sets from area "x" to area "y" and all your requests will be fulfilled.</details>

string-quartet-italy.intro_html:
The Italy String Quartet – an exquisite professional string quartet based in Bologna, Italy, offering bespoke musical artistry for weddings and exclusive events. Discerning clients praise their elegant, highly polished performances, a versatile repertoire, and a classy presence that guests adore and remember.

This impeccable ensemble of musicians specializes in delivering curated musical entertainment for the most refined occasions. Masters of both acoustic and electric instruments, The Italy String Quartet crafts the perfect performance for every setting. Their stunning LED violins, viola, and cello imbue any event with an extraordinary wow factor. Explore their Dress Catalogue and Luxury Dress Catalogue to complement the aesthetic. A state-of-the-art sound system ensures flawless amplification for their electric instruments. The quartet is regularly engaged to perform at illustrious venues such as Caruso Belmond Hotel on the Amalfi Coast, Villa Sola Cabiati on Lake Como, and Masseria Potenti in Puglia.

The Italy String Quartet brings years of combined industry experience, celebrated for their unwavering professionalism and exceptional talent. Their vast, meticulously curated repertoire spans eras and genres, ensuring the ideal musical accompaniment for every moment. This electric string group is delighted to travel, performing across Italy and making them the perfect choice for Italian destination weddings and corporate events. The following are just a selection of the prestigious locations where they have been booked for weddings and celebrations:

la-dolce-vita-bologna-italy.intro_html: La Dolce Vita – an exquisite wedding and party ensemble based in Bologna, Italy. Composed of some of the nation’s most celebrated vocalists, the band is further elevated by a curated selection of world‑class DJs who deliver impeccable live performances. Their distinguished career includes appearances on prestigious live television broadcasts and releases through top‑tier record labels. The musicians have graced the illustrious Festival di Sanremo and have toured alongside the legendary Andrea Bocelli. They are regularly engaged for exclusive weddings and events at refined venues such as Villa Miani in Rome, La Foce in Siena, Villa Aurelia in Rome, and the Aquadulci Hotel in Domus de Maria, Sardinia.
la-dolce-vita-bologna-italy.description_html:
Every member is a graduate of the finest music academies in Italy and abroad, including the United States and the United Kingdom; even the DJs hold honours in music degrees and master’s programmes. Together they have performed across the globe – in the UAE, Germany, France, Spain, Greece and beyond – for iconic brands including BMW, Ferrari, Dior, Campari, Cartier, Google, and the Bologna Soccer Team. Their purpose is not merely to perform, but to design a bespoke project, curating energy and a custom experience that becomes the impeccable soundtrack to your event. Every request is attended to with meticulous care until the final note. The repertoire spans classical music (with a superlative string section) to RnB, Soul, Jazz, Pop, Rock, Funk, and Italian classics.

Line‑up options

  • 5‑piece band
    (singer, saxophonist, percussionist, guitarist, DJ, sound technician)
  • 6‑piece band
    (2 singers, saxophonist, percussionist, guitarist, DJ, sound technician)
  • 7‑piece band
    (3 singers, saxophonist, percussionist, guitarist, DJ, sound technician)
  • 8‑piece band
    (3 singers, saxophonist, percussionist, brass, guitarist, DJ, sound technician)
  • 9‑piece band
    (3 singers, saxophonist, percussionist, 2 brass, guitarist, DJ, sound technician)
  • 10‑piece band
    (4 singers, saxophonist, percussionist, 2 brass, guitarist, DJ, sound technician)

…more options can be provided upon request…

Other Ad On’s available:

  • 4‑piece strings group
  • 6‑piece string group
  • 8‑piece string group
  • Professional dancers

wedding-band-puglia-italy-stardust.intro_html:
About Stardust – An Exquisite Wedding Band Based in Puglia, Italy

What distinguished guests most cherish about Stardust: an impeccable live band, extraordinary vocal prowess, a dance floor brimming with energy through the evening, consummate professionalism and flexibility, a meticulously curated repertoire, a seamless fusion of band and DJ, and refined communication throughout.

Stardust is a distinguished cover band, based near Bari in the heart of Puglia, Italy. Esteemed for their artistry, they are sought after for weddings, corporate celebrations, and private soirées across Italy and throughout Europe.

The ensemble is frequently engaged at some of the region's most exclusive venues, including Tenuta TRESCA in Botrugno, Villa Eva in Ravello, and Villa Aura del Lago on Lake Como, as well as the illustrious Castello Monaci and Borgo Egnazia.

Their narrative began in 2007, born from a group of kindred spirits who recognised an instant and profound connection. Conceived from an idea by Alex upon his return from the vibrant streets of London, the current formation began its journey into the Apulian hinterland in 2007, weaving a rich tapestry of live soul, pop, and rock that has captivated audiences ever since.

The band comprises Alex, Nico, Saverio, and Bufi, each bringing a refined sensibility to every performance.

Available throughout Puglia—including Alberobello, Lecce, Gallipoli, Locorotondo, Martina Franca, Fasano, Manduria, and Brindisi—Stardust also graces events further afield in Sicily, Naples, and the Amalfi Coast.

Below is a curated selection of the exclusive destinations where Stardust has been invited to perform for discerning clientele:

  • Relais Abbazia San Pietro In Valle

In Italiano

Stardust é una band degna di note e di storia. Una storia che nasce nel 2007 da un'energia che s'incontró e si amó fin dal primo momento.

Da un'idea di Alex Spadavecchia, di ritorno dalle streets del sound londinese, l'attuale formazione inizia a muovere i passi nell'entroterra pugliese dal 2007, coinvolgendo fino ad oggi anime e corpi di folle on the road con esperimenti live soul/pop/rock.

L'incontro e' stato disegnato da un istinto andato a buon fine: Alex, Nico, Saverio, Bufi. Just a friend e' il titolo del primo singolo con il quale si apre il sipario del palcoscenico del tempio di una band in continua evoluzione. In attesa del primo album dedicato ad ognuno di noi.

Tempo, cambiamento, amore andato, amore ricercato, amicizia.

E' qui il mondo, in un cd dove la vita si incastra e si libera, tra le righe di un gruppo che invoca la scelta di dare valore a quello che conta: un sorriso che abbonda e si schiude adesso, un sentimento che rischia di unire elementi diversi per farli diventare perfetti, armonici, matematicamente perfetti, tra passato e presente, a sud, lontano da qualcuno, da un qualcosa che siamo noi tutti.

Infondo la vita cos'é se non una sommatoria di ricordi e di speranze divise su milioni di persone?

wedding-band-puglia-italy-stardust.faq_html:
<details><summary>What does the wedding package include?</summary>Stardust, a name, a guarantee of success. Live band (keyboards, electric guitar, drums, vocals) and DJ service. Available for the duration of the party.



</details><details><summary>How far in advance do I need to get in touch with you?</summary>Contact us as soon as possible to check our availability and ask for a personalised quote!



</details><details><summary>Size of group?</summary>Medium (4-6 musicians).



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>Rock, Pop, Italian and English/American dance music from the 70s to today.



</details><details><summary>Can I ask for songs not included in the repertoire?</summary>No problem.



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>Decades of experience in the sector, a guarantee of success for your party!



</details><details><summary>Do you have your own equipment?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Are you able to travel?</summary>Yes, throughout Italy.



</details><details><summary>Is there a surcharge for travel?</summary>Yes, but we will provide a quote that includes travel costs, or clearly specify them.



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>We are available for the whole party at your request.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to prepare for the performance?</summary>At least two hours.



</details><details><summary>Do you do outdoor performances?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>What other types of service do you offer?</summary>Acoustic music at drinks receptions.



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Stardust, un nome, una garanzia di successo. Live band (tastiere, chitarra elettrica, batteria, voce) e servizio dj. A disposizione per tutta la durata della festa.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Contattateci appena possibile per verificare la nostra disponibilità e chiedere un preventivo personalizzato!



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Media (4-6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Musica Rock, Pop, Dance Italiana e straniera dagli anni '70 ad oggi.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Nessun problema.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Esperienza decennale nel settore, garanzia di successo per la vostra festa!



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, tutta Italia.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, da definire.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Restiamo a disposizione per tutta la festa.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Almeno due ore.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Che altri tipi di servizio offri?</summary>Musica agli aperitivi con set in acustico, dopofesta.</details>

dj-alps-europe-chris.intro_html: DJ Chris — an exquisite scratch DJ and turntablist based in the French Alps, offering a refined, bespoke musical experience for the most discerning clientele. Impeccably attuned to the atmosphere, he curates every set with precision, ensuring a seamless, captivating journey that keeps the dance floor alive throughout the evening.
dj-alps-europe-chris.description_html:
With a distinguished background rooted in Jungle and Drum ’n’ Bass, DJ Chris has been commanding clubs, raves, and private celebrations across the United Kingdom since 2004. His artistry spans an impeccable repertoire of party Hip Hop, UK House, Breaks, and Drum and Bass, later expanding into an eclectic fusion of funk, soul, disco, house, and pop. Every performance is a bespoke composition, tailored to the unique vision of each celebration.

For over a decade, DJ Chris has held an esteemed residency at the legendary Loop Bar in Tignes, while also energising exclusive student gatherings for Outgoing, Off The Piste, and NUCO. His reputation for transforming any venue into an unforgettable experience has led him to be regularly booked at some of France’s most prestigious estates, including Château Lagorce in Gironde, Château de la Gaude in Aix-en-Provence, and Hôtel Château de La Côte in Biras. He also tours the Alps each winter, captivating audiences at après-ski lounges and late-night haunts with his impeccably curated soundscapes.

DJ Chris has shared the stage with an extraordinary roster of international icons: Rudimental, The Scratch Perverts, MC Akil of Jurassic 5, Shy FX, The Nextmen, Featurecast, Mystro, DJ JFB (DMC Champion), Skitz, PRofit, the beatbox collective Duke (X Factor UK finalists), London ska/hip hop ensemble Lazy Habits, The ASBO DISCO, Krafty Kuts, DJ Yoda, A-Skillz, Dr Syntax & Pete Cannon, DJ Woody (two-time DMC Champion), Ed Solo, and Low Steppa — to name but a few. These collaborations underscore his standing among the most sought-after talents in the industry.

His global residencies include prestigious events such as The British Ski & Snowboard Championships, Corona New Zealand, and Bass Station Europe, further testament to his unparalleled versatility and refined artistry.

The following distinguished venues have hosted DJ Chris for weddings and private events:

wedding-band-rome-italy-sonics.intro_html:
The Sonics – An Exquisite Musical Ensemble for Rome’s Most Refined Celebrations

What discerning clients cherish most: exceptional musicianship, breathtaking vocals, an impeccably curated repertoire, and an ability to keep every guest enchanted throughout the evening.

The Sonics represent a peerless choice for those seeking a wedding band of the highest calibre, based in Rome and available for exclusive events throughout Italy.

Delivering electrifying performances with a polished, high-energy presence, this ensemble of consummate professionals adapts its programme with effortless sophistication to suit any occasion—from intimate nuptials and lavish receptions to distinguished corporate galas.

Renowned for their vast and versatile repertoire, The Sonics masterfully engage audiences of every generation, transforming each celebration into an unforgettable experience. Their sound—a seamless fusion of acoustic elegance, pop refinement, soulful classics, and rock anthems—includes celebrated artists such as Rihanna, Ed Sheeran, Elvis, Lady Gaga, ABBA, and Nirvana, alongside the most current hits, ensuring every moment is perfectly accompanied.

The ensemble is fronted by a magnificent female vocalist and can be complemented by additional musicians, including a live DJ, guaranteeing impeccable sound quality that inspires guests to dance until the final note.

Available in a range of bespoke line-ups—from an intimate duo to a full band of up to six members—The Sonics tailor their formation to your event’s unique requirements. Clients are invited to select their favourite pieces from the band’s curated set list, and may request up to five songs to be omitted. The band then crafts a personalised programme, referencing the chosen selections in style and arrangement. (Please note that the final set list on the evening remains at the discretion of the musical director.)

New for 2024: The Sonics now offer an exclusive Live Band Karaoke Experience—a captivating interactive show where you and your guests take the stage alongside a seasoned live band. This luxurious bandeoke offering, among the first of its kind in Italy, includes:

  • 4 musicians
  • One host
  • Professional microphone
  • Dedicated lyrics screen
  • Over 200 song titles to choose

The Sonics are an elegant pop and rock wedding band with sublime female vocals, perfectly suited for company parties, conventions, business events, weddings, birthdays, surprise celebrations, private soirées, promotions, and galas.

They are regularly booked to perform at Italy’s most prestigious venues, including Belmond Grand Hotel Timeo in Sicily, Sheraton Parco De’ Medici Hotel in Rome, Villa Di Ulignano Di Massimo Cristaldi in Pisa, and Borgo di Tragliata in Fiumicino. Their presence has also been celebrated on the award-winning wedding planning blog Style Me Pretty, most notably for an ethereal destination wedding that checks all the boxes of refined Italian romance.

Standard performances are structured with timeless grace: one hour of exquisite cocktail reception music followed by two hours of uninterrupted after-dinner revelry. For those desiring an extended celebration, options include:

  • Inserting brief intermissions with a curated pre-recorded playlist
  • An additional live set (please enquire for the bespoke rate per hour)
  • A DJ set following the live performance

wedding-band-rome-italy-sonics.faq_html:
<details><summary>Qual è il prezzo del tuo servizio?</summary>A partire da 1500€.



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Live set acustico per ricevimento/cerimonia/aperitivo, live set dance/rock/party, DJ set (opzionale), possibilità di richiedere e scegliere brani preferiti da ascoltare e/o ballare.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Prima possibile!



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Solista, piccola (2-3 musicisti), media (4-6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Da acoustic al party/rock, dal soul all' easy listening alla dance, da Elvis a Lady Gaga, dagli Abba ai Nirvana, da Gianni Morandi ai Subsonica in continuo aggiornamento.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>No problem, è possibile scegliere brani da inserire nel setlist.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>La band è attiva da 7 anni, composta da musicisti professionisti, con lunga esperienza anche con artisti di fama nazionale!



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, ovunque!



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, da concordare in base alla destinazione...etc...



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Secondo richiesta.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Il minimo indispensabile, cambia in base alle richieste del cliente, alla location, etc.



</details><details><summary>2izzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

italian-riviera-swing-band.intro_html:
The Italian Riviera Swing Band – an exquisite swing and jazz ensemble based in Genoa, Italy, offering impeccably refined performances for the most discerning clientele.

Clients consistently praise this ensemble for its elegant jazz and swing repertoire, stunning female vocals, flexible line-ups, bespoke setlists, and polished performances — the epitome of luxury wedding entertainment in Italy.

Composed of five of Italy’s most accomplished pop and jazz artists, this ensemble presents a curated set list of reimagined arrangements — blending beloved Italian classics, timeless international standards, and contemporary hits.

The band is regularly engaged for weddings and events at the most exclusive venues, including Velaa Private Island in the Maldives, Splendido Belmond Hotel in Portofino, and Borgo Santo Pietro in Tuscany, Italy.

Their sound is a refined balance of vintage glamour and contemporary jazz, captivating audiences with uplifting rhythms and mesmerising vocals.

This ensemble performs regularly for an international clientele at destination weddings throughout Italy and at corporate events worldwide.

The lead singer performs songs in English, Italian, French, Spanish, Portuguese and German.

Thanks to its impeccable sound and refined aesthetic, the band has recently performed for Bvlgari in Amman, Jordan, and counts Versace, Trussardi, Porsche, and Axpo among its esteemed past clients.

Here are just some of the locations where the band has been booked for weddings and events:

  • Velaa Private Island, Maldives
  • Borgo Santo Pietro, Florence
  • La Foce, Siena, Italy
  • Splendido Belmond Hotel, Portofino
  • Castello di Rosciano, Perugia
  • Borgo Stomennano, Siena
  • Byblos Art Hotel Villa Amistà
  • Villa Mangiacane, Florence
  • Villa Necchi Campiglio, Milan
  • Dimora Ghirlandaio, Florence
  • Castello di Montignano, Perugia
  • Du Lac et Du Parc Grand Resort
  • Rome, Italy
  • Petrognano, Italy
  • Poggi del Sasso, Grosseto, Italy
  • Villa Durazzo, Genoa
  • Monaco
  • Santa Margherita Ligure
  • Misano Adriatico, Rimini, Italy

With their exceptional expertise, these musicians offer outstanding live music tailored to the ambience of any occasion. Whether providing refined background music for cocktails and receptions, setting an elegant tone for classy dinners, or enlivening the dance floor with vintage swing before transitioning to up-tempo contemporary hits — every moment is curated to maintain a sophisticated atmosphere.

Led by a charismatic female vocalist reminiscent of old-world divas, this band is an indispensable choice for luxurious, chic events.

A selection of our esteemed clientele includes: Bulgari (Amman, Jordan), Huawei (Rome), Trussardi (Turin), Versace (Kiev, Ukraine), Porsche (Florence), Axpo (Switzerland), and AgustaWestland (Lake Maggiore).

Among the distinguished venues where we have performed are Hotel De Paris (Monte Carlo), Belmond Splendido (Portofino), Casina Valadier (Rome), Chateaux Diter (Le Grasse, France), Four Seasons (Florence), Hotel Royal Evian (Switzerland), Villa d’Este (Lake Como), Villa San Giacomo (Positano), Oasi Olympia (Sorrento), and Kempinski Palace San Clemente (Venice).

Ensemble

The full ensemble comprises female vocals, piano, saxophone, double bass, and drums. Additionally, the band is available in duo, trio, or quartet configurations — with or without vocals.

Extra services

  • Option to include a percussionist
  • Option to include a male vocalist

Advised for

  • Luxury weddings
  • Corporate events
  • Gala dinners
  • Yacht parties
  • Luxury cruises
  • Luxury hotel entertainment

florence-jazz-band-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
The Florence Jazz Band – an exquisite ensemble available for hire at weddings and events in Tuscany, throughout Italy, and across Europe.

Clients praise the band for its beautiful vocals, elegant atmosphere, impeccable professionalism, and the magical ambience they create – guests are captivated.

The Florence Jazz Band presents a refined repertoire of masterpieces from American vocal music, spanning jazz and swing. Their curated selections include beloved recordings by Ella Fitzgerald, Billie Holiday, the blues of Nat King Cole, Ray Charles, and Etta James, as well as lesser‑known gems from the great jazz and swing masters of the early 20th century.

This bespoke ensemble regularly performs at prestigious venues such as the Caruso Belmond Hotel on the Amalfi Coast, Villa il Pozzo Winery & Resort in Certaldo, and Borgo Di Castelvecchio in Siena.


In particular, the band has devoted itself to rediscovering and revitalising those songs by these artists that, inexplicably, have remained hidden from the public yet possess immense artistic and musical value.

The ensemble performs as a quartet of voice, clarinet, bass, and classical guitar – a refined combination that evokes the rhythms, sounds, and atmosphere of the golden age of American jazz.

In Italiano

Il Florence Jazz Band propone un repertorio basato su alcuni capolavori della musica vocale americana in stile jazz e swing.

La band interpreta brani celebri di Ella Fitzgerald, Billie Holiday, i grandi blues di Nat King Cole, Ray Charles, Etta James, ed i brani più sconosciuti dei grandi protagonisti del Jazz e dello Swing dei primi anni del Secolo del Jazz.

In particolar modo la band ha voluto riscoprire e rivalorizzare brani dei suddetti autori, rimasti inspiegabilmente celati al grande pubblico ma di grande valore artistico-musicale.

Un quartetto composto da voce, clarinetto, contrabbasso e chitarra classica. Musica e ricerca sono i filoni conduttori del progetto che mira a ritrovare il ritmo, il sound e l'atmosfera degli anni 20, 30 e 40 del Novecento americano in un largo spettro culturale che spazia dalla storia della Musica, dell'arte, della moda alla pratica delle stesse.

prodigal-duo-wedding-band-italy.intro_html:
The Prodigal Duo: An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble from Tuscany, Italy

What discerning clients cherish most: impeccable live vocals and masterful guitar work, dance floors brimming with effortless elegance, and seamless, personalized communication—including bespoke first dance arrangements.

Comprising two virtuoso vocalists and guitarists, The Prodigal Duo brings a legacy of thousands of performances across the most exclusive venues in Italy and Europe.

Discover the refined world of wedding bands in Tuscany.
prodigal-duo-wedding-band-italy.description_html:
It is a rare distinction to encounter a duo of such extraordinary caliber—two exceptional singers and guitarists whose artistry defines The Prodigal Duo.

With a meticulously curated repertoire spanning genres and eras, the ensemble is in demand for the most sophisticated celebrations, from opulent weddings and corporate galas to intimate private soirees.

The duo frequently expands into a sublime "Tuscan Trio" by incorporating a celebrated saxophonist, creating an even more opulent soundscape perfect for high-end wedding entertainment.

They are regularly engaged to perform at Tuscany's most prestigious estates, including Borgo Corsignano in Arezzo, La Pescaia Resort in Grosseto, and Villa Cora in Florence.

Through decades of accumulated mastery, The Prodigal Duo also possesses the versatility to collaborate with other esteemed Tuscan musicians upon request, ensuring a fully bespoke musical experience.

The ensemble seamlessly orchestrates every facet of a wedding's musical journey—from refined background instrumentals during aperitifs to captivating live performances throughout luncheon and dinner, culminating in an irresistible invitation to the dance floor.

For over twenty years, The Prodigal Duo has been enchanting couples from Italy and across the globe, those who have chosen this enchanting land as the backdrop for their union.

Their artistry is remarkably versatile, effortlessly adapting to the unique ambiance of each event.

The duo's extensive musical library traverses nearly a century of history, featuring beloved standards from the 1930s through today. Their dance repertoire is especially rich, highlighting the exuberance of the 50s, 60s, and 70s, alongside Latin American rhythms, rhythm and blues, soul, and rock 'n' roll. In total, their repertoire boasts over 500 songs, performed acoustically or enhanced by tasteful backing tracks.

Reflecting their deep roots in Italian heritage, their collection also includes timeless pieces from the Italian tradition, such as Neapolitan classics. For an utterly personalized touch, the couple may request a specific song to be performed, even if it lies outside the standard repertoire.

Beyond live performance, The Prodigal Duo offers a refined DJ service to seamlessly extend the celebration, and can even provide karaoke for a touch of playful luxury.

An Illustrious Portfolio of Venues

The Prodigal Duo has had the distinct honor of performing at an array of the most sought-after destinations in Italy, including:

vocal-bow-violinist-singer-florence-ital.intro_html:
Vocal Bow – An Exquisite Fusion of Velvet Vocals and Refined Strings, Based in Florence, Italy

👏 What discerning clients cherish most about Vocal Bow: Impeccable live vocals and strings, an optional DJ with saxophone, a seamless transition from ceremony to celebration, bespoke playlists, flawless communication, and a polished, sophisticated presence.

Vocal Bow, a captivating vocalist and violinist from Florence, Italy, enchants audiences with her curated blend of vocal elegance and instrumental mastery.

Her musical odyssey began in her earliest years, performing at intimate local clubs where she first discovered her profound passion for music. At sixteen, she enriched her artistry by embracing the viola—a decision that heralded the dawn of her professional ascent. Today, she stands as a highly sought-after presence within Italy’s refined wedding scene, renowned for crafting exquisite atmospheres at luxury events and destination celebrations.

She is consistently engaged to perform at distinguished venues such as Borgo di Pietrafitta Relais in Siena and Ganci Farm in Savona, Italy.

Her academic journey culminated in a master’s degree in viola, a testament to her rigorous dedication. Over the years, Vocal Bow has graced an array of prestigious events and venues across Italy, earning acclaim for her appearances on national television and collaborations with celebrated Italian artists. Since 2020, she has devoted her talents exclusively to private parties and weddings, imbuing each occasion with her unique artistry and personal touch.

She now collaborates with a handpicked ensemble of exceptional musicians and DJs.

Curated Line-Up Offerings:

  • Singing Violinist
  • String Quartet
  • Singing Violinist & Singing Pianist
  • DJ & Strings
  • DJ Live with Saxophone, Violin, Voice, Percussion, and More

wedding-party-band-florence-traffic-ligh.intro_html:
Traffic Lights – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble Based in Florence, Italy

✨ What discerning clients treasure most about Traffic Lights: an impeccably high-energy ensemble, dance floors perpetually filled, sublime vocals and musicianship, an expansive and curated repertoire, the ability to learn bespoke requests, a seamless and refined professionalism, and guests utterly captivated.

Traffic Lights is a superlative live band, meticulously curated for weddings, corporate galas, exclusive parties, and private functions.

The ensemble comprises a captivating female vocalist, guitar, bass, and drums, delivering electrifying live performances of funk, soul, hip hop, rock, and pop classics—each set a masterclass in energy and sophistication.

Their performances are dynamic, exuberant, and infused with an infectious zeal, with the repertoire continuously refreshed to present only the most refined and current material.

The band has devoted considerable artistry to honing their show, weaving a vast spectrum of musical genres and styles to cater to every refined taste, balancing light and shadow throughout their performance—ensuring the dance floor remains an impeccable, vibrant centrepiece.

Traffic Lights is frequently engaged for prestigious celebrations at The Lazy Olive Villa in Siena, Villa Pianciani in Spoleto, and Borgo Sant’Ambrogio in Pienza, Italy.

Happy to travel, the ensemble is based in Florence and performs with equal grace across Italy and Europe. Fluent in English, they are the quintessential choice for couples planning a destination wedding or an exalted celebration.

They offer a refinedly adaptable line-up of four to seven musicians (vocals, guitar, keyboards, bass, saxophone, trumpet, and drums)—a uniquely bespoke configuration perfectly suited to any event requiring sublime live music for dancing.

Their sound and stage presentation are tailored to suit any venue, and their stylistic range is vast—as evidenced by the curated setlist.

Traffic Lights’ repertoire draws from both modern and timeless influences: contemporary icons like Beyoncé, Lauryn Hill, and Amy Winehouse; funk standards of James Brown and Stevie Wonder; the Motown elegance of Dusty Springfield, Etta James, and The Supremes; modern classics from Kings of Leon and The Killers; and the legendary rock of Deep Purple, Janis Joplin, and Ike & Tina Turner.

Should you wish to engage one of Italy’s most distinguished wedding and celebration bands, look no further than Traffic Lights—a truly impeccable choice.

wedding-dj-florence-italy-zano.intro_html:
DJ Zano – An Exquisite Wedding DJ, Curated for Discerning Couples in Florence, Italy

Impeccable communication, boundless energy, bespoke musical selections, a dance floor perpetually alive, and a flawless balance of professionalism and flexibility—these are the hallmarks of DJ Zano, as celebrated by his clientele.

Based in Florence, DJ Zano is a refined entertainer whose dynamic and vibrant sets are delivered with charisma and unerring professionalism. With well over a decade of experience traversing the globe, he offers an eclectic, meticulously curated sonic journey tailored to your every desire.

For those seeking one of the most distinguished wedding DJs Florence (Italy) has to offer, an enquiry with Zano is an invitation to unparalleled elegance.

Zano is a devoted mentor to emerging DJ talent in his region, fostering the next generation of artistry.

His work has been regularly featured on the award‑winning wedding planning blog Wed Vibes, including the feature “A Romantic Dream Wedding at a Tuscan Villa.”

He curates a select ensemble of fellow DJs who can also be reserved for weddings and celebrations throughout Italy: Belmo, Stefo, Leon, Charlie, Jack, and Sasha.

His artistry is frequently commissioned for events at the exquisite Castello Monaci in Lecce, the storied Villa Aurelia in Rome, and the enchanting Agriturismo Terre di Nano in Siena, Italy.

Zano regularly collaborates with Italy‑based Toni On Sax, presenting the sought‑after Ibiza‑style DJ & live saxophone duo—perfect for an exuberant party atmosphere or a serene chillout set. An equally captivating combination is his DJ and trumpet pairing, available for hire at weddings across Italy.

Widely renowned throughout Italy, Zano has performed at iconic venues and held residencies at some of the country’s most celebrated clubs and cruises.

His repertoire is exquisitely varied, spanning from deep house to 70s disco, seamlessly weaving old and new into a performance that is both exhilarating and distinctively personal.

Performing professionally since 2002, Zano has acquired an abundance of experience in both private and public occasions, adapting every element of his craft to your unique vision.

He also enhances his offerings by collaborating with other entertainers—LED drummers, saxophonists, trumpet players, and more—creating a richly layered experience.

He is a regular presence at Casa Cornacchi in Bucine, Tuscany, Italy.

Should the refined sound of DJ Zano resonate with your aspirations, do not hesitate to make contact.

Their extensive and bespoke setlist includes iconic pieces by Stevie Wonder, Elvis Presley, and Wham, ensuring every guest is captivated. wedding-party-band-rome-italy-cosmic.intro_html:
Cosmic – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Band, Based in Rome, Italy

Cosmic embodies a refined fusion of style, groove, and effortless energy. A distinctly modern ensemble, this curated group specialises in bespoke entertainment, tailored impeccably to every occasion. Their formation adapts with grace, offering a choice of instruments alongside both female and male vocalists, ensuring an experience that is as flexible as it is exclusive. With a repertoire of unparalleled breadth—featuring beloved classics and timeless hits—Cosmic crafts the perfect sonic atmosphere for your most treasured celebration.

The band is regularly engaged for weddings and events at the most prestigious Italian venues: Villa Eva in Ravello, Villa La Foce in Tuscany, and Villa Pliniana on Lake Como.

The ensemble comprises five instrumental pillars—guitar, bass, drums, keyboards, and saxophone—interwoven with the acclaimed voices of its singers. Drawing inspiration from soul, funk, disco, and pop, Cosmic offers a musical journey across eras and genres, ensuring every guest finds their moment on the dance floor. As one of Italy’s most sought-after wedding bands, the group brings vibrant energy and first‑class musicianship to every performance. Based in the capital, they travel with ease across Italy and Europe for weddings, private parties, and corporate events.

Here are just a few of the distinguished locations where Cosmic has performed:

  • Villa Pliniana, Lake Como
  • Villa Eva, Ravello, Italy
  • Villa Corsini a Mezzomonte
  • La Badia di Orvieto, Italy

Should you wish to secure one of Italy’s most accomplished wedding and party bands, we invite you to make an enquiry with Cosmic today.

jazz-band-forli-italy-blue-note-four.intro_html:
Blue Note Four – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Forlì Cesena, Italy

What discerning clients most cherish about Blue Note Four: an impeccably elegant jazz progression to effervescent rhythms, stunning vocals, a curated atmosphere, seamless professionalism, refined flexibility, and unwavering responsiveness.

Blue Note Four presents a bespoke fusion of luminous, fresh vocals with the resonant warmth of a semi-acoustic guitar, the profound depth of the double bass, and the artistry of percussion. You are invited on an exclusive journey through the most beautiful jazz compositions—from beloved classics to rare gems, weaving swing, Latin, soul, and swing anew—ensuring an evening of impeccable musical refinement.

Annalisa, an extraordinary vocalist from Forlì, leads the ensemble. At the age of twenty, she triumphed in Forlì’s “Giovani Note” competition and has since performed with distinction throughout Emilia Romagna.

The band is regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive events at Villa Orlando on Lake Massaciuccoli in Tuscany, Castello di Vicarello in Grosseto, and Borgo Stomennano in Siena, Italy.

In April 2023, Blue Note Four graced the Festival “Le Cantaisse,” curated by Michele Minisci, former director of Forlì’s “Naima.”

The ensemble performs as a Duo, Trio, or Quartet, beginning with voice and guitar and expanding bespokely to fulfil each client’s vision—making them one of the most sought-after wedding bands in Italy.

Guitarist Nahuel, an Italian-Argentine born in 1989, has performed as a soloist at the Artusi Jazz Festival, the Tenerife Blues Festival, and other distinguished events. Enrico on double bass and Manuel on drums complete the quartet; every member has performed both in Italy and internationally alongside celebrated artists from around the world.

The band has been engaged for weddings and events at an exquisite selection of venues, including:

  • Villa Orlando, Lake Massaciuccoli
  • Castello di Vicarello, Grosseto
  • Borgo Stomennano, Siena
  • Villa Barberino, Arezzo

dj-italy-danilo.intro_html:
DJ Danilo Conti – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Based in Puglia, Italy

Clients praise DJ Danilo for his impeccable organisation, intuitive ability to read the room, high-energy ambience, bespoke playlists, and unwavering professionalism. He ensures the dance floor remains vibrant from the first note to the final encore.

DJ Danilo is a charismatic wedding DJ whose eclectic artistry weaves refined mixes spanning decades and genres—from disco and pop to R&B and hip hop. With twenty years of distinguished experience, he performs with effortless confidence in any setting, his sole priority being the creation of unforgettable moments of joy.

Renowned for his charm and showmanship, DJ Danilo delivers a premium music entertainment service defined by meticulously curated tracks and seamless transitions. His presence elevates any occasion, blending sophistication with an irresistible energy that keeps guests captivated.

A consummate professional, his years of mastery afford him the skill to orchestrate a performance unlike any other. He regularly performs at exclusive venues such as Borgo Stomennano in Siena, Masseria San Giovanni in Fasano, and Castello Marchione in Conversano.

Based in Puglia, DJ Danilo travels extensively to grace weddings, private celebrations, and corporate events throughout the region and across Italy. He crafts highly addictive musical atmospheres while preserving an elegant, refined tone. His tailor-made service ensures a truly unique and bespoke experience.

For weddings, DJ Danilo artfully unites traditional romantic elements with the vibrancy of a modern club ambiance, creating something exquisitely original. He currently serves as art director and resident DJ at two of Puglia’s most prestigious clubs—The Glam ‘House in Bisceglie and The Twins RistoShow in Canosa di Puglia—where his world-class sets are showcased.

Upon request, he can provide a full sound and light setup for an even more immersive experience.

Here are just some of the distinguished locations where DJ Danilo has been booked for weddings and events:

The Tuscany Rock Band – an exquisite ensemble for weddings and celebrations, based in Tuscany, Italy

What the most discerning clientele admire: Energetic live performances, dance floors filled with effortless grace, bespoke song requests, an interactive and joyous atmosphere, impeccable musicianship, professional and reliable coordination, seamless organisation, and the highest recommendation.

The Tuscany Rock Band is a curated collective of supremely talented musicians, devoted to delivering refined entertainment for occasions of every kind. Based in the heart of Tuscany, the ensemble travels with ease, performing regularly across Italy and beyond.

Their eclectic repertoire, spanning eras and genres with exquisite taste, ensures an evening of unforgettable allure for every guest.

They are frequently engaged for weddings and events at Castello di Petrata in Perugia, Antico Borgo la Torre in Florence, and Villa Aura on Lake Como, among other distinguished venues.

acoustic-duo-perugia-bellissimo.intro_html: Bellissimo Duo — an impeccably refined acoustic duo based in Perugia, Italy, comprising two exceptionally gifted vocalists whose artistry has been honed over many years of distinguished industry experience.
acoustic-duo-perugia-bellissimo.description_html:
This curated, unplugged ensemble delivers a performance of exquisite sophistication for your most discerning events. Their vast and meticulously selected repertoire spans multiple eras and genres, ensuring a seamless and bespoke musical journey. The duo travels with effortless grace and regularly performs at weddings, private soirées, and corporate gatherings throughout Italy.

Bellissimo Duo is frequently engaged for exclusive celebrations at the Belmond Hotel Caruso on the Amalfi Coast, Marula Bagno Golfo in Grosseto, and the Dievole Wine Resort in Castelnuovo Berardenga, Italy. We invite you to explore our 2026 Set List.

Fluent in Italian, English, and Spanish, this extraordinary duo draws from a multilingual catalogue of timeless international classics—featuring the works of Stevie Wonder, Ed Sheeran, Bruno Mars, Michael Jackson, Christina Aguilera, Coldplay, and beyond. While Bellissimo Duo performs primarily as an acoustic duo, additional musicians may be engaged upon request to create a more rhythmically vibrant and vivacious atmosphere. The ensemble brings its own impeccably professional equipment, perfectly suited to the refined setting of a wedding.

In Italiano

Bellissimo Duo è un duo composto da chitarra e voce maschile più voce femminile. Questi due giovani musicisti, con molti anni di esperienza e una fiorente carriera nel mondo della musica, renderanno il vostro matrimonio un evento armonioso e di altissima qualità, proponendo musica completamente dal vivo e spaziando con gusto attraverso svariati generi dagli anni ’80 a oggi. Il duo si cimenta su brani appartenenti ai più grandi artisti internazionali: Stevie Wonder, Ed Sheeran, Bruno Mars, Michael Jackson, Christina Aguilera, Coldplay e altri. Bellissimo Duo si esibisce generalmente in duo ma, su richiesta, è possibile aggiungere uno o più musicisti per creare un’atmosfera più ritmica e movimentata. La band dispone di attrezzatura propria, altamente professionale e ideale per matrimoni.

folk-wedding-band-italy-hopeless-wandere.intro_html:
The Hopeless Wanderers — An Exquisite Folk Wedding Band, Based in Padua, Italy

What discerning clients most cherish about The Hopeless Wanderers: an electrifying folk ensemble that fills dance floors, engages guests with effortless charm, and delivers impeccable professionalism, flexibility, and reliability. Highly recommended for those who seek nothing less than the finest.

Widely regarded as Italy’s preeminent Mumford and Sons-inspired ensemble, The Hopeless Wanderers is a meticulously curated quartet devoted to transforming the finest international pop and rock anthems into bespoke folk arrangements — a refined synthesis of tradition and modernity.

The ensemble comprises Federico (lead voice and percussion), Andrea (backing vocals, accordion, guitar, ukulele), Luca (backing vocals, guitar, mandolin, banjo, and foot percussion), and Carlo (bass guitar).

Founded in 2012, The Hopeless Wanderers immediately captivated a sophisticated audience spanning every generation, background, and musical preference.

Please note that trumpet and trombone are not included in the band’s standard configuration.

The quartet is regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at celebrated destinations such as Castello di Modanella in Siena and Masseria Grieco in Ostuni, Italy.

To date, they have performed at more than 200 concerts and events throughout Italy.

Their musical repertoire features an impeccably selected array of artists: The Beatles, Tears for Fears, Dead or Alive, The Cure, Michael Jackson, Talking Heads, David Bowie, Mumford and Sons, The Lumineers, Brooke Fraser, Avicii, and George Ezra. While these artists span vastly different genres, the band weaves them into a seamless tapestry of sound and style — a union that is utterly singular. The Hopeless Wanderers remain entirely unique in Italy; no other ensemble offers this refined, banjo-infused folk-pop experience.

The band currently presents the following Mumford and Sons compositions:

  • Little Lion Man
  • Awake My Soul
  • I Will Wait
  • Hopeless Wanderers
  • Winter Winds
  • The Banjolin Song
  • The Cave
  • Babel
  • Forever

For extraordinary occasions, the quartet is elevated by the addition of trumpet and trombone.

Their captivating energy remains their most defining attribute.

If your vision demands the most refined indie, rock, folk, and Mumford and Sons-inspired wedding band that Italy can offer, an introduction to The Hopeless Wanderers is in order.

Below are just a few of the exquisite venues where we have been commissioned for weddings and events:

  • Conti di San Bonifacio Resort
  • Rosewood Castiglion del Bosco
  • Antica Dimora Del Turco
  • Tenuta Pinto, Mola di Bari, Italy
  • Castello di Modanella, Siena

  • Castello di Gargonza, Arezzo

  • Masseria Grieco, Ostuni
  • Casa Marziago
  • Famiglia Olivini, Lake Garda

  • Malcesine, Italy

In Italiano

Una voce, un mandolino, una fisarmonica e due percussioni a pedale. I migliori brani della musica rivisitati e proposti con un'insolita veste.

Il quartetto The Hopeless Wanderers rivisita i migliori brani del pop e del rock internazionale e li ripropone in chiave folk mescolando tradizione e contemporaneità.

La formazione è composta da: Federico (voce), Luca (chitarra/mandolino/percussioni a pedale/cori), Andrea (fisarmonica/chitarra/percussioni/cori) e Carlo (basso).

Nascono nel 2012 e iniziano fin da subito a raccogliere larghi consensi tra il pubblico.

Tra le loro influenze: The Beatles, Bob Dylan, Tears for Fears, The Cure, Michael Jackson, Talking Heads, REM, Mumford and Sons, The Lumineers, Brooke Fraser — artisti molto diversi che i Hopeless Wanderers, tuttavia, sanno unire efficacemente con il loro inconfondibile sound.

The Hopeless Wanderers, con la loro coinvolgente e travolgente energia, renderanno l'atmosfera del vostro ricevimento nuziale fervida di emozioni e magia, contraddistinta da un mix di competenza e professionalità che farà della vostra festa un giorno indimenticabile.

The Hopeless Wanderers è un quartetto formato da 3 voci, un mandolino, una fisarmonica, un basso e due percussioni a pedale.

Formatosi nel 2012, ha iniziato fin da subito a raccogliere larghi consensi tra il pubblico di qualsiasi età, provenienza e gusto musicale, collezionando più di 150 concerti in tutto il Veneto e due tour in Sardegna.

Il loro inconfondibile sound vi offrirà un servizio eccelso, costituito da ottima musica e dalla garanzia di una prestazione che coinvolgerà indistintamente tutti i vostri ospiti.

La band seguirà il vostro ricevimento nuziale con la massima cautela e professionalità, a partire dal momento del vostro ingresso alla location, proponendovi per ciascuna fase una colonna sonora capace di enfatizzare lo scenario e trasformarlo in un'occasione unica e indimenticabile.

Potrete concordare con la band quali brani desiderate includere nella scaletta musicale del vostro ricevimento, attingendo a un vasto repertorio di canzoni internazionali rivisitate in chiave folk con l'ausilio del mandolino, della fisarmonica, del basso e della voce.

<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Esecuzione musicale dal vivo per festa (circa 2 ore) ed eventualmente aperitivo con brani più rilassanti.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Anticipo almeno di un mese.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Media (4-6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>The Beatles, Tears for Fears, Dead or Alive, The Cure, Michael Jackson, Talking Heads, David Bowie, Mumford and Sons, The Lumineers, Brooke Fraser, Avicii, George Ezra.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Si accettano solo un paio di richieste.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>3 anni di concerti in tutto il nord Italia. Più di 180 concerti tra feste private, matrimoni, feste in piazza e pub. 3 tour in Sardegna (costa smeralda) 1 apparizione televisiva presso TVA Vicenza.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>Sì, presa corrente con almeno 1,5KW e copertura in caso di pioggia.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, in tutta Italia.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, da valutare in base alla distanza.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>1 ora Aperitivo, 2 ore festa serale/pomeridiana.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>1 ora e 30 minuti.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

The Florence Acoustic Duo – an exquisite acoustic duo based in the heart of Florence, Italy.

Refined vocals, an impeccably relaxed elegance, and a curated repertoire that transforms every ceremony and celebration into an intimate, emotional masterpiece. Clients consistently praise the duo’s seamless adaptability, their swift responsiveness, and their bespoke approach to custom song requests. Every performance is a study in understated luxury.

The Florence Acoustic Duo comprises two exceptionally talented musicians, each with years of distinguished industry experience. Together they craft bespoke performances that journey through eras and genres, ensuring every event unfolds with flawless grace. Their straightforward, refined setup allows them to perform anywhere, at any time—from grand ballrooms to the most secluded Tuscan villas.

The Fireflies — An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Rome

What discerning clients treasure most: impeccably professional and responsive service, bespoke playlists and refined special requests, a seamless flow from ceremony to celebration, electrifying energy and captivating vocals, dance floors filled with joy, and performances consistently lauded as the crowning jewel of the evening.

The Fireflies are a curated five-piece ensemble, uniting a selection of exceptional musicians who share an unwavering passion for crafting extraordinary music. The group comprises a dynamic female vocalist, a masterful guitarist, a versatile pianist, a gifted drummer, and the founding member—the ensemble's arranger and bassist.

Explore our 2026 Set List.

The Fireflies are regularly engaged to perform at weddings and exclusive events at Villa Cini in Arezzo, Casa Olivi in Macerata, and Borgo della Merluzza in Rome, Italy.

The bassist—who has collaborated with some of the most celebrated Italian and international pop artists—founded the band with a singular vision: to create an ensemble capable of delivering impeccable entertainment for weddings, soirées, and every special occasion.

Drawing upon their extensive musical pedigree and refined experience, the members have cultivated a repertoire that traverses genres and decades, ensuring each performance offers something truly captivating for every guest. Whether interpreting classic rock anthems, soulful ballads, or exuberant dance tracks, this Rome-based wedding and party band delivers music that is at once deeply engaging and effortlessly entertaining.
