With their electrifying performances and an unwavering commitment to ensuring every event is an unqualified success, The Fireflies have become an exquisite choice for couples seeking to elevate their wedding celebrations with unparalleled flair—or for anyone desiring a supremely talented live band to provide the soundtrack to their next gathering.

Below are the refined services offered for weddings throughout Italy:

Ceremony: your most cherished songs performed with piano and voice, or with cello (additional cost), with a microphone provided for speeches.

Aperitif: an intimate Lounge Set featuring a four-piece ensemble—voice, double bass, piano, and drums—presenting Italian and international classics reimagined in a jazz-inflected, bossa nova style.

Seated Lunch or Dinner: elegantly piped background music managed through a dedicated audio system, with a microphone for speeches included.

Cake Cutting & First Dance: your chosen songs, performed with exquisite precision.

The Party: a dynamic Dance Set with a four-piece band—voice, electric bass, keyboards, and drums—delivering contemporary hits and timeless classics live, without breaks, in the spirit of an uninterrupted DJ set.

After Party: an exclusive DJ Set (additional cost).

Saxophonist (additional cost).

The ensemble also provides the following curated equipment for each event:

Audio Service: Audio System PRO EVOX 5 1600w, Digital Mixer Behringer Air Xr16, 2 monitor RCF Art 708, microphone Shure, stands, cables, and more.

Light Service: 2 bar LED, 2 Par RGB LED, 1 ROTO Par RGB, 1 smoke machine.

Backline: Bass Amp GR BASS, drum kit YAMAHA, piano NORD STAGE, stands and cables.

Discover more at firefliesband.com.

italian-jazz-trio-wedding-band.intro_html:
The Italian Jazz Trio — an exquisite jazz and swing ensemble, based in the heart of Rome, Italy.

What discerning clients cherish most: impeccable professionalism, warm and refined communication, elegant Italian jazz, a romantic ambience, flexible lineup curation, guest-favourite performances, the perfect aperitivo accompaniment, and polished musicianship.

The Italian Jazz Trio unites masterful musicians dedicated to delivering a superlative musical experience. Performing instrumental renditions of classic Jazz standards and Bossa nova masterpieces, the trio curates the bespoke soundtrack for any occasion.

Renowned for their elegance, effortless class, and foot-tapping swing, these musicians weave an enchanting magic into every event. Please explore our 2026 SET LIST — a meticulously refined repertoire.

The ensemble is remarkably versatile, moving seamlessly from subtle, romantic background melodies to high-energy classic swing that ignites the celebration. They are frequently engaged for weddings and exclusive events at prestigious venues such as Hotel Villa Cipressi on Lake Como, The Atlanta Hotel in Rome, and Hotel Villa Olmi in Florence.

With over 350 weddings and corporate events to their name, The Italian Jazz Trio commands extraordinary experience, performing regularly across Italy and Europe. Their repertoire is an old-fashioned jazz treasure trove, featuring timeless songs made famous by Ella Fitzgerald, Frank Sinatra, Louis Armstrong, Billie Holiday, and Ray Charles. The song list spans from the 1930s through the great American Songbook classics of the 1940s and 50s. Each musician has graced some of Europe’s most prestigious venues, ensuring impeccable artistry for your wedding reception.

The trio may also be elevated with an outstanding female vocalist for an even more melodious experience, or expanded into a jazz quartet with the addition of a saxophone. For an exuberant, dancing evening after dinner, the group can perform as a four-piece band with a superb female singer, offering a curated journey through Jazz, Swing, Soul, Motown, Disco, Pop, and Dance.

Below are just a few of the exquisite Italian locations where The Italian Jazz Trio has been booked for weddings and events by discerning clientele:

somethings-wedding-band-florence-tuscany.intro_html:
The Somethings – an exquisite wedding band based in the heart of Florence, Tuscany.

The Somethings are highly sought after for weddings, corporate galas, and exclusive private soirées throughout Tuscany and across Italy.

Comprising five consummate musicians—virtuosos who are as courteous as they are impeccably presented—the ensemble brings a wealth of experience serving an international clientele, communicating with a fluent command of English.

Regularly booked to perform at such esteemed venues as Villa Eva in Ravello, Borgo Corsignano in Poppi, and Castello Vicchiomaggio in Florence, The Somethings deliver an unparalleled live music experience.

The Somethings is a refined ensemble of five musicians, with an additional saxophonist available upon request, covering a curated selection of the most celebrated international hits across pop, rock, blues, funk, and soul.

The band exudes the exhilarating energy of a live performance, led by captivating vocals.

The extensive repertoire is thoughtfully arranged to complement each moment of the reception:

  • Ceremony: The most refined option is a duo of vocals and acoustic guitar, performing soulful melodies.
  • Aperitivo: A sophisticated selection of jazz standards from The Great American Songbook, presented instrumentally—with vocal performances available upon request.
  • Dinner: To preserve an atmosphere of intimate conversation and serene dining, the band typically provides curated background music from a device; live performances during dinner can be arranged upon request.
  • Party: The moment when the band fully expresses its potential—an invitation to dance the night away.

Examples of artists covered (selected from the repertoire): Norah Jones, Prince, The Beatles, The Police, Aretha Franklin, Otis Redding, Adele, Bruno Mars, Alanis Morissette, The Fugees, Cyndi Lauper, Bill Withers, Mr. Big, Donna Summer, Anastacia, Stevie Wonder, Tracy Chapman, Tina Turner, Dusty Springfield, Diana Ross, Patti Labelle, Michael Jackson, Gloria Gaynor, James Brown, Sister Sledge, Thelma Houston, KT Tunstall, Nancy Sinatra, Amy Winehouse, The Blues Brothers.

Refined details

  • Bespoke first dance: the song can be arranged, but must be requested at least 60 days before the event.
  • Curated song requests: up to three songs can be requested, with advanced notice of at least 60 days.
  • Relocation of performance: if key moments of the reception take place in different locations, two separate sound systems may be required; this must be communicated in advance and will incur a supplementary fee.

The Somethings have recently performed at a 50th birthday celebration at Castello di Ugento in Puglia, as well as weddings at Villa Palagione, Zia Cathy's Country House, and Castello di Spessa.

Past engagements include an illustrious array of venues:

italy-party-band.intro_html:
The Italy Party Band — An Ensemble of Refined Musicianship Based in Rome

Comprising four distinguished professionals, The Italy Party Band curates an impeccably dynamic performance, conceived exclusively for weddings and the most sophisticated private celebrations. Their meticulously selected repertoire traverses decades of iconic music, from the effervescent dance covers of the 70s and 80s to refined pop aperitifs and spirited rock 'n' roll, seamlessly interwoven with beloved Italian and international classics.

Their artistry is a staple at Italy’s most prestigious estates, having been regularly engaged to perform at the exquisite Villa Eva in Ravello, the illustrious Villa Balbiano on Lake Como, and the enchanting Masseria San Nicola in Puglia.
italy-party-band.description_html:
Every performance is a bespoke journey, meticulously tailored to the unique atmosphere of your occasion. The expansive repertoire, a richly curated tapestry spanning up to six hours of continuous live music, traverses jazz, pop, dance, Italian melodies, international hits, swing, and rock 'n' roll. The ensemble is adept at accompanying every phase of your celebration, offering bespoke serenade services, refined ceremony music, an elegant reception, and a captivating DJ set.

Equipped with a state-of-the-art professional audio and lighting system, The Italy Party Band requires a space of at least six square meters to present their immersive performance. Drawing from years of experience entertaining at exclusive weddings, private clubs, and refined bars, they are also available to perform an intimate acoustic set, adding a touch of understated elegance to any setting.

Their refined sound has graced an array of Italy’s most distinguished venues, including:

  • Villa Eva, Salerno, Italy
  • Villa Balbiano, Como, Italy
  • Via del Pilastro, Bologna
  • Masseria San Nicola, Fasano
  • Villa Castelletto, Sinalunga
  • Villa Corsini a Mezzomonte
  • Restaurant Notedimare, Matera
  • Villa Porta Colmegna, Luino
  • Borgo Scopeto Wine Relais
  • Castello di Rocca Cilento
  • Badia a Coltibuono, Siena
  • Filottrano, Ancona, Marche
  • Rome, Lazio, Italy
  • Gargonza, Arezzo, Italy

For those discerning couples seeking the finest live music for their wedding day, The Italy Party Band offers an unparalleled auditory experience.

In Italiano

The Italy Party Band, un ensemble di sei musicisti professionisti, propone uno spettacolo musicale d'eccellenza, meticolosamente curato per matrimoni ed eventi privati di lusso. Il loro raffinato repertorio spazia attraverso generi senza tempo, dal jazz alla dance anni '70 e '80, dal pop alla musica italiana e internazionale, fino allo swing e al rock 'n' roll.

Ogni esibizione è un viaggio esclusivo, adattabile ai desideri più raffinati. Il vasto repertorio, in grado di coprire fino a sei ore di musica dal vivo, è un arazzo sonoro di eleganza e passione. La band offre servizi di serenata, cerimonia, ricevimento e DJ set, impreziositi da un impianto audio e luci professionale.

Grazie a una lunga esperienza nei più esclusivi matrimoni e locali italiani, l'ensemble è in grado di esibirsi anche in formazione semiacustica, regalando un'atmosfera intima e sofisticata.

italy-party-band.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Band composta da 6 elementi, per uno spettacolo suonato tutto dal vivo dall'aperitivo al party - Impianto audio e luci professionale. A seconda dell'accordo: Musica per cerimonia, serenata e DJ Set.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Il prima possibile, in quanto è importante per noi personalizzare e rendere unico ogni evento. In ogni caso puoi contattarci in qualsiasi momento per richiedere la nostra disponibilità.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Media (4-6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Il nostro repertorio conta oltre sei ore di musica dal vivo: Jazz, Pop, Dance, Musica Italiana, Internazionale, Swing e Rock 'n' Roll.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Accettiamo richieste, massimo 3 brani. Ma ci si può accordare di caso in caso senza problemi per personalizzare l'evento al meglio.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Abbiamo anni di esperienza in feste private e matrimoni con la musica LIVE.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, in tutto il territorio Italiano ed europeo.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, dipende dalla zona e dalle spese di viaggio.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Dipende dal tipo di spettacolo. Abbiamo un repertorio di circa sei ore. In genere proponiamo Jazz/Bossa per l'aperitivo e rock/dance per il PARTY, ma siamo aperti a qualsiasi proposta.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Abbiamo bisogno di circa un ora e mezza per il montaggio e circa 6mq di spazio.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

showmen-roaming-band-milan-italy.intro_html:
The Showmen – An Exquisite Roaming Ensemble, Based in Milan, Italy

We are The Showmen—a premier luxury roaming band, dedicated to curating exceptional and unforgettable entertainment experiences. Our performances are defined by their unique elegance and the captivating charm of authentic Italian style.

Our meticulously refined repertoire spans the timeless classics of Italian music alongside contemporary chart-toppers, ensuring a bespoke musical journey that resonates with guests of every generation.

Whether your vision calls for nostalgic Italian masterpieces or the latest hits that inspire spontaneous song, The Showmen deliver impeccably crafted live music for you and your esteemed guests. As a distinguished wedding band in Italy, we tailor our setlist to suit both intimate soirées and grand, lively celebrations. Join us for an extraordinary fusion of musical heritage and Italian sophistication, transforming every event into a truly special occasion.

principals-band-benevento-italy.intro_html:
About The Principals – an exquisite wedding & party ensemble based in Benevento, Campania, Italy

👏 What discerning clients cherish most about The Principals: an electrifying, high-energy performance; guests swept into song and dance; impeccably curated song selections; masterful crowd engagement; a seamless transition from refined cocktails to spirited celebration; an uninterrupted dance floor; professionalism and flexibility; unreservedly recommended

Be introduced to The Principals—a refined four-piece ensemble based in Benevento, Italy, celebrated for their vintage Italian sound, delivered with a captivating and impeccably entertaining style.

Specialising in weddings, parties, and exclusive private events, their versatile repertoire spans beloved Italian classics, international hits, and subtle touches of rumba and Neapolitan flair. They are regularly commissioned for bespoke celebrations at Villa Corsini a Mezzomonte in Florence and Cantina Masicei in Vibo Valentia, Italy.

Comprising a singer/guitarist, drummer, bassist, and electric guitar/violin virtuoso, The Principals craft a dynamic musical journey that moves effortlessly from setting a romantic ambience to igniting the dance floor. They offer an acoustic roaming performance to warmly welcome guests, as well as a live amplified set curated to inspire dancing during or after dinner. Background music is provided during interludes, and a microphone is available for speeches if desired during lunch or dinner.

Their repertoire is a charming fusion of international and classic Italian melodies that resonate with a global audience, with the option to include elegant jazzy instrumental pieces upon request. They can perform a roaming set throughout the entire dinner, if so desired. What distinguishes their roaming act is the use of compact, battery-powered amplifiers; they play a couple of pieces in one refined spot, then move to another, ensuring every guest receives a personal, intimate moment with the music. Roaming is a perfect choice for aperitifs when guests are mingling in a garden or on a terrace. For a dinner setting, however, a fixed concert format may be ideal—featuring music between courses and culminating in a spirited set that invites everyone to dance.

when-in-rome-luxury-showband-italy.intro_html:
When In Rome – An Exquisite Luxury Showband Based in Rome, Italy

When In Rome is a refined and impeccably energetic live band, based in Italy and conceived exclusively for destination weddings and international events that demand exceptional musical artistry.

Composed of seasoned, virtuosic musicians, the ensemble delivers a polished live performance that seamlessly merges elegance, character, and vibrant energy—an impeccable choice for couples curating their celebration in Italy.

Their repertoire is a meticulously curated selection of international pop, funk, soul, disco, and contemporary party favourites, each reimagined with fresh arrangements and delivered with commanding live presence.

The band is regularly engaged to perform at weddings and events at Villa Miani in Rome, Italy.
when-in-rome-luxury-showband-italy.description_html:
The result is a sophisticated and exhilarating musical journey that transitions effortlessly from serene, intimate moments to a dancefloor alive with celebration.

When In Rome is designed to accompany every stage of a wedding day with grace and bespoke flexibility.

From the emotional gravity of the ceremony to the refined ambience of the drinks reception, and onward to the electrifying evening party, the band crafts a seamless sonic narrative that mirrors the mood of each moment.

Their musicians possess extensive experience working with international couples and wedding planners, ensuring every performance feels natural, professional, and perfectly attuned to the occasion.

Based in Italy and a frequent presence at destination weddings, When In Rome is available nationwide—including Rome, Tuscany, the Amalfi Coast, Lake Como, Apulia, and many other breathtaking locales.

The core lineup features male and female vocals, complemented by saxophone, guitar, keyboard, bass, and drums, creating a dynamic and versatile sound that adapts effortlessly to every facet of the celebration.

From elegant acoustic sets to a full high-energy party band, the ensemble offers flexible musical solutions, allowing couples to entrust their entire wedding day to one cohesive, impeccable team.

Additional Services

  • DJ set after the live band
  • DJ and sax performance

  • Music for drinks reception

city-movers-rome-italy.intro_html: The City Movers – an exquisite wedding and celebration ensemble, based in the heart of Rome, Italy.
city-movers-rome-italy.description_html:
The City Movers are a Rome-based live band renowned for their impeccably smooth sound, refined groove, and an effortless command of atmosphere. Their curated repertoire seamlessly weaves soul, funk, R&B, pop, and rock into a polished, modern energy perfectly suited for weddings, corporate soirées, and private gatherings. Established by seasoned professionals with distinguished backgrounds in jazz and contemporary music, The City Movers were conceived with the bespoke requirements of exclusive events in mind.

Every performance is defined by an unwavering commitment to quality, flexibility, and an intuitive understanding of a celebration’s choreography—from elegant, ambient interludes to electrifying live sets that captivate discerning guests. Their refined artistry and meticulous attention to detail have swiftly positioned them as a coveted choice at Rome’s most breathtaking venues.

The ensemble offers adaptable line-ups, gracefully scaling from intimate configurations to full, expansive live arrangements. Performances may encompass a pivotal ceremony moment or a complete day of wedding entertainment, with live music, curated background playlists, and spirited party sets all orchestrated with flawless precision. The City Movers provide their own professional-grade sound and lighting equipment, and are delighted to accommodate bespoke requests—such as a first dance or personally meaningful songs. Whether set within classic halls or singular outdoor locations, they bring an air of effortless professionalism, sublime musicianship, and relaxed confidence to every occasion. Their singular ambition: to create a seamless, unforgettable ambience and a soundtrack that perfectly complements your celebration.

Curated Line‑Up Options:

  • Duo Basic: Vocalist and instrumentalist (guitar with backing tracks)
  • Basic Band: Vocalist, bass, drums, guitar (with backing tracks)
  • Full Band: Vocalist, bass, drums, guitar, keyboard (no backing tracks)
  • Extra: Saxophone, DJ, Violin

dusk-roamers-band-verona.intro_html: About Dusk Roamers – an exquisite roaming band based in Verona, Italy. Dusk Roamers is a refined pop/folk ensemble, originating from Verona, composed of impeccably skilled and seasoned musicians.
dusk-roamers-band-verona.description_html:
With a distinctive identity as a travelling band, Dusk Roamers perform at weddings and corporate events across the country, bringing a curated sense of elegance to every occasion. They are regularly booked for ceremonies and celebrations at Giardino Giusti in Verona, Villa Rizzardi in Negrar di Valpolicella, and Relais Forte Benedek on Lake Garda—each a bespoke venue befitting their sophisticated artistry.

The band seamlessly blends the greatest Italian and international hits of the 1970s and 1980s with the latest chart‑toppers, creating an atmosphere that is both nostalgic and contemporary. As a roaming ensemble, they typically perform during the aperitif and dinner, continuing until the meal’s conclusion. Between courses, they play musical interludes around the tables, enchanting guests with an intimate, lively ambiance. For the after‑dinner party, a DJ is generally recommended, and the band can assist in arranging one to ensure a seamless transition into the evening’s revelry.

Line‑up options:

  • 3‑piece roaming band: singer/guitarist, saxophonist, percussionist
  • 4‑piece roaming band: singer/guitarist, saxophonist, percussionist, double bass player

dusk-roamers-band-verona.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- The length of our sets depends on the type of event. For a wedding, we can play during the ceremony, the aperitif, and around the tables during dinner.

- Usually, during the aperitif, we play for about 1.5 to 2 hours continuously. We can perform both from a fixed spot and moving among the guests. If we do take a short break, we always leave background music playing from a playlist.

- For dinner, we typically play two sets of about 15 minutes each, moving around the tables during breaks between courses.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- For the party, I usually suggest contacting a DJ or I (the band's singer) can offer to do a DJ set.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- Usually, if the venue is close to where we live (within an hour from our home), we arrive at least two hours beforehand to set up. If it's further away, we plan to arrive at least three to four hours in advance, accounting for potential traffic. We typically take about an hour for setup and soundcheck.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- If necessary, we can learn some song requests, unless it's a song that the singer cannot perform well. In that case, we recommend playing the MP3.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- When we perform at a fixed location, we typically occupy about 4 meters x 3 meters of space.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- We can perform without problems in unusual settings.</details>

flair-luxury-showband-venice-italy.intro_html:
The Flair – An Exquisite Luxury Showband from Venice, Italy

Surrender to the effervescent allure of The Flair, a refined ensemble that transforms every occasion into an unforgettable affair. With an impeccably curated repertoire and dynamic audience engagement, this distinguished showband elevates any gathering to new heights of sophistication.

Whether orchestrating a grand wedding celebration or an intimate soiree, The Flair tailors its performance to the moment—offering bespoke lounge arrangements that craft a serene, elegant ambiance for smaller gatherings. Ideal for exquisite evenings of conversation and champagne, their music weaves seamlessly into the atmosphere.

Recognised as one of Italy’s premier wedding bands, The Flair infuses every performance with world-class artistry, impeccable style, and an exuberant energy. They are consistently engaged to grace prestigious venues such as Villa Aurelia in Rome, setting the stage for truly remarkable events.

The Flair offers a curated range of solutions, each meticulously designed to create the perfect atmosphere for your occasion. Their guiding philosophy: every detail is crafted and attended to by hand, ensuring a truly bespoke experience.

〈What clients most treasured about Elegant Sax: a supremely talented saxophone & DJ duo, electrifying energy that fills the dance floor, seamless communication and meticulous planning, gracious flexibility with requests, an impeccably stylish and professional presence, and an atmosphere that effortlessly transitions from refined chill sets to exuberant party moments. Guests were captivated; the experience, utterly unforgettable.〉

Elegant Sax is a seasoned professional whose artistry spans more than fifteen years of performances across Italy and abroad. For those seeking a musician of impeccable credentials for their most cherished day, this is a choice of unparalleled refinement.

Known for a collaborative and gracious approach, Elegant Sax works intimately with each client to curate a bespoke performance tailored to the occasion. The repertoire is vast and varied, weaving through eras and genres — from pop and rock to traditional Italian melodies and timeless swing. Remarkable covers of beloved artists such as Dua Lipa and Ed Sheeran sit alongside classic jazz standards, each rendered with exquisite precision.

With kindness and an innate understanding of the day’s rhythm, Elegant Sax orchestrates a seamless set that spans from the first gentle notes to the last exuberant flourish — every moment designed, every detail perfected.

fede-strings-collective-brescia-italy.intro_html:
Fede Strings Collective – an ensemble of consummate musicians, based in the refined city of Brescia, Italy.

With a distinguished portfolio of performances at the most exclusive weddings and galas across Europe, this exquisite collective has graced breathtaking destinations including Lake Como, Tuscany, the French Riviera, London, Liguria, Milan, Venice, and Barcelona. Under the artistic direction of a violinist who has served as principal violin of Il Volo since 2023, the ensemble offers impeccably curated solo performances—both acoustic and electric—alongside inspired improvisations with DJs, weaving afro house and lounge into an unforgettable sonic tapestry. Their exceptional artistry is regularly engaged for bespoke celebrations at Hotel Villa Cipressi in Lecco and Aura Villa del Lago in Italy.
fede-strings-collective-brescia-italy.description_html: Their string quartet offers a uniquely refined experience, inspired by the elegance of the Bridgerton era. Performing beloved pop songs and cinematic soundtracks, the musicians are adorned in exquisite costumes drawn from a curated collection of fifteen distinct ensembles. This ensemble is the epitome of sophistication—ideal for crafting an unforgettable atmosphere during guest arrivals, ceremonies, and aperitifs. The quartet performs acoustically for the majority of engagements, seamlessly integrating into any setting without the need for additional speaker setup. Should amplified sound be desired, arrangements can be discussed in advance, or a DJ sound system may be employed for the evening’s festivities. With a remarkably swift setup time of just thirty minutes, the quartet arrives at the venue no less than one hour prior to the performance. For those seeking a truly bespoke touch, the quartet is delighted to learn a special request song, provided sufficient notice is given.

luminosity-showband-milan-italy.intro_html:
Luminosity – An Exquisite Professional Showband Based in Milan, Italy

Luminosity is a refined ensemble, curating impeccable musical performances for the most discerning occasions. Established in 2020, this ensemble brings together virtuoso musicians from across Italy, united by an unwavering commitment to professionalism and a profound passion for music and entertainment. Our curated repertoire spans iconic hits from the 1970s and 1980s to contemporary chart-toppers, featuring luminaries such as Stevie Wonder, Beyoncé, Michael Jackson, and Bruno Mars. We are frequently engaged for weddings and prestigious events at La Villa Hotel in Asti, La Foce in Siena, and The Cavalieri Waldorf Astoria Hotel in Rome, Italy.
luminosity-showband-milan-italy.description_html:
We are available for weddings, galas, corporate celebrations, and private soirées. Our versatility enables seamless adaptation to any occasion, ensuring an impeccable performance every time. Our aspiration is that every musical moment etches itself into the memories of guests, rendering each occasion uniquely remarkable. Whether music serves as a subtle backdrop or the vibrant centerpiece, we dedicate ourselves to ensuring it transcends mere accompaniment—becoming a defining element that enriches and distinguishes the entire affair.

Line-up Options:

  • 6 to 11 piece band
  • DJ Sax
  • DJ Live (with sax, singers & percussion)
  • Optional Add Ons: violin, strings ensemble, dancers, DJ, light & fire artists, voice/percussion

We are frequently booked as a wedding band in Lake Como.

wedding-band-tuscany-celestial-groovers.intro_html:
About Celestial Groovers – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble Based in Tuscany, Italy

Celestial Groovers stands as an impeccably refined wedding and party band, rooted in the heart of Tuscany and dedicated to delivering curated, high-calibre entertainment for the most discerning celebrations. This sophisticated ensemble performs across the region and beyond, gracing weddings, private soirées, and corporate events with an unparalleled musical presence. Comprising a group of exceptionally skilled musicians, Celestial Groovers brings both virtuosity and professionalism to every performance, ensuring an experience that is nothing short of extraordinary.

To glimpse the artistry that awaits, we invite you to view the band’s exquisite video below—a true testament to their bespoke craft. Celestial Groovers is frequently engaged to perform at esteemed venues such as Agrisalotto Agriturismo & Ristorante in Arezzo and Villa Medicea di Lilliano in Florence, further solidifying their reputation as a premier choice for refined occasions.

Tailored Line-Ups for an Exclusively Bespoke Experience

Celestial Groovers offers a fully customizable ensemble, meticulously adapted to the specific atmosphere of your event. Upon request, a distinguished male vocalist may be added to any configuration. The curated line-ups include:

  • 5‑Piece: Female Vocals, Keyboard, Guitar, Bass & Drums
  • 6‑Piece: Female Vocals, Keyboard, Guitar, Bass, Drums & Saxophone
  • 7‑ & 8‑Piece: Female Vocals, Keyboard, Guitar, Bass, Drums, Saxophone, Trumpet & Trombone

With years of refined experience, the band seamlessly shifts between genres and styles, transitioning from elegant traditional wedding melodies to high‑energy performances that command any dancefloor. Depending on your preference, Celestial Groovers can perform both ‘plugged’ and ‘unplugged’ acoustic sets, harmonizing perfectly with the nuanced needs of your occasion. Additionally, they offer enchanting jazz and swing performances guaranteed to captivate every guest, and can collaborate with a DJ to infuse an extra layer of magic into your celebration.

For those seeking one of Tuscany’s finest wedding bands, Celestial Groovers presents an unparalleled choice—a symphony of elegance, skill, and bespoke artistry that will define your most cherished moments.

naples-swing-band-italy.intro_html: The Naples Swing Band — an exquisite jazz and swing ensemble, based in the refined city of Naples, Italy.
naples-swing-band-italy.description_html:
What discerning clients cherish most about The Naples Swing Band: impeccable elegance and professionalism, outstanding vocal artistry and musicianship, a bespoke repertoire of jazz and Italian classics, a captivating atmosphere, effortless flexibility, and resounding praise from every guest.

The Naples Swing Band comprises a curated collective of virtuoso musicians, performing at the most distinguished weddings and events throughout Italy.

Their meticulously crafted repertoire spans luminous jazz standards and cosmopolitan pop melodies, the timeless classics of the Italian tradition, and the gentle sophistication of bossa nova — each piece selected to evoke an air of refined exclusivity.

This ensemble creates an atmosphere of unparalleled elegance, perfectly suited to the most exalted celebrations.

They are regularly engaged to perform at iconic venues including Villa Eva in Ravello and Villa San Michele Belmond Hotel in Fiesole, Italy.

Available in duo, trio, quartet, quintet, or extended formations, The Naples Swing Band adapts seamlessly to your every preference and the unique character of your chosen setting. Their ability to shift from an intimate configuration to a fuller arrangement — welcoming additional musicians as required — ensures a soundtrack that is both bespoke and unforgettable.

Blending vintage charm with modern flair, the group has earned a reputation as a distinguished wedding band in Italy. Below are just a few of the prestigious locations where they have performed for weddings and private events.

naples-swing-band-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What does the wedding package include?</summary>Installation & disassembly of the system(s), live music and recorded music between sets, customizable repertoire according to requests or needs, personalization of the playlist for the disco.



</details><details><summary>How far in advance should I get in touch with you?</summary>Typically with 3 to 4 months' notice. But if we are available, even up to a week in advance.



</details><details><summary>Size of band?</summary>Small (2-3 musicians), medium (4-6 musicians), large (more than 6 musicians).



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>Repertoire that ranges from jazz standards to popular songs from the international repertoire, to the classics of the Italian, Bossanova and Portuguese tradition. Flexible with the possibility of requests.



</details><details><summary>Can I ask for songs not included in the repertoire?</summary>We accept songs as long as there is time to prepare them (a couple of months is ideal).



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>For over three years active with numerous live between private events and concerts.



</details><details><summary>Are you able to travel to our event?</summary>Yes, absolutely. It is something we do regularly.



</details><details><summary>Is there a surcharge for travel?</summary>Yes, the cost of travel and any overnight stay.



</details><details><summary>Can you perform at more than one wedding per day?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>The entire duration of the event, dividing the performance into several sets.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to prepare the performance?</summary>About two hours.



</details><details><summary>Do you perform outdoors?</summary>Yes



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Montaggio/Smontaggio impianto/i, Musica Live e Filodiffusione, Repertorio personalizzabile in base a richieste o esigenze, Personalizzazione della playlist per la filo diffusione.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>In genere con un preavviso di 3/4 mesi. Ma se siamo disponibili, anche fino ad una settimana di anticipo.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti), media (4-6 musicisti), grande (più di 6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Repertorio che spazia dagli standard jazz, ai brani popolari del repertorio internazionale,fino ai classici della tradizione italiana,bossanova e portoghese. Flessibile con possibilità di richieste.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Accettiamo brani purchè ci sia il tempo materiale per prepararli.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Da oltre tre anni attivi con numerosissimi live tra eventi privati e concerti.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, assolutamente si, è una cosa che svolgiamo regolarmente.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, le spese del viaggio e dell'eventuale pernottamento.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Tutta la durata dell'evento, dividendo la performance in più "set".



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Due ore circa.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

hyped-up-florence-italy.intro_html:
Hyped Up — an ensemble of extraordinary refinement, residing in the heart of Florence, Italy. Not merely a wedding and party band, but artisans of auditory splendor, composing the soundtrack to life’s most treasured celebrations.

With a distinctly contemporary sensibility and an impeccably curated international repertoire, Hyped Up has established itself as the very definition of musical mastery in Tuscany.

Guiding this distinguished ensemble is Dizy, a luminary whose career is steeped in exquisite melodic excellence. Her path is one of refined harmonies and soul-stirring compositions.

Hyped Up is regularly engaged to perform at an exclusive selection of distinguished venues, including La Pescaia Resort in Grosseto, the historic Abbazia di San Galgano in Siena, and Castello il Palagio Ricevimenti in Florence.
hyped-up-florence-italy.description_html:
Dizy possesses an exceptional talent for curating bespoke musical journeys, ensuring each performance is impeccably tailored to the client’s unique vision. Drawing upon a carefully selected collective of Tuscany’s most accomplished professional musicians, Hyped Up weaves intricate sonic tapestries that elevate every gathering beyond the ordinary.

From intimate duos to dynamic six-piece configurations enriched by the sultry resonance of a saxophone, the ensemble’s versatility is without equal. Hyped Up does not merely perform — it curates a complete experience, guiding clients through every nuance of musical entertainment, from the refined elegance of a ceremony to the exuberant energy of the celebration.

Renowned for redefining wedding music in Italy, the band brings an unparalleled fusion of sophistication and vitality to each event. An unwavering commitment to quality ensures that every note is rendered with impeccable precision.

The ensemble has graced some of Tuscany’s most iconic settings, from the timeless elegance of Caffé Paszkowski to the opulent grandeur of Castelfalfi Resort and the prestigious halls of Hotel Helvetia & Bristol.

Beyond the stage, Dizy’s artistry extends far and wide. As a seasoned session musician, her melodies have traveled across borders, enchanting audiences with an ethereal voice and magnetic presence.

With Hyped Up, every occasion becomes a symphony of joy — a testament to music’s power to transcend boundaries and unite hearts. In Florence, where creativity flows as freely as the Arno, Hyped Up stands as a beacon of refined musical excellence, ready to serenade the soul and ignite the spirit of celebration.

For your next event, consider this exceptional ensemble — a top wedding band in Tuscany, devoted to crafting an unforgettable auditory experience.

italian-roamers-band-milan.intro_html:
The Italian Roamers – An Exquisite Acoustic Roaming Band for Hire in Italy and Internationally

The Italian Roamers are a curated ensemble of four exceptional musicians, wielding an impeccable quartet of instruments—guitar, double bass, violin, and snare drum—and delivering four harmonised voices in perfect symphony.
italian-roamers-band-milan.description_html:
We perform at the most refined weddings, corporate galas, black-tie dinners, yacht soirées, and bespoke functions throughout Europe and beyond—including Spain, France, Malta, Greece, Switzerland, and Dubai.

Widely regarded as the most distinguished roaming band in Italy, our wandering presence elevates any occasion with an air of exclusive sophistication.

Our ensemble comprises Federico (guitar and vocals), Luca (violin and vocals), Andrea (double bass and vocals), and Mattia (snare drum and vocals). We are masters of the roaming art—gliding seamlessly among guests at weddings and celebrations, transforming spaces into intimate concert halls.

We are regularly booked to perform at exquisite venues such as Sant Ffraed House in Wales, Belmond Villa San Michele in Florence, the Monaco Grand Prix, the Imola Grand Prix in Emilia Romagna, Chateau Monfort in Milan, and the Grand Hotel Imperiale Resort & SPA on Lake Como, Italy.

Our refined artistry has graced luxury locations including Il Borro Tuscan Bistro in Dubai, Hotel Cala di Volpe in Porto Cervo, Hotel Radisson Blu in Rome, Casinò di Campione d’Italia, 55 Club, Hotel Principe di Savoia, the Trussardi Show Room, Aspria Harbour Club, Sporting Club, and Expo 2018 in Milan.

In Italiano

Quattro raffinati musicisti, quattro strumenti d'eccezione — chitarra, contrabbasso, violino e rullante — e quattro voci armonizzate: ecco i The Italian Roamers. Un'esperienza sonora esclusiva per eventi aziendali, cene di gala, matrimoni, feste in villa e in barca, ma soprattutto un accompagnamento itinerante di ineguagliabile eleganza. Questa busking band d'élite reinterpreta brani italiani e internazionali con gioiosa leggerezza, senza amplificazione, affidandosi unicamente alla purezza acustica degli strumenti e delle voci, portando la musica a un passo da voi, ovunque desideriate. Si sono già esibiti in location d'eccezione come Harbour Club Milano, Teatro delle Stelle e You di Porto Cervo, oltre a innumerevoli feste private su yacht e in ville. Una nuova tournée li condurrà a Dubai e Mosca.

saxophone-dj-tuscany-double.intro_html:
About Double Sax & DJ – An exquisite saxophone and DJ duo, based in the heart of Tuscany, offering bespoke musical experiences for weddings and celebrations throughout Italy.

What discerning clients most cherish about Double Sax & DJ: an electrifying union of saxophone and DJ artistry, impeccable crowd intuition, refined performances, an atmosphere of unparalleled vitality, consummate professionalism, and a resounding triumph among every guest.

Double Sax & DJ stands as an exceptional duo within Italy, dedicated to delivering impeccable musical entertainment through the seamless fusion of masterful DJ sets and the sublime voice of the saxophone.

This ensemble is celebrated for its innovative spirit, blending electrifying DJ compositions with the enchanting resonance of the saxophone. The result is a performance of vibrant energy and sophisticated refinement, an irresistible invitation to celebrate.

This is a pairing of extraordinary versatility, perfectly suited to a diverse array of occasions, where talent, taste, and elegance converge to render any event truly unforgettable.

Please inquire about the 2026 Set List and a sample music programme from a recent wedding, available upon request.

As one of Italy's most distinguished DJ and saxophone acts, the duo is devoted to curating a setlist entirely bespoke to your vision, honouring your requests and learning new compositions for your momentous day.

The ensemble is a perennial favourite at esteemed venues such as Le Filigare Winery & Resort in Chianti and Borgo di Castelvecchio in Contignano, Italy.

The duo provides entertainment of the highest calibre for every moment of your wedding celebration:

Ceremony – Select your preferred compositions, and we shall render them in an intimate acoustic arrangement during the most tender moments of your day.

Reception of Guests and Aperitif – Funky, chill, and lounge music are but a few of the genres we artfully combine with the live saxophone to animate the cocktail hour with sophisticated energy.

Dinner – We present an extensive array of musical options for the dinner service, where the music serves not as the protagonist but as a sublime and unobtrusive backdrop.

Cake Cutting and Other Moments – The cutting of the wedding cake shall unfold exactly as you have always envisioned. Make it truly unforgettable with custom-curated playlists and songs performed on demand.

Disco – When the night calls, Double Sax & DJ commands the dance floor with a performance of intense energy and live virtuosity. Saxophone and DJ artistry have never been so exquisitely intertwined.

The following represents a curated selection of the prestigious venues where the duo has been engaged for weddings and events:

If you seek to engage one of Italy's most distinguished saxophone and DJ duos, your search concludes with Double Sax & DJ. We invite you to reach out and commence the journey.

Please explore the official website for further information.

In Italiano

Double Sax & DJ è il frutto dell'amicizia e della passione per la musica, due ragazzi nati nel cuore della Toscana che hanno scelto il sassofono come strumento della loro creatività.

Provenienti da formazioni ed esperienze musicali diverse, si uniscono in una performance molto dinamica ed entusiasmante coniugando l'energia del dj-set al sound accattivante del sax.

Double Sax & DJ è un progetto versatile e adatto ad una vasta gamma di occasioni, quando talento, gusto ed eleganza rendono un evento indimenticabile.

Saranno la meravigliosa colonna sonora del vostro giorno più bello, grazie al loro sound coinvolgente e divertente.

I componenti di Double Sax & DJ ascolteranno le vostre esigenze e necessità per dare vita a un intrattenimento musicale degno di un evento unico e indimenticabile.

Il repertorio sarà personalizzato in base alle vostre esigenze e sarà in grado di catturare l'attenzione di grandi e piccini.

saxophone-dj-tuscany-double.faq_html:
<details><summary>What does the wedding package include?</summary>Our wedding pack includes totally personalized musical services for all phases of the event (ceremony, reception and aperitif, dinner, cake cutting, first dance, party, etc.)



</details><details><summary>How far in advance do I have to contact you?</summary>At least 6 months is ideal.



</details><details><summary>Size of the group?</summary>Small (2-3 musicians).



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>The repertoire is not fixed but agreed with the client to guarantee a musical service perfectly in keeping with the tastes of the guests.



</details><details><summary>Can I ask for pieces not included in the repertoire?</summary>We gladly accept the request for pieces not covered by our usual repertoire, especially when it comes to the key moments of the event such as the ceremony or the cutting of the cake.



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>Almost twenty years of live music in the most diverse situations such as orchestras, street bands, radio, TV, bands, discos, night clubs, and weddings.



</details><details><summary>Do you have your own equipment?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Do you need particular material or specific conditions to be able to offer the service?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Do you perform at events outside Tuscany?</summary>Yes, we do.



</details><details><summary>Is there a surcharge for travelling?</summary>Yes, the price depends on the distance.



</details><details><summary>Do you work for more than one wedding per day?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Do you work alone or with a team of professionals?</summary>Alone.



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>Our services do not have a standard duration and widely cover all phases of the event from the very first reception until late at night.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to prepare for the performance?</summary>The technical preparation time depends on the client's requests and the amount of equipment needed. We are always in line with the normal timings of the venue.



</details><details><summary>Do you do outdoor performances?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Il nostro pack matrimonio include servizi musicali totalmente personalizzati per tutte le fasi dell'evento (cerimonia, accoglienza e aperitivo, cena, taglio torta, primo ballo, party, ecc.)



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Almeno 6 mesi.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Il repertorio non è fisso ma accordato a priori con il committente per garantire un servizio musicale perfettamente in target con i gusti dei presenti e dei festeggiati.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Accettiamo di buon grado la richiesta di brani non contemplati dal nostro repertorio abituale, soprattutto quando si tratta dei momenti salienti dell'evento come la cerimonia o il taglio della torta.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Quasi vent'anni di musica dal vivo nelle situazioni più disparate come orchestre, streetband, radio, tv, gruppi musicali, discoteche, locali notturni, e matrimoni.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, sì, accettiamo incarichi con trasferta.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, sì, il prezzo dipende dalla distanza.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>Da solo.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>I nostri servizi non hanno una durata standard e coprono ampiamente tutte le fasi dell'evento dalla primissima accoglienza fino a tarda notte.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Il tempo tecnico di preparazione dipende dalle richieste del committente e dalla quantità di attrezzatura necessaria. Siamo sempre in linea con le normali tempistiche delle location.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

neon-beats-dj-sax-taranto-italy.intro_html:
Neon Beats – an exquisite DJ & saxophone duo based in Taranto, Italy, redefining refined entertainment for the most discerning celebrations.

Rooted in Taranto, Neon Beats is celebrated for its impeccable fusion of curated DJ sets and live saxophone artistry. With years of experience, they orchestrate bespoke luxury entertainment for weddings and events throughout Puglia and beyond. Seamlessly blending pulsating house rhythms with soulful jazz melodies, their performances are a masterclass in sonic refinement. They are regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive gatherings at Masseria Fulcignano in Lecce and Castello Marchione in Bari. Every detail is tailored to perfection, captivating audiences with visually stunning displays that elevate the atmosphere. Though based in Taranto, Neon Beats has become a highly sought‑after ensemble across Italy, enchanting guests amid the most picturesque landscapes. Dedicated to creating magical, enduring moments, Neon Beats infuses every event with an effortless elegance and vibrant energy, leaving an indelible impression on all who experience their harmonious artistry.

swing-roaming-band-bari-popinjays.intro_html:
The Popinjays – An Exquisite Roaming Ensemble, Based in Puglia, Italy

An impeccably curated roaming jazz & swing band, The Popinjays offer bespoke musical entertainment for the most distinguished occasions. Their refined artistry and years of combined industry experience ensure a performance of unparalleled professionalism and grace.

The ensemble travels with consummate ease across Puglia and beyond, gracing weddings, private soirées, and corporate galas throughout Italy. They are frequently engaged for celebrations at such illustrious venues as Villa Aurelia in Rome, Masseria Mangiamuso in Brindisi, and Tenuta Odegitria in Taranto.

A Repertoire of Rare Elegance

The Popinjays present a vast and varied repertoire spanning eras and genres—vintage covers interwoven with exquisite jazz reworkings of beloved contemporary hits. The band roams with fluidity, weaving through every corner of your event, transforming each moment into a curated sensory experience.

Among the distinguished locations where they have performed:

  • Villa Aurelia, Rome
  • Masseria Mangiamuso, Ostuni
  • Tenuta Odegitria, Martina Franca
  • Masseria Torrepietra Dimora Storica
  • Tenuta Montevitolo
  • Oppure – Masseria Moderna
  • Sorrento, Naples

For those seeking one of Italy’s most refined roaming jazz & swing ensembles, The Popinjays represent the pinnacle of sophistication and exclusivity.

dj-bari-panache.intro_html:
DJ Panache – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Experience Based in Bari, Italy

DJ Panache is an exceptional open-format DJ who curates refined, top-tier entertainment for weddings and exclusive events. With an impeccable command of every genre and era, he presents a bespoke selection of greatest hits, often collaborating with distinguished musicians—including masterful saxophonists—to elevate each performance.

An artist of remarkable adaptability, DJ Panache welcomes every request, ensuring a perfectly tailored soundtrack for your celebration. His craft emphasizes high-quality mixing, particularly on vinyl, delivering sets designed for those who seek far more than a standard wedding DJ.

He is regularly booked to perform at prestigious venues such as Borgo Di Castelvecchio in Tuscany, Italy.

Happy to travel, DJ Panache graces weddings, private soirées, and corporate events across Bari, Puglia, and throughout Italy. With years of industry experience playing at festivals and international events alongside talented vocalists and saxophonists, his DJ + sax option remains one of the most requested luxuries for weddings in Puglia and beyond.

  • Borgo Di Castelvecchio, Contignano
  • Castellana Grotte, Bari, Italy
  • Sextantio Le Grotte Della Civita
  • Masseria Torrepietra, Bari, Italy
  • Castello Monaci, Lecce
  • Corato, Bari, Italy
  • Masseria Salamina
  • Villa Lamia, Puglia, Italy
  • Palombaro, Chieti, Italy

If your vision calls for one of Italy’s finest DJs, look no further than DJ Panache—an invitation to experience entertainment of the highest calibre.

wedding-duo-italy-dolce-beats.intro_html:
Dolce Beats – An Enclave of Musical Refinement, Based in Verona, Italy

What discerning clientele most cherish about Dolce Beats: Exceptionally gifted musicians, an atmosphere of effortless grace, flawless adaptability and professionalism, guests utterly captivated, the undisputed highlight of every celebration.

Dolce Beats, presented in its exclusive two‑ or three‑piece configuration, represents the zenith of musical elegance for the most distinguished affairs. This bespoke formation is meticulously curated to deliver an impeccable acoustic experience—ideal for refined aperitifs, opulent weddings, and evenings of sophisticated revelry.

The ensemble is regularly summoned to perform at celebrated venues such as Castello di Rosciano in Perugia and the Grand Hotel Tremezzo on Lake Como, Italy—a testament to its standing among the most sought‑after musical purveyors.

  • One male vocalist and keyboardist: dynamic and versatile.

  • One female vocalist: captivating and soulful, or a saxophonist: warm and classy.

Perfect for:

wedding-trio-milan-acoustic-highway.intro_html:
Acoustic Highway – an exquisite acoustic trio, based in Milan and Tuscany, Italy

Acoustic Highway presents a trio of consummate professionals, devoted to curating the finest musical ambience for every occasion.

Established in 2016, the ensemble comprises a vocalist, an acoustic guitarist, and a pianist—each possessing years of individual industry refinement.

The trio performs with impeccable grace across all of Italy and is delighted to travel internationally for your event. Their extensive experience has graced a myriad of celebrations and functions.

Renowned as a refined acoustic ensemble for hire in Italy, Acoustic Highway is celebrated for its warm, acoustic sound and a versatile repertoire suited to an array of elegant festivities.

With a bespoke repertoire drawn from a vast catalog, Acoustic Highway ensures there is something to enchant every guest.

They are regularly engaged for weddings and events at the Abbey of San Galgano in Chiusdino and Borgo Tre Rose Country Hotel in Montepulciano, Italy.
wedding-trio-milan-acoustic-highway.description_html:
Acoustic Highway is distinguished for its artful re‑arrangements of songs, breathing new life into beloved classics with fresh and exhilarating compositions.

The group possesses a profound passion for all music, and their expansive repertoire reflects this—effortlessly traversing Blues, Soul, RnB, and Pop.

Acoustic Highway is flexible, fun, and impeccably organised, making them the quintessential choice for your wedding or soirée.

Here are just a few of the exquisite venues where clients have reserved the trio for weddings and events:

  • Abbey of San Galgano, Chiusdino

DJ Otsis – An Exquisite Artisan of Sound, Based in Lecce, Italy

A consummate professional DJ and producer, DJ Otsis also brings an impeccable sense of coordination to weddings and private events, complemented by a distinguished presence as a local radio and television host. With more than two decades of experience in the entertainment sphere, his journey began in the luminous world of nightclubs and evolved into a refined dedication to crafting bespoke musical experiences for exclusive weddings and elite soirées.

He is regularly invited to perform at Borgo Sant’Ambrogio in Siena, Casino De Viti in Lecce, and Masseria Quadrelli in Puglia—venues that epitomise Italian elegance.

An innate ability to select the perfect musical accompaniment for every moment reflects a profound passion for music across all genres. This skill forms the cornerstone of infusing each event with a distinct sense of charm and fascination. Drawing upon his extensive expertise as a regional radio host and a polished television and stage presenter, he brings a unique perspective to every facet of your wedding day. His approach seamlessly blends professionalism with an aura of levity and amusement, ensuring a spirited and jovial atmosphere while sidestepping any hint of intrusion or excess.

dj-florence-leon.intro_html:
DJ Leon – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Based in Florence, Italy

What discerning clients cherish most about DJ Leon: an electrifying energy that masterfully reads the room, an impeccably full dance floor, seamless mixes and bespoke edits, exceptional communication and planning, a refined professionalism that is effortless to collaborate with, a curated and versatile musical selection, and an atmosphere of unparalleled celebration.

DJ Leon is a refined professional DJ, based in the heart of Florence, offering a high-energy performance of the utmost sophistication.

His profound passion for music and travel has cultivated an extraordinary entertainer, one who tailors every element of his artistry to your distinct vision and desires.

DJ Leon regularly elevates events alongside other distinguished artists, blending his expertise with LED drummers, saxophonists, and more for a truly bespoke experience.

He is managed and has been expertly trained by DJ Zano—one of Italy’s most celebrated and sought-after wedding DJs.

Fluent in Italian, English, and Spanish, DJ Leon commands an extensive repertoire spanning every era and genre, crafting a flawless performance that resonates across generations and cultures.

He is consistently booked for weddings and prestigious celebrations at Villa Catignano, Borgo Castelvecchi, and Castello di Vicarello in Tuscany, Italy.

For years, the Italian DJ Leon has honed his craft behind the decks, performing for clientele from around the globe at weddings, nightclubs, private soirées, and corporate events.

On your most precious day, entrust the professionalism and passion of DJ Leon. You will be assured a uniquely curated service, offering impeccable musical entertainment that adapts to your requests, accentuating every moment of your wedding with an exceptional sound.

DJ Leon has access to some of the finest equipment in the industry to suit the demands of your event, guaranteeing a formidable celebration that surpasses every expectation.

saxophonist-milan-italy.intro_html:
About The Milan Saxophonist – an exceptionally refined wedding saxophonist and DJ, based in the heart of Milan, Italy.

An exquisite fusion of DJ artistry and live saxophone, from aperitivo to afterparty. Impeccable crowd intuition, curated playlists, and a seamless flow that transforms every celebration into an unforgettable experience.

The Milan Saxophonist is a virtuoso musician and DJ, dedicated to delivering impeccably curated musical entertainment for the most discerning events. With years of industry mastery, he is a consummate improviser, effortlessly adapting his performance to elevate each moment with bespoke artistry.

Based near Milan, this seasoned saxophonist is delighted to travel to your chosen venue, performing frequently across Italy and beyond.

He is regularly booked for weddings and exclusive celebrations at Castello di Rosciano in Perugia, the NH Collection Grand Hotel Convento di Amalfi, and the Grand Hotel Imperiale Resort & SPA on Lake Como, Italy.

A master of both saxophone and the DJ console, he commands an eclectic repertoire spanning house, chillout, pop, jazz, Latin, and Italian styles. His refined, multi-disciplinary approach ensures every guest—young and old—is captivated by an elegantly layered soundscape.

As a performer, The Milan Saxophonist is supremely adaptable, frequently collaborating with other artists and DJs. He is renowned in Italy’s wedding music scene for his seamless blend of live saxophone with expertly mixed DJ sets.

You may engage The Milan Saxophonist as either a solo saxophonist or as a combined saxophone and DJ service. His DJ offering includes the rental of a professional audio and lighting system. When performing as a DJ with live saxophone, he uses a wireless microphone to move freely among guests, delivering intimate, interactive moments. For saxophone sets, he prepares bespoke playlists of three or four songs to perform over. While DJing, he mixes seamlessly using the DJ console.

His performances have graced prestigious venues across Europe—including Cannes, Nice, Antibes, Provence, and the French Riviera in France; Monaco; St Moritz, Lugano, Bern, Zurich, Geneva, Zermatt, Lausanne, and Montreux in Switzerland; Barcelona and Madrid in Spain; as well as the Maldives—and throughout Italy, from Bologna and Bergamo to Lake Como, Lake Garda, Turin, Genoa, Lecco, Varese, and Venice.

For those seeking an unparalleled musical experience, The Milan Saxophonist offers an exquisite, bespoke journey—elevating your celebration with impeccable style and sophistication.
saxophonist-milan-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What does the wedding package include?</summary>DJ / sax equipped with audio / light system. Available to perform during aperitif, dinner, and after dinner.



</details><details><summary>How far in advance should I get in touch with you?</summary>Four months.



</details><details><summary>Size of group?</summary>Soloist or duo with live DJ.



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>Aperitif...lounge, chill out, smooth jazz, soft house, cover. Dinner...ambient, lounge, background Party: dance, commercial, latin, revival, happy music. All with live improvisations on the sax.



</details><details><summary>Can I ask for songs not included in the repertoire?</summary>Sure.



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>4 years of weddings in Italy, Switzerland, French Riviera (Cannes, Juan Les Pins, Antibes), events in Italy, Switzerland, French Riviera, Barcelona and Maldives.



</details><details><summary>Do you have your own equipment?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Do you need particular material or specific conditions to be able to offer the service?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Do you perform internationally?</summary>Yes, in Europe and Asia.



</details><details><summary>Is there a surcharge for travel?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Do you perform at more than one wedding per day?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Do you work alone or with a team of professionals?</summary>Alone or with a live DJ.



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>Sax 1 to 2 hours, DJ 3 to 6 hours.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to set up for the performance?</summary>Fifteen minutes.



</details><details><summary>Do you perform outdoors?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Dj/sax provvisto di impianto audio/luci. Incontro conoscitivo e incontro in loco per decidere al meglio postazioni musica. Disponibile a spostamenti struttura aperitivo, cena, e dopocena.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Quattro mesi.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Solista.



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Aperitivo: lounge, chill out, smooth jazz, soft house, cover. Cena: ambient, lounge, di sottofondo Party: dance, commerciale, latin, revival, happy music. Il tutto con interventi live al sax.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Certo.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>4 anni matrimoni in Italia, Svizzera, Costa Azzurra (Cannes, Juan Les Pins, Antibes) eventi in Italia, Svizzera, Costa Azzurra, Barcellona e Maldive.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, in Europa e Asia.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>Da solo.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Sax 1/2 ore, dj 3/6 ore.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Quindici minuti.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

A paragon of musical refinement, Italian Sax & DJ is a virtuoso musician residing in the Eternal City. With more than two decades of experience gracing the most prestigious events and opulent destinations worldwide, this accomplished artist has performed at private soirées, grand theatres, corporate galas, and the world’s most exclusive venues.

His impeccable artistry has been showcased for leading international broadcasters, including Sky, Rai, Mediaset, RTL Hungary, TVR, Radio Europa FM, and Magic FM. Additionally, he has curated bespoke performances for an illustrious roster of multinational corporations and luxury marques such as Waldorf Astoria, Hard Rock Café Company, Mondadori, Max Mara, The Woolmark Company, Benetton, Feltrinelli, Sheraton Hotels & Resorts, Abbott Laboratories, Novotel, Mercure Hotels, and Excel Hotels and Resorts.

The band is frequently engaged for weddings and private celebrations at some of Italy’s most prestigious venues, including Masseria Lamacoppa in Ostuni, Villa Eva on the Amalfi Coast in Ravello, Domus Laeta in Giungano, Relais Blu in Naples, and Borgo Scopeto Wine & Country Relais in Siena.

saxophonist-dj-puglia-italy-toni.intro_html:
Toni On Sax – An Exquisite Wedding Saxophonist & DJ, Based in Tuscany & Puglia, Italy

Presenting Toni On Sax, an impeccably refined saxophonist and disc jockey of unparalleled artistry, headquartered in the heart of Tuscany and Puglia. His curated talents are available for discerning clients across Italy and throughout the world.

With a wealth of industry experience spanning many years, Toni brings an unwavering professionalism and consummate skill to every occasion—be it an opulent wedding, an intimate private soirée, or a prestigious corporate event. His repertoire is a bespoke tapestry of genres, effortlessly traversing pop, jazz, lounge, soul, Bollywood, and funk to suit the most sophisticated tastes.

Toni is most frequently commissioned as a saxophonist for weddings and exclusive private celebrations; upon request, he also offers an exquisite DJ service to elevate the ambiance further. He frequently performs alongside the esteemed DJ Zano, a partnership that yields the coveted Ibiza-style DJ and saxophone duo—perfect for vibrant party anthems or a serene, chilled set.

His calendar is adorned with performances at some of the most illustrious venues: Château de Farcheville in France, Hotel Santa Caterina on the Amalfi Coast, Castello di Montignano in Perugia, and the enchanting Greek island of Lefkada. As a seasoned globetrotter, Toni has enthralled audiences across Europe and the Middle East, including a spectacular New Year’s Eve 2020 performance for the Jumeira Company at the iconic Burj al Arab in Dubai. He is also intimately familiar with the musical traditions of Indian and Islamic wedding ceremonies.

One of Toni On Sax’s most extraordinary signatures is his custom-built LED saxophones, which illuminate in a kaleidoscope of colours, casting an ethereal sparkle over your event. A versatile artist, he performs as a soloist or seamlessly integrates with jazz bands, vocalists, and DJs. He maintains an impeccable network of Italy’s finest wedding ensembles, ready to be summoned for a truly curated experience.

Beyond Tuscany and throughout Italy, Toni is in high demand in Croatia, Malta, Greece, Montenegro, Spain, Ibiza, and across the Middle East. For those seeking one of Italy’s most refined saxophonists, look no further than Toni On Sax—an invitation to an unforgettable, luxurious celebration.

florence-string-quartet-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
The Florence String Quartet – an ensemble of unparalleled refinement, available for exclusive hire at weddings and events in Tuscany and throughout Italy.

Renowned for their exquisite ceremony music, elegant ambience, and impeccable professionalism, this quartet has earned the highest praise from discerning clients. Their vast repertoire spans classical masterpieces and contemporary pop, alongside treasured selections from opera and celebrated film scores.

Based in Florence, this distinguished ensemble is in demand for weddings and private celebrations across Tuscany, Italy, and beyond. The quartet is led and managed by Lorenzo, a virtuoso violinist whose artistry defines the group’s refined character.

In addition to the full quartet, the ensemble offers a bespoke string duo or trio, as well as solo violin or cello—perfect for intimate wedding ceremonies and exclusive functions. For a truly curated experience, additional instruments may be included, such as oboe, flute, or a vocalist (tenor, soprano, and others). An Italian folk trio or quartet, a DJ for evening celebrations, and an acoustic singer‑guitarist are also available upon request.

The musicians are sought after for weddings and corporate events throughout Italy’s most coveted destinations, including Siena, Arezzo, Pisa, Grosseto, Perugia, Livorno, and beyond.

The quartet has been regularly engaged at some of Italy’s most prestigious venues, among them Abbazia di San Galgano in Siena, Belmond Villa San Michele in Fiesole, and Villa Miani in Rome. Below is a selection of the exceptional locations that have been graced by their presence:

  • Belmond Villa San Michele
  • NH Grand Hotel Convento Amalfi
  • Villa Miani, Rome

party-sax-dj-tuscany-italy.intro_html: Party Sax & DJ – an exquisite collective of virtuoso saxophonists and masterful DJs, meticulously based in the heart of Tuscany and Umbria, Italy. Their refined performances redefine wedding entertainment, curating an atmosphere of unparalleled sophistication.
party-sax-dj-tuscany-italy.description_html:
What discerning clients most admire: impeccably packed dance floors, the sublime fusion of saxophone and DJ artistry, electrifying ambience, effortless flexibility, flawless communication, and a crowd‑pleasing presence that elevates every occasion.

Party Sax & DJ represents the pinnacle of bespoke entertainment—a world‑class ensemble that sets an impeccable standard for weddings, celebratory gatherings, and corporate events. Nestled in the picturesque landscapes of Tuscany and Umbria, they captivate audiences locally and grace international stages with an allure that is both magnetic and refined.

By blending the infectious pulse of a master DJ with the soulful, melodic resonance of an accomplished saxophonist, they create an immersive fusion of sound that is nothing short of extraordinary. Their versatility is boundless: they seamlessly incorporate additional live instruments—bongos, percussion, violin, and an array of talented singers—enriching each performance with layers of depth and elegance.

Regularly engaged for the most exclusive celebrations, Party Sax & DJ has performed at esteemed venues including:

  • Villa di Maiano, Tenuta di Casa Brucciata, Villa Boscarello, and Agriturismo Terre di Nano (Italy)
  • Bastide du Roy (France)
  • Hotel Cortijo Bravo (Spain)
  • 58 Gin in Dalston, London

Their global footprint is equally impressive, enchanting audiences in breathtaking destinations from the Caribbean to Ibiza, Malta to Turkey, Tunisia, Germany, Italy, the United Kingdom, and Spain. Each performance transcends borders, leaving an indelible mark on every stage they grace.

Their extraordinary talent has attracted the attention of prestigious corporations and revered institutions. Rolls Royce, Trustpilot, Warner Brothers, the Malta High Commission, The Law Society, and the iconic Cas’ Mila Restaurant in Ibiza are among the discerning clients who seek the pinnacle of entertainment.

Party Sax & DJ possesses an innate ability to read the room, curating an unforgettable musical journey that seamlessly weaves genres and eras. The result is an electric atmosphere that fills the dance floor with effortless energy. Every event becomes a uniquely tailored odyssey, filled with magical moments and lasting memories.

For those seeking an elevated touch, the Alfa Romeo DJ Service offers a distinctive, bespoke addition to your wedding or event—a truly memorable flourish.

Prepare to be enthralled by Party Sax & DJ—a true embodiment of sophistication, talent, and world‑class entertainment. Their international reach and unwavering commitment to excellence continue to set the standard, transporting you on a musical odyssey that transcends boundaries and leaves an indelible mark on heart and soul.

Party Sax & DJ has become one of the most sought‑after wedding bands in Italy, entertaining crowds at corporate events, nightclubs, weddings, and parties with an impeccable, refined presence.

Please take a look at our Google reviews for more information and glowing testimonials.
