party-sax-dj-tuscany-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Our DJ set is usually a 4 or 5 hour set, with the option to increase the time for an additional cost. Saxophonists usually perform 4 or 5 30-minute sets during the party and other various set combinations for the ceremony, drinks reception (aperitivo) or dinner.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Our main setup is DJ only or DJ & Sax, but we can add various live elements; like violinist, percussion (bongos), additional sax (double saxophone), singer, guitar and more.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes we provide all our own sound equipment and lights. We offer various packages and all options can be customisable to the client needs.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Our DJ doesn't take breaks during the party, but we offer background music/laptop playlist as part of our packages for dinner.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We usually arrive at least 2 hours before performance time.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Depending on the package chosen, but it usually takes between 30 minutes to 1.5hrs for setup and soundcheck, for the party setup.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes our saxophonists can learn a special song request and the DJ can play as many requests as needed.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- For ceremony, drinks reception (aperitivo) & dinner, we need about 1.5m x 1.5m. For the party this depends on the package but we will need a minimum of 2m x 3m and a maximum of 3m x 6m.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes we are comfortable to perform in all sorts of environments as long as electricity close-by and we have a stable ground to setup our equipment on.</details>

acoustic-duo-blossom-florence-italy.intro_html: Blossom Duo — an exquisite acoustic duo, impeccably refined and based in the heart of Florence, Italy, offering a bespoke musical experience for weddings and exclusive gatherings.
acoustic-duo-blossom-florence-italy.description_html:
This curated ensemble was born from a profound friendship, uniting two virtuosos who met five years ago and resolved to craft an extraordinary repertoire for their performances. Both artists are alumni of the illustrious Florence Conservatory, Siena Jazz, the Bernstein School of Musical Theatre, and CPM — one of Italy’s most prestigious music institutions. Their distinguished careers have led them on tours across the Italian peninsula, contributing to an array of refined musical endeavours.

They are frequently engaged for weddings and elite events at venues such as Novanta Hotel in Arezzo, Borgo Argiano in Siena, and Borgo Casa al Vento in Chianti — each an exquisite setting befitting their artistry.

They find particular joy in performing at weddings and private gatherings, where their artistry truly flourishes. Upon meeting five years ago, they united in purpose to curate a collection of well-known songs, artfully arranged for their exclusive events. Now known as Blossom Duo, they present an acoustic jazz act infused with refined RnB and soul undertones.

The ensemble can be effortlessly expanded, performing as a trio with additional saxophone or double bass, or as a quartet with both — offering a bespoke configuration for each occasion.

The following prestigious venues have hosted Blossom Duo for weddings and exclusive events:

lazio-party-band-italy.intro_html:
The Lazio Party Band – An Unparalleled Musical Atelier for Your Italian Wedding

Immerse yourself in the exquisite artistry of The Lazio Party Band, an ensemble that redefines the very essence of a luxurious Italian wedding. We orchestrate an impeccably curated soundscape, perfectly designed to complement a day of sublime cuisine and fine wine, whether set against the rolling hills of Tuscany, the captivating coastline of Sorrento, or the timeless backdrop of Rome, Venice, or Florence.

Our esteemed reputation has made us a recurring choice for elite clientele at the nation’s most prestigious estates, including the Belmond Grand Hotel Timeo in Sicily, Le Volpi in Padua, Casale Doria Pamphilj in Rome, and Dievole Wine Resort in Tuscany.
lazio-party-band-italy.description_html:
We specialize in crafting an effortless, bespoke experience for the internationally discerning couple. Fluent in English and deeply versed in the nuances of destination celebrations, we provide a concierge-level service, guiding you seamlessly from your initial inquiry to the final dance. We assume complete command of your day’s musical narrative—from a poignant ceremony to an energetic DJ set that lingers gracefully into the early hours.

Our carefully curated repertoire captivates guests of every generation, inviting spontaneous dance and heartfelt sing-alongs. What truly distinguishes The Lazio Party Band is our ability to forge a genuine connection with your guests, weaving them into the very fabric of your unforgettable celebration. Should the spirit move you, the stage is yours to command.

Though our atelier is rooted in Rome, our decade of expertise has seen us traverse the entire Italian peninsula and perform extensively across Europe, accumulating an intimate knowledge of diverse venues and traditions. We arrive with a state-of-the-art PA system and refined lighting, impeccably configured for soirees of 100 to 120 guests. For grander affairs, we deploy a comprehensive, custom-tailored production on location.

Among the distinguished venues we have had the privilege of serving:

  • Belmond Grand Hotel Timeo, Sicily
  • Le Volpi, Padua, Italy
  • Masseria San Nicola, Fasano
  • Casale Doria Pamphilj, Rome
  • Rome Cavalieri Waldorf Astoria
  • Antico Convento I Cappuccini
  • Dievole Wine Resort, Siena
  • Villa Anson Silj, Rome
  • Il Grande Prato, Castelfiorentino
  • Montefiore dell'Aso, Ascoli Piceno

THE BAND

Our signature configuration is a refined sextet: vocalist, trumpet, saxophone, guitar, bass, and drums. For more intimate gatherings, we can artfully reduce the formation to three, four, or five musicians. Beyond the core ensemble, we can curate a bespoke selection of exceptional talent, including a solo singer-guitarist, a ceremonial soprano, a resonant tenor, a classical string trio, or a harpist.

DJ SERVICE

Our resident DJ commands an exquisite and eclectic library, intuitively selecting tracks to harmonize with the evening's evolving ambiance. He is available as a standalone service or to complement the live performance of the band.

DRINK RECEPTION MUSIC

During the welcome aperitif, our musicians bathe the room in sophisticated lounge melodies or the warm, familiar strains of traditional Italian classics, setting a tone of refined elegance.

EQUIPMENT RENTAL

For clients curating their own musical program, we offer an exclusive rental service of our premium equipment: high-fidelity speakers, professional mixers, microphones, and atmospheric lighting. Please inquire for a bespoke quotation.

dj-live-rome-into-the-night.intro_html:
Into The Night – A Bespoke DJ Live Ensemble, Based in Rome, Italy

Into The Night is an impeccably curated DJ live group, possessing years of refined performance and industry expertise. The ensemble marries the energy of a DJ set with the artistry of a live band, delivering a dynamic, exquisitely tailored experience suited to the most distinguished occasions.

Comprising a captivating female vocalist, a masterful saxophonist, a proficient percussionist, and a visionary DJ, this exceptional collective commands the dance floor with effortless grace, ensuring every guest remains enchanted throughout the evening.

View our list of Italy's best wedding bands ➡️

Based in the luminous capital of Rome, Into The Night regularly performs across the city and beyond, lending their refined artistry to weddings, exclusive private parties, and prestigious corporate events. They are frequently commissioned for celebrations at the magnificent Torre del Parco in Lecce.

DJ Live ensembles are the quintessential choice for any affair, their sophisticated approach enabling Into The Night to tailor each set with absolute precision to your desires. They present multi-genre performances that can evoke a serene, lounge-like ambience or ignite a resplendent, full-scale celebration with equal mastery.

To secure one of Rome’s most distinguished DJ Live acts, look no further than Into The Night. As one of Rome's best wedding bands, they promise an unforgettable, impeccable experience.

jazz-fowls-band-duo-florence-italy.intro_html:
Jazz Fowls – An Exquisite Jazz Duo & Ensemble Based in Florence, Italy

Jazz Fowls present an impeccable curation of Jazz, Soul, and R&B. Comprised of highly refined professional musicians, the ensemble tailors its lineup to the distinctive preferences and bespoke requirements of each occasion. They are regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at Villa Nemora in Arezzo and Pieve Aldina Relais & Châteaux Hotel in Siena.
jazz-fowls-band-duo-florence-italy.description_html:
With a distinguished reputation, Jazz Fowls have graced numerous prestigious venues, including the renowned Belmond Hotel properties—Castello di Casole and Villa San Michele—as well as iconic settings such as Caffè Paszkosky in Florence and the esteemed Hotel Gran Principe di Piemonte.

Curated Lineup Options:

  • Duo: guitar + voice
  • Trio: guitar + voice + bass / double-bass
  • Quartet: guitar + voice + bass / double-bass + drums
  • Quintet: guitar + voice + bass / double-bass + drums + sax

These refined configurations represent our signature live sets, yet we are delighted to perform in alternative arrangements to realise the client’s most refined vision.

wedding-party-cover-band-italy-fighters.intro_html:
The Fighters – an exquisite trio of musicians, based in Lazio, Italy, devoted to the art of live performance.

This refined ensemble specialises in impeccably executed covers of the most celebrated anthems in musical history. With decades of collective experience, The Fighters continue to captivate audiences with their boundless energy and masterful artistry. Their curated repertoire spans eras and genres—from the timeless brilliance of Queen and The Beatles to the contemporary verve of The Black Eyed Peas—ensuring every guest is swept into an unforgettable evening of dance.

Regularly engaged for bespoke weddings and exclusive events at distinguished venues such as Villa Quaranta Tommasi Wine Hotel & SPA in Ospedaletto and Castello di Rossino in Lecco, The Fighters bring seamless sophistication to every occasion. They travel throughout Italy, gracing private celebrations, festivals, and club engagements with an effortless elegance that has earned them a devoted following for over a decade.

Their years of expertise guarantee a flawless setup and performance, making them the quintessential choice for discerning hosts. Among the prestigious destinations where they have been booked for weddings and events:

  • Castello di Rossino, Lecco
  • Villa Quaranta Tommasi Hotel
  • Antica Fattoria di Paterno
  • Castello di Petrata, Assisi
  • Castel Gandolfo, Rome
  • Casa Olivi, Treia, Italy
  • Agriturismo Tontenano, Arezzo
  • Tenuta di Forte Sorgnano
  • Castello Brancaccio, Rome
  • Villa Le Bolli
  • Riparbella, Pisa, Italy
  • Sansepolcro, Arezzo, Italy
  • Trevi, Perugia, Italy
  • Sorrento, Italy

For those seeking to secure one of Italy’s most distinguished wedding and party cover bands, The Fighters await the privilege of curating your extraordinary celebration.

wedding-dj-tuscany-charlie.intro_html:
DJ Charlie – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Curating Bespoke Soundscapes Across Tuscany, Italy

With a distinguished career spanning many years within the refined realm of music, DJ Charlie has orchestrated unforgettable experiences at weddings, private soirées, exclusive parties, and alpine après-ski events. His artistry has been further enriched by performances abroad in France, Switzerland, and England, allowing him to cultivate a sophisticated connection with discerning international audiences. Having honed his craft in elite clubs, he now collaborates exclusively with the esteemed DJ Zano—one of Italy’s most celebrated wedding DJs—to deliver impeccably curated musical journeys across the breathtaking landscapes of Tuscany, where he resides. Fluent in English, French, and Italian, Charlie ensures seamless harmony with every guest, tailoring each set to the refined sensibilities of the occasion. His transition from club stages to private events has been a deeply fulfilling evolution, driven by a passion for creating unforgettable moments through an impeccable soundtrack. He is regularly engaged for weddings and celebrations at the prestigious Villa Valentini Bonaparte in Perugia, Villa Lena in Pisa, and Agriturismo Terre di Nano in Siena.
wedding-dj-tuscany-charlie.description_html: DJ Charlie’s extensive and meticulously curated repertoire traces its roots from the nostalgic elegance of the 70s, 80s, and 90s revival through to the latest bespoke mixes spanning house, hip-hop, reggaeton, and electronic music. Seamlessly blending these diverse genres, he crafts an electrifying atmosphere that evolves effortlessly throughout the event, appealing to the most refined and varied musical palates. Beyond his own artistry, DJ Charlie collaborates with an ensemble of exceptional live artists—including vocalists, saxophonists, violinists, trumpeters, and drummers—infusing each set with a unique, captivating dimension that elevates the celebration. Renowned for uniting guests of all ages and cultural backgrounds, his vibrant yet refined sounds create an inclusive, engaging ambience that transforms every event into an unforgettable, luxurious experience.

tuscany-wedding-band-italy.intro_html:
About The Tuscany Wedding Band – an ensemble of exceptional refinement based in Florence, Tuscany

✨ What discerning clients cherish most: the crowning highlight of their event, musicians of extraordinary talent, an atmosphere of effortless elegance, impeccable professionalism and accommodation, guests utterly captivated, and the highest recommendation.

The Tuscany Wedding Band has curated a legacy of eleven years, specializing exclusively in the most distinguished celebrations—nuptials, bespoke conventions, and exquisite galas.

Their vast, meticulously selected repertoire renders them the quintessential ensemble for any occasion of note: from refined concerts and gala evenings to intimate cocktail receptions, sublime dinner music, and irresistible dance sets.

We are regularly engaged to perform at the most coveted venues, including Villa Grabau in Lucca, Casa Cornacchi in Arezzo, and Villa Buonvisi in Tuscany, Italy—each a setting worthy of their artistry.

Every musician is Tuscan-born, save for the vocalist, a Canadian who has made Florence her home for 25 years, lending a cosmopolitan grace to the ensemble’s authentic Italian soul.

Their illustrious clientele includes private affairs of the highest order: the wedding of Mayor Domenici (former Mayor of Florence), fashion designer Guicciardini’s Spring Ball, Ben Lewis’s 60th Birthday (chief financial advisor at Goldman Sachs), and Peter Arnell’s Wedding (founder of the Arnell Group), whose guest list included the legendary Tina Turner.

Each member brings years of solo mastery honed in celebrated concert halls, festivals, and as session musicians alongside luminaries such as Raf, Biagio Antonacci, Irene Grandi, Dirotta su Cuba, Noemi, Ana Popovic, Patti Smith, Patty Pravo, Dolce Nera, Adriano Celentano, and Etta James.

Their repertoire spans the classic jazz standards of the 1920s through 1950s—the timeless works of Sinatra, Ella Fitzgerald, and Sarah Vaughan—and extends to contemporary jazz icons like Diana Krall, Norah Jones, Amy Winehouse, and Michael Bublé. For the dance floor, they command an impeccable selection of Motown, Soul, and music from the 1960s to the 1990s, alongside modern masters such as Rihanna, Adele, Beyoncé, Bruno Mars, Pharrell Williams, Meghan Trainor, and Coldplay.

It is their consummate musicianship, professionalism, and an unmistakable “Tuscan flair” that has established them as one of the most sought-after ensembles for both Italian and international events of unparalleled distinction.

For those who seek the finest wedding band Tuscany (Italy) can offer, an introduction to The Tuscany Wedding Band awaits the most discerning enquiry.

string-quartet-sicily-armonia.intro_html:
Armonia String Quartet – An Exquisite String Ensemble from Sicily, Italy

Armonia String Quartet is a magnificently refined string group, presenting impeccably curated classical renditions for the most distinguished occasions.

Whether gracing grand celebrations or intimate gatherings, this ensemble infuses every event with timeless romance, enchanting all who experience their artistry.

Masters of an extraordinary repertoire, the quartet performs with equal elegance across classical, pop, rock, and folk genres, offering a truly bespoke musical journey.

Based in Catania, the quartet regularly performs across Sicily for destination weddings, exclusive parties, and corporate soirees, and is delighted to travel to your chosen venue.

They are frequently engaged for weddings and events at the prestigious Grand Hotel Timeo Belmond, Borgo del Carato, and Verdura Resort Rocco Forte Hotel in Sicily.
string-quartet-sicily-armonia.description_html:
Always impeccably attired, Armonia String Quartet takes profound pride in their performances, ensuring every exquisite detail is flawlessly executed.

The quartet brings many years of performance experience, offering the utmost professionalism and skill to deliver a perfect, seamless presentation.

Their swift, unobtrusive setup allows the ensemble remarkable flexibility for both indoor and outdoor settings, adapting effortlessly to any refined environment.

Below are just a few of the distinguished locations where the quartet has been engaged:

  • Grand Hotel Timeo Belmond Hotel
  • Verdura Resort Rocco Forte Hotel
  • Commenda di San Calogero
  • La Tonnara di Scopello
  • Torre di Scopello-Doria
  • Torre Garbonogara, Termini Imerese
  • Dimora delle Balze
  • Borgo del Carato, Sicily
  • Ragusa, Sicily
  • Palermo
  • Lentini, Syracuse, Italy

For those seeking one of Sicily’s most refined string quartets, Armonia String Quartet represents an unparalleled choice.

wedding-dj-tuscany-italy-stefo.intro_html:
DJ Stefo – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Beside the Tuscan Hills

Stefo stands as an exceptional wedding DJ, residing in the refined region of Tuscany, Italy. His impeccable artistry is sought after for weddings and distinguished events across Italy and throughout Europe.

His curated repertoire spans a sophisticated blend of genres—from House and pop to Garage and hip hop—demonstrating remarkable versatility and flawless mixing.

Stefo’s mastery has been cultivated under the mentorship of DJ Zano, one of Italy’s most celebrated and sought-after wedding DJs.

For those discerning couples in search of an unparalleled wedding DJ within Tuscany’s finest offerings, an introduction to Stefo promises an experience of utmost luxury.

He is regularly booked to elevate celebrations at elite venues such as Borgo Tre Rose Country Hotel in Montepulciano, Tenuta di Monaciano in Siena, and Castello di Montalto in Castelnuovo Berardenga, Italy.
wedding-dj-tuscany-italy-stefo.description_html:
A consummate party DJ based in Florence, Italy, Stefo has graced some of the most exclusive discos throughout Tuscany with his refined presence.

His journey began in 2013 as a DJ producer, releasing his first record for Wolfrage Recordings before joining the esteemed House Park Records.

His impeccable charisma and innate musicality have rendered him a premier choice for weddings in Tuscany, as well as for corporate soirées and intimate private parties.

With years of seasoned experience, he is an assurance of an uninterrupted, exuberant celebration that endures through the night.

His boundless energy and profound love for music converge into an exquisite performance—an unforgettable hallmark of luxury and joy.

swinging-emotions-milan-italy.intro_html:
About Swinging Emotions – a refined jazz & swing ensemble based in Milan, Italy

Giulio is an Italian composer, arranger, guitarist and vocalist of exceptional calibre. His artistry is defined by a warm, impeccably styled crooner’s voice—evocative of Michael Bublé and Frank Sinatra—and a masterful command of the American Songbook. He reinterprets timeless melodies with an exquisite sensibility, appealing to both devoted jazz connoisseurs and discerning audiences who delight in the elegance of swing. The ensemble is a coveted presence at luxury weddings and exclusive events, regularly gracing distinguished venues such as Villa Balbiano and Villa Simplicitas E Solferino on the shores of Lake Como.

Among the select few musicians in Italy who command a seven-string semi-acoustic guitar—an instrument hallmarked by virtuosos like Bucky Pizzarelli and John Pizzarelli—Giulio is a prodigy of swing guitar. His discography includes a curated collection of albums, EPs and singles, featuring original compositions, reimagined international successes, and the cherished classics of legendary crooners. His most recent album, Timeless, has garnered over 1.8 million streams on Spotify within months of its release—a testament to its refined, enduring appeal. Giulio has shared the stage with luminaries of Italian and global jazz, most notably the esteemed New York pianist John Colianni (renowned for his work with Mel Tormé, Les Paul, Lionel Hampton and Woody Allen). Together, they have performed at prestigious London venues—Spike’s Place Jazz Club, The Boisdale of Belgravia, The Concorde Club and The Boisdale of Canary Wharf—each a setting that has also hosted icons such as Amy Winehouse, Rod Stewart and Tom Jones.

His career is punctuated by performances at illustrious jazz festivals and bespoke high-end events, including the 150th anniversary celebration of Villa d’Este on Lake Como, the unveiling of the new Ferrari 296 GTS, and exquisitely curated private weddings. For live engagements, Giulio collaborates with a select roster of elite musicians, offering ensembles ranging from an intimate trio to a sophisticated quartet, and expanding to an eight-piece big band. He also presents exclusive tribute projects dedicated to iconic artists—Michael Bublé, Nat King Cole, Frank Sinatra—alongside a “Swingin’ Christmas” programme, an impeccable choice for the holiday season.

Comprising some of Italy’s most accomplished musicians, Rogues Gallery brings decades of experience curating refined performances for the most exclusive luxury events. The ensemble has graced prestigious venues across Italy and beyond, collaborating with world-renowned brands and the industry’s most sought-after event planners. A perennial presence at the illustrious Chiostro dei Domenicani in Lecce, they are a hallmark of sophisticated celebration.

wedding-saxophonist-tuscany-spicy-sax.intro_html: Spicy Sax – An exquisite wedding DJ & saxophonist, based in the refined landscapes of Tuscany and Sardinia.
wedding-saxophonist-tuscany-spicy-sax.description_html:
What discerning clients most admire: high‑energy saxophone and DJ performances that keep the dance floor impeccably full, an innate ability to read the room, seamless improvisation, and a professional, effortless collaboration – a truly curated experience.

Hailing from the heart of Tuscany, Spicy Sax delivers a bespoke musical journey that spans classical, jazz, pop, and Ibiza‑style sounds. His vast and meticulously curated repertoire is designed to elevate any occasion with unparalleled sophistication.

Spicy Sax collaborates with an ensemble of exceptional performers – from DJs and string quartets to percussionists and full orchestras – offering all‑inclusive packages that ensure every musical desire is met with flawless execution. Whether performing indoors or al fresco, his years of refined experience guarantee an impeccable atmosphere for private celebrations, weddings, and corporate affairs.

Happy to travel, Spicy Sax regularly graces the Tuscan region with his artistry, and throughout August, he performs exclusively at weddings and events in Sardinia. He is frequently booked at esteemed venues such as Villa Catignano in Siena, Hotel Ollastu Resort in Sassari, and Borgo Sant’Ambrogio in Pienza.

wedding-band-bologna-curious-groove.intro_html:
The Curious Groove Band — an exquisite wedding and celebration ensemble, based in the historic city of Bologna, Italy.

Conceived in March 2013, this refined collective has since devoted itself to delivering the finest funk and groove repertoire with impeccable artistry. Exceptionally versatile, the band effortlessly traverses a spectrum of styles throughout your event, curating a bespoke sonic journey for every moment. From an elegant jazz aperitif and an acoustic dinner set to an electrifying party performance, The Curious Groove Band ensures a seamless, captivating experience from the first note to the last.

The ensemble is regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at distinguished venues such as Castello di Petrata in Perugia and Glamping Abruzzo in Pescara, Italy.
wedding-band-bologna-curious-groove.description_html:
The band comprises six primary elements — male and female vocals, guitar, bass, drums, piano, and saxophone — and may be fully adapted to suit the unique character of your occasion. For intimate, refined gatherings, the formation can be discreetly reduced to two or three musicians; for grand celebrations, the full six-piece ensemble commands the room with effortless authority.

With decades of collective experience, The Curious Groove Band attends to every musical detail, offering a vast and curated repertoire that ensures something for every discerning guest. The act draws from an exclusive pool of uncompromising musicians — among the finest in Italy for this genre — each at the pinnacle of their craft. As a result, the lineup may occasionally differ from promotional footage, reflecting the bespoke nature of each performance.

Below are a selection of locations where this distinguished band has been engaged for weddings and events:

  • Castello di Petrata, Assisi
  • Glamping Abruzzo, Cappuccini
  • Morcote, Switzerland
  • Alessandria, Piedmont, Italy
  • Passo delle Erbe, Italy

For those seeking one of Italy’s most refined and grooving ensembles, The Curious Groove Band stands as an unparalleled choice.

tuscany-sax-dj-duo-italy.intro_html:
Tuscany Sax & DJ – An Exquisite Sax & DJ Duo Based in Tuscany, Italy

Raff and Freddy, two brothers born and raised in a small town nestled in the Tuscan countryside near Florence, embody a rare harmony of heritage and artistry. Music lovers since childhood, they unite their instruments and creative vision to form the distinguished duo Tuscany Sax & DJ.

Eclectic, brilliantly talented, and infused with a spirit of refined audacity, they craft a musical style that transcends convention—redefining the classical perception of the saxophone. Their performances, driven by impeccable energy and captivating involvement, command attention and enchant an ever-growing audience.

Tuscany Sax & DJ are now sought after for international luxury events, where elegance seamlessly intertwines with celebration to shape an utterly unique spectacle. For your most cherished and extraordinary day, entrust your entertainment to the professionalism and passion of this duo, assured of a bespoke, personalised service that transforms your grand occasion into an unforgettable, exuberant festivity.

An exclusive selection of venues that have hosted their refined performances:

  • Masseria Agnello, Realmonte
  • Castello Vicchiomaggio
  • Relais Borgo Scopeto
  • Beefbar on the Beach, Malta
  • Hotel Villa La Palagina
  • Borgo Di Castelvecchio
  • Agriturismo Terre di Nano
  • The Estate Of Petroio
  • Tenuta di Casa Bruciata
  • Castello di Rosciano, Perugia

  • Masseria Calderisi, Fasano

  • Umberto Cesari, Bologna
  • La Pescaia Resort

So if you seek to engage the finest sax & DJ duo Italy has to offer, we invite you to reach out.

In Italiano

Raff e Freddy sono due fratelli nati e cresciuti in un piccolo paese della campagna toscana, vicino Firenze.

Appassionati di musica fin da piccoli, uniscono i loro strumenti e la loro creatività formando il duo Tuscany Sax & DJ.

Eclettici, talentuosi e folli quanto basta, danno vita a uno stile musicale fuori dagli schemi, rivoluzionando l’idea classica del sassofono.

Le loro performances all’insegna dell’energia e del coinvolgimento non passano inosservate, conquistando un pubblico sempre più ampio.

Tuscany Sax & DJ sono oggi richiesti in eventi di lusso dove la classe si fonde con il divertimento per dar forma ad uno spettacolo unico.

Nel giorno più bello e speciale della vostra vita, affidatevi alla professionalità e alla passione del duo Tuscany Sax & DJ, e sarete certi di ricevere un servizio personalizzato e unico, in grado di rendere il vostro grande giorno, una festa straordinaria ed esplosiva.

Tuscany Sax & DJ (premiati Ai Dance Music Awards come migliori performers Italiani) vi propongono un intrattenimento musicale originale e unico nel suo genere, adattandosi alle vostre richieste musicali, per enfatizzare ogni momento del vostro matrimonio con un sound d'eccezione.

Ogni momento del Matrimonio (accoglienza e aperitivo, cena, taglio torta e ballo) verrà gestito in maniera unica e scenografica, senza dover effettuare un minimo spostamento di strumentazione.

Tuscany Sax & DJ vantano esperienza e professionalità nella gestione artistica di eventi musicali, rappresentando la scelta primaria in eventi di alto livello, sia privati che di importanti marchi italiani e internazionali.

Il repertorio proposto dai Tuscany Sax & DJ, spazia sui generi Disco (Dance / Deep & Fashion House ecc.) ognuno caratterizzato dal proprio sound Tuscany Sax & DJ per garantirvi una festa formidabile, capace di superare tutte le vostre aspettative.

tuscany-sax-dj-duo-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Su richiesta - Silent Disco (per proseguire il party fino a tardi senza alcun rumore esterno, grazie alle cufie led) - Luci Illuminazione scenografica / service luce arch - Videoproiezioni per trailer.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Tempo minimo consigliato: 12 mesi. Consigliato: 24 mesi.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Il repertorio va in base alle situazioni distinte che si vengono a creare durante il Matrimonio (es. accoglienza e aperitivo, cena, disco-party...) ed è totalmente personalizzabile sul singolo evento.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Il servizio di personalizzazione dei brani è compreso nel nostro pack standard quindi nessun problema nella scelta di qualsiasi brano, soprattutto per l'ingresso sposi, taglio torta, primo ballo...



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>18 anni.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, siamo in grado di operare grazie anche al nostro personale tecnico in tutto il Mondo.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, dipende dal raggio chilometrico.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Non abbiamo un tempo limite, i Tuscany Sax & DJ sono a disposizione dalla prima accoglienza ospiti alla "chiusura" dell'evento.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Il tempo tecnico di installazione impianti dipende dal numero di impianti stessi (audio / luce / coreografie) da installare. Il tempo è sempre comunque in linea con le normali esigenze delle location.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì</details>

wedding-band-rome-rising-stars.intro_html:
The Rising Stars – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble from Rome, Italy

Rooted in the timeless elegance of Rome, The Rising Stars embody a peerless wedding and party band, renowned for curating extraordinary musical journeys for the most discerning events. Masters of enchanting ambiance, this refined ensemble is the definitive choice for those who seek an indelible, impeccably crafted experience. Their gift for imbuing every gathering with an aura of profound significance is unmatched, establishing them as true luminaries in the realm of live entertainment.

What distinguishes The Rising Stars is their remarkable adaptability, offering a bespoke line-up that transforms seamlessly from an intimate duo to a dynamic full band, tailored to the unique character of each occasion. They are regularly engaged for weddings and events at the illustrious Villa Aurelia, Villa Piccolomini, and Casale del Gallo in Rome, Italy.
wedding-band-rome-rising-stars.description_html:
With a legacy spanning over fifteen illustrious years, The Rising Stars have graced stages across Italy and beyond, performing at weddings that radiate love, private celebrations brimming with joy, and corporate galas demanding the utmost sophistication. Distinguished by a diverse and extensive repertoire, they traverse eras and genres with effortless grace, ensuring the perfect melodic narrative for every moment and every guest. Their music becomes the living soundtrack to life’s most cherished occasions, resonating with the nostalgia of the past and the vibrancy of the present.

In essence, The Rising Stars are not merely a band; they are curators of emotion, architects of memory, and catalysts of celebration. It is not simply about music—it is about crafting an unforgettable symphony of moments that etch themselves into the tapestry of time. When you choose The Rising Stars, you are securing an enchanting journey through the power of music, elevated to an art form.

Their impeccable line-up options include:

Duo: composed of a voice (male or female) and an instrument chosen from guitar or piano, this refined pairing is particularly suited to civil or religious ceremonies, or for entertaining guests during an aperitif, with a repertoire of delicate Italian and international classics.

Strings Duo: a sophisticated combination of violin and cello, perfect for ceremonies and especially for an elegant aperitif, offering both classical and contemporary masterpieces.

All-Female Band: featuring voice, piano, drums, and bass, this ensemble can elevate the entire wedding reception with a wealth of Italian and international songs interpreted in a jazz key, alongside great dance classics from the 1970s to today.

All-Male Band: comprising four musicians—voice, bass, guitar, and drums—this group accompanies guests from aperitif to final celebration, illuminating the atmosphere with a vast repertoire spanning rockabilly (Jerry Lee Lewis, Elvis Presley), dance hits of the ’70s and ’80s (Gloria Gaynor, The Trammps, Barry White), contemporary chart-toppers (Bruno Mars, Coldplay, Muse), and timeless Italian and international treasures (Fabi, Tenco, Silvestri, Gino Paoli, Nat King Cole, Michael Bublé).

The Big Band: from two to five voices, a rhythm section, and a wind section, with a repertoire that moves from evergreen Italian and international classics to dance revival and current hits.

DJ Service: ideally suited for the final phases of the reception, dedicated to dancing, this service creates a truly engaging disco atmosphere with a professional lighting system and a DJ-set ranging from lounge music—perfect for soft moments such as an aperitif or dinner—to genres including dance, revival, rock & roll, rock revival, Latin American, group, and commercial dance.

So, if you are seeking one of Rome’s most refined wedding and party bands, look no further than The Rising Stars.

female-dj-milan-nene.intro_html:
Introducing DJ Nene – An Exquisite Wedding DJ and Electronic Music Producer Based in Milan

What discerning clients cherish: an impeccably curated dance floor throughout the evening, seamless transitions, a refined song selection that adapts to the atmosphere, radiant professionalism, and an abundance of guest admiration.

DJ Nene is an Italian electronic music DJ and producer whose deep-rooted passion for all forms of electronic music and emerging technologies has cultivated a bespoke musical identity — one defined by original productions and captivating performances.

Her releases traverse cosmopolitan, dreamy minimal house journeys and sweet electronic gems, each track a testament to her artful vision.

DJ Nene’s sets are an eclectic and fun fusion of timeless classics and contemporary sounds. Her selections in indie dance and melodic techno are characterized by a unique, elegant signature, ensuring every guest is moved to the dance floor.

She is regularly booked for weddings and events at prestigious locations such as Belmond Villa San Michele in Fiesole, Villa Regina Teodolinda by Lake Como, and Villa Lake Relais Gargnano in Navazzo, Italy.

As a remixer, her passion for melodies resonates with remarkable power and effect.

Her works embody a sublime balance between energy and minimalism, reflecting a mild yet eclectic philosophy where quality reigns supreme. Each performance tells a story, weaving a harmonic dance across her chosen musical spectrum — whether a soft house set, a hypnotic club journey, or a dreamy wave movement.

She has collaborated with an illustrious roster of high-profile brands and venues, including: Louis Vuitton, Gio Moretti, Fragiacomo, Liu Jo, Sephora, Martini, Santa Margherita Wines, DS Automobiles, Inter Football Team, CR7 Cristiano Ronaldo, Unopiù, Sky, Pirelli, Me by Melià, and Hilton.

She has been engaged for weddings and events at an array of distinguished locations, including:

florence-tenors-italy.intro_html:
The Florence Tenors — An Exquisite Ensemble of Refined Male Vocalists, Based in Florence, Tuscany

Celebrated throughout Italy for their impeccable live performances, The Florence Tenors grace weddings, galas, and exclusive gatherings with a presence that is nothing short of extraordinary. Their curated repertoire spans from the grandeur of opera and classical masterpieces to the warmth of traditional Italian melodies and the allure of modern pop, beautifully adapted to reflect the unique vision of each discerning client.

The ensemble is frequently engaged to perform at the most prestigious estates and venues, including Villa Boscarello in Siena, Villa Camilla in Florence, and Castello di Rosciano in Perugia, among a constellation of other refined locations.

A Selection of Distinguished Venues Graced by The Florence Tenors

Bespoke Performance Offerings

1) The Classic Three Tenors
Following the final course and preceding the cake, the ensemble, resplendent in concert dress, delivers an exquisite performance of approximately twenty to thirty minutes, accompanied by piano and, should one desire, a string quartet.

2) The Three Tenors as "Singing Waiters"
During the dinner service, the tenors, discreetly attired as waiters, move among the tables alongside the serving staff. One may even pour wine. Just before the first course, a tenor surprises the gathering with an a cappella aria or a piece with piano. After the next course, the second tenor rises, and before dessert, the third tenor performs. Later, in concert dress, the trio presents a final, polished concert of approximately twenty minutes with piano and string quartet accompaniment if desired.

3) The Three Tenors as "Guests" for the Ceremony — "Love Actuality" Version
The tenors arrive as if they are invited guests, mingling before the ceremony and taking their seats among the congregation. At a moment chosen by the couple, the pianist begins, and one tenor rises to sing, followed by the second and third, who move toward the couple. Together, they offer one or two additional pieces during the ceremony.

Reflections from Discerning Clients

During the wedding ceremony at the church, at which moments does the tenor typically perform? — Asked by Georgina on 30 August 2025

Response from Lorenzo: Typically during the ceremony, the tenor may perform at the offertory hymn, at Communion, and at the Signing of the Register, as well as upon the bride's entrance.

bologna-swing-band-italy.intro_html:
Bologna Swing Band – An Ensemble of Exquisite Gypsy Jazz & Swing, Based in Bologna, Italy

Founded in 2010 in the refined city of Bologna, Bologna Swing Band brings together four virtuosos from distinguished artistic backgrounds, united by an impeccable passion for Gypsy Jazz—the cherished Manouche tradition. From its inception, the ensemble swiftly ascended to perform at the most exclusive events, festivals, and weddings across Italy, becoming one of the nation’s most coveted purveyors of refined Gypsy Jazz & Swing. Their impeccable artistry has graced celebrated destinations such as Zunfthaus zur Meisen in Switzerland, Villa Rosa in Montepulciano, and the revered Abbazia San Pietro in Valle in Umbria, Italy.

The quartet curates a bespoke repertoire steeped in authentic Manouche culture, with a steadfast reverence for Django Reinhardt, the preeminent master of gypsy music. Enchanted by the narratives of the countless musicians who traversed Europe in the last century, these four talents enrich each performance with original compositions, selections from the Standard Jazz repertoire, and sublime arrangements of varied traditions—all exquisitely reinterpreted through the lens of Gypsy Jazz.

acoustic-duo-bari-artisan.intro_html:
Artisan Acoustic Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic Experience Based in Bari, Puglia, Italy

Artisan Acoustic Duo presents an impeccably curated pairing of performers, enchanting audiences throughout Puglia and beyond with their distinctive interpretations of history’s most celebrated compositions. From jazz and Italian swing to pop and American blues, this refined duo effortlessly traverses genres, offering a bespoke musical journey for every occasion. With a willingness to travel, they grace weddings, private soirées, and corporate events across Italy with an air of effortless sophistication.

Discover their artistry in the video below for a glimpse of their captivating repertoire.

Listen further to our vocalist as part of The Popinjays, one of Puglia’s most sought‑after wedding ensembles. We are frequently engaged to perform at distinguished venues such as Masseria San Martino in Brindisi and Leonardo Trulli Resort in Puglia.
acoustic-duo-bari-artisan.description_html:
Entirely acoustic, this duo offers a seamless, elegant setup that adapts with grace to both indoor and outdoor settings. Their eclectic repertoire spans eras and genres, ensuring something exquisite for every generation. The female vocalist possesses a truly enchanting range, capturing the hearts of all who listen.

Among the distinguished locations where we have been booked for weddings and events:

  • Masseria San Martino, Brindisi
  • Polignano a Mare, Bari, Italy
  • Leonardo Trulli Resort, Puglia
  • Masseria San Giovanni, Puglia
  • Masseria Grieco

Should you seek one of Italy’s most refined acoustic duos, look no further than Artisan Acoustic Duo—an invitation to elevate your celebration with unparalleled elegance.

dj-cips-cortona-italy.intro_html:
DJ Cips – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration DJ, Based in Cortona, Italy

✨ What discerning clients cherish most: impeccably packed dance floors, flawlessly curated music selections, an intuitive reading of the room, seamless communication, gracious accommodation of requests, electrifying sets, and unwavering professionalism.

For the past decade, DJ Cips has graced both exclusive clubs and intimate private soirées with his refined artistry.

Since 2016, he has devoted his talents to the world of weddings, while continuing to elevate festivals and club events.

By day or by night, he attends to every exquisite detail, delivering an unparalleled level of bespoke service.

His sets are meticulously tailored to each couple’s desires, reflecting a dedication to precision, reliability, and sophistication—supported by the finest equipment and absolute dependability.

He is regularly engaged for weddings and events at distinguished venues such as The Lazy Olive Villa in Siena, Agriturismo Villa Le Bolli in Tuscany, and Palagina la Dimora in Figline Valdarno.
dj-cips-cortona-italy.description_html:
Always prepared to refine every facet of a couple’s most special day, DJ Cips collaborates closely with their wedding coordinator. No request is beyond consideration—whether it concerns the style of the setup or the selection of songs.

With an extensive mastery of the club scene, DJ Cips now channels all his expertise into the wedding realm, offering an experience that is both refined and exhilarating.

His exceptional ability to discern the energy of a crowd and adapt his performance accordingly stands as one of his most distinguished qualities.

Below is a curated selection of the prestigious locations where clients have commissioned his artistry for weddings and celebrations:

  • The Lazy Olive Villa, Siena
  • Agriturismo Villa Le Bolli

wedding-band-puglia-italy-cosmos.intro_html:
Cosmos – An Exquisite Wedding Band from Puglia, Italy

Cosmos presents a refined musical experience, a bespoke pop covers ensemble based in the sun-drenched region of Puglia. At its heart lies the impeccable vocal artistry of lead singer Marina, whose captivating presence elevates every performance. Curated exclusively for weddings and distinguished events, Cosmos brings a luminous energy that transforms receptions into unforgettable celebrations. Their meticulously crafted setlist, blending modern and classic pop masterpieces, ensures guests remain enraptured on the dance floor throughout the evening.

This ensemble has been entrusted with delivering impeccable entertainment at some of Italy’s most prestigious venues, including Masseria Borgo Ritella in Fasano, Relais Villa Cenci in Cisternino, and Lido Bambu Beach Club in Monopoli. For discerning couples seeking both male and female lead vocals, lead singer Marina also performs alongside the exquisite Puglia-based band Stardust, offering an additional layer of bespoke versatility.

These are among the exclusive locations where Cosmos has orchestrated unforgettable wedding celebrations:

  • Masseria Borgo Ritella, Fasano
  • Masseria Le Carrube, Ostuni
  • Relais Villa Cenci, Cisternino
  • Lido Bambu Beach Club, Monopoli

myrtle-duo-ravenna-italy.intro_html:
Myrtle Duo – An Acoustic Duo of Distinction, Based in Ravenna, Italy

Presenting Myrtle Duo, an exquisite musical ensemble whose captivating presence has graced celebrations across the globe, weaving a tapestry of love, joy, and refined elegance into every wedding and event they adorn.

With a bespoke fusion of vocals, guitar melodies, loop station artistry, and percussive rhythms, Myrtle Duo transforms any gathering into an unforgettable, curated experience.

At the heart of this duo lie two seasoned musicians, each boasting over two decades of impeccable experience in the world of live performance and high-end events.

Their devotion to music is matched only by their passion for yoga, and they artfully unite these two disciplines to craft a harmonious atmosphere of unparalleled serenity and sophistication.

We are regularly engaged to perform at weddings and events at Borgo Stomennano in Tuscany and Buccelletti Casali & Cantina in Arezzo, Italy.
myrtle-duo-ravenna-italy.description_html:
Myrtle Duo’s journey has carried them to far-flung destinations, where they have shared their refined musical talents and life experiences. From the vibrant energy of New York to the pristine shores of the Maldives, from the mystical landscapes of India to the serene temples of Thailand, they have left an indelible mark with every note.

Their versatility is revealed through an extensive repertoire and an innate ability to adapt each performance to the occasion. Whether an intimate home concert, a sophisticated club, a romantic wedding, or a chic restaurant, they effortlessly create an ambiance that is both bespoke and enchanting.

What distinguishes Myrtle Duo is their capacity to perform anywhere—thanks to their wireless sound system, they can set the stage in the most picturesque locations without reliance on a power source, serenading you amidst nature’s breathtaking beauty.

From their harmonious vocal blends to their mesmerising guitar melodies and the subtle magic of their loop station, Myrtle Duo ensures your special day becomes an exquisite celebration of music, love, and happiness. Allow this duo to become the soundtrack to your most treasured moments, crafting lasting memories that will echo in your hearts forever.

venice-jazz-band-italy.intro_html:
The Venice Jazz Band – An Exquisite Jazz Ensemble Based in Venice, Italy

The Venice Jazz Band presents a meticulously curated repertoire spanning the golden era from 1901 through the beloved classics of the 1950s, performed with impeccable elegance and refined sensibility. What distinguishes this ensemble is the profound camaraderie that infuses every performance, a seamless harmony born of genuine friendship.

The musicians who comprise The Venice Jazz Band represent some of the most accomplished jazz talents in northern Italy, a distinguished collective that has performed together since the band’s inception in 2005. Their repertoire encompasses dixieland, ragtime, swing, gypsy jazz, and celebrated American songs from 1901 to 1950, with occasional bespoke acoustic interpretations of pop and rock selections. In collaboration with guest vocalists, the ensemble also offers an exquisite array of Bossa, Latin, and Bolero arrangements, available upon request.

The band is regularly engaged for weddings and distinguished events at prestigious venues including Hotel Belmond Cipriani, Rifugio Pomedes in Belluno, Hotel Palazzo Pianca in Venice, and Castello Rubein in Merano, Italy.

The band graciously accommodates virtually any repertoire request, refined to suit the client’s vision within thoughtfully considered parameters. The ensemble functions as an extended family of musicians, its configuration adapting to the client’s specific desires and budget—from an intimate duo to a full ensemble of six or seven musicians. Despite the variety of instrumentation, the signature element remains the band’s distinctive acoustic warmth, relying almost exclusively on unamplified instruments, allowing performances with or without amplification across a diverse range of settings.

The instrumental palette includes clarinet, guitar, banjo, double bass, drums, vocals, violin, and saxophone. The Venice Jazz Band collaborates with premier sound services in the region and can seamlessly arrange all necessary audio instrumentation to suit any location. The ensemble performs regularly throughout Italy and possesses an intimate knowledge of Venice’s unique logistical considerations, leveraging a trusted network of local collaborators to ensure an impeccably smooth concert setup and execution on the island.

dj-gavorrano-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
DJ Gavorrano – An Exquisite Wedding & Party DJ, Based in Tuscany, Italy

What discerning clients most admire: an impeccable DJ, a meticulously curated song selection, an innate ability to read the room, graceful accommodation of requests, a consistently packed dance floor, and a demeanour of consummate professionalism and warmth.

For those in pursuit of a masterful DJ whose repertoire knows no bounds—spanning every genre imaginable—to elevate the enchantment of your wedding day, you have arrived at the finest destination. DJ Gavorrano brings a passion and energy that captivates every guest, ensuring an atmosphere of refined celebration.

Based in Grosseto, DJ Gavorrano has devoted many years to his craft, and in recent seasons has specialised exclusively in the wedding sector throughout Tuscany and beyond. He is regularly entrusted with performances at the illustrious Burlamacchi Villas in Lucca, Villa Santarsa in Sansepolcro, and Verreno Resort in Arezzo—venues that themselves embody luxury and exclusivity.

With a profound passion for all musical genres, he is also a vinyl connoisseur, possessing a bespoke collection of approximately two thousand records. His expertise in audio, instrumentation, and lighting design allows him to craft the perfect entertainment package for your wedding or event—a truly customised experience.

Services

DJ Gavorrano provides everything required to deliver an extraordinary DJ set: professional sound systems and an exquisite lighting rig that adapts seamlessly to each pivotal moment of your day—from a sophisticated aperitif through to the final, unforgettable hours of the night.

Repertoire

You may rely upon his seasoned counsel and a tailor-made schedule for your celebration. His vast musical range, complemented by his extraordinary vinyl collection, ensures a soundscape of unparalleled depth and elegance.

The party package includes a complete DJ set alongside professional speakers, a refined lighting system, and all necessary equipment. Travel is included in all quotations (unless otherwise stated), offering couples a seamless, stress‑free journey toward an impeccable event.

jazz-swing-trio-florence-suits.intro_html:
The Suits Jazz Band – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble Based in Florence, Italy

What discerning clients most treasured about The Suits Jazz Band: impeccably stylish, high-calibre live jazz that creates an enchanting atmosphere, seamless communication, and bespoke flexibility—including roaming sets and curated special requests—establishing them as a refined choice for weddings and events across Italy.

The Suits Jazz Band is a distinguished and versatile ensemble, founded in 2017 and originating from the luminous city of Florence, Italy. Specialising in jazz and roaming performances, this sophisticated 4+ piece band is celebrated for delivering captivating musical experiences that are both intimate and grand. At the heart of their melodic tapestry lies a skilfully curated blend of trumpet, guitar, tuba, and percussion washboard—each instrument intertwined with the next: the trumpet’s melodic allure, the guitar’s harmonious strumming, the tuba’s deep resonance, and the washboard’s rhythmic groove, infusing every performance with irresistible energy.

The band’s unique sound is further elevated by enchanting vocal harmonies, their voices blending seamlessly to add an intimate, nostalgic touch. This fusion of instrumental mastery and evocative vocals creates an unforgettable auditory journey for audiences of every occasion. The Suits Jazz Band has earned a reputation for its ability to adapt with effortless grace—whether for a joyous wedding, a lively private party, or a sophisticated corporate gathering, they bring infectious energy and impeccable talent. Their repertoire spans jazz classics, swing tunes, blues ballads, and Latin rhythms, ensuring a diverse and engaging musical narrative.

Beyond exceptional performances, they manage every detail of equipment and logistics, offering a wholly hassle-free experience for event organisers. Their professionalism and meticulous attention to detail make them the preferred choice for those seeking top-tier entertainment. Dressed in the finest retro attire, The Suits Jazz Band is the quintessential ensemble for a vintage-inspired affair, ready to craft a soulful and vibrant ambience that delights guests at weddings, parties, and corporate events alike.

They perform across Italy, sharing their devotion to vintage music on many distinguished occasions. The band is regularly booked for weddings and events at venues such as Agriturismo Il Rigo in Siena, Villa il Pozzo in Certaldo, and La Badia di Orvieto in Terni. Their artistry has been celebrated on the award-winning wedding blog Love My Dress, and they recently performed at a wedding featured in Vogue Italia.

Here are just some of the esteemed locations where The Suits Jazz Band has been engaged for weddings and events:

  • Castello di Santa Maria Novella
  • Agriturismo Il Rigo, Siena, Italy
  • Castiglion Fiorentino, Arezzo
  • Borgo Di Castelvecchio
  • La Torre Di Pila, Perugia, Italy
  • Hotel Podere Conti
  • La Badia di Orvieto, Terni, Italy
  • Villa Lena, Pisa, Italy

runaway-soul-reggello-italy.intro_html:
Runaway Soul – An Exquisite Swing Trio, Based in Arezzo, Italy

Conceived in the summer of 2021, Runaway Soul emerged as a refined ensemble, captivating audiences in the finest clubs between Florence and Arezzo. Their impeccable artistry quickly earned them invitations to exclusive weddings and private celebrations throughout the Chianti region, and soon they were gracing the illustrious Frescobaldi estate, where they cultivated relationships with discerning event planners. Today, this bespoke trio travels across Italy, bringing its curated sound to weddings and distinguished gatherings.

They are regularly commissioned for celebrations at Agriturismo Terre di Nano in Siena and Relais Guado Al Sole in Pisa, two of Tuscany’s most enchanting venues.
runaway-soul-reggello-italy.description_html:
During the summer of 2023, Runaway Soul performed elegant aperitifs and wedding parties along the Tuscan coast, including coveted appearances on the islands of Giglio and Elba. Their exceptional talent has been widely recognised, with over sixty performances already scheduled this year alone.

The ensemble masterfully interprets Italian swing and dance, alongside jazzy, funky, and irresistibly danceable selections. Their repertoire also encompasses a rich array of traditional Tuscan melodies and beloved Italian folk classics, ensuring a perfectly refined musical backdrop for any occasion.

Line‑Up Options

  • Primary configuration: a sophisticated trio featuring saxophone, guitar with vocals, and drums.
  • Expandable to a six‑piece roaming ensemble, with the addition of double bass, trumpet, and other wind instruments.

Who We Are

We are a trio that seamlessly blends the finest traditions of folk music and Italian swing. Our curated repertoire ranges from timeless classics to spirited, dance‑inducing numbers—equally suited to setting an elegant ambience or igniting the dance floor.

How We Work

Our remarkable versatility allows us to adapt effortlessly to any event. Whether performing from a fixed position to create a central musical focal point, or moving freely among your guests to infuse spontaneity and interaction, we tailor the experience to your venue and desired atmosphere—be it romantic and refined, lively and energetic, or intimate and cosy.

What We Offer

Music lies at the heart of everything we do, yet the tempo remains yours to command. Whether you desire exuberant entertainment that invites celebration or a soft, elegant soundtrack that accompanies conversation, we are here to bring your musical vision to life with impeccable finesse.

We kindly request access to a private dressing room where the musicians may change and store their equipment, as well as a meal and refreshments during the event. For the most refined performance, we recommend positioning the musicians in a shaded area to ensure optimal conditions.

Line‑Up Options

  • Trio
  • Duo
  • Solo

capital-folk-rome-italy.intro_html:
Capital Folk – an exquisite, roaming folk ensemble based in Rome, Italy, offering a bespoke musical experience for the most discerning celebrations.

What clients most cherish: impeccably high‑energy performances that captivate every guest, with curated, versatile live sets that couples often describe as the crowning highlight of their wedding.

Capital Folk embodies the authentic roaming band tradition, bringing the very soul of Italian music to your wedding or exclusive event.

Whether you envision a romantic pre‑wedding aperitif amidst Tuscan vineyards, a sun‑drenched ceremony along the Amalfi Coast, or an intimate celebration within a Roman courtyard, we craft the perfect, refined musical atmosphere.

Led by Stefano, a distinguished Italian accordionist, the ensemble performs as soloists, duos, trios, or quartets—adapting seamlessly to the venue, your guests, and your vision.

This refined Italian folk ensemble is frequently engaged for pizza parties, pre‑wedding events, weddings, and exclusive gatherings at Casale del Gallo and Il Duca in Trastevere, Rome.
capital-folk-rome-italy.description_html:
From Italian classics to romantic ballads, from jazz and French chanson to international hits, our repertoire is as versatile as it is exquisite.

Why choose us? Flexible lineup: from an intimate solo performance to a full quartet.

  • An authentic Italian atmosphere, meticulously curated for an international clientele.
  • Perfectly suited for pre‑wedding soirees, cocktail receptions, and ceremonies.
  • Available throughout Italy and for select events abroad.
  • A fully bespoke lineup—simply enquire.

We will transform your Italian celebration into an unforgettable memory, cherished by your guests for years to come.

tuscany-jazz-collective.intro_html: The Tuscany Jazz Collective – an exquisite, professional jazz and swing ensemble curated from the heart of Tuscany, Italy. A refined musical experience for the most discerning celebrations.
tuscany-jazz-collective.description_html:
What clients most cherished: Elegant jazz performances, impeccable professionalism and reliability, effortless communication, remarkable flexibility, extraordinary talent, widespread acclaim, and an atmosphere of refined elegance.

Comprising a collective of consummate professionals, the ensemble brings many years of experience delivering bespoke musical performances for weddings and events across Tuscany and Northern Italy.

The repertoire spans from serene, refined jazz and evocative swing to vibrant Latin jazz and spirited, dance-inducing rhythms, perfectly tailored for wedding receptions and soirées.

The ensemble is a perennial presence at some of Italy’s most prestigious venues, including Borgo Studiati in Pisa, Borgo Stomennano in Monteriggioni, and Masseria Potenti in Taranto.

string-quartet-turin-italy.intro_html:
Italian String Quartet – An ensemble of four consummately trained musicians, the Italian String Quartet stands as one of the most distinguished string collectives in the region, perfectly suited for every bespoke occasion.

Based in Turin, this quartet brings decades of combined expertise, delivering impeccable professionalism and artistry that captivates any audience. Their meticulously curated 2025 repertoire spans classical masterpieces, contemporary pop, and timeless wedding compositions, all presented with exquisite refinement.

Discerning clients are invited to preview audio samples and cinematic videos to appreciate their sophisticated sound.

The quartet is regularly engaged for exclusive weddings and events at an array of exceptional venues, including Domaine du Mont Leuze in France, VISTA Palazzo Lago di Como Hotel, and Villa Cungi in Arezzo, Italy.

Always impeccably attired, the quartet takes immense pride in its aesthetic presentation, ensuring a flawless alignment with the tone of your event.

Below is a selection of distinguished locations where the quartet has been privileged to perform:

  • Domaine du Mont Leuze, France
  • Villa Cungi, Arezzo
  • VISTA Palazzo Hotel, Lake Como
  • Villa Marigola Centro Congressi
  • Borgo San Felice, Siena
  • Isola del Garda, Lombardy, Italy
  • Tenuta di Artimino
  • Abbazia di San Galgano
  • La Villa Hotel, Mombaruzzo
  • Villa Erba, Lake Como
  • Borgo Stomennano
  • Villa Mosconi Bertani, Arbizzano
  • Museo Nazionale dell'Automobile
  • Castello di Guarene, Cuneo
  • Villa Scorzi, Pisa
  • Nordelaia, Cremolino
  • Ristorante La Madonnina di Barni
  • Hotel Villa Cipressi, Varenna
  • Villa Catignano, Siena, Italy
  • Lenno, Lake Como, Italy
  • Isole di Brissago, Switzerland
  • Cernobbio, Lake Como, Italy

For those in pursuit of Italy’s most refined string quartet, the Italian String Quartet of Turin represents the pinnacle of elegance and musical mastery.

In Italiano

Il Quartett creerà momenti squisiti ed emozionanti, accompagnando la cerimonia e il ricevimento con un'eleganza ineguagliabile.

Composto da quattro talentuose musiciste, il Quartett unisce la tradizione del quartetto d'archi classico con una versatilità raffinata, offrendo un repertorio che spazia dalla musica classica al cafè-concert fino alle più celebri colonne sonore.

Il gruppo si esibisce inoltre in formazioni alternative—violino solista, duo o trio—e offre la collaborazione con una cantante o un DJ, per un'esperienza musicale personalizzata e curata in ogni dettaglio.

Grazie a un vastissimo repertorio e a una profonda esperienza nella musica classica e moderna, il Quartett allieterà ogni istante del vostro matrimonio, realizzando una colonna sonora emozionante e raffinata che accompagnerà con prestigio il vostro evento più atteso.

Per completare l'immagine di ogni evento, viene proposta una selezione di abiti eleganti, visibili nella galleria fotografica.

Si riportano alcuni esempi del vasto repertorio offerto:

Musica classica: comprende le più belle pagine scritte nel periodo barocco, classico e romantico. J.S. Bach – Aria, Arioso, Jesu Joy of Man’s Desiring, Brandenburg Concerto, Largo del Concerto per due violini, Cantata no 140, Preludio corale; A.M. Bach – Menuet; A. Vivaldi – Le quattro stagioni, ecc.

Musica da film e musical: comprende le più conosciute colonne sonore del XX secolo. All I Ask of You – Phantom (Lloyd-Webber), America – West Side Story (Bernstein), Ashokan Farewell – The Civil War (Ungar), As Time Goes By (Hupfeld), Begin the Beguine (Porter), Birthday Variations, ecc.

Arie d'opera: La Bohème (Puccini), Carmen (Bizet), La vedova allegra (Lehár), La forza del destino (Verdi), Traviata, Rigoletto, Madama Butterfly (Puccini), Tosca (Puccini), Manon Lescaut (Puccini), ecc.

Musica per matrimonio in chiesa: raccolta pezzi – Pachelbel Canon in D; Wedding March (Mendelssohn); Wedding March (Wagner); Ave Maria (Schubert, Gounod, Caccini, Mascagni); Aria – Bach; Arioso – Bach; Intermezzo di Mascagni.

Canzoni famose: The Beatles, My Heart Will Go On – Titanic, La Bamba, Purple Haze (Hendrix), New York, New York, Summertime, Love Me Tender, Feelings (Albert), Heaven – Bryan Adams, ecc.

Musica tradizionale internazionale: Rumanian Folk Dances (complete) (Bartók), Congratulations, O sole mio, Funiculì Funiculà, ecc.

Tango e latino: Blue Tango (Anderson), Tango in D (Albéniz), Tico-Tico (Abreu), Por Una Cabeza Tango (from Scent of a Woman) (Gardel), El Choclo Tango (Villoldo), Tanguedia III (Piazzolla).

Che si tratti di matrimoni o di eventi esclusivi—feste private, convention, cerimonie, anniversari, conferenze—il Quartett garantisce con la sua professionalità un repertorio impeccabile per ogni occasione.

Copertura territoriale: Il Quartett è lieto di esibirsi in Piemonte, Liguria, Lombardia, Valle d'Aosta, Toscana, Emilia Romagna e in tutta Italia.

string-quartet-turin-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Musica per la cerimonia, aperitivo e ricevimento, esibizioni come strumento solista o duo, trio, quartetto, con la collaborazione di una cantante e un dj.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Fino a qualche giorno prima, ma per garantire la nostra disponibilità per in Vostro evento è meglio contattarci qualche mese prima.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Solista. Piccola (2-3 musicisti) Media (4-6 musicisti) Grande (più di 6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Il nostro repertorio comprende musica classica, latino, tango, musica da film e musical, musica attuale, musica tradizionale internazionale ecc. Musica per cerimonia in chiesa, aperitivo, ricevimento.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Eseguiamo anche trascrizioni e arrangiamenti su richiesta.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Musiciste professioniste laureate in Conservatorio, e con ampia esperienza concertistica alle spalle in vari formazioni camerali ed orchestrali.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>Da solo.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>In base al momento per qui avete scelto la nostra esibizione.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Circa 30 minuti.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

trio-toscano-italy.intro_html:
About Trio Toscano – An Exquisite Wedding and Event Ensemble Based in Tuscany, Italy

What discerning clients cherish most: exceeding every expectation, impeccable communication, a bespoke first dance arrangement, seamless DJ integration, a dance floor brimming with joy, guests utterly captivated, and an ambiance perfectly curated for the Tuscan landscape.

Trio Toscano presents an all-male trio of extraordinary musicians from the heart of Tuscany, delivering original, live interpretations of beloved classics. Their extensive repertoire draws upon musical influences spanning the ages, offering a refined and energetic atmosphere for any occasion.

They perform exquisite renditions of the most cherished songs of recent history—from Adele’s Rolling in the Deep to The Beatles’ Come Together—each arrangement impeccably crafted and delivered with passion.

As one of Italy’s most sought-after wedding ensembles, early booking is essential, particularly for Friday or Saturday celebrations between May and October. For those seeking an even more exclusive experience, weekday or Sunday weddings are warmly welcomed to ensure availability.

They are regularly engaged to perform at prestigious venues such as Villa Montecastello in Monteriggioni and Borgo Castelvecchi in Siena, Italy.

Their profound love for music across all genres is exemplified by their masterful navigation of soul, pop, rock, folk, and disco. The trio moves effortlessly through a varied setlist, curating a bespoke event entirely tailored to you.

The Tuscan Trio comprises three members—vocals, keyboard, guitar, and percussion—each a seasoned professional who has performed extensively throughout Italy and Europe. They take pride in attending to every musical need, drawing on experience from weddings, private parties, and corporate events alike.

The ensemble is entirely self-sufficient, with equipment that is both easily transportable and perfectly suited to any location. Should you desire, they can also provide an impeccable DJ set to extend the evening’s enchantment.

If you seek to engage the finest wedding band Tuscany has to offer, allow Trio Toscano to orchestrate an unforgettable musical journey for your most special day.

<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Live Music, Dj music.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Almeno una settimana in anticipo, anche se, ovviamente, prima si contatta e meglio si organizza.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Stevie Wonder, Michael Jackson, Bruno Mars, Cold Play, U2, Kings of Leon, Ed Sheeran, Pink, U2, Queen ecc ecc I classici italiani...ecc ecc... Su richiesta è disponibile una scaletta dettagliata.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Un massimo di 2 brani da comunicare almeno 2 mesi prima dell evento.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Esperienza pluridecennale in Italia ed all' estero. Ci siamo esibiti per importanti celebrità italiane e straniere dello sport e dello spettacolo e per rinomati brand internazionali.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>Sì, scrittura privata, caparra per riservare la data dell'evento



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, ovunque.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, da calcolare in base alla distanza.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>Da solo.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Il nostro pacchetto standard prevede solitamente 3 performance live da 50 minuti ciascuna, ovviamente il tutto è discutibile in base alle esigenze del cliente.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Circa 90 minuti.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

beats-cello-perugia-italy.intro_html:
Beats & Cello represents the pinnacle of refined musical artistry for discerning couples. Based in Perugia, this exquisite DJ and cello duo curates an impeccably bespoke auditory journey across Italy’s most exclusive destinations. Celebrated for their seamless fusion of romantic ceremony melodies and vibrant DJ sets, they consistently earn the highest acclaim from an elite international clientele for their professionalism, flexibility, and profound musical talent.

As one of central Italy’s most evocative ensembles, their refined performances are highly sought after in Umbria, Tuscany, Rome, and beyond, gracing only the most sophisticated celebrations. The cello serves as the magnificent protagonist of their performance, delivering an emotionally enveloping presence during the ceremony and infusing the DJ set with unparalleled sophistication. Its resonant tones warm the hearts of the couple during entrances, adding an indelible touch of class to every moment. Beats & Cello is regularly engaged to perform at exceptional venues such as Relais La Corte dei Papi in Arezzo, Podere Sant'Antonio in Bolsena, and Villa La Bagatta in Lazise.

Their modern duo formula—featuring cello, guitar, and both female and male vocals—creates a classy and captivating aperitif atmosphere. The repertoire is a curated selection of sophisticated, bespoke arrangements performed in English, Italian, and French. Notably, all live performances are impeccably authentic, forgoing audio backing tracks. During dinner, they provide seamless support for speeches using state-of-the-art wireless microphones and speakers, always collaborating closely with wedding planners to ensure a flawless event. As the evening transitions to the open bar, the duo unveils their spectacular cello show and DJ set, artfully weaving classical and contemporary tracks. Every musical genre is meticulously customized in collaboration with the couple. Their technical prowess allows them to mount up to three distinct audio and lighting systems within a single venue, ensuring an immersive sonic landscape.

Their impeccable reputation secures them frequent engagements at Italy’s most prestigious estates, including:

  • Umbria: Castello di Petrata, Castello di Rosciano, Posta dei Donini, Colcaprile, Forte Sorgnano, Villa Le Mura, Villa Montefreddo, Montenero Castle, Agriturismo San Pietro Aquaeortus, Cantina Antonelli, and Cantina Colsanto.
  • Rome: Villa Aurelia and Castello della Spizzichina.
  • Tuscany: Borgo Lucignanello, Borgo di Pietrafitta, Villa Pordenovo in Siena, San Galgano Abbey, and San Pietro in Assisi.
  • Other: Hotel Bramante in Todi.

These iconic locations have hosted weddings for distinguished couples from France, America, England, Spain, China, and Italy, further cementing Beats & Cello’s status as a purveyor of exquisite musical experiences.
