tuscany-swing-band-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscany Swing Band – An Exquisite Swing & Jazz Ensemble from Tuscany, Italy

Conceived from the convergence of three distinguished musicians, The Tuscany Swing Band embodies a refined synthesis of artistry and sophistication. Each member brings a wealth of professional experience, united by an impeccable musical sensibility and a shared devotion to crafting unforgettable moments at weddings, soirées, and corporate celebrations. Kindly peruse our 2026 SET LIST for a glimpse into our curated repertoire.

We are regularly entrusted with performances at the most prestigious estates and venues, including Chalet d’Adrien in Verbier, Belmond Villa San Michele in Fiesole, and Villa il Pozzo Winery & Resort in Certaldo.

Our ensemble comprises Conservatory graduates and dedicated music educators, possessing over fifteen years of mastery in live entertainment and private event artistry. We offer bespoke packages that encompass both ceremony and reception, orchestrating every musical nuance of your day with seamless elegance.

We converse fluently in English, French, and German, and maintain close collaborations with Italy’s most revered locations and esteemed planning agencies. Within our curated profile, you will discover an extensive collection of videos, live audio recordings, photography, and testimonials from our discerning international clientele.

The complete line-up features Elena on female vocals and snare drum, Stefano on guitar, Mirco on double bass, and Alberto on wind instruments. We may also present a refined Trio configuration or adapt the instrumentation to suit the occasion.

The Tuscany Swing Band is devoted to delivering a musical presentation of the highest calibre, performed entirely live. The group’s vast musical erudition and cultivated expertise ensure an impeccably elevated performance, enriched by a repertoire of original arrangements honed through decades of diverse engagements — from intimate street festivals to grand theatres, from exclusive clubs to luxury hotels and private gatherings.

The guitar, piano, snare drum, and voice are acoustic instruments of extraordinary depth and dynamic range. The warm, enchanting vocal tones intertwine with instrumental improvisations on piano and guitar, all gracefully underpinned by the lively yet refined rhythm of the snare drum played with brushes — a truly magical confluence.

The repertoire is vast and multifaceted, drawing from a rich tapestry of musical genres. Through original arrangements, it spans Italian, European, and American swing of the 1940s, timeless jazz standards, bossa nova, and instrumental pieces such as waltz musettes and beguine. A place of honour is reserved for the beloved Italian songs that captivated the world — those cherished melodies of the radio and gramophone era.

Should you wish to engage the most exquisite swing and jazz ensemble Tuscany has to offer for your wedding or event, we invite you to reach out.

The Tuscany Swing Band has had the privilege of performing at the following distinguished locations:

  • Belmond Villa San Michele, Fiesole
  • Chalet d’Adrien, Verbier, Switzerland
  • Villa il Pozzo Winery & Resort

Real questions from clients

Can you perform outdoors? (asked by Marina on 8 December 2025)

Response from Stefano: Yes, but we require a shady area to perform of at least 4 metres length x 2 metres depth, not far from an electric socket.

What else do you require? (asked by Marina on 8 December 2025)

Response from Stefano: We also need a dressing room to change clothes and washroom facilities.

Do you require parking close to the venue? (asked by Marina on 8 December 2025)

Response from Stefano: Yes, we have to install some heavy equipment (amps etc.) so the area where we play must be reachable by car.

In Italiano

Il trio The Tuscany Swing Band nasce dall’unione di tre musicisti provenienti da estrazioni musicali eterogenee con un’ampia esperienza professionale e con la stessa passione e curiosità per diversi linguaggi musicali. Con la stessa voglia di divertirsi facendo divertire chi ascolta.

Il Progetto. Il trio The Tuscany Swing Band nasce dall’idea di offrire uno spettacolo musicale di alta qualità interamente suonato dal vivo.

L’ottima preparazione musicale e la lunga esperienza professionale dei componenti garantiscono performance artistiche sempre di alto livello; così come lo studio approfondito del repertorio, la creazione di arrangiamenti originali e gli anni di pratica in ogni sorta di contesto: dai festival di strada ai concerti in teatri e auditorium, dai locali agli hotel di gran lusso e alle feste private.

Il sound. La chitarra, il pianoforte, il rullante e la voce sono strumenti ricchi di infinite sfumature e come tutti gli strumenti acustici sono in grado di sfruttare una illimitata gamma di dinamiche.

La voce calda e avvolgente si alternerà con le improvvisazioni strumentali del pianoforte e della chitarra sostenuti dal ritmo incalzante e discreto del rullante suonato con le spazzole.

Il repertorio è molto vasto ed attinge da vari generi musicali. Arricchito da arrangiamenti originali, esso spazia principalmente dallo swing italiano, europeo e americano degli anni ’40 agli standard jazz, senza escludere la Bossa Nova e brani strumentali come valzer musettes, beguine e altro.

Un occhio di riguardo viene rivolto alla canzone italiana che “ha girato il mondo” ovvero quella dell’era dello swing, quella delle vecchie radio e dei giradischi. Insomma quei “motivetti” che piacciono tanto in tutto il mondo.

blu-mare-dj-live-sicily.intro_html:
Blu Mare – An Ensemble of Refined Musical Artistry, Based in Sicily, Italy

Blu Mare represents the pinnacle of live music excellence, offering an exquisite ensemble of DJs, vocalists, and instrumentalists curated to elevate every occasion. Devoted to delivering impeccable wedding and event music, they specialize in crafting unforgettable moments defined by elegance and sophistication. Committed to the resounding success of each celebration, they spare no effort in tailoring their performances to surpass even the most discerning expectations. They are regularly booked for weddings and exclusive events at Torre Garbonogara in Palermo, Sicily.
blu-mare-dj-live-sicily.description_html: The ensemble comprises elite musicians and dynamic vocalists, adorned in captivating stage attire, exuding vibrant energy and delivering a bespoke musical journey. Whether clients seek a refined live band in Sicily or a distinguished show band for events throughout Italy, Blu Mare stands as the unrivaled leader of musical excellence in the region. They possess an innate understanding of what it takes to orchestrate an exceptional live music experience, catering to the diverse tastes of clients and their esteemed guests. Blu Mare is the premier choice for upscale corporate events and private celebrations worldwide, distinguished by their expansive repertoire spanning chart-topping hits and timeless classics across genres and eras. Their unparalleled energy electrifies audiences, ensuring a spectacular party atmosphere that leaves a lasting impression on all in attendance.

blu-mare-dj-live-sicily.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 2 x 60-minute sets or 3 x 40-minute sets, but I’m flexible depending on the event. After the band performance there is 2 Hours with DJ Set.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes, I offer different line-ups, from solo DJ sets to DJ + saxophonist, singer, or percussionist.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes, I can provide a full setup for events of up to 150/200/300 guests, including stage, a professional sound system, DJ booth, microphones, and lighting (moving heads, LED lights, etc.). For larger events, I collaborate with external AV providers.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, I offer continuous music through DJ sets or playlists between and after my live performances.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- I usually arrive around 2 hours before the start of the performance.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Approximately 60–90 minutes depending on the venue and setup required.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes, I can prepare and perform specific song requests, including first dance songs.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- I need at least 6x3 meters for stage ,PA and lights

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes, I have Public Liability Insurance and all my equipment is PAT-tested.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Absolutely, I’m comfortable performing outdoors or in unique settings such as barns, beaches, and historical villas.</details>

federal-florence-italy.intro_html:
Federal – an exquisite, bespoke wedding and party ensemble based in Florence, Italy.

Federal curates impeccable musical experiences for ceremonies, aperitivo receptions, intimate dinners, and grand celebrations. Renowned for their refined versatility, they offer a carefully selected repertoire spanning classical and jazz for serene moments, through to vibrant pop, soul, and funk for spirited festivities. This makes them an ideal choice for those seeking one of the most distinguished Tuscany wedding bands for an entire day’s curated entertainment.

Beyond their live performances, Federal presents an elevated DJ set, which may be enriched with additional instruments—saxophone, djembe, percussion, and vocals—for a truly bespoke sound. With an unwavering commitment to client satisfaction and meticulous attention to detail, they collaborate closely with each couple to tailor every musical selection. Their standard luxury services for weddings and events in Italy include:

  • Live Band: 3 musicians, 2 singers, 1 saxophonist (Aperitif set: 1.5 to 2 hours)
  • Live Band: 3 musicians, 2 singers (Party set: 1.5 to 2 hours)
  • DJ & Saxophonist for the party (approx. 2 hours)
  • Background music during dinner
  • Single setup (Audio & lighting system included)

dj-daniel.intro_html:
DJ Daniel – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Curated for Rome and Italy’s Finest Destinations

DJ Daniel stands among Italy’s most esteemed and sought-after wedding DJs, celebrated for orchestrating elevated, emotionally captivating experiences at the most refined destination celebrations. Based in Rome, he performs with impeccable artistry across Lake Como, Tuscany, the Amalfi Coast, and beyond, serving discerning international couples who seek elegance, professionalism, and music imbued with meaning.

With more than fifteen years of mastery and a background shaped by both classical tradition and contemporary production, DJ Daniel has earned a reputation for his refined sensibility, flawless transitions, and profound intuition for the rhythm of a room. His bespoke sets are meticulously composed to unfold with grace throughout the day—from intimate, luminous ceremony moments to exuberant dance floors alive with joy and motion.

Daniel frequently collaborates with live virtuosos—saxophonists, electric violinists, and percussionists—to create performances that feel deeply immersive and utterly unique. Every event is bespoke, tailored to the couple’s personality, cultural heritage, and vision. Whether a sunset aperitivo along the coast or a late-night revelry beneath the stars, each passage is musically sculpted with precision and devotion.

Couples cherish Daniel’s serene, professional presence and his collaborative spirit. He invests time in understanding their preferences, curates edits that heighten each moment, and ensures seamless transitions across every phase of the day—even within the most complex venue arrangements.

Languages Spoken: English, Italian, and conversational French

Most Requested Format: A curated cocktail set with live saxophone, followed by a dynamic evening party

Venues Performed At: Villa Balbiano, Castello di Vicarello, Villa Cimbrone, Masseria Potenti

Clientele: International creatives, luxury fashion insiders, destination wedding specialists, and private VIP clients

From candlelit ceremonies nestled in Tuscan villas to rooftop soirées overlooking coastal towns, DJ Daniel brings taste, experience, and genuine musical artistry to weddings destined for the extraordinary.

the-italian-tenor.intro_html:
The Italian Tenor – An Exquisite Vocal Virtuoso, Based in Marche, Italy

Masterfully weaving the grandeur of classical opera with the allure of contemporary pop, this remarkable Italian tenor delivers impeccably refined performances, curated exclusively for the most discerning events.

A luminary of the stage, The Italian Tenor has graced audiences across Germany, Spain, Russia, Saudi Arabia, and Luxembourg—appearing at festivals, official ceremonies, corporate galas, private soirées, and the most luxurious weddings. He is a perennial choice for celebrations at Villa Mosconi Bertani in Verona and Tenuta Bossi in Florence, Italy.

Among his most celebrated achievements are appearances on Italian and international television, a commanding performance at the Gazprom Anniversary in Russia, the honour of singing the Worldvision National Anthem for an Italian international volleyball match, and several distinguished radio broadcasts.

Currently touring the globe and unveiling a newly released album, he offers a stunning, one-of-a-kind act—effortlessly adapting his repertoire to captivate any audience with his versatile, powerful voice, leaving every guest utterly enchanted.

Below are just a selection of the exquisite venues where he has been booked for weddings and events:

  • Villa Mosconi Bertani, Verona
  • Tenuta Bossi, Pontassieve
  • Anglo American Hotel, Florence
  • Pontremoli, Ancona, Italy
  • Villa Pizzo, Lake Como
  • Verdura Resort, Sicily
  • Lake Misurina, Belluno
  • Terrazza delle Cinque Lune, Rome
  • Figline Valdarno, Florence, Italy

For those who seek the most magnificent male vocalist Italy has to offer—to elevate a wedding or event into an unforgettable masterpiece—the opportunity to engage The Italian Tenor awaits.

one-more-time-wedding-band-bari-italy.intro_html:
One More Time – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble, Based in Bari, Italy

Born from an inspired vision shared by Amanda, the captivating lead vocalist, and Roberto, the masterful guitarist, this refined ensemble was meticulously brought to life.

Their curated repertoire spans the richness of Italian heritage and the breadth of the international musical landscape, each note chosen for its elegance and emotional resonance.

The formation is a bespoke configuration—intimate as a trio or expansive as a quintet—each arrangement impeccably tailored to the occasion.

Close your eyes, and the sensation of a full, symphonic presence envelops you, breathing exquisite life into your most cherished melodies. The band is frequently engaged for weddings and extraordinary events at Massa Lubrense in Naples and No. 3 The Château in Charente, France.
one-more-time-wedding-band-bari-italy.description_html:
Through every performance, the ensemble weaves an elegant and sophisticated tapestry of harmonies, devoted solely to your enchantment. The unmistakable refinement of their musical selections marries seamlessly with their artistic professionalism, setting the stage for an indelible and captivating experience.

By choosing this band, you embark on a journey through an expansive collection of both Italian classics and global hits. Their repertoire spans the sultry rhythms of R&B to the heartwarming embrace of Soul Music, ascending to the lively notes of Swing and echoing the nostalgic melodies of the 1970s, 1980s, and 1990s. Every arrangement is meticulously crafted by the ensemble, reflecting the distinctive musical roots and backgrounds of each musician.

An Additional Bespoke Duo Option

In addition to the full band, we offer an exquisite Duo service: a harmonious blend of guitar and vocals, perfect for creating an intimate and elegant atmosphere. Ideal for ceremonies, cocktail receptions, and dinner accompaniment, this talented duo adds a touch of musical magic to your most refined moments.

Exquisite Details

What services do you provide?

  • Ceremony Music
  • Cocktail Music
  • Reception Music
  • Party Music
  • Entertainment
  • DJ

What is included in the wedding package?

We offer a refined TRIO comprising vocals, guitar, and keyboard, as well as a distinguished QUINTET with vocals, guitar, keyboard, bass, and drums. Upon request, we can add additional instruments (saxophone, violin, etc.) and a DJ set to elevate the experience further.

How far in advance should I contact you?

We recommend reaching out up to two months in advance to allow for impeccable coordination with the couple.

What genres of music do you offer?

Nu Soul, R&B, Disco, Jazz, Italian, Pop, Commercial, Contemporary

What type of musical formations are available?

Duo, Trio, Quartet, Full Band (five elements)

Size of the ensemble?

  • Small (2–3 musicians)
  • Medium (4–6 musicians)

Repertoire?

Arrangements are crafted by the musicians themselves, so you can enjoy a variety of Italian and international songs, from swing to music from the '70s, '80s, and '90s.

Can I request songs not in the repertoire?

We are delighted to receive and consider bespoke song requests.

Experience?

One More Time is particularly active in the wedding sector and can accompany all facets of the reception, from the civil or religious ceremony to the final celebration.

Do you have your own equipment?

Yes.

Do you require any specific materials or conditions to provide the service?

No.

Are you available for travel?

Yes, throughout Italy.

Is there an additional fee for travel?

Yes, it depends on the distance.

How much time do you need to set up for the performance?

Two to three hours before the start of the event.

Do you perform outdoors?

Yes.

What other types of services do you offer?

Rental of audio equipment, lights, and video projectors.

Do you charge per hour or per event?

Per event.

If necessary, are you available to work extra hours?

Yes.

wedding-band-rome-kickers.intro_html:
The Kickers – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble Based in Rome, Italy

The Kickers stand as an exceptional wedding and party band, rooted in Rome and enriched by many years of refined industry experience. This impeccable trio commands a vast and meticulously curated repertoire, spanning pop, soul, blues, and funk—captivating every audience with effortless sophistication.

With their signature style, these talented artists perform the most beloved ballads and timeless hits, crafting an atmosphere of pure enchantment. Whether for intimate soirées or grand-scale festivities, The Kickers deliver a bespoke experience that is both seamless and unforgettable.

We are regularly engaged for weddings and events at Tenuta 4 Pini in Rome, a testament to our unwavering reputation for excellence.
wedding-band-rome-kickers.description_html:
Based in the capital, this distinguished band travels extensively to grace events throughout the region. Whether for private celebrations, corporate galas, or wedding ceremonies, The Kickers bring an impeccable performance, their professionalism and seasoned expertise ensuring a flawless show from start to finish.

Among the exclusive locations where we have been booked for weddings and events are:

  • Tenuta 4 Pini, Rome
  • Florence, Italy

Should you seek to engage one of Rome’s most refined wedding and party bands, look no further than The Kickers—an ensemble of exquisite artistry and impeccable service.

puglia-string-quartet-weddings-italy.intro_html:
The Puglia String Quartet – an ensemble of impeccable refinement, based in the heart of Puglia, Italy.

This curated string quartet lends its exquisite artistry to wedding ceremonies, breakfasts, and receptions, as well as to an array of exclusive private and public occasions—from intimate meetings and birthdays to milestone anniversaries, christenings, and distinguished conferences.

The quartet’s primary sphere of operation encompasses Puglia, Basilicata, Calabria, and Campania, yet its bespoke performances are sought after for weddings and events throughout Italy. Among the distinguished venues regularly graced by their presence are Masseria Pettolecchia La Residenza in Puglia and Agriturismo Masseria Salamina in Pezze di Greco.

Upon request, the ensemble can be further elevated with the addition of a female vocalist and/or a harpist, introducing an extra dimension of sonic luxury to their performances.

What distinguishes The Puglia String Quartet is, without question, its superlative musicianship and unparalleled versatility—a dynamic, high-energy live presence that transforms every occasion. The formation comprises:

  • Two violins
  • A cello
  • A double bass

The repertoire is a meticulously curated collection of arrangements, personally transcribed by a member of the quartet, spanning a wealth of musical styles and genres—each piece exquisitely adapted for the refined timbre of classical strings. The ensemble’s foremost objective is to satisfy the most discerning musical tastes of you and your guests, drawing upon a lifetime of expertise and accumulated artistry.

Should you wish to engage the finest local string quartet for your wedding in Puglia, we invite you to make an inquiry.

In Italiano

Il Quartetto d’Archi Puglia offre le sue raffinate esecuzioni per cerimonie in chiesa o in comune, banchetti nuziali, e ogni altra occasione pubblica o privata—meeting, compleanni, anniversari, battesimi, convegni.

Opera principalmente in Puglia, Calabria, Campania e Basilicata, ma è disponibile per trasferte in tutta Italia. Ciò che lo contraddistingue è l’originalità della formazione e la poliedricità di un repertorio curato con esclusivi arrangiamenti, nonché l’atmosfera magica e raffinata di esecuzioni rigorosamente dal vivo. Il quartetto si compone di:

  • Due violini
  • Un violoncello
  • Un contrabbasso

Il repertorio, le cui trascrizioni si avvalgono degli esclusivi arrangiamenti elaborati da uno dei componenti del gruppo, spazia tra diversi stili e generi musicali, arricchiti e caratterizzati dalla particolare timbrica di strumenti classici. L’obiettivo primario del Quartetto d’Archi Matrimonio Puglia è quello di assecondare i gusti musicali più esigenti, avvalendosi della competenza e dell’esperienza maturata in una vita dedicata alla musica.

wedding-band-florence-party-collective.intro_html:
The Florence Party Collective – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble from Florence, Italy

Hailing from the heart of Florence, The Florence Party Collective is a distinguished wedding and party band, meticulously dedicated to delivering impeccable entertainment for both private soirées and grand public celebrations. With over fifteen years of refined experience, the ensemble possesses the artistry and expertise to transform any occasion into an unforgettable affair. Their bespoke, customizable lineup offers unparalleled flexibility, adapting seamlessly to your every desire. The collective is available worldwide, bringing their refined sound to the most exclusive destinations. From Renaissance Il Ciocco Resort & Spa in Tuscany to Borgo Di Castelvecchio in Siena, they are regularly engaged to perform at the most prestigious weddings and events. Drawing from a vast and curated repertoire of genres and eras, The Florence Party Collective ensures every guest is lifted to their feet in effortless elegance.
wedding-band-florence-party-collective.description_html:
The Florence Party Collective offers a fully customizable ensemble, ranging from an opulent eight-piece band to an intimate duo, with a curated selection of genres tailored to your personal taste. They perform with impeccable artistry during wedding ceremonies, receptions, and cocktail hours, and provide enchanting musical interludes between sets. Should you desire specific compositions for your celebration, the band is delighted to learn them, offering both instrumental and vocal arrangements, and can provide sample recordings in advance of your grand day. The group possesses a suite of exceptional event accessories, including a disco ball, fog machine, refined lighting, premium microphones, a projector, and a state-of-the-art sound and PA system. For those seeking one of Florence's most sought-after wedding and party bands, the search ends here with The Florence Party Collective.

In Italiano

Professionalità, eleganza, divertimento. Lasciate che Florence Party Collective trasformi il vostro sogno in realtà con un servizio su misura e di altissimo livello. Nulla è impossibile per questo wedding team: solo i migliori professionisti per il vostro evento. Oltre venti anni di esperienza nel settore matrimoniale e in live in tutta Italia con famosi artisti pop nazionali garantiscono una competenza senza pari.

Siete appassionati di musica funk e soul con tocchi dance? Jazz, pop, gospel o swing? Sarà la band che fa appositamente per voi, creando un’esperienza nuziale all’insegna del divertimento, della buona musica, dell’eleganza e della qualità più assoluta.

Emanuela e Luca vi guideranno nella scelta della migliore soluzione per Voi. La grande esperienza del team consente di modulare diverse formazioni, garantendo una varietà di atmosfere raffinate durante il giorno del vostro matrimonio. Non dovrete pensare ad altro che alla musica che desiderate: Emanuela e Luca si occuperanno di supervisionare ogni dettaglio, assicurando la perfetta riuscita dell’evento.

Ci penseranno loro a effettuare un sopralluogo, a gestire le pratiche burocratiche SIAE e a provvedere a tutti gli impianti e al coordinamento di ogni musicista impegnato nel vostro evento.

Duo, trio, quartetto, quintetto, sestetto, settetto, ottetto, DJ: Florence Party Collective saprà venire incontro a tutte le vostre richieste, offrendovi differenti formazioni e un servizio curato per rendere speciale il vostro matrimonio.

Florence Party Collective vi proporrà un pacchetto completo ed adatto ad ogni vostra esigenza in termini musicali, includendo:

  • Musica per la cerimonia (classica/gospel)
  • Musica aperitivo (jazz, swing italiano & internazionale, lounge, internazionale sottofondo)
  • Musica live funk, soul, dance, pop hit contemporanee
  • DJ set

Le performance di Florence Party Collective saranno rigorosamente live per coinvolgere tutti i presenti con un ritmo caldo e dal sound emozionante, creando un’atmosfera esclusiva e indimenticabile.

wedding-band-florence-party-collective.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Musica per la cerimonia (classica/gospel), musica aperitivo (jazz, lounge, internazionale sottofondo), Musica live funk soul dance pop. Tutto rigorosamente live. DJ set. No Karaoke.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>I mesi di giugno, luglio e settembre sono ricchi di eventi. Si consiglia la prenotazione anticipata di almeno 6/8 mesi.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>- Solista
- Piccola (2-3 musicisti)
- Media (4-6 musicisti)
- Grande (più di 6 musicisti)



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Classica, Gospel, Pop, Jazz, Swing, Blues, Pop Internazionale, Soul, Funk, Disco.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Due brani extra repertorio. + € 30,00 a brano dal terzo brano in poi.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Il team è composto da musicisti professionisti, di eterogenea formazione e specializzazione, con una oltre decennale esperienza live. Il team stabile garantisce eventi di qualità.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, trasferte in tutta Italia e Europa.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, costo trasferimento, Vitto e alloggio nel caso occorra il pernottamento.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Lavoriamo in base ai tempi del vostro evento.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Tempo di sistemazione set 2 ore circa.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

wedding-dj-tuscany-simon.intro_html:
DJ Simon – An Exquisite Wedding DJ, Curated for Tuscany’s Most Refined Celebrations

Based in Grosseto, the elegant heart of Tuscany, DJ Simon is revered for his impeccably crafted, high-energy DJ sets that transform every occasion into an unforgettable experience.

Since his earliest years, DJ Simon has meticulously built an illustrious career, performing at an exquisite array of events—from intimate private soirées to grand-scale corporate galas—bringing the same unwavering sophistication and vitality to each.

His career is distinguished by collaborations with some of the most renowned luminaries in the industry, including Gigi D’Agostino, Gabry Ponte, DJ Antoine, DJs From Mars, and Christian Marchi—a testament to his impeccable standing among peers.

Fluent in both Italian and English with masterful ease, DJ Simon is the quintessential choice for discerning couples planning a bespoke destination wedding in Tuscany, ensuring seamless communication and a truly refined atmosphere.
wedding-dj-tuscany-simon.description_html:
His bilingual artistry has graced venues across Europe, working in perfect harmony with clients and fellow performers alike. I am regularly booked for exclusive weddings and events at Villa il Pozzo in Florence, Abbazia San Faustino in Perugia, and Certosa di Pontignano in Siena—each a jewel of Italian heritage.

My repertoire is an exquisitely curated tapestry spanning eras and genres—from timeless pop and rock to the latest EDM and serene chill-out selections—every note chosen to elevate your celebration.

With a gracious willingness to accommodate every request, I become the heart and soul of your event, ensuring the dance floor remains impeccably filled from the first chord until the last farewell.

My parties are one-of-a-kind experiences, weaving together guests of all ages and cultures with vibrant, eclectic sounds. Only the finest, state-of-the-art sound systems are used, guaranteeing an auditory experience of unparalleled clarity and richness.

If you seek a consummate professional dedicated to crafting an unparalleled entertainment experience—one that keeps you and your guests dancing in sublime delight—DJ Simon is the impeccable choice. Reach out today to discover more.

dixie-band-bari-roamers.intro_html:
About The Dixie Roamers – an exquisite roaming dixie band, based in Bari (Puglia), Italy

For those who demand nothing less than impeccable artistry, The Dixie Roamers present a refined, fully acoustic strolling ensemble that elevates every event into a curated sensory experience. Specialising in bespoke renditions of beloved Dixieland and American classics, this roaming band moves with effortless grace, bringing music to every corner of your celebration. With years of industry experience and a reputation for unparalleled professionalism, The Dixie Roamers deliver a performance of exceptional quality—a signature sound reserved for the most discerning clientele. Their artistry has been regularly showcased at prestigious venues such as Il Borro Relais & Châteaux in Arezzo and Villa Rocca in Ostuni, Italy.

Happy to travel, The Dixie Roamers perform across Puglia and beyond—for weddings, private soirées, and exclusive corporate events. The ensemble comprises five virtuoso musicians, each playing a carefully selected instrument: banjo, trumpet, percussion, and extraordinary vocals. This refined combination yields an unbeatable, soul-stirring sound—a hallmark of true luxury. For an unforgettable, roaming musical experience that embodies sophistication and exclusivity, The Dixie Roamers are the epitome of excellence.

vespa-dreams-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
Vespa Dreams – An Ensemble of Refined Elegance for Exquisite Celebrations

Hailing from the sun-drenched hills of Tuscany, Vespa Dreams is a bespoke all-male trio based in Florence, Italy. Their curated lineup—guitar and vocals, bass, and drums—delivers an impeccable sonic experience that has become synonymous with sophisticated events throughout Italy.

Renowned for their refined style, the ensemble specialises in a masterful fusion of Funk, Soul, Rock, and Pop, drawing inspiration from the rich musical heritage of the Maremma region. They are regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive gatherings at the prestigious Castello di Albola, where their performance transforms each occasion into an unforgettable affair.

Since their inception, Vespa Dreams has cultivated a reputation for crafting exceptional evenings—immersive, soulful grooves interwoven with high-energy anthems. Whether curating the atmosphere for a wedding, a corporate function, or a lavish party, the trio’s impeccable sound and unwavering commitment to live artistry have made them a most sought-after ensemble, spreading the infectious rhythm and luminous energy of Tuscany wherever they perform.

<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Set Lengths are usually a full 2-3 evening set, 2-4 x45 minute ceremony/aperitivo sets. 

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- We can add a keyboardist and saxophonist to our line up 

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Sound and lighting is provided free of charge 

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- We do provide laptop playlist and DJ services 

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We usually arrive a minimum of 3 hours before designated performance time 

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Set time is usually 90 minutes 

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- We usually do up to 3-5 requests free of charge depending on difficulty 

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Our equipment is all PAT tested 

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- We are comfortable performing outdoors and varied locations</details>

sax-vibes-dj-brescia-italy.intro_html:
Sax Vibes – an exquisite fusion of soulful saxophone and refined electronic rhythms, curated by the illustrious Italian saxophonist and DJ, Matt, based in Brescia.

With an impeccable command of house and deep house, Sax Vibes has graced the most prestigious venues across Italy, including Taiga in Forte Dei Marmi, Armani Privè in Milan, Vip Club in Cortina, and a portfolio of equally distinguished spaces. Each performance is a bespoke interplay of live saxophone and masterful DJ mixing, weaving a sonic tapestry that resonates deeply with every guest.

Sax Vibes is the preferred choice for weddings and private celebrations at La Torre Di Celle in Perugia and Relais Villa Porta in Luino – destinations that themselves embody exclusivity and grace.

Every set is meticulously curated to forge an intimate connection with the audience, ensuring an unforgettable atmosphere whether during a romantic ceremony or an after‑party. From the most elegant nuptials to the most spirited soirées, Sax Vibes elevates every occasion with a unique alchemy of talent and energy. Experience the sublime magic where saxophone meets beat – and enduring memories are impeccably crafted.

viva-firenze-roaming-florence-italy.intro_html:
About Viva Firenze – an exquisite roaming ensemble based in Florence, Italy

Viva Firenze is a refined Italian roaming band, rooted in the heart of Florence, that brings the timeless charm of classic Italian music to life. Their performances are a curated celebration of Bel Canto and the iconic melodies of Italy from the 1920s through the 1960s, offering an impeccably nostalgic journey through the country’s musical heritage.

The band’s core ensemble—featuring vocals, guitar, double bass and percussion—crafts a warm, engaging sound that gracefully enhances any setting. For a richer, more melodic experience, saxophone, trumpet and trombone may be added, lending the music extra depth and unparalleled character. They are regularly booked for weddings and events at the exclusive Casa Giulia Country House in Trevi and Villa di Maiano in Florence.
viva-firenze-roaming-florence-italy.description_html: Led by a passionate vocalist, Viva Firenze moves through venues with effortless grace, creating a vintage, bucolic atmosphere that seamlessly complements weddings, private parties and cultural events. Their roaming style fosters intimate, authentic connections with guests, celebrating the timeless spirit of Italian music in a bespoke, unforgettable manner. Line‑ups range from four to seven musicians, allowing flexibility for distinct events while maintaining their signature swing and refined Italian pop sound.

wedding-party-band-rome-glam-funk.intro_html:
Glam Funk Band – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Rome, Italy

Glam Funk Band is a refined function band, curating the most celebrated dance hits from across the decades with a fresh, funky elegance. For years, this ensemble has been one of Rome’s most sought-after wedding and party bands, offering an impeccable wealth of experience for the most discerning occasions. The core formation comprises four virtuoso musicians, with the capacity to expand to nine members by incorporating saxophone, percussion, trumpet, and additional vocalists—a bespoke configuration tailored to elevate any event.

Beyond a repertoire of smooth hits, ideal for an aperitif or an evening of understated sophistication, the band presents a curated selection of danceable music in the funky and dance genres. Their current favourites include Bruno Mars, Maroon 5, Jamiroquai, Robin Thicke, and Jason Derulo, while drawing from a timeless setlist of icons such as Michael Jackson, Donna Summer, and Cheryl Lynn. Exceedingly talented and flexible, the musicians spare no effort in personalising the musical entertainment to your every desire. The band has been honoured to perform at distinguished venues including Borgo Stomennano in Monteriggioni, Palazzo Del Capitano Del Popolo in Orvieto, Ca' P'a Casa Privata in Salerno, Villa Corsini a Mezzomonte, Villa Catignano in Siena, Villa Merlo Nero in Florence, and Susegana in Treviso.

tuscany-virtuosi-strings-opera-florence-.intro_html:
About Tuscany Virtuosi – An Exquisite String Quartet with Opera Singers in Florence, Italy

Tuscany Virtuosi is an award‑winning string ensemble, graced by opera singers, and based in the heart of Florence, Italy.

Impeccably refined, they have been honoured with the Wedding Awards for Best Professional Musicians for three consecutive years, consistently earning five‑star acclaim for their bespoke services.

This distinguished ensemble is regularly curated for weddings and events at the esteemed Villa Sant'Andrea in Lucca, Italy.
tuscany-virtuosi-strings-opera-florence-.description_html:
From an elegant string quartet for the ceremony to a sparkling electric‑violin performance with LED instruments at the evening reception, they bring both classical and contemporary music to life with unparalleled sophistication.

Their opera singers add an extra layer of grandeur, delivering powerful, heart‑stirring performances that captivate every guest.

Tuscany Virtuosi is celebrated for their seamless “All Inclusive” packages, which may include not only their remarkable string and vocal artistry but also special effects such as LED instruments and cold sparkling fountains for a breathtaking cake‑cutting moment.

Their versatility allows couples to craft a truly tailored musical journey—whether a violin‑piano duo for the ceremony or a DJ and saxophonist for the evening celebration.

The ensemble’s repertoire spans classical, pop, jazz, and the most exquisite soundtracks, ensuring a curated experience of the highest order.

With Tuscany Virtuosi, you can expect a level of professionalism, passion, and musicality that transforms your special day into an extraordinary, unforgettable affair.

Line‑up Options

  • Trio
  • Quartet
  • Quintet
  • 6‑piece string group
  • Opera Singers

dj-rome-leo.intro_html:
DJ Leo – An Exquisite Wedding DJ from Rome, Italy

Hailing from the eternal capital, DJ Leo is a performer of exceptional refinement. He commands fluency in Italian, English, French, Spanish, and Croatian—an impeccable asset for destination weddings and distinguished international events. His profound passion for music and travel has been artfully woven into a career dedicated to sharing joy and elegance.

Leo moves effortlessly through eras and genres, crafting a bespoke sonic journey that resonates across generations and cultures. A graduate of the Goody Music School in Rome, he has rapidly ascended to become one of the most sought-after DJs on the Italian and global stage. His curated performances regularly grace the most coveted venues: Borgo Castelvecchi in Tuscany, Borgo del Carato in Sicily, and Castello di Pontentino in Seggiano.

A master of seamless mixing, DJ Leo offers an eclectic repertoire of house, commercial dance, revival, deep house, and lounge—ensuring every moment is perfectly scored. His career includes performances at an illustrious array of venues and clubs worldwide: Villa Miani (Rome), Odescalchi Castle (Bracciano), Villa Aurelia (Rome), Palazzo Colonna (Rome), Terrazza Cafarelli (Rome), Maxxi Museum (Rome), Villa di Fiorano (Rome), Villa del Balbianello (Lake Como), Villa Piccolomini (Rome), Aman Sveti Stefan (Montenegro), Revelin (Croatia), Sky Garden (Bali), Enigma (Santorini), and Empire Club (Marrakech). His discerning clientele includes Giacomo Gianniotti, Tiziana Rocca, Danilo Cataldi, Matteo Politano, and Giulia de Lellis.

Bespoke Performance Options

Each offering is meticulously curated to elevate every phase of your celebration—from an intimate dinner atmosphere to an exhilarating after-party.

  • DJ Set – Up to 3 Hours
    An ideal choice for cultivating a vibrant, refined ambience tailored to the evening’s rhythm.

  • Two Performers: DJ + Percussion or DJ + Sax – Up to 2 Hours
    A dynamic duo that introduces a live instrumental layer, deepening the sensory experience.

  • Three Performers: DJ + Sax + Singer – Up to 2 Hours
    A high-energy trio blending rhythm, melody, and vocals for an unforgettable, standout performance.

Every option is entirely customisable, ensuring an impeccable alignment with the style and tone of your celebration. For those seeking one of Rome’s most refined musical artisans, DJ Leo awaits to compose your perfect day.

milan-swings-band-italy.intro_html:
Milan Swings — An Exquisite Swing & Jive Ensemble, Based in Milan

For over a quarter of a century, Milan Swings has been a cornerstone of the Italian music scene, delivering impeccably refined performances that blend vintage swing with effortless sophistication. This curated ensemble has graced the most prestigious venues across Italy and beyond, including Blue Note Milan, Assago Forum, Alcatraz, Bloom, and Spirit de Milan, earning a reputation for unparalleled artistry and allure.

The band’s bespoke repertoire spans two original albums alongside a hand-selected collection of timeless Italian and American swing classics — That’s Amore, Mambo Italiano, Volare, Wanna Be Americano, Buonasera Signorina, Zooma Zooma, Via Con Me, and many more. Every performance is a masterful fusion of rhythm, charm, and exuberant elegance, often elevated by collaborations with accomplished Lindy hop and swing dancers who add an extra dimension of style and vibrancy.

Milan Swings has graced some of Italy’s most iconic private estates, particularly around Lake Como — Villa d’Este, Villa Erba, Villa Pizzo, the Mandarin Oriental (formerly CastaDiva) — as well as the Principe di Savoia in Milan, the Crown Plaza, Palazzo Ferrajoli and Palazzo Brancaccio in Rome, and Il Pelagio Castle in Florence, among many others. Each engagement is a testament to their unwavering commitment to delivering an exquisite, immersive experience.

Bespoke Line-Up Options

  • Core Ensemble: Saxophone, piano, vocals, double bass, and drums — a refined foundation of swing.
  • Expanded Formation: Additional trumpets, trombones, guitar, percussion, and female vocalists may be added, creating a full big band of up to 20 members. Personalised lecterns and a themed aesthetic for the evening are available upon request, ensuring every detail is impeccably curated for your exclusive celebration.

dazzling-silk-wedding-florence-italy.intro_html:
Dazzling Silk – An Unrivalled Wedding & Celebration Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

What discerning clients cherish most about Dazzling Silk: a supremely versatile ensemble offering exquisite ceremony vocals and piano, refined jazz aperitif sets, and high-energy funk soirées with an optional DJ, all curated from a varied and engaging repertoire. Impeccable planning and performance throughout the day, delivered by a deeply talented and highly recommended collective.

Dazzling Silk is an Italian ensemble of virtuoso musicians, each bringing decades of refined expertise to your most cherished occasion. With over ten years of experience in the luxury events sphere, the band ensures an impeccable standard of quality and reliability.

Their seasoned artists provide bespoke counsel, proposing the most elegant solutions for every requirement. Equipped with professional-grade instruments, they orchestrate the entirety of your celebration—from delicate jazz and soft pop for cocktail hour to exuberant, dance-driven funk for the evening, complemented by a seamless DJ set.

The ensemble is regularly engaged to perform at distinguished venues such as Agriturismo Terre di Nano in Siena and Osteria San Michele in Pisa.

Upon request, the band offers an exquisite array of equipment: dual audio systems and mixers (enabling two complete setups), refined lighting systems, a smoke machine, a DJ console, and curated playlists.

Dazzling Silk is based in Florence yet performs throughout Italy with effortless grace. Our standard performance length is two hours of immersive party music following dinner, featuring vocals, piano, guitar, bass, and drums.

We are privileged to count five of Italy’s finest vocalists and instrumentalists from the national scene within our ranks.

Line-Up Options:

  • From an intimate duo to a full ten-piece ensemble.

wedding-band-rome-soul-pirates.intro_html: Soul Pirates – an unparalleled wedding and celebration ensemble, based in the exquisite city of Rome, Italy.
wedding-band-rome-soul-pirates.description_html: Specialising in refined entertainment of the highest calibre, Soul Pirates comprises five accomplished musicians who honour both the timeless elegance of yesterday and the vibrant energy of today. Their curated repertoire spans the Swing Era through 1970s Disco, embracing Rock ’n’ Roll, Twist, Soul, Motown, R’n’B, alongside a selection of beloved Italian classics. With nearly a decade of experience performing across Italy and internationally, this impeccably balanced band transforms each wedding into an extraordinary event. They are regularly engaged for celebrations at the prestigious Valle Di Assisi Hotel in Perugia, and have provided bespoke performances for world-renowned clients such as Huawei and Porsche. Their vast, thoughtfully curated repertoire ensures a perfect song for every guest and every occasion. For those seeking one of Italy’s most distinguished soul wedding and party bands, an exclusive experience awaits.

fusion-street-players-roaming-venice-ita.intro_html:
Fusion Street Players — An Exquisite Roaming Ensemble from Venice, Italy

Cherished by discerning clientele for their captivating energy, expansive repertoire, and impeccable professionalism, Fusion Street Players delivers bespoke sets that ensure every guest remains enchanted from the first note to the last.

Conceived in 2015 from the shared passion of four accomplished musicians, the ensemble was founded with a singular vision: to reimagine the essence of a celebratory performance. Since their inception, they have graced hundreds of distinguished events — from opulent gala dinners to exclusive corporate soirées — bringing their refined artistry to the most prestigious and private locations throughout Italy.

Effortlessly weaving the timeless charm of Italian musical tradition with a modern, engaging sound, Fusion Street Players has become one of the most coveted roaming bands in the country, regularly engaged for weddings and bespoke celebrations at the esteemed Le Stonghe Palazzo in Fossombrone.
fusion-street-players-roaming-venice-ita.description_html:
The ensemble's distinctive line-up — two acoustic guitars, a cajon, and a vocalist — affords them the rare ability to craft four-part vocal harmonies throughout their repertoire, imbuing every performance with an unparalleled originality and sophistication. Their signature roaming format allows them to adapt with seamless grace to any setting, bringing live music to the very heart of the gathering, wherever the audience desires.

The curated repertoire traverses the great Italian classics alongside international hits, all reimagined through exquisite acoustic arrangements. Fusion Street Players is the quintessential choice for weddings, private events, gala dinners, and any occasion that demands impeccable musical entertainment. Each setlist and atmosphere is thoughtfully customised to reflect the unique vision of the host.

Performances typically commence during the aperitivo, followed by two or three fifteen-minute sets throughout dinner. These sets may be delivered in a purely acoustic manner, without amplification, or elevated using the band's own professional audio system — complete with headset microphones and a wireless instrument setup — precisely calibrated to the requirements of the evening.

fusion-street-players-roaming-venice-ita.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths? (e.g. 2 x 60 minute sets or 3 x 40 minute sets)</summary>- We are able to perform 3 sets of 30 mins or 1 set of 90 mins during welcome or aperitif, and 3 sets of 20 mins during the dinner. If necessary we can play during evening party with a 90 mins set.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Our line up is the same, 4 piece band. Main Voice + 3 background voices, 2 guitars, 1 portable cajon, but the musicians could change.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes, we offer two proposals: totally Acoustic WITHOUT audio system and amplification or WITH audio amplification, Audio system, headset mics and wireless instrument system. If required we are able to offer all sound & Lighting equipment. Final price of equipment is to be agreed after discussing requirements with the client.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- To be established during communication with client.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We normally arrive at the venue 2 HOURS before the event starts, to set up and soundcheck

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes, we can learn song requests (first dance, the entry of newlyweds, cut of cake...)

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- We are able to perform outdoors and in unusual settings</details>

tuscany-party-duo-cortona-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscany Party Duo – an exquisite acoustic and electric ensemble paired with a refined DJ service, based in the heart of Cortona, Italy.

Guests consistently praise this duo for their impeccable talent and professionalism, the seamless fusion of live performance and curated DJ sets, an expansive repertoire that welcomes bespoke requests, and an atmosphere of effortless elegance that keeps every guest enraptured well into the night.

For more than two decades, our devotion has been to live music in its most sophisticated forms. Beyond our frequent engagements as wedding musicians throughout Tuscany and the breadth of Italy, we have graced concert stages across the country—performing as a duo or alongside other distinguished musicians.

A signature element of our artistry is an affinity for international music; we deliberately select foreign songs over purely Italian ones, ensuring a truly global soundscape. This refined preference has cemented our reputation as one of the most highly regarded wedding ensembles in Tuscany and beyond.

Mastery of English-language repertoire is essential when performing at weddings of English, Irish, American, Australian, and other international clientele. We are regularly commissioned for events at distinguished venues such as Villa Cungi in Sansepolcro and Castiglione del Lago in Perugia.

We stand among the most seasoned wedding musicians in Italy. Delivering a diverse international repertoire—including the most celebrated songs from various nations, even those seldom heard in Italy—is of paramount importance. On occasion, after a performance, guests have inquired about our nationality, lauding our curated song selection and flawless pronunciation.

Today, more than twenty years after our ambitious beginnings, we take pride in consistent, year‑on‑year growth. Though we have received numerous accolades in recent years, our greatest satisfaction remains the joy of the couples and their guests. We are wholly dedicated to fulfilling every desire, offering bespoke suggestions, discerning advice, and all necessary assistance.

Our Packages

Acoustic Set
Two acoustic guitars and two voices—ideal for apertifs and cocktail hour. This genuinely unique act, with a vast and varied repertoire spanning many eras and genres, will enhance your event with refined sophistication.

  • Sound system and instruments set in the aperitif area.
  • Duration: up to 2 hours of live performance.

Acoustic Set & DJ Set (or DJ Set + Sax)
After a relaxed aperitif and a delectable dinner, there is nothing quite like taking to the dance floor to continue the evening with laughter and joy. We DJ in any style—chart & pop, 60s–90s, R&B, hip hop, Motown, funk, soul, garage, and more. With years of industry experience, we understand that music is the heartbeat of any event, especially weddings.

  • Sound system and instruments set in the aperitif area.
  • Sound system with wireless microphone set in the dinner area for Spotify background music and speeches.
  • Sound system, DJ equipment, and disco light system set in the after‑dinner area.
  • Duration: Acoustic set up to 2 hours live; DJ set up to 4 hours.

Live Electric Set & DJ Set
For those who desire both live music and a DJ set, this exclusive package offers the finest of both worlds—combining the energy and spontaneity of live performance with the seamless transitions and infinite playlist possibilities of a professional DJ. Elevate your event to new heights as The Tuscany Party Duo brings together skilled musicians and an experienced DJ in one unforgettable experience.

  • Sound system with wireless microphone set in the dinner area for Spotify background music and speeches.
  • Sound system, professional instruments, DJ equipment, and disco light system set in the after‑dinner area.
  • Duration: up to 4 hours total, blending live performance and DJ set.

DJ + SAX

  • Sound system with wireless microphone set in the dinner area for Spotify background music and speeches.
  • Sound system, DJ equipment, and disco light system set in the after‑dinner area.
  • SAX performance during the after‑dinner DJ set.
  • Duration: up to 4 hours DJ set after dinner.

DJ SET

  • Sound system with wireless microphone set in the dinner area for Spotify background music and speeches.
  • Sound system, DJ equipment, and disco light system set in the after‑dinner area.
  • Duration: up to 4 hours DJ set after dinner.

Seeking the perfect wedding musicians to craft a magical atmosphere on your most special day? Look no further than The Tuscany Party Duo—a dynamic ensemble that transforms dreams into reality. With exceptional musical talent and extensive experience performing at weddings, this duo guarantees refined entertainment and joyous celebration.

The Tuscany Party Duo offers a curated selection of musical options tailored to your taste. From elegant acoustic renditions of the greatest hits during apertifs to vibrant dance and sing‑along anthems performed live or as a DJ during the after‑dinner party, their versatility ensures that every moment of your wedding is accompanied by the most exquisite music.

tuscany-party-duo-cortona-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>Are you open to receiving requests?</summary>Absolutely, we do! You can fully personalise every playlist to your liking. In regards to the DJ set, you have complete freedom to select any song of your choice.  
						


</details><details><summary>Could you perform our 1st dance or a special song live?</summary>In case you have a special song that holds personal significance to you (such as your first dance), and you would like us to perform it live at your wedding, even if it is not currently part of our regular repertoire, we are more than willing to learn and play it exclusively for you. Just inform us of the song title and artist as soon as possible or at least three months prior to the wedding date. Thank you!  
						


</details><details><summary>Is it possible for us to utilise Spotify in order to send you our requested playlists?</summary> Certainly! We do have a Spotify Premium account. Don't hesitate to share your playlists!  
						


</details><details><summary>What is the number of songs you will play?</summary>Approximately 15 to 20 songs per hour, resulting in an average of 45 to 60 songs during our performance, and a maximum of 60 to 80 songs.  



</details><details><summary>What time do you start playing?</summary>Consider this as a possible schedule: dinner commences at approximately 7:00 pm and concludes at 9:30-10:00 pm. Following dinner, we promptly commence playing and the music continues uninterrupted until 2:00am!!    
						


</details><details><summary>What time do you usually stop? Can we eventually add an extra hour?</summary>We usually stop to play/dj at max 2:00 am. Once we finish our Live/DJ set at 2:00 am, we have the option to rent a sound system until 3am for an additional fee. During this time, you can choose to play either one of our dance playlists or your own music using your personal device such as a Smartphone, iPhone, tablet, or any other device you prefer.  
						


</details><details><summary>At what time will you be arriving at the venue?</summary>For our live electric & DJ set we may arrive around one and a half to two hours ahead of dinner. All necessary preparations will be completed beforehand, ensuring no interference with the ceremony reception or any check-sound procedures. For the acoustic and the acoustic DJ set] we arrive one and a half to two hours ahead of start of the Acoustic Set.  
						


</details><details><summary>What is the duration required for you to set up?</summary>From the moment we arrive and begin unloading our equipment, it takes approximately one and a half to two hours.  
						


</details><details><summary>Are venue contacts something that you require?</summary>It would be greatly beneficial if we could obtain the contact information for the venue manager, including their email address and telephone number. This would allow us, if needed, to directly address any technical requirements, such as power supply and other technical needs.  
						


</details><details><summary>Can a friend or family member participate in the evening by singing a song?</summary>Yes of course!! Nonetheless, it would be greatly appreciated if you could give us prior notice (via e-mail), especially if the performance is intended to be a surprise! Our repertoire is constantly evolving and thoughtfully curated to encompass timeless classics from the last six decades as well as current chart-topping hits. When you book us, you will receive a complete wedding entertainment package for your event in Italy.</details>

acoustic-trio-bari-classico.intro_html: Trio Classico — an exquisite acoustic trio from the sun-drenched region of Puglia, Italy, offering a refined and authentically Italian musical experience.
acoustic-trio-bari-classico.description_html:
Clients consistently praise Trio Classico for their impeccable artistry: an authentic Italian atmosphere, a lively yet elegant engagement, effortless collaboration, and flawless communication. Guests are enchanted, and the ensemble comes highly recommended for those seeking a truly curated celebration.

This exceptional trio specializes in spirited renditions of Italy’s most cherished traditional and folk songs. Perfect for an authentic Italian occasion, their performance brings the very soul of Italy to every wedding and event.

Comprising a mandolin, an accordion, a guitar, and a trio of vocalists, Trio Classico weaves a unique and enchanting sound that captivates any audience. Entirely acoustic, these virtuosos can roam freely through your event, delivering a bespoke, roaming Italian performance that feels both intimate and grand.

With years of combined industry experience, the ensemble embodies the highest standards of professionalism and talent, ensuring an unforgettable show. They are regularly booked for weddings and events at prestigious venues such as The Rome Cavalieri Waldorf Astoria Hotel, Castello di Ugento Hotel in Lecce, and Masseria San Giovanni in Puglia, Italy.

Happy to travel across the country, Trio Classico performs for weddings, private parties, and corporate functions throughout Italy. Their acoustic nature makes them ideal for both indoor and outdoor settings, adapting seamlessly to any refined ambience.

Here are just some of the exquisite locations where Trio Classico has been engaged for weddings and events:

  • Castello di Ugento Hotel, Lecce
  • Masseria San Giovanni
  • Villa Mon Repos, Sicily
  • Palazzo Budini Gattai, Florence
  • Castello Monaci, Lecce
  • Masseria Calderisi, Fasano
  • Masseria Amastuola Wine Resort
  • Basilica di San Nicola, Bari
  • Vinilia Wine Resort, Taranto
  • Castello di Vicarello, Grosseto
  • Calderisi Mare Beach Club
  • Domus Laeta, Giungano
  • Il Palmento Hotel Relais
  • Corato, Bari, Italy
  • Masseria Narducci
  • Rome Cavalieri Waldorf Astoria Hotel
  • Il Salviatino, Florence, Italy
  • Monopoli, Bari, Italy
  • Ostuni, Italy
  • Casarano, Lecce, Italy
  • Pantelleria, Trapani, Italy
  • Maiori, Italy

Should you desire to engage one of Italy’s finest acoustic trios—an ensemble of impeccable taste and refined musicianship—look no further than Trio Classico. We invite you to discover the luxury of an authentic Italian soundtrack for your most special occasion.

Please enjoy the video below to experience the brilliance of Trio Classico.

wedding-party-band-tuscany-the-blazers.intro_html:
The Blazers – an exquisite wedding and party ensemble based in the heart of Tuscany, Italy.

Renowned for delivering impeccably curated entertainment, The Blazers specialise in transforming events into unforgettable experiences. With years of refined expertise performing at Italy’s most distinguished venues and for esteemed brands, this ensemble offers a performance that is truly without equal.

Discover their meticulously crafted 2025 Set List – a testament to their versatility and artistry.

Based in the enchanting region of Tuscany, The Blazers travel throughout Italy, gracing weddings, private soirées, and corporate gatherings with their presence. They are frequently engaged at exclusive properties such as Villa Teloni in Macerata, Laticastelli Country Relais in Siena, and Villa Mussio in Livorno.
wedding-party-band-tuscany-the-blazers.description_html:
The Blazers’ vast and varied repertoire spans multiple eras and genres, from the timeless anthems of Queen to the soulful brilliance of Stevie Wonder – an exhaustive collection that leaves no desire unfulfilled. Their impressive selection includes both English and Italian songs, making them the consummate choice for destination weddings seeking a truly authentic and sophisticated musical backdrop.

The band’s swift and unobtrusive setup allows them to perform in any setting, whether within the grandeur of a ballroom or beneath the open sky. For those discerning clients seeking to engage one of Italy’s most refined wedding and party ensembles, The Blazers remain the unparalleled choice.

italian-folk-band-genoa.intro_html:
Italian Folk Band – Exquisite Folk & Wedding Entertainment Based in Genoa, Italy

The Italian Folk Band offers an immersive journey into the soul of Italy, delivering an atmosphere of refined elegance and authentic spirit. Their meticulously curated repertoire pays homage to legendary maestros such as Fred Buscaglione, Dean Martin, and Domenico Modugno, weaving a tapestry of timeless Italian classics.

The ensemble features a powerful male vocalist, a spectacular accordionist, and a masterful guitarist—each an impeccable virtuoso. Together, they conjure a dreamy Italian ambiance, performing a bespoke selection of serenading ballads and effervescent up-tempo melodies. From spirited tarantellas to impassioned Neapolitan anthems, their performance is crafted to captivate, ensuring every guest is swept onto the dance floor.

Understanding that every celebration is entirely unique, the band offers unparalleled flexibility. Clients may select from bespoke configurations—trio, quartet, quintet, or sextet—enhanced by the rich, resonant textures of double bass and percussion. Furthermore, the band’s visual presentation can be perfectly curated to complement the occasion, whether it be the timeless sophistication of formal attire or the charming heritage of an ‘old-style’ white ensemble, complete with a Coppola hat and accents of vibrant red.

The Italian Folk Band has had the distinguished privilege of performing at an exclusive collection of Italy’s most prestigious estates and boutique hotels, including:

  • Belmond Caruso Hotel, Amalfi
  • Villa Sola Cabiati, Tremezzo
  • Relais & Spa Castello di Casiglio
  • Casina Valadier, Rome, Italy
  • La Villa Hotel, Asti
  • La Pescaia Resort, Grosseto
  • Bagno Piero, Lucca
  • Passalacqua, Lake Como
  • Borgo Corsignano
  • Lake Garda, Italy
  • Udine, Italy
  • Capannori, Lucca, Tuscany
  • San Gimignano, Siena, Italy

For discerning clients who seek to curate an event marked by unparalleled authenticity and exquisite Italian refinement, the Italian Folk Band stands as the definitive choice.

wedding-dj-sicily-italy-denny.intro_html:
DJ Denny – An Exquisite Wedding DJ, Based in Sicily, Italy

DJ Denny represents the pinnacle of refined open-format artistry, curating impeccably crafted sets and performances of the highest calibre. With years of distinguished performance experience, he possesses a rare confluence of skill, talent, and professionalism, orchestrating celebrations that are truly unparalleled.

His bespoke services have been sought by discerning clientele from across the globe for weddings, private soirées, and exclusive corporate events. DJ Denny is regularly engaged to perform at the most prestigious venues in Sicily, including the Verdura Resort Rocco Forte Hotel in Sciacca, the Belmond Grand Hotel Timeo in Messina, and the Commenda di San Calogero in Augusta.

With hundreds of exceptional events to his name, DJ Denny is the definitive choice for destination weddings and occasions of significance. He performs either solo or in collaboration with other artists; one of his most coveted formats is a vinyl DJ set harmoniously paired with a live saxophone performance. For those seeking to secure the services of Sicily’s finest open-format DJ, DJ Denny offers an experience of uncompromising elegance.

irish-band-italy-knots.intro_html:
The Knots — An Exquisite Irish Wedding Ensemble, Based in Bari, Puglia, Italy

The Knots represent a truly refined Irish band, dedicated to the performance of every manner of Celtic traditional repertoire.

From their impeccably curated base in Bari, Puglia, this exceptional assembly of musicians traverses the country, sharing their deep passion for Irish music at weddings, private soirées, and distinguished corporate gatherings.

Comprising four virtuoso instrumentalists—violin, guitar, percussion, and banjo—The Knots bestow upon your event an authentic, bespoke Irish and Celtic sound of unparalleled elegance.

We invite you to peruse our 2025 Set List.

Discover their artistry in the video below, and witness what Italy's most sophisticated Irish band can offer.

Our calendar is frequently reserved for weddings and exclusive celebrations at Castello Monaci in Lecce, Villa Eva in Ravello, and Relais Masseria Villa Cenci in Puglia, Italy.
irish-band-italy-knots.description_html:
As Italy's preeminent Irish wedding band, The Knots bring decades of combined industry mastery. We offer you a performance that is entirely bespoke—curated to your unique vision and event—featuring selections from The Pogues, Steve Earle, The Dubliners, and an exquisite array of traditional Irish songs and melodies.

This highly accomplished ensemble performs fully acoustically, allowing them to grace any setting—whether indoors or amid the most enchanting outdoor landscapes.

Should you seek to engage one of Italy’s finest Irish wedding musicians, look no further than The Knots. We await the pleasure of your enquiry.

ravenna-violinist-faenza-italy.intro_html: The Ravenna Violinist — an exquisite solo violinist and vocalist, based in the refined city of Faenza, Italy, offering bespoke musical experiences for the most discerning weddings and events, both throughout Italy and abroad.
ravenna-violinist-faenza-italy.description_html:
Each performance is a masterful fusion of violin and voice, seamlessly interwoven to captivate and enchant. The artist commands both the electric violin—adorned with a luminous LED-lit bow for a breathtaking visual spectacle—and the acoustic violin, delivering an impeccably curated repertoire spanning classical masterpieces, contemporary pop, vibrant dance, and spirited reggaeton. Regularly engaged for celebrations at the prestigious Casali di Casole in Siena and the majestic Villa Miani in Rome, every appearance is a hallmark of refined elegance.

A state-of-the-art wireless microphone system complements the violin, ensuring pristine sound in most settings. For expansive or open-air venues, an enhanced amplification arrangement is recommended to preserve impeccable audio quality for both violin and vocals. The performance repertoire is a thoughtfully curated selection, yet bespoke requests are welcomed with grace—whether for the ceremony, the dinner, the cutting of the cake, or the first dance. In the lead-up to the event, close coordination with the DJ ensures seamless integration of tracks and a finalised set list, along with a mutually agreeable sound check time to guarantee flawless execution.

The artist possesses an innate ability to adapt to any environment—intimate indoor salons, sweeping outdoor terraces, sun-drenched beaches, or unconventional settings—always elevating the unique atmosphere with poise and artistry. Whether you seek to infuse your occasion with understated sophistication or vibrant energy, the performance is tailored to leave an indelible impression of luxury and joy.

Line-up Options

  • Solo Violinist
  • Solo Violinist Singer
  • Violin & DJ

splendour-duo-padua-italy.intro_html:
About Splendour Duo – an exquisite Violin & Cello Duo based in Padua, Italy

Splendour Duo is a supremely refined ensemble of violin and cello, offering impeccably curated live music for weddings and exclusive high-end celebrations across the globe.

Classically trained and internationally celebrated, the duo delivers a polished, deeply expressive sound to ceremonies, receptions, and every moment where atmosphere and musical perfection are paramount.

Their collaboration began aboard luxury cruise liners, performing for the world’s most prestigious cruise lines and cultivating a versatile repertoire ideally suited to wedding ceremonies, private soirées, and bespoke events.

The ensemble is regularly commissioned for weddings and gatherings at Villa Muggia in Stresa and Villa Cariola in Caprino Veronese.

Today, Splendour Duo dedicates itself exclusively to luxury weddings and private functions, also offering solo violin or cello performances upon request. Based in Padova, the duo travels internationally to serve discerning clientele.

Both musicians possess formidable academic foundations and extensive stage presence. Violinist Marina, a graduate of the Kyiv Academy of Music, has toured extensively across Europe as lead violinist with the symphonic production Lord of the Sound. Her career includes performances for VIP and corporate events, Carnival Cruise Line productions, opening ceremonies at Celebration Key, and contemporary crossover shows such as Celestial String.

Cellist Olesia, a graduate of the Dnipro Academy of Music, served as lead cellist of the Dnipro Youth Orchestra and toured throughout Europe. She also spent over five years performing with a resident string quartet on Princess Cruises, playing for formal ceremonies, private events, ship inaugurations, celebrity guests, and members of the British Royal Family.

Splendour Duo offers flexible formations—from solo violin or cello to string duo, trio, or quartet—with set lengths typically ranging from 30 to 45 minutes. The ensemble provides essential sound equipment, arrives well in advance to ensure a seamless setup, and is pleased to learn a limited number of special requests, such as a first dance. Performances can be adapted to a wide array of venues, including alfresco settings when weather permits, always delivered with elegance, consummate professionalism, and an unwavering attention to detail.

vibe-mix-latina-italy.intro_html:
About Vibe Mix – an exquisite wedding & party ensemble based in Latina, Italy

Vibe Mix is a refined electro-acoustic trio, offering a bespoke live experience for the most discerning celebrations.

The ensemble features Daniele on vocals and guitar, the commanding lead vocalist Pamela, and Francesco on bass.

Vibe Mix lends its impeccable artistry to private soirées, weddings, milestone birthdays, open-air concerts, exclusive nightclubs, and distinguished Disco Rock Pubs.

The ensemble can present a female lead, a male lead, or both as principal vocalists, elegantly tailored to the client’s preference.

They are regularly engaged to perform for weddings and prestigious events at Villa Brasini in Rome, Italy.
vibe-mix-latina-italy.description_html:
Driven by a passion for music and an exquisite synergy among its members, the band has curated a reputation for delivering impeccably high-quality entertainment across the nation.

A Vibe Mix performance typically spans approximately three hours, offering the following refined structure:

  • One acoustic set of roughly one hour, providing sophisticated background ambience.

  • One spirited electric set of approximately two hours, designed for inspired dancing. Alternatively, the performance can be elegantly divided into three sets of one hour each.

The show encompasses both acoustically intimate background music for serene moments and vibrant, lively compositions to encourage guests onto the dance floor. Upon request, the line-up may be expanded with additional musicians such as a saxophonist, violinist, male vocalist, or a DJ, creating an even more bespoke affair.

The fee includes a professional audio system and stage lighting, perfectly suited for medium-sized venues. Should the occasion demand, a larger audio and lighting service can be arranged to meet the precise requirements of the event.

The ensemble is also capable of covering up to three separate areas—for example, the reception, cocktail hour, and main hall—ensuring a seamless sonic experience throughout.

Before, after, and between live sets, carefully curated playlists provide a continuous, pleasant atmosphere through refined background music.

The band typically arrives approximately two hours before the event for setup; the soundcheck and configuration process takes around thirty minutes.

Up to two live songs chosen by the couple may be performed—such as the first dance, parent dance, or cake cutting—and any other moment of the event can be customised with background music upon request.

The ideal performance area measures at least four by four metres, though the band is flexible and can adapt to more intimate spaces if required.

All equipment is CE-certified and fully compliant with European safety standards, ensuring uncompromised quality and reliability.

The ensemble is available to perform in any venue, including the most unique or unconventional locations.

Line-up Options

Three- to seven-piece band (additional musicians: male vocalist, saxophonist, violinist, DJ)
