fret-flow-florence-italy.intro_html:
Fret Flow Duo
An ensemble of peerless refinement, based in Florence, Italy
fret-flow-florence-italy.description_html:
What discerning clientele most cherish about Fret Flow Duo: Impeccable communication, an atmosphere of joyful elegance, exquisitely beautiful music, emotionally resonant ambience, consummate professionalism and adaptability, bespoke song selections, and the highest recommendations.

Founded by a virtuoso musician and vocalist from Florence, Fret Flow brings to each performance over two decades of accumulated mastery.

Through years of artistic exploration, they have immersed themselves in an extraordinary breadth of genres—from the rustic soul of Irish folk to the improvisatory spirit of jazz, from the energy of rock to the sophistication of contemporary composition—each influence having enriched their sonic sensibility and curated repertoire.

The ensemble performs with guitar, mandolin, saxophone, double bass, and voice, weaving a uniquely textured tapestry of sound for every occasion. Whether appearing as a solo artist or helming configurations of duos, trios, or quartets, every iteration allows Fret Flow to refine their singular, eclectic approach to music.

Fret Flow is regularly engaged to perform for weddings and events at Villa Ardore in Florence and Quercia Al Poggio in Barberino Tavarnelle—venues of distinction that reflect their calibre.

Why Choose Fret Flow?

From the tender strains of a ceremony melody to the spirited vibrancy of a reception, the ensemble adapts seamlessly to the ambience and the refined tastes of your guests. Bilingual communication in English and French ensures effortless collaboration with international couples, planners, and attendees.

Song requests and personal interactions are warmly welcomed, rendering each performance a bespoke and unforgettable experience. With an extensive repertoire, Fret Flow can perform for up to three hours, divided into sets of 45 minutes. Should a particular piece be desired for a first dance or any other cherished moment, the ensemble will learn and perform it live, provided advance notice is given.

Thanks to battery-powered amplification of the highest quality, Fret Flow can perform in virtually any setting—even in the midst of a pastoral landscape—without recourse to a power source. This service is included in the fee. During brief intermissions, silence is never left to linger; curated background music flows through the sound system, maintaining an atmosphere of effortless grace.

With a swift 20‑minute setup, the ensemble is ready to perform with remarkable efficiency, though they prefer to arrive at the venue at least 90 minutes before the performance time. Having performed at hundreds of weddings across Italy, Fret Flow has curated bespoke musical journeys for couples from every corner of the globe.

Line-up Options:

  • Solo Guitar – Intimate and sophisticated.
  • Guitar Duo – Harmonious and warm.
  • Guitar & Mandolin Duo – A touch of Italian and folk charm.
  • Guitar + Voice & Double Bass Duo – Charm & Elegance.
  • Guitar & Sax – Smooth, soulful and jazzy.
  • Guitar & Violin Duo – Makes you tap your feet.
  • Trio: Guitar, Violin & Double Bass – Swinging instrumentals with an Italian feel.

dj-lecce-italy-gius.intro_html:
DJ Gius – An Exquisite Wedding DJ, Based in Lecce, Italy

What discerning clients most cherish about DJ Gius: impeccable mixing, refined crowd intuition, boundless energy, seamless communication, unwavering professionalism, bespoke playlists, and an atmosphere of unforgettable elegance.

DJ Gius is a masterful, sophisticated performer hailing from Italy, an expert in curating bespoke musical journeys for the most distinguished events. His innovative remixes transform beloved classics into exhilarating new compositions, each set a meticulously crafted narrative that glides effortlessly from the 1970s and 1980s through the naughties and into the 2010s.

With a career spanning hundreds of refined gatherings—from opulent weddings and private soirées to exclusive club nights and grand festivals—DJ Gius brings a versatility that is both rare and impeccable. He is a regular presence at the most coveted venues, including Castello di Ugento Hotel in Lecce, Masseria Grieco in Ostuni, and COCO Beach Club in Bari, Italy.

For an even more extraordinary experience, a live saxophonist may join DJ Gius, creating an electric fusion of DJ and live saxophone that elevates any wedding or celebration to the highest tier of luxury entertainment.

DJ Gius is delighted to travel, performing across Italy and beyond, and dedicates himself to fulfilling every refined requirement of your event.

In Italiano

Gius è un dj professionista che si occuperà dell'intrattenimento musicale del vostro matrimonio, valorizzandone i momenti più importanti e selezionando i brani migliori per ogni fase del ricevimento. Affidandovi a Gius troverete serietà, carisma ed esperienza, ovvero tutto ciò che vi servirà per la buona riuscita della vostra festa!

Il dj dispone di attrezzatura audio e luci altamente professionale, di effetti speciali (fontane luminose Sparkular/macchine delle scintille), di un servizio di videoproiezione su maxi schermo, di karaoke, microfoni wireless e gadget di ogni tipo.

Generalmente si fa accompagnare da un vocalist con lo scopo di coinvolgere ancora di più tutti gli invitati. Entrambi saranno a disposizione per accontentare ogni vostra richiesta, esigenza e gusti musicali.

Gius vanta di un repertorio molto vasto che va dalla musica anni '70 fino ad oggi, passando per tutti i generi musicali, come disco, commerciale, dance, reggaeton, balli latino americani e tanto altro.
dj-lecce-italy-gius.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Impianto Audio/Luci professionale (TesteMobili,Strobo,Laser,EffettiLed ecc) Effetti speciali: Fontane Sparkular/Macchine delle scintille+Macchina del Fumo Videoproiettore+Maxi Schermo+Microfoni+Gadget.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Preferibilmente con largo anticipo al fine di poter organizzare al meglio l’evento



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Solista, Piccola (2-3 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Qualsiasi genere musicale a disposizione. L'importante è far divertire tutti gli invitati.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Certo.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>DJ dal 2011. Attestati DJ/Producer e Tecnico del Suono.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Quanto richiesto.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Poco più di un'ora.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

two-the-tune-duo-florence-italy.intro_html:
About Two The Tune – an exquisite acoustic duo based in Florence, Italy

Two The Tune, a bespoke wedding and events ensemble hailing from Florence, Italy.

Francesco, a supremely gifted vocalist and guitarist, harmonises his soulful voice with Eugenio’s rhythmic percussive artistry, weaving a captivating tapestry of pop‑folk melodies accented by a refined acoustic twist.

Their performances stand as a testament to an unwavering shared passion for music, drawing from an impeccably curated international repertoire to craft an unforgettable acoustic experience for their discerning audiences.

They are regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive events at Borgo Colognola in Perugia and Agriturismo Il Lebbio in Tuscany.
two-the-tune-duo-florence-italy.description_html:
From the most intimate weddings to distinguished corporate galas, Two The Tune deliver every performance with infectious energy and undeniable virtuosity, leaving guests utterly captivated and deeply impressed.

Based in Florence yet available for engagements throughout Italy, Two The Tune continue to enchant audiences with their heartfelt artistry, proving that when it comes to music, two truly is the tune.

They offer a selection of refined set configurations, the most popular being two sixty‑minute sets or three forty‑minute sets. For an extra Italian flourish, clients may also elect to add a male vocalist to the duo, perfect for performing beloved classic Italian songs.

Their performance is powered by a state‑of‑the‑art, high‑end sound system, provided and included in the bespoke fee. An option to enhance the ambience with additional lighting is available at an extra cost.

<details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, We can provide a laptop playlist the celebrators prefer

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We arrive about two hours before the start of our performance

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- It takes us 1 hour to prepare the stage.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>Of course! It will be our pleasure to play your favourite song.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- We need an area of ​​at least 2 x 2 meters.

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- We have liability insurance and professional equipment that complies with safety regulations.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, we can play wherever you think is most appropriate. As long as there is electricity and it is a safe place.</details>

wedding-band-amalfi-italy-turnpikes.intro_html:
The Turnpikes – An Exquisite Folk & Roaming Ensemble, Based in Amalfi, Italy

The Turnpikes are a refined four-piece folk roaming band, rooted in the enchanting coastal town of Amalfi, Italy. For several years, they have captivated discerning audiences within the wedding and entertainment sphere with their soulful harmonies and impeccably dynamic instrumentation.

The ensemble comprises a guitarist and vocalist, a violinist, a cajonist and backing vocalist, and a bass ukulele and accordionist—each musician bringing a bespoke artistry to every performance.

Their curated song list weaves together Italian and international rock, folk, and pop masterpieces—from The Beatles, Sting, Coldplay, Oasis, Red Hot Chili Peppers, Bob Marley, Bruce Springsteen, and David Bowie, to pure 1950s rock & roll, exquisitely reinterpreted alongside classic Neapolitan tradition songs, all infused with a distinctive folk sensibility.

The Turnpikes are regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at celebrated venues including Waterfall Garden in Malta, Caruso Belmond Hotel on the Amalfi Coast, SPAO Borgo San Pietro Aquaeortus in Umbria, Villa Arvedi in Grezzana, and Masseria Astapiana Villa Giusso in Vico Equense, Italy.
wedding-band-amalfi-italy-turnpikes.description_html:
The Turnpikes’ performances transcend mere music—they are a fully immersive luxury experience. Their energetic stage presence and innate ability to forge a connection with every guest render each event an unforgettable occasion.

Among the prestigious locations where they have been invited to perform for weddings and events:

  • Caruso Belmond Hotel, Amalfi Coast
  • SPAO Borgo San Pietro Aquaeortus
  • Borgo Castello Panicaglia, Perugia
  • Villa Arvedi, Grezzana
  • Masseria Astapiana Villa Giusso
  • Villa dei Fisici, Positano
  • Borgo di Castelvecchio, Siena
  • Waterfall Garden, Malta
  • Villa Zagara, Sorrento
  • San Martino Alfieri, Asti
  • Asciano, Siena, Italy
  • Vietri sul Mare, Italy

Below you will find a refined description of their bespoke services:

Acoustic Roaming Performance

The ensemble gracefully follows guests through the various settings of the wedding venue, presenting acoustic music supported by a battery-powered amplifier and a microphone. Impeccable background music is provided throughout. This roaming performance typically encompasses:

  • Arrival and welcome toast of the newlyweds—featuring Wagner’s wedding march exquisitely rearranged in a swing style
  • Initial buffet segment (7 to 8 songs with a pause)
  • Cutting of the cake (3 to 4 songs)

Fixed Position with Amplification

In this setting, pre-recorded music is elegantly curated before, between, and after the live sets. A curated party playlist—a sophisticated blend of timeless classics and contemporary favourites—is always at hand, though the couple is most welcome to provide their own selection. During this arrangement, the most celebrated moments include:

  • Entrance of the bride and groom
  • First dance of the bride and groom
  • Dance of the bride and groom with parents
  • Dance with all guests
  • Throwing of the bouquet
  • Launch of the garter

Upon request, the performance order may be bespoke-customised to align perfectly with the couple’s vision.

Whether enchanting guests at a rustic outdoor wedding or a lively street festival, The Turnpikes’ music is assured to inspire dancing and heartfelt celebration.

dolce-vita-duo-vicenza-italy.intro_html:
Dolce Vita Duo – A Bespoke Guitar & Violin Ensemble from Vicenza, Italy

Dolce Vita Duo presents an exquisite fusion of classical refinement and contemporary vitality, enchanting audiences with an impeccably curated stage presence and unrivaled musicianship.

Based in the enchanting city of Vicenza, this duo of virtuoso violinist and guitarist brings a distinctly refined sophistication to weddings and events both across Italy and internationally.

Having graced the stage alongside luminaries such as Anastacia, Eros Ramazzotti, Adriano Celentano, and Rita Pavone, the duo’s pedigree is impeccable, ensuring an unforgettable performance for your most distinguished occasion.

The duo is frequently engaged to perform at the prestigious Palazzo di Piero in Tuscany, a testament to their enduring appeal and exceptional artistry.
dolce-vita-duo-vicenza-italy.description_html:
Exceptionally versatile, Dolce Vita Duo curates their performances for a diverse array of occasions, including wedding ceremonies, receptions, corporate galas, birthday celebrations, and art exhibitions.

Their meticulously crafted repertoire moves effortlessly from timeless classical masterpieces to contemporary favorites, offering a musical journey that resonates with the most discerning of audiences.

While their principal presence is rooted in the captivating regions of Veneto, Lombardia, Emilia Romagna, and Toscana, the duo’s renown extends far beyond – they are frequently summoned to grace weddings and events throughout Italy and abroad.

Experience the unparalleled magic of Dolce Vita Duo as they elevate your event into an exquisite celebration of timeless elegance and joyful melodies, leaving an indelible impression upon all who attend.

jazz-band-florence-italy-ponte-vecchio.intro_html:
Ponte Vecchio Jazz Band – An Exquisite Ensemble of Refined Musicianship, Based in the Heart of Florence, Italy

Comprising the impeccable artistry of Stefano on piano, Simone on drums, and Andrea on double bass, this bespoke trio curates a repertoire that gracefully spans from pop and rock to the timeless elegance of jazz and swing.

For each exclusive event, Ponte Vecchio Jazz Band may present a duo, trio, or quartet; their signature offering, however, remains the refined instrumental jazz trio—a truly curated experience.

They are regularly engaged to perform at the most distinguished venues, including Masseria San Michele in Martina Franca and Villa Montanare in Arezzo, Italy, where their sound elevates every celebration.
jazz-band-florence-italy-ponte-vecchio.description_html:
Ponte Vecchio Jazz Band is a newly conceived musical project, born from the collaboration of three consummate professionals who, with passion, charisma, and boundless energy, animate your wedding reception in an impeccably engaging manner. The vision is to embrace something entirely new—to depart from conventional wedding music and delight guests with a singular touch of originality.

Stefano at the piano, Simone at the drums, and Andrea on the double bass become your personal musicians for the day, ever at your disposal and always ready to perform. They offer a spectacular presentation that is sure to be cherished by all who attend.

Their collection is remarkably vast and varied in musical style: Italian and international masterpieces reimagined through the lenses of pop, rock, or jazz, ensuring a performance that is exquisitely personalised, fresh, and creatively inspired.

Below are just a few of the exquisite locations where they have been booked for weddings and events:

  • Villa Montanare, Cortona
  • Masseria San Michele
  • La Bandita Country House
  • Castello di Petrata, Assisi
  • Villa Alberico, Rome
  • Villa Cora, Florence
  • Villa e Parco di Corliano
  • Villa di Striano, Florence
  • La Pescaia Resort, Grosseto
  • Villa Belsole, Certaldo
  • Antico Borgo San Lorenzo
  • Borgo San Pietro Aquaeortus
  • Tenuta di Papena, Chiusdino
  • Villa Medea, Lucca
  • L'Olmo Hotel, Monticchiello
  • Fattoria di Corsignano
  • Pietrasanta, Lucca, Italy
  • Greve in Chianti, Italy

In Italiano

Ponte Vecchio Jazz Band, un progetto musicale esclusivo concepito da tre musicisti di raffinata professionalità che, con passione, carisma e una straordinaria energia, animeranno il vostro ricevimento nuziale in modo impeccabile e profondamente coinvolgente. L’idea è di sperimentare qualcosa di nuovo, di allontanarsi dalla consueta musica da matrimonio, per intrattenere gli ospiti con quel tocco di originalità che non guasta mai.

Stefano al pianoforte, Simone alla batteria e Andrea al contrabbasso saranno i vostri musicisti per un giorno, sempre a vostra completa disposizione e pronti a offrirvi una performance spettacolare, destinata a essere apprezzata da tutti.

Ponte Vecchio Jazz Band vi propone un repertorio vastissimo e variegato nello stile musicale: brani storici italiani e internazionali rivisitati in chiave pop, rock o jazz, per rendere l’esibizione il più personalizzata possibile, con un taglio fresco, nuovo e creativo.

jazz-band-florence-italy-ponte-vecchio.faq_html:
<details><summary>What does the wedding package include?</summary>The package includes the preparation of your own instrumentation (digital piano, drums and double bass), amplification if necessary. Live music during and after the reception.



</details><details><summary>How far in advance do I need to get in touch with you?</summary>At least two weeks, preferably a month in advance.



</details><details><summary>Size of group?</summary>Small (2-3 musicians).



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>Jazz standard pieces suitable for the reception of guests and during the aperitif. Italian and foreign pop / rock songs to have fun and entertain after the reception.



</details><details><summary>Can I ask for songs not included in the repertoire?</summary>On request, the spouses can insert pieces of their life in our lineup to accompany the most significant moments such as the bride and groom's entrance, the cutting of the cake and the first dance.



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>Decades of experience in weddings and private events. Our trio is made up of professional musicians.



</details><details><summary>Do you have your own equipment?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Do you need particular material or specific conditions in order to offer the service?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>How far do you travel?</summary>We travel throughout the Tuscany region.



</details><details><summary>Is there a fee for travel?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Do you perform at more than one wedding per day?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>The duration of the performance is to be agreed according to your needs.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to prepare for the performance?</summary>The minimum time for setting up the instrumentation is 1 hour.



</details><details><summary>Do you do outdoor performances?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Il pacchetto include l'allestimento della propria strumentazione (pianoforte digitale, batteria e contrabbasso), amplificazione se necessaria. Musica live durante e dopo il ricevimento.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Almeno due settimane, preferibilmente un mese di anticipo.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Brani standard jazz adatti al ricevimento degli ospiti e durante l'aperitivo. Brani pop/rock italiani e stranieri per divertirsi e intrattenere dopo il ricevimento.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>A richiesta gli sposi possono inserire dei brani della loro vita nella nostra scaletta per accompagnare i momenti più significativi quali l'ingresso degli sposi, il taglio della torta e il primo ballo.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Esperienza decennale in matrimoni ed eventi privati. Trio è composto da musicisti professionisti.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, regione Toscana.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>Da solo.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>La durata dell'esibizione è da concordate in base alle esigenze degli sposi.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Il tempo minimo per l'allestimento della strumentazione è di 1 ora.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

wedding-dj-amalfi-coast-crescendo.intro_html:
DJ Crescendo — An Exquisite Wedding DJ Curated for the Amalfi Coast, Italy

With years of refined experience orchestrating weddings and exclusive events along the Amalfi Coast, DJ Crescendo brings an impeccable standard of musical artistry to each bespoke celebration. His presence is sought after at the most distinguished venues in Naples, Salerno, Ravello, and Positano, as well as throughout Italy’s most coveted destinations.

He is regularly engaged to perform at prestigious estates such as Villa Eva in Ravello, Relais Villa San Martino in Taranto, and Belmond Villa San Michele in Fiesole — each an emblem of elegance and exclusivity.
wedding-dj-amalfi-coast-crescendo.description_html:
The innate power of music lies not in harmony alone, but in sound itself — an electric force that stirs the soul at the very first note, even in its most serene form. This is the singular gift that music holds above all other arts.

Passionate since childhood, DJ Crescendo immersed himself in the world of dance music at sixteen, mastering digital platforms such as Virtual DJ and Traktor. In October 2010, he began an intensive DJ course at Studio 76 under the esteemed Marco Montefusco of Salerno, culminating in a prestigious internship at Dolcevita in June 2011. The following years saw collaborations with MPA Radio as technical director for the Quinto Piano program alongside Roberto Giaquinto.

The summer of 2013 marked a transformative chapter: DJ Crescendo joined the team at Altromondo Studios Disco in Rimini and Riccione, where his dream of performing beyond his native city materialised on July 1 at the club’s illustrious opening party. He later graced the Vanilla Club in Cava dei Tirreni alongside Alex Colle of RADIO IBIZA.

Summer 2014 gave rise to the “Street Festival” project — a curated experience designed to captivate a diverse audience with singing contests, dance performances, DJ battles, fashion shows, and a grand piazza disco.

Below are just a selection of the exquisite locations where DJ Crescendo has been booked for weddings and events:

  • Belmond Villa San Michele
  • Masseria Sanrà, Noicattaro, Bari
  • Villa Lena, Toiano, Palaia, Pisa

In Italiano

L'effetto naturale e generico della musica in noi, non deriva dall'armonia ma dal suono, il quale ci elettrizza e scuote al primo tocco quando anche sia monotono. Questo è quello che la musica ha di speciale sopra le altre arti.

Appassionato di musica fin da bambino, decide di avvicinarsi al mondo della dance all'età di 16 anni iniziando a prendere confidenza con i vari programmi per pc (Virtual DJ, Traktor...). A partire dall'ottobre 2010 frequenta il corso da DJ tenuto presso lo Studio 76 da un famosissimo artista salernitano: Marco Montefusco. Il corso termina con uno stage il 1 giugno 2011 al Dolcevita. Negli anni 2012–2013 ha collaborato con radio MPA come tecnico del programma Quinto Piano con Roberto Giaquinto.

L'Estate 2013 è caratterizzata dall'enorme esperienza fatta a Rimini e Riccione. DJ Crescendo, infatti, entra a far parte dello staff della Discoteca Altromondo Studios. Qui si concretizza il sogno di suonare fuori dalla propria città; questo sogno si realizza il 1 luglio quando ha la fortuna di suonare alla festa d'apertura del club. L'inverno successivo è caratterizzato dalla collaborazione con il gruppo Italians nell'organizzazione dei Giovedì Universitari presso la famosa discoteca salernitana Vittoria. In autunno, invece, DJ Crescendo si esibisce al Vanilla Club di Cava dei Tirreni insieme ad Alex Colle (esponente di RADIO IBIZA).

L'estate 2014 è caratterizzata dalla nascita del progetto Street Festival con lo scopo di richiamare un pubblico più ampio (dai piccoli ai grandi). Quest'ultimo, infatti, offre contest di canto, ballo, sfide tra DJ, sfilate di moda e disco in piazza.

DJ Crescendo ha avuto l'opportunità di suonare in vari locali e bar della zona tra cui:

  • Dolcevita Italian Discoteque (Pontecagnano-Faiano)

</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Repertorio molto vasto in base alle esigenze degli ospiti. Infatti mi avvalgo, su richiesta, della collaborazione di altri professionisti per rendere il lavoro il più perfetto possibile.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Nessun problema, cerchiamo di accontentare tutti (è consigliabile esprimere le proprie richieste nel momento del primo contatto).



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Anni nell'ambito di feste di compleanno, matrimoni e serate danzanti.

</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

wedding-dj-lucca-italy-edo.intro_html:
DJ Edo – An Exquisite Wedding & Party DJ, Curated from Lucca, Italy

Guests consistently commend his impeccable ability to fill the dance floor, his bespoke musical selections, and his refined energy. Every request is handled with effortless grace, supported by professional lighting and an intuitive rapport that ensures every guest is swept into the rhythm of the evening.

Originally from Guatemala and now based in Lucca, DJ Edo brings a rare global sensibility to his craft. He began his journey with a degree in pharmacy, yet his intrinsic passion for music never diminished. In October 2011, he embraced his true calling and began performing professionally, quickly establishing a distinguished reputation across Tuscany’s most exclusive venues.

His artistry is defined by a curated fusion of electronic dance music, pop, and house—a refined blend that he tailors with remarkable intuition. Whether at a private estate or an intimate celebration, he reads the room with unparalleled precision, delivering sets that feel both spontaneous and meticulously orchestrated.

DJ Edo is regularly booked for weddings and events at L’Arancera di Villa Grabau in Lucca, La Sorgente di Francesca in Florence, and Agriturismo Terre di Nano in Siena, among other exceptional locations. Over the years, he has refined his artistry across dance clubs and private gatherings, earning sustained acclaim for his dynamic, engaging performances.

wedding-dj-florence-tuscany-italy-luke.intro_html:
DJ Luke — An Exquisite Musical Curator for Your Wedding Day, Based in Florence

What discerning clients cherish most: an impeccably professional and utterly reliable presence, a bespoke musical journey tailored to every moment of the celebration, masterful genre-blending and an innate ability to read the room, a dance floor that remains animated from the first note to the last — unequivocally recommended.

DJ Luke is an award-winning DJ based in Florence, Tuscany.

His curated set list traverses a refined spectrum of genres, from dance and house to Latin and chillout.

DJ Luke is in demand to perform at weddings and events in Tuscany and throughout Italy, bringing an impeccable sonic sensibility to each occasion.

He is regularly booked for weddings and events at Villa Cora and Quercia Al Poggio in Florence, as well as Conti di San Bonifacio Wine Resort in Grosseto, Tuscany.

Here are just some of the exclusive locations where he has been engaged for weddings and events:

  • Conti di San Bonifacio Wine Resort
  • Villa Bastia, Umbria, Italy
  • Quercia Al Poggio, Barberino Val d'Elsa
  • Villa Cora, Viale Machiavelli
  • Abbazia di San Galgano, Chiusdino
  • Villa Geggiano, Castelnuovo Berardenga
  • Casa Cornacchi Country House
  • Relais La Corte Dei Papi, Arezzo
  • Castello di Bibbione, Florence
  • Abbazia di San Pietro in Valle
  • Castiglione d'Orcia, Siena, Italy
  • Villa Corsini a Mezzomonte
  • Agriturismo Tenuta Conti Faina
  • Poggio Cennina Resort, Bucine
  • Castel Di Pietra, Grosseto, Italy
  • Agriturismo Villa & Fattoria Di Radi
  • Villa Castelletti
  • Villa Il Cerretino, Prato, Italy
  • Locanda della Fratta, Siena, Italy
  • Agriturismo Aia Vecchia Montalceto
  • Villa la Massa, Florence, Italy
  • Castello Banfi Wine Resort
  • Hotel Forte Charme, Nago-Torbole

So if you are seeking the finest wedding DJ that Florence and Tuscany have to offer, an experience defined by elegance and precision, DJ Luke awaits the pleasure of curating your celebration.

In Italiano

Luke nasce a Firenze nel febbraio del 1988, e fin da piccolo coltiva una raffinata passione per la musica. All'età di sedici anni, inizia quasi per gioco a organizzare le prime feste con gli amici, proponendosi come deejay e intrattenitore con karaoke.

Con il tempo, questa grande passione si sviluppa sempre più: gira per discoteche e locali esclusivi, iniziando a identificare il suo genere musicale d'elezione. Nell'inverno del 2005, lavorando come PR per varie discoteche fiorentine — Meccanò, Costes, Tenax — trova l'occasione per cimentarsi con una console "vera" nell'impianto del Meccanò di Firenze.

Nell'estate del 2006 collabora con l'animazione del villaggio Baia Verde di Punta Ala, suonando nel discopub del villaggio con un repertorio commerciale e revival. Questa collaborazione viene rinnovata ogni estate, grazie allo staff d'animazione e ai gestori del locale.

Nella stagione 2008-09, conclusa la scuola superiore, decide di partire come dj/animatore con l'agenzia pratese 69 Groove per tutta la stagione invernale. Il suo incarico: organizzare e coordinare le attività musicali dello staff di animazione dell'Hotel Artuik a Marilleva, in Trentino Alto Adige.

Questa esperienza lo arricchisce profondamente dal punto di vista musicale e umano, portandolo a proporsi ufficialmente come dj e intrattenitore per cerimonie e matrimoni.

Negli anni successivi continua a lavorare con le discoteche della zona, e viene spesso chiamato per feste di compleanno, laurea e matrimoni, nonché per inaugurazioni di palestre e negozi di abbigliamento.

Nell'ultima stagione invernale ha lavorato con la Discoteca NO LIMIT di Calenzano, il Lounge Bar CHAPEAU di Campi Bisenzio e l'American Bar MIX di Sesto Fiorentino; mentre nella stagione estiva appena trascorsa è stato impegnato nella località balneare di Punta Ala (GR), alla discoteca BLACKSUN il sabato e nel Beach Club LA VELA la domenica.

Proprio al BLACKSUN ha esordito nella serata inaugurale di venerdì 9 luglio 2012, che ha visto come ospiti speciali "I Soliti Idioti" — Francesco Mandelli e Fabrizio Biggio. Collaborazioni continue anche con un altro Beach Resort della zona, il locale CALA FELICE (Marina di Scarlino), dove nel mese di luglio ha tenuto una festa esclusiva per la nazionale olimpica di ginnastica ritmica.

Nel mese di settembre ha organizzato le serate a tema del venerdì per il BarSport di Calenzano: Serata Gresae (14-09-12) e Serata Oktoberfest (28-09-12), con musica revival anni 50-60 e musica tipica bavarese.

Nella stagione corrente inizia a lavorare anche con L'Oibò e La Rotonda a Firenze.

Predilige musica commerciale e house, ma anche revival anni 70-80, italiana, balli di gruppo e lounge/chill-out per un'atmosfera più raccolta.

Dal 2012 è iscritto all'Accademia Italiana Deejay di Firenze, dove ha frequentato con successo corsi di specializzazione per producer e deejay.

wedding-dj-florence-italy.intro_html:
About DJ Lozzy – a curator of exquisite sonic experiences for the most refined weddings and events in Florence, Italy

What discerning clients cherish most about DJ Lozzy: An impeccably curated dance floor that captivates guests across every generation, intuitive crowd reading and seamlessly sculpted musical transitions, unwavering professionalism and bespoke reliability, an effortless and gracious flexibility.

Maestro Lozzy presides over the Tuscan soundscape, based in the historic heart of Florence, commanding over two decades of unparalleled experience. His bespoke services are available for hire within the Florentine capital and throughout an exclusive 100-kilometre radius.

italian-dixie-band.intro_html:
The Italian Dixie Band — an impeccably curated ensemble of refined jazz & swing virtuosity, based in Rome, Italy.

From the effervescent classics of 1920s jazz to the polished swing of the 1950s, The Italian Dixie Band delivers an exquisite Dixieland experience, uplifting and expressive, for the most discerning occasions. A regular presence at celebrated weddings and exclusive parties throughout Italy and beyond, this ensemble embodies the pinnacle of bespoke musical artistry.

For those seeking to engage the finest traditional jazz and Dixieland swing ensemble Italy has to offer for a wedding or private event, an invitation to experience their unparalleled artistry awaits.

They have been privileged to perform for England Rugby Travel at their Platinum events in Rome, and are frequently engaged for weddings and soirées at the illustrious Casina Valadier on Piazza Bucarest.
italian-dixie-band.description_html:
Il Jazz ha rivoluzionato la storia della musica nel mondo e il Dixieland ne è stata la sua espressione più divertente.

The Italian Dixie Band propone i classici del jazz degli anni ’20 fino ad arrivare allo swing degli anni ’50.

Capitanati da Raffaele, i sei della Italian Dixie Band hanno conquistato la simpatia del pubblico, suonando i grandi classici del jazz in puro stile New Orleans.

La band è composta da Raffaele (clarinetto, sax e voce), Gianfranco (tromba), Ferruccio (trombone), Fausto (sousaphone), Alberto (banjo), Matteo (washboard e batteria).

wedding-band-rome-italy-silver-screen.intro_html:
Silver Screen – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble Based in Rome, Italy

Nestled within Rome’s timeless grandeur—where ancient history meets contemporary allure—Silver Screen emerges as a refined four-piece party band, dedicated to curating unforgettable wedding celebrations and exclusive events. Their bespoke artistry offers a full day of musical enchantment, elevating every moment from the sacred to the celebratory with impeccable grace.

The ensemble’s hallmark is its captivating duo, renowned for their mastery of film music. This duo serenades guests during the ceremony, aperitif, and dinner, transforming these intimate interludes into cinematic experiences of exquisite sophistication. Silver Screen is regularly booked for weddings and events at the distinguished Via dell'Oca 35 Hotel in Rome, Italy.

Their soulful renditions and emotive performances infuse your special day with cinematic elegance, conjuring an atmosphere both nostalgic and enchanting. Yet Silver Screen is equally adept at igniting the celebration. As the sun sets and the festivities intensify, the full band commands the stage, delivering a curated repertoire that traverses genres—from pop and soul to rock, jazz, blues, and funk. Every musical preference is impeccably addressed, ensuring guests dance until the early hours.

All-Day Service

Silver Screen presents a comprehensive entertainment package, meticulously crafted to accompany every facet of your wedding or event—from tender moments to exuberant revelry.

Film Music Specialists

The duo’s expertise in film music lends a refined cinematic sophistication to your most treasured memories, rendering them truly unforgettable.

Genre Diversity

With their vast and versatile repertoire, Silver Screen guarantees that every guest finds a reason to dance and immerse themselves in the celebration.

Silver Screen is more than a band; they are the maestros behind the bespoke soundtrack of your cherished moments, transforming your event into a magical, music-filled journey of unparalleled luxury.

dance-dynasty-wedding-lisbon-rotterdam.intro_html:
Dance Dynasty – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble Based in Rotterdam & Lisbon

For the discerning host who demands nothing less than perfection, Dance Dynasty presents an impeccably curated musical experience. Specialising in Pop, Soul, Funk, Latin, and Jazz, this refined ensemble transforms any event into an unforgettable evening of elegance and rhythm.

Their vast repertoire is a bespoke collection spanning jazz and Latin melodies to disco, hip‑hop, dance, and the most coveted top‑40 hits. Performances are delivered with effortless multilingual charm in Italian, Dutch, French, Spanish, and English—a testament to a genuine passion for diverse musical heritage.

With bases in Rotterdam, Nice, Imperia, Ventimiglia, and Lisbon, Dance Dynasty is ideally positioned to grace celebrations across Europe and beyond. The ensemble is a regular, coveted presence at the prestigious Circuit of Spa‑Francorchamps in Belgium, an endorsement of their supreme artistry and professionalism.

Every performance is a masterclass in improvisation, engagement, and flawless execution—ensuring a spectacular evening that lingers in memory long after the final note. The lead singers command the stage with conviction and zeal, weaving an intimate connection with the audience that elevates the entire affair.

To accommodate the full arc of a wedding day, the band also offers smaller configurations and solo singing pianists, each arrangement as exquisite as the last.

The ensemble may be reserved in the following bespoke formations:

  • Solo: Singing Pianist.
  • Duo: Singing Pianist & Drummer.
  • 3‑Piece: Singing Pianist, Drummer & Guitar or Bass.
  • 4‑Piece: Singing Pianist, Drummer, Guitar, Bass.
  • 5‑Piece: Singing Pianist, Drummer, Guitar, Bass & Female Singer or Saxophone.

wedding-violinist-italy-laura.intro_html:
Laura Violin – An Exquisite Wedding Violinist Based in Rome, Italy

Laura is in impeccable demand to perform at weddings, soirées, corporate galas, and marriage proposals throughout Italy. Her curated repertoire traverses classical masterpieces, pop covers, jazz standards, and film scores, allowing her to craft a bespoke set list that perfectly complements your celebration.

Explore her refined 2025 Set List to envision the musical ambiance she can create.

For those seeking the most distinguished wedding violinist Italy has to offer, an experience with Laura Violin promises unparalleled elegance. She is regularly engaged to perform at esteemed venues such as Tenuta di Casa Bruciata in Perugia and Villa Spadaforte in Arezzo.
wedding-violinist-italy-laura.description_html:
A graduate of the Conservatoire in 2012, Laura has devoted her professional journey to exploring diverse musical universes—from classical orchestras and songwriters to rock bands and beyond. In addition to her teaching practice, she brings over a decade of refined experience to every performance. She typically performs alone, wielding either a classic violin or an electric violin, to create an intimate and sophisticated atmosphere at weddings and private events.

Among her most distinguished experiences:

  • Appearance on the television program “Cavalli di Battaglia” featuring the renowned actor and showman Gigi Proietti
  • Performances at Rome’s Olympic Stadium for Champions League sports events with the Rome Philharmonic
  • A tour in China with the Orchestra Filarmonica Campana

Laura frequently collaborates with a professional photographer and friend named Emilia, particularly for weddings and marriage proposals, ensuring every exquisite moment is captured with artistry.

wedding-band-perugia-italy-big-apples.intro_html:
The Big Apples – an exquisite wedding band based in Umbria, Italy

For nearly a quarter of a century, The Big Apples have distinguished themselves as a refined cover band, performing at more than two thousand prestigious events across Italy—from exclusive weddings and bespoke corporate affairs to intimate private soirées. Their curated repertoire seamlessly weaves contemporary hits, timeless ballads, and cherished evergreens from the 1970s to today, delivered with an electrifying presence, impeccable energy, and an unwavering guarantee of dance-filled evenings. The ensemble is regularly invited to grace illustrious venues such as Castello di Ugento Hotel in Lecce, Villa I Tramonti in Rimini, and Castagneto Carducci in Livorno, testament to their standing among Italy’s most sought-after musical acts.

Beyond their core performance, the band offers an integrated DJ service, with all sound and lighting equipment included in every bespoke quote unless otherwise specified. For those seeking an even more opulent experience, The Big Apples can expand to include a saxophone and percussionist for an additional fee, and will recommend other virtuoso musicians—such as a solo saxophonist or an acoustic duo—to craft the perfect ensemble for your celebration. Share your vision with us, and we shall devote ourselves to creating an unforgettable, impeccably tailored musical journey.

italy-hot-jazz-band.intro_html:
About The Italy Hot Jazz Band – an exquisite ensemble of professional musicians based in Tuscany, Italy

The Italy Hot Jazz Band is a celebrated Dixieland jazz ensemble, born in the heart of Florence. They are engaged for an array of refined occasions—weddings, luxury celebrations, festivals, Tuscan sagras, and exclusive private parties throughout Italy. Their impeccable artistry has been regularly showcased at distinguished venues such as Casa Cornacchi Country House in Arezzo and Dimora Buonriposo Hotel in Siena.
italy-hot-jazz-band.description_html:
Many of its members, having performed with other esteemed ensembles, now unite as a curated group of nine musicians. The band offers remarkable versatility, adapting its signature style from a formation of just four players. Their purpose is to evoke the authentic sounds and ambiance of traditional jazz from the 1920s and 1930s—music played by the fathers of the genre. The greatest reward, when performing in grand piazzas, is witnessing even the most reserved guests begin to move, first their feet and then their entire body, or encountering a guest who thanks them for transporting them back to a magical moment in time.

Below are just a few of the exquisite locations where The Italy Hot Jazz Band has been booked for weddings and events:

  • Casa Cornacchi Country House
  • Dimora Buonriposo, Sarteano
  • Villa Le Fontanelle, Florence
  • Conti Thun Wine Resort
  • Il Verreno Resort, Arezzo
  • Falconiere Relais & Spa, Arezzo
  • Borgo Sant'Ambrogio
  • Fiera Milano
  • Villa Lungomonte, Pisa
  • Poppi, Italy
  • Terranuova Bracciolini, Arezzo

For those who seek the finest jazz band Italy has to offer, The Italy Hot Jazz Band represents the pinnacle of refined musical elegance.

In Italiano

Se desiderate rendere il vostro matrimonio unico con un intrattenimento musicale ricercato ed elegante, ma dal gusto inedito e originale, la Italy Hot Jazz Band potrebbe fare al caso vostro.

Un'affermata dixie band composta da talentuosi musicisti in grado di animare con raffinatezza il "grande giorno".

The Italy Hot Jazz Band propone musica jazz new orleans, più comunemente denominata dixieland.

Prendendo ispirazione dai sound anni '20, '30 e '40, si tratta di un jazz ballabile che si avvicina molto alle sonorità swing. Essendo molto versatili, su richiesta del cliente possiamo trasformaci in una band blues-rockabilly-anni'60

La band sarà composta da quattro a nove musicisti, a seconda delle vostre richieste.

Banjo, tromba, contrabbasso, sax e l'emozionante voce di Sybil, la cantante statunitense, vi accompagneranno durante tutta la giornata delle vostre nozze.

italy-hot-jazz-band.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Il pacchetto matrimonio include un minimo di quattro musicisti con spostamento nel raggio di 50 km senza aggiunta spese extra. Abbigliamento consono ed eventuale impianto audio.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Per quanto riguarda i matrimonio o i grandi eventi dovremmo avere un buon preavviso di almeno 3/4 mesi.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Media (4-6 musicisti), grande (più di 6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>I nostri brani più conosciuti sono: Doctor Jazz, Down by the Riverside, When the saints go marchin in, Sweet Sue, When you are smiling, By Bye Blues, Basin Street, Bourbon Street Parade, ecc...



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Sì, con un anticipo di un mese si possono preparare nuovi brani suonati nel nostro stile.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Esperienza nel settore.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, ovunque in tutto il mondo! Suoniamo spesso da sud a nord Italia e capita di essere reclutati anche in USA.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, dipende dalla trasferta.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Dalle 2 alle 3 ore.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>1/2 ora.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Che altri tipi di servizio offri?</summary>Disponiamo di vari impianti personali per amplificare i nostri eventi. Inoltre possibilità extra di musica DJ con Pc e compilations.</details>

dream-grooves-band-florence-italy.intro_html:
Dream Grooves – An Exquisite Ensemble for Refined Celebrations, Based in Florence, Italy

Hailing from the cultural heart of Florence, Italy, Dream Grooves is a curated quartet renowned for its impeccable artistry and versatile musicianship. Their refined repertoire spans jazz, funk, pop, blues, and soul, delivering bespoke musical experiences for weddings, corporate galas, and private soirées across Italy and beyond.

The core formation comprises exquisite vocals, piano, drums, and bass, with the option to incorporate additional instrumentalists for an even more comprehensive and opulent auditory experience. This fluidity ensures that every performance is meticulously tailored to the client’s vision, cultivating an atmosphere that is both unique and unforgettable.

Dream Grooves is frequently entrusted with curating the musical ambiance at the prestigious Villa Aura del Lago on Lake Como and Villa Castelletto in Siena, among other distinguished venues.
dream-grooves-band-florence-italy.description_html:
Their continually evolving repertoire, rich with a diverse array of musical styles, guarantees a performance that is perpetually fresh and exquisitely engaging for every discerning listener. An unwavering professionalism permeates every facet of their craft, from the initial consultation through to the final, flawless performance—establishing them as an impeccable choice for event planners seeking unparalleled quality.

For those who desire an event that transcends mere entertainment, Dream Grooves offers a symphonic solution that harmonises bespoke customization with extraordinary live music, enhanced by the possibility of an expanded ensemble.

wedding-band-rome-italy-suitably-hyped.intro_html:
Suitably Hyped – A Refined Wedding & Event Ensemble Based in Rome, Italy

Step into a world of unparalleled elegance with Suitably Hyped, an exquisite wedding and event band based in Rome. Their impeccable dynamism and refined engagement with discerning guests elevate every occasion. The repertoire, a bespoke curation of international pop hits and R&B classics, ensures a seamless and sophisticated ambiance. Suitably Hyped is regularly commissioned for exclusive weddings and private events at prestigious venues such as Hotel Villa Simplicitas on Lake Como and Villa Valentini Bonaparte in Perugia.
wedding-band-rome-italy-suitably-hyped.description_html:
Formed by a meticulously selected ensemble of virtuoso musicians, Suitably Hyped is dedicated to delivering performances of unparalleled artistry and emotional resonance. With years of experience mastering the art of refined entertainment, they possess an innate ability to orchestrate an evening that transitions effortlessly from sophisticated cocktails to an exuberant, elegant celebration.

What distinguishes Suitably Hyped from other ensembles is their bespoke, contemporary sensibility. Their fresh, modern sound and impeccable style are meticulously tailored for couples seeking a distinctive and exhilarating auditory experience for their nuptials. Whether the vision is a classical Italian ceremony steeped in tradition or an avant-garde contemporary fête, Suitably Hyped provides a flawless soundtrack.

Prepare to surrender to an evening of sublime music and dance. With their exquisite performances and masterful connection with the audience, Suitably Hyped ensures that your celebration will be recounted with admiration for years to come. Enquire to curate your unforgettable luxury experience.

bologna-jazz-band-italy.intro_html:
The Bologna Jazz Band – an ensemble of exquisite refinement based in Bologna, Italy

Led by a captivating and sophisticated female pianist and vocalist, The Bologna Jazz Band presents a curated repertoire of jazz and swing. Their impeccable artistry is perfectly suited for couples who desire a musical accompaniment that is both effortlessly elegant and enchantingly present—elevating every cherished moment of their celebratory day.

 

Una pianista e cantante dalla raffinatezza e vitalità impeccabili: questa è l’anima del Bologna Jazz Band. Il suo servizio musicale è curato nei minimi dettagli, offrendo un’esperienza sonora esclusiva. La sua passione abbraccia il jazz e oltre, sposandosi perfettamente con le coppie che desiderano un accompagnamento musicale efficiente, piacevole e mai invadente, capace di impreziosire ogni istante del loro giorno speciale.

Attenta a ogni desiderio degli sposi, la band è disponibile a preparare brani su richiesta per momenti specifici della cerimonia e del ricevimento, e a collaborare con eventuali amici, offrendo supporto audio per scherzi e video. Si occupa dell’intero apparato musicale e tecnico: dalla cerimonia al ricevimento, dal taglio della torta fino a un dj-set finale su richiesta. Ogni esibizione è completamente dal vivo, senza basi musicali.

Il repertorio, ricco e vasto, è frutto di oltre un decennio di attività dal vivo. Oltre a esibizioni in teatri e rassegne jazz, la band vanta collaborazioni con enti prestigiosi come MSC Crociere e Rossetti Entertainment. Dai grandi classici della musica italiana e internazionale a blues, pop, rock e colonne sonore, ogni brano viene reinterpretato in modo personale, senza mai tradirne l’essenza. La scaletta è personalizzata secondo i gusti degli sposi e degli invitati.

La formazione può essere solista oppure affiancata dal fratello, chitarrista e trombettista diplomato con lode, con cui collabora da anni. Per i set dal vivo, la formazione si può arricchire con contrabbasso, batteria e, per le cerimonie, un violino, tutti musicisti professionisti con progetti discografici all’attivo.

Among the exclusive venues where this ensemble has performed:

  • Rocca Isolani, Bologna, Italy
  • Hotel Papadopoli, Venice, Italy
  • Agriturismo Villa Le Bolli, Siena
  • Parco Principi Grand Hotel, Rome
  • Villa Alberico, Rome
  • Villa Sarah, San Gimignano
  • Piacenza, Italy
  • Montestigliano, Siena, Italy
  • Lago d'Iseo, Italy.

<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Il duo ha la possibilità' di suonare sia per la cerimonia (civile o religiosa) che per il ricevimento. Ha la possibilità di montare un doppio impianto audio con relative luci.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Entro venti giorni dalla data.



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>La formazione propone un vasto repertorio che spazia tra il jazz, blues pop della canzone italiana ed internazionale.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Ogni richiesta è ben accetta!



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Da più' di dieci anni suonano per eventi privati, fiere, rassegne e concerti.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, le spese di viaggio.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>La durata si adatta a seconda delle richieste e dei tempi previsti dagli sposi e dal catering.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>30 minuti.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

acoustic-duo-rome-italy-andiamo.intro_html:
Andiamo Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic Duo, Based in Rome, Italy

✨ What discerning clients cherish most about Andiamo Duo: an impeccable party atmosphere, a curated repertoire of exceptional breadth, refined crowd intuition, warm and personable artistry, virtuosic live performances, seamless flexibility, and unwavering reliability.

Andiamo Duo is a charismatic and youthful pop-cover ensemble, offering bespoke acoustic performances for weddings and celebrations throughout Italy.

With a vast and meticulously curated repertoire spanning soul, funk, contemporary chart hits, and beloved Italian classics, they possess an innate ability to draw every guest onto the dance floor with effortless grace.

Their artistry has been regularly engaged at distinguished venues including Agriturismo Borgo Divino in Montespertoli and Borgo Corsignano in Arezzo, Italy.

The Ceremony

A refined, unobtrusive setup comprising a compact station with mixer and one or two loudspeakers positioned adjacent to the ritual space. A bespoke selection of music accompanies the bride’s entrance and the couple’s departure, each piece chosen in intimate consultation with the couple. A power source within ten metres of the station is required; all other elements are provided.

The Reception

The standard performance involves the assembly of a single, elegant station in the hors-d’oeuvre and cake area. This space accommodates two loudspeakers, a mixer, two guitars, a ukulele, and percussion instruments. A dedicated loudspeaker in the dining hall diffuses a carefully curated playlist throughout the meal. Live music commences with the aperitif buffet, offering a selection of gentle, ambient pieces for approximately one hour and thirty minutes, presented in refined sets of about forty-five minutes. As guests proceed to the dining hall, the playlist continues. At the cutting of the wedding cake and during dessert, the live performance resumes with more spirited and celebratory selections for an additional hour and thirty minutes, again in forty-five minute sets. A power source within ten metres of the station is required; all else is included.

Andiamo Duo employs only the most exquisite and sensitive instruments; we kindly recommend verifying with the venue that appropriate protection—such as an umbrella, gazebo, or similar cover—is available to shield the equipment from direct sunlight.

The Artistry of Andiamo Duo

The Andiamo Duo project was conceived in the late summer of 2011, born from the inspired vision of Luca (voice, ukulele, percussion, and guitar) together with Davide (voice and guitars). From the very first notes they shared, an extraordinary artistic potential was unmistakable: a profound musical understanding of genre and language, a vocal blend of rare and singular beauty, and two distinct yet wholly compatible talents, perfectly destined to converge.

This enchanting synergy soon captivated audiences both intimate and grand. Their voices evoke the finest traditions of Simon & Garfunkel, yet venture into distinctive realms of pop, soul, and folk, enriched by sophisticated acoustic textures that draw upon world music—ukulele, udu drum, and more—with subtle electronic nuances when the moment calls.

The duo rapidly expanded their presence across live clubs and theatres, performing an average of two hundred evenings per year. They have graced prestigious festivals such as Ferentino Acustica and the Gavazzana Blues Festival, and collaborated with celebrated figures of the Italian scene, including Amedeo Minghi on the reimagining of “Per Noi.”

Their command of English pronunciation,近乎 native in its fluency, combined with a deep passion for those sounds, has allowed them to export their art internationally—most notably in Germany and England, where they achieved sold-out houses throughout their tours. In March 2018, they were guests of the Italian embassy in Peru for a concert celebrating the roots of Italian music. In the summer of 2018, they participated in the twelfth edition of the talent show XFactor, advancing to the Bootcamp stage.

Among the locations where Andiamo Duo has been engaged for weddings and events:

  • Agriturismo Borgo Divino
  • Villa Valentini Bonaparte
  • Borgo Corsignano, Poppi
  • Villa del Mandorlo, Puglia
  • Casale Doria Pamphilj
  • Oltre Il Giardino, Rome
  • Casale del Gallo, Rome
  • Grand Hotel Tremezzo
  • Masseria Salamina, Fasano
  • Rome Marriott Hotel Flora
  • Villa Benveduti, Gubbio
  • Zeneggen, Switzerland
  • Castello di Rosciano, Perugia
  • Borgo di Tragliata, Rome
  • Borgo Santo Pietro, Siena
  • Villa Barozzi, Lago Maggiore
  • Monteverdi Tuscany
  • Casa Cornacchi Country House
  • Tenuta di Casa Bruciata
  • Borgo Castelvecchi, Siena
  • Florence, Italy
  • Asti, Italy
  • Dicomano, Florence, Italy
  • Collazzone, Perugia, Italy
  • Lugnano In Teverina, Italia

In Italiano

Gli Andiamo Duo nascono nella tarda estate del 2011 da un’idea di Luca (Voce, Ukulele, Percussioni e Chitarra) che, incontrandosi con Davide (Voce e Chitarre), danno vita a questo progetto. Fin dalle prime note condivise dal duo si intuiva un enorme potenziale artistico, una grande intesa musicale di genere e linguaggio, un connubio vocale più unico che raro, due talenti molto diversi ma totalmente compatibili, quasi fatti apposta per essere fusi insieme. Molto velocemente questa magia ha iniziato ad incuriosire piccole e grandi platee, addetti ai lavori o semplicissimi appassionati del genere.

Le due voci ricordano i migliori Simon & Garfunkel con sostanziali differenze di genere (Pop/Soul con un qualcosa di Folk) e di sonorità acustiche ricercate che attingono al panorama World (Ukulele, Udu Drum, ecc.) ma che all’occorrenza vengono supportate da sfumature elettroniche. A pochi mesi dalla loro formazione, stipulano un contratto con un’etichetta discografica per la produzione del loro primo album, uscito nel 2013 dal titolo “Acoustic Remedy”, disponibile su tutte le piattaforme digitali (iTunes, Amazon, Spotify, ecc.), raccogliendo recensioni molto positive ed incoraggianti da radio e riviste specializzate. Tra i brani più apprezzati c’è la cover di “Teardrop” dei Massive Attack, disponibile anche su YouTube, per non parlare dei brani originali “Me And My Sound” e “World I’m Here”.

Successivamente, gli Andiamo Duo si dedicano alla produzione di video per YouTube, proponendo loro riarrangiamenti di grandi classici. Tra i più famosi si può trovare “Ebony Eyes” di Stevie Wonder, “Impressioni Di Settembre” della P.F.M. e “Maniac” di Michael Sembello (colonna sonora di Flash Dance). Nel frattempo allargano il loro circuito nei live clubs e teatri, con in media 200 serate l’anno, partecipando a noti Festival come il “Ferentino Acustica 2015” e il “Gavazzana Blues Festival 2016”, collaborando con grandi nomi della scena italiana come Amedeo Minghi nel riarrangiamento di “Per Noi”, con la quale si esibiscono al Teatro Brancaccio per l’evento “Natale è Qui 2016”.

Prendono parte ad una puntata di “Ah Ah Car” condotta da Sergio Friscia e Barty Colucci in onda su RAI 4 nel dicembre del 2016. Data la loro pronuncia inglese quasi da madre lingua e la loro passione per quelle sonorità, riescono anche ad esportare il progetto all’estero, principalmente in Germania ed Inghilterra, dove collezionano sold out durante tutta la durata dei tour. Attualmente sono impegnati nella produzione del loro secondo album sotto la guida artistica di Fabrizio Federighi della DeepSide Music.

waves-dj-sax-italy.intro_html:
Waves DJ & Sax – An exquisite duo of professional DJ and saxophonist, based in the heart of Lazio, Italy.

Over the past decade, we have curated an impeccable repertoire for hundreds of distinguished gatherings—from opulent weddings and exclusive soirées to refined corporate events—often enchanting an international clientele. Our journey as a DJ began in the late 1990s, amidst the luminous nightlife of clubs and discos, forging a foundation of masterful artistry and experience.

Our location in central Italy affords effortless travel across the country’s most coveted destinations, from the rolling hills of Tuscany to the Amalfi Coast of Campania, the timeless elegance of Lazio, and the medieval splendour of Umbria. We are regularly engaged to perform at Terrosi Vagnoli Luigi in Livorno and Hotel Villa Cipressi in Lecco, two of Italy’s most refined venues.

Throughout your event, we seamlessly tailor our musical narrative to each distinct chapter—from the delicate murmur of cocktails through the intimate glow of dinner to the exuberant crescendo of the dance floor. A signature of our set is this carefully orchestrated journey, evolving across genres as the evening unfolds. Every bespoke playlist is constantly refined to captivate the audience before us, ensuring that each guest finds a moment of resonance. The result is a curated selection that traverses soul, R&B, funky grooves, nu disco, rare gems, and dance—featuring the most iconic international hits from the 1970s through to today’s most celebrated sounds.

This makes our performance the ideal soundtrack for celebrations of every ilk, with weddings and ceremonies being among the most cherished occasions. You are invited to define the musical genres and specific songs, creating an audience-pleasing presentation of the highest calibre that artfully spans many styles. Our DJ set frequently includes live accompaniment from a saxophonist, percussionist, or violinist, elevating the experience into a more comprehensive and bespoke performance tailored precisely to your occasion and desires.

Every package includes a professional sound system and an exquisite lighting setup.

Line-up options:
- Saxophone
- Percussionist (Bongos)
- Violinist & other live elements

wedding-party-dj-milan-italy.intro_html:
About The Milan DJ – An Exquisite Wedding & Party DJ in Milan, Italy

Since 2008, The Milan DJ has been curating impeccable live sets at the most refined events, parties, and clubs. She has graced exclusive House, Hip-Hop, Deep, and Mash Up soirées, as well as bespoke Presentations, Private Parties, and Vogue Nights. As a distinguished special guest at the Grelka and Boogel Woogel music festivals—each drawing over 100,000 discerning guests—her career is elevated by a captivating presence and an intuitive understanding of every event’s rhythm. She is regularly engaged to perform at weddings and private functions at Fiera Milano.
wedding-party-dj-milan-italy.description_html: Originally from Russia and raised in Siberia, The Milan DJ began her journey as a resident DJ at one of Siberia’s most prestigious clubs. Her reputation flourished, leading to performances across the globe, and for five consecutive years she was honoured as “Best Female DJ of Siberia.” This triumph was followed by a refined tour across Russia and Siberia, where she filled dancefloors through the night and captivated audiences with her artistry. Relocating to Milan in 2014, she immediately made an indelible impression, performing at weddings, private events, and the city’s most exclusive venues—Just Cavalli, Vibe Room, LimeLight, House Cafe, Hollywood Ritmoteque, Old Fashion, Terrazza Duomo 21, and many others. Since then, she has been enchanting guests in luxury destinations worldwide, including Milan, Paris, Florence, Stresa, Venice, Palermo, Moscow, Samara, Lugano, and Geneva. For those seeking a truly all‑encompassing DJ to orchestrate an unforgettable event, The Milan DJ is the epitome of refined entertainment.

wedding-string-quartet-milan.intro_html:
The Milan String Group – An Ensemble of Refined Excellence

Conceived in 2014 by a collective of musician friends, The Milan String Group was born from a shared desire to curate exquisite soundscapes for private celebrations and weddings. Based in Milan, Italy, this ensemble offers an impeccably flexible formation—available as a quartet, quintet, duo, or as individual virtuosi—ensuring a bespoke configuration for every event.

The group’s repertoire is anchored in classical masterpieces, yet has recently been elevated with contemporary selections, including modern love songs by Ed Sheeran and other iconic artists. Their prestigious engagements include regular performances at Hotel Villa Emden in Switzerland and the Aethos Saragano Hotel in Umbria, Italy.

With years of refined industry experience, these accomplished musicians provide an impeccable soundtrack to your most cherished occasion. Their professionalism, class, and talent inspire complete ease, attending to every detail with utmost skill and an unwavering commitment to elegance. For those seeking the most distinguished string ensemble Milan has to offer, The Milan String Group awaits your enquiry.

tenore-lucca-italy.intro_html:
Il Tenore — an exquisitely refined tenor and opera singer, based in the timeless city of Lucca, Italy.

Born in Viareggio, Il Tenore’s passion for music and voice was discovered in his earliest years. Though life initially charted a different course, his devotion to opera remained impeccably unwavering. At the age of forty‑two, he was auditioned by Maestro Delfo Menicucci of the G. Verdi Conservatory in Milan — a bespoke turning point that marked the beginning of his luminous professional journey.

In 2014, he joined the chorus of the Puccini Festival as principal tenor, gracing multiple opera seasons and assuming solo roles of profound distinction. His artistry is regularly curated for weddings and exclusive events at San Pietro Sopra Le Acque Resort in Perugia and Soho House in Rome.

The ensuing years saw his career flourish with extraordinary debuts — as Manrico and the Duke of Mantua at the Teatro del Casino in Sanremo, followed by Cavaradossi in Tosca. His powerful, resonant voice and commanding stage presence garnered immediate acclaim both in Italy and abroad.

In 2017, his participation in the television programme Tu si que values earned national recognition, finishing second and receiving widespread admiration. Since then, he has become a cherished regular performer with the Puccini e la sua Lucca Festival, appearing in venues of impeccable prestige — London, the Musikverein in Vienna, and Buckingham Palace.

Recent years have included solo performances across Europe, from Monte Carlo to the Isle of Wight, as well as major concerts in Lucca, Florence, and La Spezia. His repertoire continues to expand, blending classical mastery with profound emotional depth.

Since 2024, Il Tenore has brought his exquisite artistry to the world of weddings, where each performance imparts elegance, passion, and timeless beauty to every celebration. He is now available to hire as a tenor and opera singer for weddings in Italy.

tenore-lucca-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Usually it is three sets, divided during dinner, which include 2/3 songs each set

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- No

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- No, I rely on the music service present at the party, I just need a microphone and the playback of the backing tracks that I have on a USB stick.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- No

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- Usually 90 minutes before the performance starts. 

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Around 10 minutes

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- With notice in advance, yes.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- I don't require a specific space, I love going around the tables and trying to involve people

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- As long as amplification can be provided, I can perform anywhere.</details>

smooth-sax-genova-italy.intro_html:
Smooth Sax – An Exquisite Saxophonist for Refined Celebrations, Based in Genova, Italy

Hailing from Genova, Italy, Smooth Sax stands as a premier saxophonist, renowned for curating an impeccable ambience at weddings and the most exclusive luxury events.

Possessing Master’s Degrees in Classic Saxophone and Jazz Music, Smooth Sax marries technical mastery with an impassioned artistic sensibility.

Having graced prestigious stages across Europe, the United Kingdom, and beyond, he has performed alongside luminaries such as Tony Coleman, Otis Grand, and Waldo Weathers — a testament to his refined artistry.

His services are frequently engaged for weddings and events at the illustrious Forte dei Marmi in Lucca and the incomparable Villa d'Este in Como.

As a session musician, his contributions to soundtracks for theatre, film, and television have been featured in productions by RAI, Prime Video, Sky, Warner, and Universal, underscoring his versatile sophistication.

Smooth Sax boasts an extraordinary portfolio of over 200 bespoke private events — from elegant yacht parties along the French Riviera and Amalfi Coast to distinguished corporate engagements for iconic brands including Dolce & Gabbana, JP Morgan, and Patek Philippe.

He has performed at exclusive celebrations within hallowed venues such as Villa d’Este on Lake Como, the Four Seasons in Florence, and the Hotel Splendido in Portofino — each setting a stage for his impeccable delivery.

Whether for an intimate gathering or a grand festivity, Smooth Sax is the discerning choice for those who seek a touch of exquisite sophistication on their most cherished day.
smooth-sax-genova-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Usually 2 x 60 minute or 3 x 40 minute sets.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- I can add a DJ or Percussionist or both to my performance.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes when i work alone (without DJ) i bring my Bose L1 Pro PA and it's included in the price.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes i can provide a playlist service after/between my sets.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 1.5hrs to 2hrs before the event.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 30 minutes if I'm performing as solo.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- 2m x 2m as a soloist, more space will be needed if a DJ & Percussionist are added.

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes no problem.</details>

wedding-band-genoa-gravity.intro_html:
Gravity – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Genoa, Italy

Gravity is a refined pop and soul ensemble, curating an impeccable repertoire of high-energy classics from the golden era of soul and Motown, alongside sophisticated covers of contemporary chart-toppers. Comprising seven exceptionally talented musicians and led by two powerfully charismatic vocalists, the band delivers a captivating live performance that leaves audiences utterly enthralled.

Their bespoke setlist weaves together vintage masterpieces by Jackson 5, Stevie Wonder, and Gloria Gaynor with modern anthems from Daft Punk, Justin Timberlake, Jessie J, and Maroon 5 — each rendition crafted to elevate the atmosphere of any luxury celebration. Gravity is frequently engaged for exclusive weddings and events at the distinguished La Foce in Chianciano Terme, Italy.
wedding-band-genoa-gravity.description_html: Every song within their curated collection is designed to ensure the dance floor remains vibrant throughout the evening, offering a diverse selection that appeals to every guest. Gravity transforms each gathering into an unforgettable soirée, where impeccable musicianship and soulful duets between the male and female vocalists create a truly concert-like experience — performed entirely live, without the use of backing tracks. With years of combined industry expertise, this ensemble represents the pinnacle of refined live entertainment for discerning couples who demand nothing but the finest.

sapphire-swing-jazz-florence-italy.intro_html:
The Sapphire Swing – An Exquisite Vintage Swing & Jazz Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

The Sapphire Swing is a meticulously refined musical offering, bestowing an air of timeless elegance upon weddings, ceremonies, corporate affairs, and intimate private celebrations. Their artistry seamlessly marries vintage allure with a clean, modern sophistication—creating an atmosphere that is at once classic and refreshingly contemporary.

Their impeccably curated repertoire glides effortlessly from Italian-inspired swing and romantic mid-century melodies to luminous American jazz standards, all subtly infused with the European sensibility of 1930s–40s Paris. The result is a warm, polished sound that sets the perfect tone for everything from an intimate cocktail hour to an upscale dinner reception. This ensemble is regularly engaged for weddings and events at the illustrious Castello di Montegufoni in Florence.

The band offers bespoke line-ups, ranging from a graceful voice-and-guitar duo to a full six-piece ensemble. Additional instruments—such as violin, clarinet, or double bass—may be added to bring further depth, elegance, or vintage colour to each moment. Whatever the formation, The Sapphire Swing adapts beautifully to the setting and mood of every occasion.

Every musician within the group is a seasoned professional: punctual, impeccably presented, and exquisitely sensitive to the flow of the day. Their performances are crafted to elevate the atmosphere without ever overpowering it, offering music that feels curated, thoughtful, and seamlessly integrated into the experience. For couples and event planners who seek music that is stylish, polished, and effortlessly classy, The Sapphire Swing brings a graceful touch that renders each moment truly special.
