<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Our sets usually last about 2 hours

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Absolutely, our lineup ranges from duets to sextets, and can be tailored to the client's needs and tastes. You can choose from the following options: vocals, two guitars, violin, clarinet, and double bass.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- If necessary, we can provide our own sound system. We also have battery-powered amplifiers, allowing us to easily move around with smaller set-up and perform in different locations during the event.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, we will be happy to take care of this!

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We usually arrive at the venue a couple of hours before the performance starts.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- The setup and duration of the soundcheck depend on the lineup, but we expect it to last a maximum of 40 minutes to take care of everything and be ready well in advance of the start of the event.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Absolutely yes, we are all professional musicians and we gladly accept specific requests for pieces to be performed, but we kindly ask the client to let us know in advance.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>-Absolutely yes! We adapt to any situation, as long as it includes a shaded area in case of a sunny or particularly hot day!</details>

rumba-gipsy-band-italy.intro_html:
Rumba Gipsy Band – an exquisite wedding and celebration ensemble, based in the cultural capitals of Florence and Sardinia, Italy.

Rumba Gipsy Band is a meticulously curated function band, specialising in the art of flamenco rumba — the captivating style immortalised by The Gipsy Kings. Having devoted years to mastering the distinctive guitar techniques and extraordinary musical vernacular that define this genre, the ensemble presents an impeccably refined repertoire of songs performed in this tradition, including many of the Gipsy Kings’ international hits.

Composed of virtuoso musicians with decades of collective professional experience, the band offers a bespoke configuration ranging from four to seven performers, adapting seamlessly to the scale and ambience of any distinguished occasion. Theirs is a genuine passion for music, delivering the most exquisite renditions of your cherished favourites.

Rumba Gipsy Band is regularly engaged at the most prestigious venues, including Agriturismo Podere Conti in Filattiera, Villa Sola Cabiati on Lake Como, and Castello di Gabbiano in Florence, Italy.
rumba-gipsy-band-italy.description_html:
The ensemble is the quintessential accompaniment for every moment of a refined event — from the serene elegance of a ceremony to the exuberant revelry of an evening celebration; their artistry is entirely adaptable. Their performance style and repertoire are fully customisable, tailored to the intimate nuances of your occasion, while the larger configuration is ideal for grand festivities. For public events, the band recommends their full seven-piece lineup, accompanied by a bespoke lighting show that elevates the atmosphere to sublime heights.

A typical performance spans an indulgent hour and thirty minutes, filled with some of the most timeless music ever composed. Should you seek to secure one of Italy’s most distinguished rumba flamenco ensembles for your wedding or gala, the Rumba Gipsy Band awaits your enquiry.

groove-shakers-verona-italy.intro_html:
About Groove Shakers – an exquisite wedding & party ensemble based in Verona, Italy

With over three hundred performances across Italy and abroad, we have had the distinct privilege of curating unforgettable experiences at private soirées, corporate galas, and the most refined wedding celebrations.

Driven by an unwavering passion for live music, our stage presence radiates the timeless energy of Hip-Hop and R&B from the 2000s and beyond. Our bespoke setlist features iconic tracks from artists such as Usher, Coolio, Eminem, Beyoncé, Alicia Keys, Rihanna, Black Eyed Peas, Crazy Town, Bruno Mars, Chris Brown, and many more—each selection impeccably chosen to elevate the atmosphere.

Every performance is meticulously crafted to forge a profound connection with audiences of all backgrounds, ensuring an ambiance of joyous sophistication. We are regularly retained for weddings and events at the illustrious Villa Orlando in Lucca.
groove-shakers-verona-italy.description_html:
Our journey has led us to perform in the most extraordinary settings—from the timeless grandeur of Piazza San Marco in Venice to exclusive events for luxury houses such as Bvlgari, BMW, Huawei, and the Breathless Resort in Cabo San Lucas. We have also graced the stage of the legendary Alcatraz in Milan on multiple occasions.

Each concert offers a two-hour odyssey through sound, elegantly divided into five medleys of fifteen to twenty minutes. Every medley seamlessly blends six to twelve songs by key and tempo, creating an immersive live experience that echoes the fluidity of a DJ set, yet pulses with the undeniable energy of a full band.

estate-duo-reggio-emilia-italy.intro_html:
Estate Duo — An Exquisite Vocal & Guitar Ensemble, Based in Reggio Emilia, Italy

Estate Duo is the refined collaboration between Marina and Sam, two artists of impeccable pedigree. Individually, they have performed across the globe alongside some of the most celebrated names in music. Engaged for curated events throughout Italy and Switzerland—from intimate gatherings to grand celebrations—this acoustic duo commands every stage with equal grace and sophistication. They are a recurring presence at the prestigious Al Veluu Ristorante Suites in Como, Italy, where their performances have become a hallmark of the venue's exclusive ambiance.
estate-duo-reggio-emilia-italy.description_html:
Marina lends her voice as a backing vocalist for luminaries such as MARIO BIONDI, IL VOLO, MARCO MENGONI, and a host of distinguished Italian and European artists. In Switzerland, she graced the stage of The Voice and, more notably, conceived a bespoke reinterpretation of Black music's greatest classics. In 2011 and 2012, she led the house band at the Montreux Palace during the illustrious Montreux Jazz Festival—a testament to her artistry and refined musical sensibility.

Our performances are meticulously curated, typically offering a seamless 90-minute or two-hour set. Should the occasion call for a more tailored approach, we are delighted to divide the programme into shorter intervals, arranged during the booking consultation. We are entirely self-sufficient: every detail, from our premium sound system to ambient background music before and during intermissions, is included in our fee—ensuring an effortlessly luxurious experience.

Upon prior arrangement, we are pleased to learn up to three bespoke songs beyond our existing repertoire. These are often reserved for ceremonial entrances, intimate dinners, or the first dance—moments that deserve an extraordinary soundtrack.

As a duo, we possess remarkable versatility, adapting to any space or setting with understated elegance. Should the location require it, we can provide battery-powered equipment, ensuring our performance remains flawless, no matter the environment.

Curated Line-Up Options

  • Duo — Guitar & Vocals
  • Trio — Guitar, Vocals & Sax

john-on-vocals-singer-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
John On Vocals – An Exquisite Wedding Singer & Guitarist, Based in Grosseto, Italy

Acclaimed for his warm, refined vocal presence and impeccable acoustic guitar artistry, John On Vocals curates an atmosphere of effortless elegance. Guests are drawn into the experience through his carefully selected repertoire, which seamlessly transitions from sophisticated ambience to spirited singalongs. His performances present an impeccable fusion of refined tranquility and exuberant celebration—equally suited to the intimacy of an early afternoon gathering or the revelry of a late-night soirée.

Drawing from an exquisite palette of Rock, Soul, Jazz, Blues, and Pop, each set is a bespoke journey crafted for weddings, luxury events, private parties, and distinguished gatherings. John is a favoured presence at esteemed venues including Villa Tombolina in Colli al Metauro and Villa Silver on the shores of Lake Como, where his artistry consistently enhances the most memorable of occasions.

John On Vocals cultivated his reputation as a discerning musical curator from the most authentic of beginnings—performing as a busker on the streets of London before ascending to provide refined ambience and entertainment across the United Kingdom and Europe. His distinguished clientele includes JP Morgan, Mayfair Hotels, CBE's, The CMO Club, and an array of discerning private patrons.

wedding-dj-sicily-giuseppe.intro_html:
DJ Giuseppe — An Exquisite Wedding DJ Based in Sicily

For several seasons, DJ Giuseppe has curated unforgettable celebrations across Sicily, bringing an instinctive mastery of atmosphere to every event. Based in Palermo, his refined presence is sought after for weddings throughout Italy, with a particular affinity for the elegant grounds of Tenuta Savoca.

On your most cherished day, DJ Giuseppe envelops your reception in an impeccably balanced soundscape—uniquely engaging, romantic, and sophisticated. Every performance is a bespoke journey, tailored to the mood of your guests and designed to keep them spellbound on the dance floor until the final notes.
wedding-dj-sicily-giuseppe.description_html:
An Exclusively Curated Service

Beyond musical entertainment, DJ Giuseppe offers a comprehensive, personalised experience that includes refined animation services, adding a touch of delightful originality to every moment of your celebration.

Bespoke Repertoire

His meticulously selected repertoire spans from beloved Italian classics to international treasures, featuring timeless pieces from the 1970s, 1980s, and 1990s. With an encyclopaedic knowledge of every genre, he ensures guests of all ages move together in effortless harmony.

Impeccable Equipment

  • 2 speakers from 750 watt RMS to 1400 watt Peak
  • White Wedding Stand with 2 White Truss Cover
  • 2 Moving Head ADJ R1 or 2 MOVING HEAD R7 Soundsation
  • 2 PAR LED (inside truss cover) + LED BAR
  • 1 TV SMART 4K 55'
  • 1 FOG MACHINE
  • 1 CONSOLE PIONEER XDJ-RX2 or DDJ-RR with PC
  • 1 WIRELESS MICROPHONE

Here are just some of the distinguished venues where DJ Giuseppe has been booked for weddings and events:

  • Tenuta Savoca, Sicily
  • Noto, Italy
  • Taormina, Messina, Italy
  • Scopello, Trapani

Bella Dixie – an exquisite Dixie-style ensemble based in Rome, Italy

Comprising four to eight impeccably talented musicians, Bella Dixie hails from the enchanting city of Rome. Founded in 2019, this refined ensemble has ascended with remarkable grace, leaving an indelible imprint on the musical landscape through their unparalleled artistry.

Renowned for their scintillating performances, Bella Dixie has graced over two hundred weddings with mesmerising melodies and infectious rhythms. They are regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at Casa Cornacchi in Bucine, Italy.
bella-dixie-jazz-band-rome-italy.description_html:
Their bespoke blend of elegance, vibrant energy, and unwavering passion imbues every occasion with an unforgettable retro charm, transforming ordinary gatherings into extraordinary celebrations. The band’s curated repertoire is a testament to their versatility and musical mastery, encompassing timeless classics from the Great American Songbook, evocative Italian and American swing anthems, spirited Rock ’n’ Roll numbers, and an eclectic array of genres that captivates audiences of all ages.

With every note, Bella Dixie transports listeners on a sublime journey through time, creating magical moments that linger long after the final chord fades. Experience the magic of Bella Dixie, where vintage allure meets contemporary sophistication, leaving an enduring legacy of musical excellence.

soul-drive-band-rome-italy.intro_html:
Soul Drive – An Exquisite Soul & Funk Covers Ensemble Based in Rome, Italy

For several years, Soul Drive has graced weddings and exclusive events across Italy and throughout Europe, delivering an impeccably curated musical experience. Our refined repertoire, encompassing soul, funk, blues, Motown, hip hop, and contemporary pop covers, offers a bespoke soundtrack—whether as an elegant backdrop for cocktail hour or an exuberant, dance-inducing performance. We are frequently engaged to perform at distinguished venues such as Villa Medicea di Lilliano in Grassina, Borgo Corsignano in Poppi, and Masseria Grieco in Ostuni, Puglia.

Soul Drive is a charismatic ensemble specializing in soul, funk, and pop covers, based in Rome, Italy. Our services are in high demand for weddings, corporate affairs, private parties, and any occasion demanding an impeccably packed dance floor. We take immense pride in curating the finest private event entertainment. Our bespoke performances grace weddings, milestone birthdays, anniversaries, and intimate family gatherings. Immerse yourself in the enchanting magic of live soul, Motown, and pop at your celebration. Relax and entrust the music to us with absolute confidence. downtown-nights-florence-italy.intro_html:
Downtown Nights – An Exquisite All-Female Acoustic Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

Downtown Nights presents a captivating all-female electroacoustic ensemble, composed of exceptionally refined and seasoned musicians. Every facet of your occasion is meticulously attended to; the ensemble serves as trusted curators, ensuring each event is tailored to impeccable perfection. With an extensive international repertoire, they artfully select the ideal musical accompaniment for every cherished moment.

They offer the following bespoke services:

  • Live Music for Cocktail Hours (duo or trio live band + sax or percussion)
  • Background music for dinner (selected playlist)
  • Live music after dinner
  • Music for special moments (cutting cake, dances, etc.)
  • Extra services: music for the ceremony or a DJ Set

The ensemble is regularly engaged to perform for weddings and events at Castello di Montignano in Perugia, Umbria.

The seamless fusion of their three voices, harmonising with exquisite precision, creates an enchanting atmosphere during ceremonies. Downtown Nights offers customisable arrangements, augmenting their ensemble with percussion, drum machine, saxophone, violin, and DJ sets according to each client's desires. Boasting over a decade of performance expertise across Tuscany's most prestigious venues, their versatility, experience, and attention to every detail ensure that your dream event becomes an indelible memory.

Line-up Options

  • 3 members (vocal, vocal/bass, vocal/guitar)
  • One Request: percussion/drum machine, sax, violin

violinist-naples-annalisa-strings.intro_html:
Annalisa Strings – An Exquisite Violinist Based in Naples, Italy

Annalisa Strings is an exceptionally refined violinist, devoted to curating impeccable musical experiences for the most distinguished events. With years of experience performing across Italy, this masterful artist lends her artistry to weddings, private soirées, and corporate galas with unparalleled grace.

Her bespoke repertoire spans eras and genres with exquisite breadth, encompassing cherished classical masterpieces, timeless pop anthems, and soul-stirring melodies. She is regularly engaged to perform at the most prestigious venues, including Villa Carolina in Sorrento, Lido Chimera in Latina, and Villa Rufolo in Ravello—settings befitting her refined talent.

Annalisa Strings is delighted to travel, routinely performing throughout Italy and Europe, ensuring her presence graces your celebration wherever it unfolds. Flexible and adaptable, she delivers an impeccable performance in any setting, whether indoors or outdoors.

For those seeking one of Italy’s most distinguished violinists, Annalisa Strings offers a truly luxurious musical experience—one defined by elegance, exclusivity, and flawless execution.

wedding-band-rome-outcasts.intro_html:
The Outcasts — An Exquisite Wedding Band Based in Rome, Italy

The Outcasts are a meticulously curated ensemble, ranging from an intimate duo to a refined five-piece formation, based in the enchanting city of Rome, Italy. They perform primarily as a swing and jazz collective, yet their impeccable versatility ensures they ascend to the dance floor with an irresistible repertoire of the most celebrated party anthems of all time. Since their founding in 2015, the band has had the distinguished privilege of entertaining discerning audiences at exclusive events, weddings, private soirées, and elegant street celebrations.
wedding-band-rome-outcasts.description_html: Chiara, the band’s captivating lead singer, began her artistic journey at a tender age, studying classical, modern, and contemporary dance. She later refined her craft at the prestigious Cunningham School and the Alvin Ailey School in New York, under the tutelage of Maestra Maria Di Re for both modern and operatic singing. In 2008, she graced the Fabrizio Frizzi–hosted Rai Uno programme La Botola. Chiara performed as both singer and dancer in the bespoke musical Inferno Opera Rock for three consecutive seasons, was a finalist for the esteemed Mia Martini Award and Tour Music Fest, and participated in the 2014 blind auditions for The Voice of Italy on Rai Uno. She also delivered a spellbinding performance as the lead in the opera L'Orlando furioso, part of the Jobel Theater's music theatre at the Creative Arts Workshop in 2016. Since 2018, the band has graced Rai Uno, including performances at the iconic Parco della Musica in Rome in 2020 and 2022, as well as during Rai Uno café. In February 2023, lead singer Chiara bestowed an exquisite performance on Rai Due in Viva il Videobox by Rosario Fiorello.

dj-per-matrimoni-toscana-jack.intro_html:
DJ Jack – An Exquisite Wedding DJ, Curated for the Discerning Connoisseur

Since 2011, DJ Jack has graced the most illustrious venues across Tuscany, refining his art amid the region’s most coveted estates. His impeccable versatility and masterful command of multiple genres transform every reception into a bespoke auditory journey. With an unwavering passion for his craft, he accompanies your celebration from the first note to the final toast, curating a seamless, elegant soundtrack that reflects your unique vision. Together, you shall orchestrate playlists and moments of sublime spontaneity—each detail meticulously arranged.
dj-per-matrimoni-toscana-jack.description_html:
Jack is regularly engaged for weddings and events at Il Verreno Resort in Arezzo, a testament to his refined artistry. He has been mentored and managed by DJ Zano, one of Italy’s most celebrated wedding DJs, whose legacy of excellence is entrusted to Jack’s capable hands. Zano remains devoted to nurturing rising talent within his local sphere, and Jack exemplifies that cultivated pedigree.

Among the distinguished estates that have welcomed Jack’s presence are:

  • Castello il Palagio Ricevimenti
  • Relais Abbazia San Pietro In Valle
  • Borgo di Pietrafitta Relais
  • Villa Aurelia, Rome, Italy
  • Castellare di Tonda Resort & Spa

padova-dj-wedding-italy.intro_html:
Padova DJ – An Exquisite Sonic Artisan from Padova, Italy

Padova DJ orchestrates the soundtrack of your emotions with impeccable artistry.

With more than two decades of refined experience, Padova DJ presents a genuine live DJ set—never reliant on pre-composed playlists. He regards music as the very soul of every celebration: it elevates emotion, marks each cherished moment, and transmutes the day into an unforgettable reverie. His presence is regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive events at the distinguished Villa Tiboldi in Cuneo, Italy.
padova-dj-wedding-italy.description_html:
With precision honed over years, he reads the room with intuitive grace, curating a bespoke musical journey that flows seamlessly from the elegant stillness of the aperitif to the vibrant energy of the dance floor. His selections blend commercial hits, house, Italian classics, and international melodies into a refined tapestry. His sole aspiration? To ensure that you and your guests are immersed in perpetual smiles, effortless dance, and the pure joy of the occasion.

A music producer of note, Padova DJ also releases original compositions available on Spotify and aired on national radio.

Exclusive optional services, available upon request:

  • Live performances alongside saxophonists, pianists, or vocalists
  • Custom lighting and visual effects, accompanied by a dedicated consultation
padova-dj-wedding-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 2 to 3 hour sets

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- I can add Saxophone, Violin, Pianist or Singers live performances.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We usually arrive about 2 to 3 hours before the event. The setup must be fully operational and tested at least one
hour before the event starts.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- It depends on the size of the venue and the number of setups required on average, it takes about 1 to 1.5 hours.

</details><details><summary>Can you play song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- Approx. 2m x 3m

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, of course — by performing at different types of events, I often play in a variety of settings.</details>

tuscany-folk-band-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscany Folk Band — an exquisitely refined folk ensemble, based in Tuscany and curated for the most discerning celebrations throughout Italy.

✨ What discerning clientele cherish most about The Tuscany Folk Band: An authentic Tuscan folk trio, roaming musicians who intuitively read the room, warm Italian charm, immersive sing-alongs and dancing, impeccably suited for aperitivo, dinner, and pizza parties.

We specialise in performing bespoke folk and traditional Italian compositions at weddings and events across Northern Italy.

Our performances are typically acoustic, allowing us to wander gracefully among your guests, cultivating an intimate and unforgettable atmosphere for your most exquisite day.

The ensemble may be engaged as a duo, trio, quartet, or quintet — either as an instrumental ensemble or with a refined vocalist.

Clients who have experienced The Tuscany Folk Band frequently choose to book them for weddings and events at the Caruso Belmond Hotel on the Amalfi Coast, the Cavalieri Waldorf Astoria Hotel in Rome, Borgo Di Castelvecchio in Contignano, Castello di Montalto in Siena, and Villa La Selva Wine Resort in Arezzo, Italy.
tuscany-folk-band-italy.description_html:
This distinguished traditional Italian folk ensemble is regularly commissioned to perform at welcome dinners or pizza parties throughout Italy, as well as during the aperitif cocktail hour or dinner service.

When performing during a welcome dinner, pizza party, or aperitif, the band plays for the entirety of the event, with brief ten-minute interludes throughout the meal.

For dinner performances, the musicians make refined interventions between courses, moving near each table and inviting guests to join in harmonious sing-alongs.

The Folk Trio comprises accordion, guitarist singer, and violin.

The Folk Quartet offers one of the following bespoke combinations:

  • accordion, guitarist singer, violin and mandolin;
  • accordion, guitarist singer, violin and acoustic bass guitarist singer;
  • accordion, guitarist singer, violin and sax;
  • accordion, two guitarist singers and violin.

The group performs as an acoustic roaming band, requiring no amplification — an artful presence that moves effortlessly through your celebration.

They are frequently engaged for afternoon festivities, after which couples often select one of our refined Tuscany wedding bands for the evening soirée.

serenissima-dj-venice-italy.intro_html:
Serenissima DJ – An Exquisite Curated Experience in Venice, Italy

Since 2009, Serenissima DJ has commanded stages across the globe, leaving an indelible mark on the world of refined music. His bespoke presence has reshaped experiences at iconic venues such as Treviso’s Dema disco and Venice’s Souk – Piccolo Mondo, elevating each performance to an art form. In 2018, he expanded his impeccable craft into production, founding studios in Venice and Padua, and achieving a distinguished forty-first position on Beatport’s global chart with a single track of exceptional allure. He is regularly curated for weddings and exclusive events at the prestigious Corte San Mattia in Verona and Tenuta di Casa Bruciata in Perugia.

His magnetic allure has graced the most refined settings—Molo, Glam, Kings, Supersonic, and the Venice Biennale—while also lending his musical sophistication to private celebrations, from bespoke weddings to the most exclusive soirées. Serenissima DJ’s journey represents an evolution of sound and a legacy of rhythm that continues to captivate discerning audiences worldwide.

cesca-on-sax-florence-italy.intro_html:
Cesca on Sax – An Exquisite Saxophonist & DJ for the Most Refined Celebrations, Based in Florence, Italy

What discerning clients most treasured about Cesca on Sax: Impeccably kind and professional, effortless communication, bespoke musical curation, extraordinary flexibility, an outstanding saxophone performance, vibrant energy that captivates guests, and an experience earnestly recommended.

Born and raised in Campania, Cesca discovered her passion for the saxophone as a young prodigy, honing her craft to the highest standard and earning distinction at numerous international competitions.

Today, she is a luminous presence on the Italian music scene, collaborating with the country's most accomplished musicians and DJs to create moments of pure sophistication.

Her artistry is defined by remarkable versatility—spanning from the soulful depths of jazz to the exhilarating pulse of house—with exquisite command of both alto and tenor saxophones.

Cesca is regularly engaged to perform at weddings and exclusive events at the esteemed Borgo Di Castelvecchio in Tuscany, Italy.

Her enchanting music has graced the halls of five‑star hotels and iconic villas, establishing her as a highly sought‑after artist for weddings and corporate galas alike.

A contemporary edge defines her repertoire: she masterfully wields the Electronic Wind Instrument (EWI), infusing funk and chillout sets with a modern, curated flair.

Driven by an unwavering devotion to crafting unforgettable musical journeys, Cesca continues to enchant audiences with her boundless creativity and refined stage presence.

Among the prestigious locations where she has been booked for weddings and events:

  • Borgo Di Castelvecchio, Tuscany
  • Agriturismo Fattoria del Colle
  • Relais Guado al Sole, Pisa
  • Volterra, Pisa, Italy
  • Pontassieve, Florence, Italy
  • Ambra, Arezzo, Italy

roaming-band-bari-jay-walkers.intro_html:
The Jay Walkers – An Exquisite Roaming Ensemble, Based in Bari, Puglia, Italy

The Jay Walkers represent a refined assembly of virtuoso musicians, dedicated to delivering unparalleled roaming performances for the most distinguished events. This impeccably curated group commands a vast array of instruments, weaving effortlessly through your occasion with grace, skill, and an undercurrent of joyous sophistication.

This ensemble has been recognised among Italy’s finest jazz bands. Happy to travel throughout Puglia and beyond, The Jay Walkers perform regularly across Italy at weddings, private celebrations, and corporate affairs.

Please take a moment to review our 2026 Set List.

As a highly sought-after wedding band in Puglia, we are frequently engaged for ceremonies and receptions at iconic venues such as Masseria Grieco in Ostuni, Relais Villa San Martino in Taranto, and Masseria Amastuola Wine Resort in Crispiano, Italy.
roaming-band-bari-jay-walkers.description_html:
The Jay Walkers possess an eclectic repertoire spanning eras and genres—from pop and rock to Italian and Balkan classics. Entirely acoustic, this fully roaming orchestra performs with boundless enthusiasm and energy, adaptable to almost any setting.

Comprising eleven to fourteen musicians, with brass, percussion, and wind instruments, The Jay Walkers promise a performance of singular distinction. Below are just a few of the exclusive locations where we have been booked for weddings and events:

  • Masseria San Nicola, Fasano
  • Masseria Grieco, Ostuni, Italy
  • Masseria Quadrelli
  • Masseria Narducci, Brindisi
  • Castello il Palagio, Italia
  • Masseria Amastuola Wine Resort
  • Castello Marchione, Puglia
  • TH Ostuni, Puglia
  • Masseria Fontana Di Vite
  • Masseria Salamina, Fasano
  • Relais Villa San Martino, Taranto
  • Villa Cenci, Cisternino
  • Santa Maria di Leuca, Lecce
  • Suffolk, UK

Should you seek to engage one of Italy’s most distinguished roaming or strolling bands, look no further than The Jay Walkers—an impeccable choice for a bespoke musical experience.

fire-led-dancers-jugglers-italy-fireflie.intro_html:
The Italy Fireflies – An Exquisite Ensemble of Fire & LED Performers, Based in Milan, Italy

The Italy Fireflies present an extraordinary fire show of rare refinement, captivating from the very first moment the artists grace the scene.

Fire possesses an arcane and primal allure, evoking the deepest echoes of tribality and origin. This elemental force is treated with the utmost artistry and respect.

Exquisite tongues of flame, cascading sparks, and meticulously choreographed pyrotechnic interplay leave audiences utterly spellbound, culminating as the fire-eater extinguishes the flame from which the entire narrative began.

This impeccable ensemble is regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at the prestigious Casa Cornacchi Country House in Bucine, Italy.
fire-led-dancers-jugglers-italy-fireflie.description_html:
A breathtaking narrative unfolds through fire—an element that propagates and regenerates across an array of bespoke equipment and special effects wielded by the performer.

Whether upon a piazza, a cobblestone street, or within the refined setting of an elegant ceremony, every audience falls under the spell of this curated performance, also presented at distinguished street artist festivals. The luminous sparks of fire enchant and mesmerise.

The artists of The Italy Fireflies entrance with their refined fire play and juggling, elevating your wedding celebration into an unforgettable occasion enhanced by bespoke light effects.

For those seeking original concepts for a nocturnal celebration, historical re-enactments, or exceptional artists for private parties, a fire show represents the quintessential choice to evoke profound emotion in both adults and children alike.

Entirely customised incarnations of the performance may be commissioned: you select the music, the attire, the choreography—in essence, you render your event utterly unique.

Complementary LED light shows, pixel poi performances, and parades are also available, including a striking "mirror man" (as seen in the portfolio).

In Italiano

La compagnia nasce dalla raffinata passione di Saimon per il fuoco e si specializza in questo settore della giocoleria d’élite. La formazione presso il prestigioso Teatro Tascabile di Bergamo ha portato Saimon a divenire anche danzatore sui trampoli.

La compagnia impiega inoltre attrezzature LED di altissima qualità.

Le musiche sono interamente prodotte dalla compagnia e pertanto non soggette a tutela SIAE.

Proponiamo animazione curata per matrimoni, eventi aziendali, feste di paese, rievocazioni storiche e ogni altra celebrazione che richieda un tocco di esclusività.

Realizziamo spettacoli di giocoleria con fuoco, anche personalizzati secondo le esigenze di durata, composizione musicale o numero di performer, animazione itinerante e danza su trampoli, oltre a spettacoli di giocoleria con LED.

wedding-singer-amalfi-italy.intro_html:
The Amalfi Wedding Singer – an exquisite vocalist for refined celebrations on the Amalfi Coast, Italy

Originally from Sydney, Australia, the Amalfi Wedding Singer has spent nearly a decade immersed in the breathtaking beauty of the Amalfi Coast, crafting a career defined by impeccable artistry. Her extensive experience as a singer and songwriter includes the release of four original albums and co-writing the official Platinum Jubilee song for Queen Elizabeth II, a piece performed at Buckingham Palace in 2022 by Grammy Award–winning artist Gregory Porter.

Renowned for her unique tone and richly textured voice, she collaborates with the region’s most accomplished musicians to deliver bespoke live music for weddings and exclusive events in Ravello, Amalfi, Praiano, Positano, Sorrento, the island of Capri, and throughout Italy. Fluent in both English and Italian, she performs exquisitely at the finest venues—luxury hotels, private villas, and elegant boats—and offers a curated repertoire available upon request. Her regular engagements include Relais Blu Hotel in Sorrento, Lloyd’s Baia Hotel in Vietri sul Mare, and Nabilah Beach in Naples.

An outstanding vocalist of exceptional refinement, she brings a fresh, sophisticated sound to every occasion. Tutored by Australia’s leading vocalists and a two-time SIMA Young Women in Jazz graduate, her live repertoire spans Jazz Standards, Bossa Nova, and Contemporary selections. She performs as part of a Duo, Trio, or Quartet, and is delighted to discuss bespoke ensemble options tailored to your event.

One of Italy’s most sought-after female wedding singers

The Amalfi Wedding Singer would be honoured to perform at your Amalfi Coast wedding, gracing such exquisite venues as Belmond Hotel Caruso, Villa Cimbrone, Villa Eva, Casa Privata, Grand Hotel Tritone, Hotel Marincanto, Palazzo Murat, Villa Magia, Villa Silvana, and Hotel Eden Roc & Suites. She will collaborate with you to curate the perfect set list, assemble a remarkable band, and, with at least one month’s notice, learn any special requests to ensure an impeccably personalised experience.

marche-sax-civitanova-italy.intro_html:
The Marche Sax — an exquisitely refined saxophonist, based in the heart of Italy’s Marche region.

Rooted in the cultural richness of the Marche region, The Marche Sax is renowned for a seamless fusion of elegance, versatility, and impeccable musical artistry.

A classically trained virtuoso whose passion for performance ignited at the age of ten, he has since graced Italy’s most exclusive venues and private celebrations with his refined, soulful sound.

Whether orchestrating an intimate wedding aperitivo or commanding a grand corporate gala, his performances are meticulously curated to elevate every atmosphere — smooth, sophisticated, and impeccably tailored to the occasion.
marche-sax-civitanova-italy.description_html:
Whether performing as a soloist with bespoke backing tracks or joined by an ensemble of exceptionally talented musicians and performers, each presentation is a uniquely personal experience.

The Marche Sax offers a curated selection of line-up configurations — from an intimate solo act to a magnificent eight-piece ensemble, which may include DJs, percussionists, violinists, vocalists, dancers, and additional refined talents.

Performance duration is entirely bespoke, ranging from concise sets to expansive three-to-four-hour sessions, accommodating the most discerning client’s vision.

Fully self-contained, he supplies an impeccable array of professional-grade sound, lighting, and video equipment — including LED walls, atmospheric smoke effects, and dynamic moving heads — all operated by a seasoned technical team.

Setup times are thoughtfully calibrated between one and three hours depending on the production’s scale, with arrival typically four hours prior to the event to ensure flawless readiness.

Equally at ease in indoor or outdoor settings, he gracefully accommodates special song requests and brings his refined energy to any venue — from elegant villas and luxury hotels to seaside celebrations and black-tie galas.

Stylish, soulful, and effortlessly professional, The Marche Sax curates moments that resonate long after the final note has faded.

dj-sasha-bergamo-italy.intro_html:
About DJ Sasha – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Based in Bergamo, Italy

Sasha is a remarkably refined DJ and producer from Bergamo, Italy. Her impeccable career commenced in 2013, during which she graced the decks of a celebrated house club in Sardinia. She is frequently invited as a special guest performer at grand-scale events alongside internationally revered artists such as Daddy Yankee, Bad Bunny, Ozuna, and Maluma.

Currently, Sasha commands the turntables at several of the most exclusive clubs in Bergamo, Brescia, Milan, and Florence. Her curated expertise has been sought after for bespoke weddings across Lombardy and Tuscany, including the nuptials of celebrity singer Paola Turci and Francesca Pascale, held at one of Tuscany’s most breathtaking villas. She also delivers refined musical experiences for prestigious brands like Geox at their flagship stores in Paris and Milan. Sasha is regularly engaged to elevate weddings and events at the illustrious Hotel Cala di Volpe Luxury Collection in Sardinia.

Her artistry has been meticulously mentored and managed by the esteemed DJ Zano, widely regarded as one of Italy’s most talented and sought-after wedding DJs.

wedding-tenor-florence-italy.intro_html:
The Wedding Tenor – A Florentine Virtuoso of Unparalleled Elegance

Discerning clients consistently commend the breathtaking operatic surprise, the impeccably refined professionalism, the profound emotional resonance, and the masterful guest engagement that transforms dinners into once-in-a-lifetime experiences.

An artist of rare distinction, The Wedding Tenor is a Florence‑based opera singer, actor, and pianist. He commenced his artistic journey commanding principal roles in celebrated operettas such as La vedova allegra, L'Acqua Cheta, Il Paese dei campanelli, Al cavallino bianco, and Casa mia casa mia with various theatre companies across Italy. Simultaneously, he sustains a prolific concert presence in Italian and European theatres, corporate events, and sacred venues, commanding a vast repertoire that encompasses opera, operetta, Neapolitan songs, soundtracks, sacred arias, operatic pop, chamber Romanze, and Baroque arias.

Collaborating with a Florentine soprano of equal refinement, he has forged an enduring artistic alliance, presenting musical performances wherein both artists shine as singers, actors, and presenters. He is regarded among Italy's most exquisite opera singers for weddings and exclusive events.

His services are regularly secured for weddings and events at distinguished venues such as Villa Catignano in Siena, Castello di Rosciano in Perugia, and Villa di Bivigliano in Tuscany.
wedding-tenor-florence-italy.description_html:
Beyond wedding ceremonies, The Wedding Tenor curates private events of the highest order—wedding banquets, intimate gatherings—held within Medici villas, ancient historic palazzos, and castles. His theatrical prowess and extensive repertoire ensnare the senses, involving each participant in an immersive performance. The wedding singer is available throughout Tuscany, Umbria, and all of Italy, offering bespoke entertainment for each segment of your event—from ceremony to aperitif to dinner or welcome dinner.

His repertoire spans an exquisite array of genres: sacred, religious, classical, opera, romanza, operetta, Neapolitan, operatic pop, and both Italian and international music. It is possible to tailor the song list entirely, learning and performing pieces upon request. He performs accompanied by a musician (piano, organ, etc.) or with his own professional backing tracks.

  • The Art of the Surprise Serenade – Envision the astonishment of your guests as an unfamiliar figure seamlessly blends among the staff, then graciously commands the room. They serenade you and your loved ones, who joyfully join in singing beloved Italian classics such as O Sole Mio and Volare, as well as operatic masterpieces like Nessun dorma.
  • The Wedding Ceremony – Elevate your nuptial rite to an unforgettable pinnacle with the captivating presence of a classical singer. The Wedding Tenor's extraordinary voice—reminiscent of Italy's greatest vocal luminaries—will mesmerise and enchant your guests.
  • Aperitifs or Dinner – Infuse your repast with an unforgettable touch by treating your guests to mesmerising classical performances. From opera to traditional and contemporary pieces, these versatile renditions delight every palate. Witness the sheer delight as guests rise in applause for this passionate and commanding voice. Whether you already have a band or DJ, add an element of refined sophistication to your evening.
  • The Wedding Soprano and Tenor Duo – In addition to solo performances, The Wedding Tenor can unite with a professional soprano, forging a remarkably fruitful alliance. Their harmonised voices deliver captivating renditions of numerous songs and operatic compositions originally conceived as duets or reimagined for this exquisite pairing.

alma-soul-band-bari-italy.intro_html:
Alma Soul Band – An Exquisite Ensemble for Refined Celebrations, Based in Bari, Italy

For over fifteen years, Alma Soul Band has been a bespoke musical project, bringing together artists of impeccable technical ability and a wealth of experience in the wedding sector—particularly within the destination wedding landscape. Their curated repertoire spans pop, soul, funk, and dance, offering a refined sound that has made them a most sought-after ensemble for exclusive events across Puglia. Among the distinguished venues that regularly host their performances is Corte Degli Aranci in Bari, where every note is delivered with elegance and precision.

The entire event is managed with impeccable attention from inception to final chord, and announcements can be delivered in both English and French, ensuring a seamless experience for an international clientele. A vast, hand-selected repertoire allows each celebration to be personally tailored, transforming every occasion into an unforgettable, luxurious affair.

dj-sereno-siena-italy.intro_html:
DJ Sereno – An Exquisite Wedding & Event DJ, Based in Siena, Italy

DJ Sereno is a refined wedding and event DJ, resident in Siena, Tuscany, whose illustrious career has graced premier clubs throughout Italy and bespoke destinations across Europe.

Driven by an impeccable passion for music, he commenced his journey as a resident DJ in the distinguished clubs between Siena and Florence, ultimately leaving his mark upon Italy’s most revered venues. He then expanded his artistry with three years aboard a luxury cruise line, traversing the globe and curating an extensive repertoire of musical styles. Today, he is regularly engaged to perform at weddings and exclusive events at La Piana Luxury Villa in Tuscany.

Following this international odyssey, DJ Sereno further honed his craft in Milan, dedicating himself to the study of music production and sound engineering. During seven years in that illustrious city, he performed within its elite clubs and at private soirées. With over two decades of experience in the wedding industry, he collaborates closely with esteemed wedding planners, becoming a sought-after name for celebrations across Italy. He offers a full range of bespoke enhancements, including saxophonists, violinists, percussionists, and even aerial dance performers.

florence-wedding-singer-italy.intro_html:
The Florence Wedding Singer — An Exquisite Artistry in Voice & Guitar

Based in the heart of Florence, Tuscany, The Florence Wedding Singer is celebrated as the most refined vocalist and guitarist in the region, curating an impeccable musical experience for weddings, marriage proposals, corporate affairs, and exclusive private celebrations. His artistry has graced prestigious events across Europe, the Middle East, and the United States, earning him a reputation for unparalleled elegance.

He is regularly engaged to perform at distinguished venues such as Villa Montecastello in Monteriggioni and Fattoria di Corsignano in Siena, offering bespoke live arrangements that transform each occasion into a cherished memory. As the lead voice of Trio Toscano, an all-male ensemble from Tuscany, he presents original, refined interpretations of beloved songs. He may also perform as an exquisite duo alongside a gifted young female vocalist, whose artistry is showcased below.

Select Venues Graced by His Presence

  • Villa Montecastello, Monteriggioni
  • Colle di Val d’Elsa, Siena, Italy
  • Fattoria di Corsignano, Siena
  • Castello di Mugnana, Florence
  • B-Roof, Piazza dell'Unità Italiana
  • Borgo Sant'Ambrogio, Siena
  • Laticastelli Country Relais
  • LA RIMESSA EXPERIENCE, Florence
  • Borgo dé Brandi, Monteriggioni
  • Borgo Corsignano, Poppi
  • Volterra, Pisa, Italy

groove-gala-wedding-band-rome.intro_html:
The Groove Gala – An Artisan Ensemble for Exquisite Celebrations, Based in Rome, Italy

Introducing The Groove Gala — Italy’s preeminent party band, established in the year 2002. Embark upon an unparalleled musical journey with our eight-member ensemble, celebrated for igniting the most refined venues across Italy with a curated tapestry of international rhythms. With a distinguished legacy of over 1,900 exceptional events, we transcend the conventional notion of a band, crafting celebrations that linger impeccably in memory. Our captivating blend of male and female vocalists, accompanied by a spirited horn section, delivers electrifying performances that elevate the essence of global dance classics to a state of pure refinement.
groove-gala-wedding-band-rome.description_html:
Our mastery lies not merely in melody, but in curating an infectious ambiance that ensures the dance floor remains resplendently animated. Beyond notes and rhythm, we infuse every occasion with joy and vivacity, transforming your celebration into an indelible spectacle. Each member of our ensemble is not simply a musician, but a charismatic entertainer, poised to elevate your most cherished moments to unprecedented heights. In a testament to our calibre, we are proud to spotlight our esteemed collaboration with Yamaha — a hallmark of distinction that underscores the impeccable quality of our performances. For those envisioning a transcendent international wedding in Italy, look no further. The Groove Gala stands ready to orchestrate a celebration beyond compare, together etching memories that resonate for a lifetime.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • The band is exclusively available in the eight-member formation for the evening reception.
  • Three musicians for the aperitif music.
  • One musician for the ceremony music.

aperitivo-duo-bologna-italy.intro_html:
Aperitivo Duo – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble, Based in Bologna, Italy

Crafted to grace your occasion with precious, luminescent interludes of tranquillity, Aperitivo Duo presents music as the impeccable complement to an aperitif or dinner. Their curated repertoire of evergreen, soul-inspired international classics is reimagined in a soft, introspective register, yet never loses its rhythmic, sparkling vitality. This refined ensemble is a recurrent presence at Borgo di Colleoli Resort in Pisa, where they elevate weddings and events with their bespoke artistry.

Sara, an Italian singer-songwriter of singular distinction, has been celebrated for three performances at the Sanremo Festival—Italy’s most prestigious musical event—as well as her numerous appearances in illustrious musical broadcasts by RAI, the national public television network. Valerio, an Italian musician and producer, specialises in crafting records for artists and labels, and in composing evocative soundtracks for theme parks, luxury brands, and advertising campaigns. Together, Sara’s luminous, brilliant voice and Valerio’s deep, rhythmic guitar enhance every social context, leaving an indelible, cherished memory of each refined moment.

latin-jazz-band-siena-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscany Latin Jazz Band – An Exquisite Latin Jazz Ensemble Based in Siena, Italy

The Tuscany Latin Jazz Band is a refined musical ensemble, proudly based in the illustrious city of Siena, Italy. This curated group may be engaged as a sophisticated four-piece formation or in more intimate, bespoke configurations. Under the impeccable direction of the gifted singer and guitarist Fabrizio, the band is celebrated for its captivating performances and its seamless fusion of vibrant Latin rhythms with the improvisational brilliance of jazz.
latin-jazz-band-siena-tuscany-italy.description_html:
Inspired by a profound passion for Latin rhythms and jazz improvisation, Fabrizio conceived The Tuscany Latin Jazz Band. The ensemble comprises a select group of virtuosic musicians: Fabrizio on guitar and vocals, a double bass player, a violinist, and a drummer. Together, they orchestrate a harmonious fusion of genres that enchants audiences and transports them into a world of rhythmic elegance.

The band is regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive events at distinguished venues such as Villa Roncovisi in Pistoia and Rosewood Castiglion Del Bosco in Siena, Italy.

Fabrizio’s musical journey began at the age of eleven, when he first took up the guitar. His devotion to the instrument deepened as he dedicated himself to mastering its every nuance. Recognising his exceptional talent, his parents enrolled him in a prestigious local music school in Siena, where he received formal training and cultivated his love for music.

Driven by a desire to explore new musical territories, Fabrizio pursued jazz studies at a renowned conservatory in Siena. There, he refined his artistry as a guitarist, delving into the rich complexities of jazz and expanding his creative horizons.

The Tuscany Latin Jazz Band’s repertoire encompasses both instrumental compositions and captivating vocal performances. They effortlessly blend traditional Latin genres—salsa, bossa nova, and samba—with the improvisational elements of jazz. Their performances are distinguished by infectious rhythms, intricate melodies, and breathtaking solos that highlight the individual virtuosity of each ensemble member.

The band’s versatility allows them to adapt seamlessly to any setting or occasion. Whether performing refined instrumental pieces that showcase their technical prowess or delivering soul-stirring vocal renditions, their music is profoundly engaging and emotionally resonant.

Over the years, the ensemble has enchanted audiences in Siena and far beyond with their electrifying performances. From private soirées and exclusive jazz clubs to the most prestigious music festivals, they have left an indelible mark on the cultural landscape, drawing admirers from every walk of life.

The Tuscany Latin Jazz Band continues to push the boundaries of their art, exploring new musical frontiers and captivating audiences with their unique alchemy of Latin rhythms and jazz improvisation. With unwavering passion and remarkable talent, they leave an enduring impact on the world of music, wowing every audience at each event they grace.

The following are but a selection of the exquisite locations where the band has been engaged for weddings and events:

  • Villa Roncovisi, Pistoia
  • Rosewood Castiglion Del Bosco
  • Villa Cicolina, Montepulciano
  • Locanda in Tuscany, Castiglione
  • Fattoria Mansi Bernardini
  • Tenuta Corte Domina
  • Lucca, Italy

admirers-puglia-italy.intro_html:
The Admirers – An Exquisite Rock ’n’ Roll Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Barletta, Italy

Since its inception in 2012, The Admirers have emerged as a distinguished force in the world of live music, comprising five accomplished musicians and, upon request, an exceptional DJ. With over a decade of refined experience in the events industry, the ensemble has graced stages across the globe, delivering more than 500 impeccably electrifying performances. Their curated repertoire spans an exquisite array of genres—dixieland, rock ’n’ roll, gipsy, surf, twist, boogie woogie, and swing—ensuring a vibrant and captivating musical journey for discerning audiences of every taste.
admirers-puglia-italy.description_html:
Specialising in the provision of top-tier entertainment for the most exclusive occasions, The Admirers have become synonymous with bespoke excellence in live music. From enchanting outdoor concerts to pulsating club soirées, from soulful serenades to jubilant wedding celebrations, from lively festivals to intimate private gatherings, the band’s versatility knows no bounds. Their mission is to blend refined musicality with an infectious stage presence, fostering a connection that transcends the barrier between performer and audience. With each performance, The Admirers aim to create unforgettable memories and lasting impressions.

When it comes to weddings, The Admirers offer a tailored entertainment package, designed to elevate every moment of the celebration. Their wedding party animation typically unfolds as follows—though fully customizable to suit the couple’s preferences and the venue’s ambience:

  • Civil Ceremony: Set the mood with a DJ accompanied by guitar, vocals, and/or saxophone or violin.
  • Wedding Entrance in ‘New Orleans’ Style and Aperitif: Serenade guests with a roaming acoustic ensemble featuring banjo, vocals, saxophone, and percussion.
  • Music During the Meal: Sustain an enchanting atmosphere with an electric set, alternating between listening and dancing intervals, performed by five musicians on vocals, guitar, tenor saxophone, bass, and drums, complemented by DJ interludes.
  • Cake Cutting Ceremony: Enhance the moment with instrumental accompaniment—whether a guitar-saxophone duo or a guitar-vocals-saxophone trio—tailored to the chosen song and ambience.
  • Music After the Cake Cutting and After Party: Transition seamlessly into the evening’s festivities with the expertise of a skilled DJ, ensuring the celebration continues well into the night.

With The Admirers at the helm, every wedding becomes an extraordinary affair, filled with music, merriment, and cherished memories.

rome-dixie-band-italy.intro_html:
The Rome Dixie Band – An Exquisite Roaming Dixie & Jazz Ensemble, Based in Rome, Italy

Impeccably capturing the spirited soul of New Orleans, The Rome Dixie Band curates a refined fusion of Dixieland Swing, classic Jazz, and a whisper of beloved Italian melodies. Their bespoke performances transport guests to the heart of Bourbon Street, where joy, energy, and timeless humour converge in an unforgettable sensory journey.

Their expertly crafted repertoire includes such cherished classics as “Volare,” “O Sole Mio,” “That’s Amore,” and “Bella Ciao”—each reimagined with the exuberant, roaming style of a New Orleans street band. For weddings and celebrations across Italy, this ensemble creates an impeccable party mood that enchants every guest, as though the cobblestones of Rome have been momentarily exchanged for the vibrant avenues of Old New Orleans.

The Rome Dixie Band is regularly invited to perform for exclusive events at the esteemed Monastero Santa Margherita in Perugia, Italy—a testament to their refined artistry and unwavering professionalism.

Their curated set list draws from legendary virtuosos such as Fats Waller, Hoagy Carmichael, Louis Armstrong, and Jelly Roll Morton. Gems like “Sweet Georgia Brown,” “St. Louis Blues,” “South,” and “When The Saints Go Marchin’ In” are delivered with exquisite precision and verve. Alongside these jazz standards, they offer bespoke renditions of Italian treasures, inviting guests to sing and dance to “Volare” and “O Sole Mio” reimagined with a Dixieland twist that is both sophisticated and irresistibly joyful.

For a celebration defined by impeccable music and boundless charm, let The Rome Dixie Band orchestrate an unforgettable affair—bringing the luminous spirit of New Orleans jazz to your most cherished occasion in Italy.

wedding-dj-sardinia-fab.intro_html:
DJ Fab – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Experience on the Shores of Sardinia

DJ Fab is a highly esteemed and charismatic maestro of the turntables, based on the captivating island of Sardinia. With years of refined experience curating unforgettable wedding celebrations across this Mediterranean jewel, he possesses an innate ability to orchestrate the perfect rhythm for your nuptials. For those seeking the most impeccable wedding DJ that Sardinia has to offer, an exclusive encounter with DJ Fab is the epitome of bespoke entertainment.

His calendar is regularly reserved for prestigious events at the Almar Timi Ama Resort & Spa in Sardinia and the Falkensteiner Resort Capo Boi in Cagliari—venues that demand only the most exceptional talents.

DJ Fab transforms any occasion into a revelry of unparalleled sophistication. His complete, transportable DJ station includes state-of-the-art audio equipment, dazzling light effects, a smoke machine, and a bubble machine, all meticulously arranged to create an immersive dance-floor environment.

His curated repertoire spans current dance anthems, the golden eras of the 80s and 90s, timeless disco, Latin rhythms—salsa, merengue, cha-cha-cha, reggaeton, kissed—and refined chillout or lounge selections for your cocktail hour. He becomes the very engine of your event, personalising each phase of the celebration with special musical requests, weaving together the ideal combinations for every cherished moment.

DJ Fab guarantees flawless sound quality and breathtaking lighting—a genuine DJ set that elevates your venue into an unforgettable soirée. Your wedding day deserves to be a symphony of joy, delight, and exquisite music; with DJ Fab, you secure a professional who transforms that vision into reality.

He is poised to electrify your party, inviting you to dance to the irresistible pulse of exotic, addictive Latin melodies and beyond, guiding every guest to the pinnacle of celebration. His varied and impeccable repertoire—current dance, Latin, 80s and 90s, disco, and lounge—ensures that every taste is honoured, making him the definitive catalyst for your reception’s magic.
wedding-dj-sardinia-fab.faq_html:
<details><summary>What does the wedding package include?</summary>DJ Stand, sound system with speaker and complete subwoofer for parties from 50 to 300 people, UV strobe laser light effects, smoke machine, bubble machine.



</details><details><summary>How far in advance should I get in touch with you?</summary>At least 7 days.  



</details><details><summary>Formation Size</summary>One DJ only.  



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>Disco music, disco from the 80s, 90s and current dance, Latin, salsa, merengue, cha cha, reggaeton, lounge and chillout.  



</details><details><summary>Can I ask for songs that are not included in the repertoire?</summary>I am able to satisfy any musical request, current music and latest trends, always original playing original tracks and taking requests as part or my packages.  



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>more than 10 years.  



</details><details><summary>Do you provide all your own equipment?</summary>Yes.  



</details><details><summary>Do you need concrete material or specific conditions to be able to offer the service?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Are you available to travel?</summary>Yes, up to 300 km.



</details><details><summary>Is there a travel surcharge?</summary>Yes, as long as it's within a reasonable distance and the price is agreed before the booking is confirmed.  



</details><details><summary>Do you perform during more than one wedding per day?</summary>No.  



</details><details><summary>Do you work alone or with a team of professionals?</summary>Alone.

</details><details><summary>How much time do you need to set-up for the performance?</summary>2 hours.  



</details><details><summary>Can you perform outdoors?</summary>Yes.</details>

wedding-party-band-rome-big-waves.intro_html:
About The Big Waves – an exquisite wedding & party ensemble based in Rome, Italy

The Big Waves represent a revelation of sound and vitality—a meticulously curated band designed to elevate every occasion into an unparalleled affair. Based in Rome, we are honoured to traverse Italy, performing exclusively at weddings, private soirées, corporate galas, and distinguished public functions. Our refined performances have established us as a coveted choice for iconic venues such as Villa Aurelia in Rome and Villa Cimbrone in Ravello.

Our Unique Offering — with an impeccably eclectic repertoire spanning genres, styles, and eras, The Big Waves deliver a bespoke and exhilarating interpretation of live music. Whether you desire timeless classics or contemporary favourites, we promise to captivate every guest and craft an atmosphere of indelible enchantment.

Beyond our dynamic live performances, we present a complete entertainment suite that includes:

  • Ceremony Music:
    Setting the perfect tone for your most cherished moments. Our Ceremony Package offers a sumptuous musical backdrop, featuring a refined combination of acoustic guitar and saxophone or flute—creating a romantic and bewitching ambiance for your wedding ceremony.
  • Aperitivo Entertainment:
    Creating a vibrant yet elegant atmosphere during your cocktail hour. Our Aperitivo Package brings the spirited essence of our ensemble to your pre-reception celebration, offering an inviting soundscape for mingling and joyous connection.
  • DJ Set:
    Sustaining the revelry deep into the night with seamless transitions. Our DJ Package delivers a dynamic musical journey tailored to your preferences, ensuring every guest remains on the dance floor, immersed in the moment.

The band are efficient, professional, and supremely adaptable, dedicated to ensuring your event unfolds with flawless grace.

  • Expandable Ensemble:
    Enhance your event with additional virtuosos. We currently present a core group of seven performers, featuring both male and female vocals, and can expand to ten musicians. This allows us to introduce trumpet, trombone, and percussion for an even richer, more opulent sound. This versatility enables us to tailor our ensemble to the very spirit of your occasion, creating a truly unforgettable experience.

We proudly offer our own bespoke audio and lighting service, ensuring a complete and impeccably professional presentation. If you seek to engage one of Rome’s most distinguished wedding and party bands, look no further than The Big Waves. Enquire with us today to make your event an unparalleled masterpiece.

venice-dj-italy.intro_html:
About The Venice DJ – A refined purveyor of sonic artistry, based in Venice, Italy

An exquisite journey into sound began at the age of eight, when the ivory keys of a classical piano first awakened an innate musical sensibility. This early enchantment blossomed into a bespoke exploration of genres—from the infectious pulse of Dance and the groove-laden rhythms of Funk to the timeless allure of 70’s Music.

During those formative years, the tactile warmth of vinyl records became a curated treasure trove of inspiration, guiding him through a mesmerising auditory odyssey. It was amidst this era that he first stepped behind the turntables, weaving a distinct fusion of rhythm and energy into intimate gatherings—a prelude to an impeccable trajectory.
venice-dj-italy.description_html:
The year 1980 marked a pivotal moment of ascension: The Venice DJ took the stage at the illustrious Scarpantibus, then the preeminent nightclub of the Friuli Venezia Giulia region. This colossal venue, capable of hosting up to 5,000 discerning revelers, served as the refined launchpad for his distinguished career. For over seven dynamic years, he held the mantle of Resident DJ, orchestrating the auditory landscape with masterful precision.

A climactic chapter unfolded in the breathtaking setting of Cortina d’Ampezzo, where from 1987 to 1992 he cast his sonic spell upon the exclusive clientele of the prestigious Bilbó club. This era marked a zenith, propelling his artistry to unprecedented heights.

The Venice DJ’s magnetic presence has graced the hallowed halls of renowned Italian venues—Amnesia, Biblos, Le Capannine, King’s River Club, and Area Cortina—each infused with his unique sonic signatures. Beyond Italy, his global reach extended to Ibiza’s HUB SPACE and George Amsterdam during ADE, solidifying his reputation as a paragon of DJ prowess.

Throughout this exquisite journey, he has honed his craft across an array of genres—classic house, tech-house, deep-house, and Dance—each note and beat a testament to unwavering commitment. His indelible imprint on the canvas of music continues to resonate, inspire, and ignite dance floors worldwide.

tuscan-tale-folk-pistoia-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscan Tale – An Italian Folk Ensemble of Unrivaled Refinement, Based in Pistoia, Italy

We are The Tuscan Tale—a curated ensemble of musicians united by a shared reverence for the timeless allure of Italian swing and folk music. Years of collaboration have forged not merely a band, but an intimate musical family; each performance is an invitation into our home, where every note resonates with warmth and authenticity.

Our deepest pleasure lies in recreating the enchanting ambiance of classic Italian gatherings—those exquisite evenings where abundant food and flowing wine accompany the joyful sound of clapping, singing, and laughter. We are regularly commissioned as an Italian folk band for weddings and exclusive events at prestigious venues such as Villa la Massa in Florence and Maniero Montecassiano in Macerata, Italy.
tuscan-tale-folk-pistoia-italy.description_html:
At the heart of our artistry is the emotion that music evokes—a feeling of nostalgia, connection, and refined soulfulness, especially through the beloved songs of our heritage. Our repertoire is a meticulously curated selection of classic tunes in Neapolitan, Sicilian, and Roman dialects—melodies that echo across generations and borders, made iconic by legends like Dean Martin and Frank Sinatra, yet rendered with an intimate, personal touch.

We preserve an impeccably authentic sound by employing traditional instruments deeply rooted in Italian musical culture: the guitar, mandolin, and accordion form our core. When a grander or more rhythmic expression is desired, we introduce bass and drums, elevating the energy without sacrificing sophistication. Whether performing at an intimate family celebration or a grand international event, our mission remains the same: to share an essence of Italian soul and unite discerning guests through the pure joy of music.

The Two Violins presents an impeccably curated musical experience, brought to life by two distinguished Italian virtuosos based in Puglia. United by a shared passion discovered in their youth, these accomplished musicians dedicated themselves to years of rigorous formal training. Their reputation precedes them, built not only on extraordinary technical virtuosity but also on an impeccable sense of aesthetic presentation. Their elegant attire and harmonious stage presence reflect a duality of passion—equally devoted to musical excellence and a refined sense of style.

The Two Violins curate a journey through sound, from poignant classical compositions that stir the soul to contemporary arrangements infused with a modern sensibility. They flawlessly bridge the gap between tradition and innovation, offering unique interpretations that are profoundly captivating.

Every performance radiates an air of exclusive enchantment, transforming weddings and high-profile events into truly magical, immersive experiences. They bring an unmistakable touch of Italian charm—a bespoke blend of elegance, talent, and grace—to every occasion they honor.

With their harmonious melodies and fashionable flair, The Two Violins continue to captivate a discerning international clientele, leaving an enduring legacy of sophistication and musical brilliance in the world of refined entertainment.

dj-maurice-lucca-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
DJ Maurice – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Based in Versilia, Italy

What discerning clients most appreciate about DJ Maurice: impeccable communication, bespoke playlists, an intuitive ability to read the room, dance floors filled with energy, and a flawless blend of professionalism and flexibility.

A master of his craft, DJ Maurice is celebrated throughout Tuscany and across Italy. His passion for music was ignited in childhood, when records were his most cherished gifts and he would spend entire days immersed in their melodies. At twenty, he began refining his artistry in neighbourhood clubs before transitioning into the world of private events and weddings, where he now specializes in curating unforgettable experiences for international couples.

His remarkably adaptable nature ensures every client’s vision is realised with precision. He is regularly invited to perform at the most distinguished venues in the region, including Borgo Stomennano in Siena, Villa Le Capanne in Volterra, and Villa Lena in Pisa.
dj-maurice-lucca-tuscany-italy.description_html:
What truly sets Maurice apart from other professional DJs in Tuscany is his rich musical background and extraordinary versatility. With a vast repertoire spanning diverse genres, he intuitively discerns the desires of his clients from the very first conversation and crafts a sonic journey that resonates with every guest. Unlike many DJs who focus solely on the couple’s preferences while neglecting the atmosphere of the room, Maurice cares deeply for everyone present. “Reading the crowd” is essential to his philosophy—he believes music should evoke emotion without the need for constant commentary. As he himself notes, “Talking over the songs is annoying; it’s like talking when you’re watching a movie in the theatre,” and he therefore uses the microphone with the utmost restraint.

His ultimate reward is witnessing guests lose themselves in the music he performs. Every set is meticulously personalised to dazzle and delight. From the moment you agree upon your shared vision, his presence ensures the perfect soundtrack for your celebration—a curated blend of emotion, energy, and elegance.

Notable for his unwavering positivism, Maurice remains consistently upbeat and engaging. His musical expertise allows him to cover virtually every genre, effortlessly weaving together styles to suit the moment. He regularly works with couples from around the world who choose Italy as the backdrop for their nuptials, and he is renowned for his ease of collaboration and flexible approach to music—happily incorporating any playlist or style to make the evening feel precisely right.

Maurice provides a complete, refined setup for every event: a professional-grade DJ system featuring a Pioneer mixer, dancing lights, pristine microphones, powerful speakers, and more. For an added layer of sophistication, he can be booked alongside a live saxophonist—perfect for elevating the cocktail hour or igniting the dance floor with an extra touch of brilliance.

He is always delighted to discuss his style or arrange a brief call to ensure a seamless fit. Input and musical suggestions from the couple are warmly welcomed—he wishes for the night to sound exactly as it should, impeccable in every detail.

Distinguished Past Clients

  • Louis Vuitton
  • Terre di Canossa
  • Garmin
  • Maserati
  • Benetti Yachts

led-violinist-rome-italy.intro_html:
The LED Violinist — An Exquisite Musical Presence for Your Most Celebrated Occasion

Based in Rome and hailing from the sun-drenched region of Salento, The LED Violinist is a virtuoso violinist and producer of unparalleled versatility. His curated repertoire spans an exquisite array of musical styles — from jazz, house, and techno to folk, pop, classical, and the evocative traditions of Balkan music — ensuring each performance is a bespoke auditory journey. In January 2009, together with esteemed DJ and producer Cristian Carpentieri, he founded a record label that rapidly ascended to become one of Italy's most distinguished tech-house imprints. During this period, he collaborated with Alex Dimitri on the album Alex Dimitri South Soul (released by BBE Records), working alongside revered vocalists Barbara Tucker and Inaya Day in composition and arrangement. The LED Violinist is a regular presence at the illustrious Rome Cavalieri Waldorf Astoria Hotel, where his performances grace the most refined weddings and private celebrations.
led-violinist-rome-italy.description_html: A significant partnership includes his contributions to feature film and short film soundtracks for Rai, Sky, and Telethon in collaboration with OutCinema. From 2010 to 2018, he performed as a member of an internationally celebrated world music ensemble, one of the most acclaimed in Italy and across the globe. For more than a decade, he has shared the stage with luminaries such as Cesare Cremonini, Carmen Consoli, Paolo Fresu, Sergio Cammariere, Dolcenera, and many others, performing as a turnist. His live presence extends to Italy's most prestigious venues — including BluBay in Castro Marina, Hollywood in Milan, and Kinki in Bologna — where he has performed alongside internationally acclaimed DJs such as Sven Vath, Pirupa, Christian Marchi, and Tommy Vee. His ongoing work as an arranger and composer encompasses orchestrations and transcriptions for a diverse array of musical ensembles, as well as the creation of refined audio works for theatre, dance, jingles, and advertising. In September 2019, he founded an innovative course in Singing and Musical Disciplines at the Accademia Artisti di Roma, one of Italy's most prestigious institutions for artistic and cultural training, where he serves as artistic and musical director. The academy's distinguished faculty includes Guillermo Mariotto, Annalisa Minetti, Eleonora Giorgi, Grazia di Michele, Luca Pitterai, Maria Grazia Fontana, Fabrizio Palma, and other notable figures.

capri-sax-dj-italy.intro_html:
Capri Sax – An Exquisite Saxophonist & DJ, Curated from the Enchanting Isle of Capri

A graduate of the illustrious Niccolò Piccinni Conservatory of Bari, Capri Sax refined his artistry to an impeccable standard, earning his distinction at the age of twenty-three. Now residing upon the breathtaking Island of Capri, he balances his role as a refined elementary school music educator with that of a consummate performer—captivating discerning audiences with the soulful voice of his saxophone. His versatility knows no borders: available for bespoke engagements across Italy and on international stages, each note is a masterful testament to his lifelong dedication, crafting an immersive and unforgettable auditory experience. He is regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive celebrations at the prestigious Marina Grande in Capri.
capri-sax-dj-italy.description_html: A coveted presence at the most distinguished weddings and events on Capri Island and the Amalfi Coast, Capri Sax elevates every occasion with his soul-stirring performances. His artistry has resonated through the most refined cities of Italy—Bari, Ravello, Rome, Sorrento, and Venice—leaving an indelible impression wherever his saxophone takes centre stage. With a harmonious synthesis of impeccable skill and profound passion, he continues to enrich the musical landscape, ensuring an enduring legacy of elegance and sonic perfection.

florence-harp-collective-italy.intro_html:
The Florence Harp Collective – An Ensemble of Exquisite Wedding Harpists, Based in Tuscany, Italy

The Florence Harp Collective is universally celebrated as the most refined gathering of professional wedding harpists in northern Italy. Their impeccable artistry graces hundreds of weddings, corporate soirées, and private celebrations each year, each performance a curated masterpiece. Every harpist is a distinguished graduate of Europe’s most revered music conservatoires, bringing a refined virtuosity to every note. Their expansive repertoire spans bespoke pop arrangements, timeless classical compositions, and enchanting Disney themes—an exquisite selection for any discerning celebration.

Whether you seek a single harpist or an ensemble of unparalleled grace, the finest wedding harpists Tuscany has to offer are at your service. They are regularly engaged for weddings and events at legendary venues such as The Colosseum in Rome, Castello di Montegufoni in Montespertoli, and Abbazia di San Galgano in Siena—each performance an impeccable addition to an unforgettable day.

italian-love-trio-bologna-italy.intro_html:
Italian Love Trio – an exquisite acoustic trio hailing from Bologna, Italy, comprising a female vocalist alongside keyboard or guitar, violin, and vocals. This refined ensemble curates the perfect ambience for every distinguished moment of your celebration.

From the aperitivo through dinner and into the most intimate lounge hours, the Italian Love Trio delivers impeccable entertainment, weaving romantic Italian melodies and classic American ballads that touch the hearts and souls of their audience. Their music paints a bespoke backdrop, enhancing the emotions of your most cherished day.

The trio is available for ceremonies and cocktail hours, and is delighted to perform requested pieces for the entrance and conclusion of the ceremony. Their performances typically span two hours, though this is gracefully tailored to the client’s needs during the booking process—whether presented as a single refined set or several shorter interludes with elegant pauses. During any break, the atmosphere remains uninterrupted, as the band plays background music through their own system, ensuring a seamless flow of enchantment throughout the event. Please note that after-party services are not offered; all necessary equipment is provided by the ensemble.
