dj-val-gaeta-italy.intro_html:
DJ Val – An Exquisite Wedding DJ & Master of Ceremonies from Gaeta, Italy

Hailing from the enchanting coastal haven of Gaeta, Italy, DJ Val has been a distinguished luminary in the musical landscape since 2004. Renowned for his impeccable ability to weave every genre into a seamless tapestry of sound, he brings a wealth of refined experience to weddings, intimate celebrations, corporate galas, and exclusive club soirées. His curated artistry is regularly sought for events at the illustrious Villa Brasini in Rome.
dj-val-gaeta-italy.description_html:
Beyond his virtuosity as a DJ, DJ Val possesses the rare capacity to serve as a master of ceremonies—elevating each precious moment with eloquence and flair. His professional acumen has carried him across Italy’s most prestigious venues, cementing his status as a coveted entertainer for discerning clientele. There are no prescribed set lengths or limitations; every performance is bespoke, tailored to the unique rhythm of each affair. For those seeking an even more opulent experience, additional refined elements may be included alongside the DJ: the soaring notes of a saxophone, the lush resonance of a violin, the percussive pulse of live percussion, or the ceremonial grace of a celebrant, among other luxuries.

DJ Val arrives at the venue one to two hours prior to the performance—a standard of punctuality that ensures a flawless setup and soundcheck. His equipment requires merely a two-meter-by-two-meter space, adaptable to both indoor and outdoor settings, allowing for an effortless integration into any elegant environment.

milan-dancers-italy.intro_html:
The Milan Dancers – An Exquisite Ensemble of World‑Class Performers, Based in Milan, Italy

The Milan Dancers is a refined, professional cast that commands stages across the globe, specialising in impeccably curated Dinner Shows. A constellation of dancers, vocalists, and distinguished performers—including musicians, aerialists, fire artists, clowns, and more—will animate and elevate your evening, crafting a bespoke format tailored exclusively to your event. From the timeless allure of Parisienne and retro elegance to the vibrant pulse of contemporary fashion and pop, and further into the evocative traditions of Spanish and Amazonian cultures, every performance is a journey of curated artistry. The company is regularly engaged for weddings and elite events at the prestigious Fiera Milano.

Select your favoured themes—or several—and we shall conceive the perfect, bespoke spectacle for your occasion. Over recent years, the ensemble has graced the most distinguished clubs, luxury wedding celebrations, and corporate galas across Europe. The sheer breadth of the repertoire, the depth of the artist pool, and an extraordinary versatility in creating tailor‑made shows for every setting form the hallmarks of this exceptional company.

Services Offered (booked individually or as a harmonious combination):

  • Dancers
  • Singers
  • Musicians (Sax, Trumpet, Percussions)
  • Performers (Aerialists, Fire artists, Burlesque, Circus artists)
  • DJ

sonicstrum-dj-wedding-france.intro_html:
About SonicStrum DJ – an impeccably refined DJ & singing guitarist, nestled in the exclusive French Alps

SonicStrum DJ’s exquisite musical journey began at the age of fourteen, fingerpicking his guitar and curating intimate house-party sets for friends. This bespoke odyssey carried him across Europe’s most distinguished stages—from premier festivals to private clubs—before finding its serene home in the French Alps, where he now resides with his family and wellspring of inspirations.

Rooted in the pure emotion of an acoustic guitar, SonicStrum DJ’s teenage strums laid the foundation for a refined artistry. His seamless transition into DJing saw him blend the soul of the guitar with the electric pulse of the dance floor, crafting a sound that is both deeply personal and universally captivating.

During his twenties, SonicStrum DJ’s curated beats resonated through Europe’s most esteemed venues—festivals, clubs, and bars alike. The settings may change, but his unwavering ability to unite discerning audiences through music remains a hallmark of his impeccable craft.

Now settled in the French Alps, SonicStrum DJ channels the serenity of the mountains into his signature style, capturing nature’s tranquillity alongside the kinetic energy of dance music. Beyond the decks, he finds harmony in family life—supported by his wife, daughter, and loyal dog—discovering a boundless source of inspiration that elevates every performance. His heart beats for Fleetwood Mac, house music, road biking, and skiing, infusing each set with a diverse palette of passions.

SonicStrum DJ’s enduring mission is to ignite dance floors with unwavering energy, from guitar strings to electronic beats. His journey inspires us all to find exquisite harmony in life’s diverse melodies.

Willing to journey across the country, The Siena Harpist & Singer frequently performs at weddings, private soirées, and corporate galas throughout Italy. tuscany-wedding-choir.intro_html:
The Tuscany Wedding Choir – an exquisite, bespoke choral ensemble based in the heart of Tuscany, Italy

Regarded as one of the most refined choirs available for hire across Italy and throughout Europe, The Tuscany Wedding Choir offers an impeccable auditory experience. Their curated performances extend beyond weddings to include exclusive corporate events, private soirées, and distinguished charity galas. For those seeking the finest wedding gospel choir Italy has to offer, this ensemble represents the pinnacle of sophistication. They are frequently engaged for ceremonies and celebrations at the revered Eremo di San Galgano in Siena, Italy.
tuscany-wedding-choir.description_html:
The standard configurations are as follows:

  • An ensemble of eight singers accompanied by piano
  • An ensemble of four singers accompanied by piano

The choir is typically composed of either four voices (two male, two female) or eight voices (four male, four female), complemented by a pianist or organist – a bespoke arrangement tailored to the most discerning clientele.

dj-du-florence-italy.intro_html:
DJ Du — An Exquisite Wedding & Private Event Maestro, Based in Florence, Italy

An introduction to DJ Du, your refined wedding curator in Italy. His journey began in the nation’s most distinguished clubs, holding prestigious residences at Paradiso in Rimini, Pascia’ and Peter Pan in Riccione, Tendenza in Siena, and Pepero and You in Porto Cervo. The latter—an establishment frequented by the international jet set, with guests including Morgan Freeman, Beyoncé, Cindy Crawford, Craig David, Janet Jackson, and many others—epitomises the exclusive circles in which he operates.

His impeccable career has extended beyond Italy to France, Switzerland, and Dubai, where he seamlessly alternates between club engagements and the most discerning private soirées. He is regularly booked to orchestrate the musical atmosphere at Villa Le Bolli in Siena and Villa Castelletto in Sinalunga, Italy—venues synonymous with elegance and prestige.

DJ Du has collaborated with esteemed fashion houses such as Loro Piana and Alberta Ferretti, further underscoring his bespoke approach to entertainment. In recent years, he has devoted his artistry exclusively to private celebrations and weddings, working extensively throughout Tuscany. His curated performances have graced iconic locations including Borgo Divino, Tenuta Corbinaia, Villa Apparita, and I Bonsi, among others. Having performed across the globe, he is adept at engaging cosmopolitan audiences and adapts with refined versatility to an exquisite range of musical genres.

wedding-band-naples-crazy-cats.intro_html:
The Crazy Cats – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Naples, Italy

The Crazy Cats is an impeccably curated collective of professional musicians and vocalists, dedicated to orchestrating every musical detail of your wedding with refined elegance, decades of experience, and unparalleled flexibility. Since 1999, this ensemble has devoted itself to delivering bespoke musical experiences for events of every kind, from soul-stirring ballads during the ceremony to exuberant performances that elevate the celebration afterward. United by an authentic passion for music and performance, the group offers a fully adaptive configuration, performing as an intimate duo or trio or expanding to a magnificent big band—ensuring precisely the ensemble your occasion deserves.
wedding-band-naples-crazy-cats.description_html: 2019 marks The Crazy Cats’s twentieth anniversary, a milestone that speaks to their extraordinary talent and enduring artistry. The group tailors its size exclusively to you and your event, and will travel to your chosen destination with the utmost professionalism. Their repertoire is a curated selection spanning eras and genres, featuring beloved hits that resonate with every guest. Upon request, they also provide an exquisite DJ service, seamlessly extending the evening’s enchantment. With a song for every soul, The Crazy Cats ensures that guests of all ages are moved to the dance floor. Currently esteemed as one of Italy’s most sought-after wedding and party bands, this refined ensemble offers an experience of unmatched quality.

wedding-band-naples-crazy-cats.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Our performances are tailored to the flow of the event rather than fixed “gig” timing.

We don’t follow a traditional 2×60 or 3×40 structure — instead, we curate live music throughout the key moments of your day, ensuring energy, elegance and atmosphere are seamless from start to finish.

If needed, we can completely reshape the show, tailoring every element to the event itself.

In addition to the live band performance, we also provide music for the civil ceremony or traditional wedding ceremony with harp, piano and violin.

We can also take care of the aperitif moments with sax, DJ and live percussion — in short, there are countless combinations and artistic solutions that can make any type of celebration truly extraordinary.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes, The Crazy Cats offers multiple curated line-ups.

From intimate piano & strings, to roaming acoustic ensembles, to full live band + DJ sets.

All musicians are part of our core team — selected, trained and styled to ensure a consistent The Crazy Cats  experience.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Absolutely.

We provide a professional sound system with a certified audio engineer and, when required, a lighting package to enhance the atmosphere — including moving heads, LED bars and ambient uplighting.

For destination weddings, we can also coordinate premium local suppliers if preferred.


</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes.

Our team can manage music transitions with curated playlists, and we offer a DJ option for the party moments.

DJ + live musicians (sax, percussion, violin) is one of our signature experiences.


</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We typically arrive 2–3 hours before guest arrival.

For production-heavy events or multi-area setups, we arrive earlier to ensure everything is perfectly prepared.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Depending on the formation, 60–120 minutes.

Our setup is quiet and elegant — we coordinate with the planner and venue to ensure no disruption to your atmosphere or décor.


</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Of course.

We love personalising your musical experience,  your first dance or a special request can be arranged and performed live.


</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- It depends on the chosen formation:

Duo / Trio: from approx. 2×3m

Full band: from approx. 4×6m

That said, one of our signature experiences is our Roaming Band — a fully mobile, immersive performance with musicians performing among your guests rather than on a stage.

This option requires no fixed performance space, making it ideal for:

Boutique weddings or intimate events

Venues with limited space

Outdoor and unconventional layouts

Moments where you want energy and interaction without a “band setup”

The Roaming Band creates a luxury, spontaneous atmosphere — high engagement, minimum footprint, maximum elegance.


</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes, full PLI coverage and certified, tested equipment.

We work regularly with high-end venues, both in Italy and internationally.


</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Absolutely.

We perform in villas, vineyards, historic estates, luxury hotels, terraces on the Amalfi Coast, private islands and destination venues worldwide.

We simply ask for weather-safe staging and power access — we will assist with technical planning.</details>

puglia-wedding-pianist-taranto-italy.intro_html:
About Puglia Wedding Pianist – an exquisite, professionally trained pianist based in Taranto, Italy

Puglia Wedding Pianist is a highly sought-after virtuoso, curating impeccable performances for weddings and elite events across the enchanting region of Puglia. His refined artistry and spectacular renditions of the most requested pieces have earned him a reputation for unparalleled elegance.

Born in Taranto in the summer of 2000, he began his studies at the age of seven and has since become one of the most distinguished choices for wedding music in Puglia. His engagements regularly include exclusive ceremonies and receptions at the prestigious Popilia Country Resort in Calabria and the esteemed Masseria Don Luigi in Fasano, Italy.
puglia-wedding-pianist-taranto-italy.description_html:
After years of dedicated study under some of Italy’s most accomplished tutors, perfecting every nuance of the piano, he graduated with distinction from Tarantino University in Piano Performance. Performing at weddings and events is but one facet of his career—he approaches each occasion with passion and an unwavering commitment to excellence.

When not enchanting wedding guests, he is in demand for studio sessions and live performances alongside some of Italy’s most celebrated artists. For his bespoke performances, the Puglia Wedding Pianist arrives approximately thirty minutes before his start time, allowing a refined fifteen-minute setup to ensure every detail is immaculate.

Song requests are graciously accepted for a special aisle walk or first dance—whether before or after dinner—provided the piece is agreed upon in advance. As long as suitable cover from the elements is available, he can perform either indoors or outdoors, requiring only a space generous enough to accommodate his piano with grace.

As the finest wedding pianist in Italy, his calendar is exceptionally exclusive; early booking is most strongly recommended to secure an experience of impeccable luxury.

violinist-bari-laura.intro_html:
The Italy Violinist – An Exquisite Violinist Based in Bari, Italy

The Italy Violinist, an exceptionally refined performer based in Bari, curates bespoke entertainment for the most distinguished occasions. Her impeccable artistry and extensive experience transform every event into an unforgettable masterpiece. The 2026 Set List offers a curated repertoire of musical excellence.

Based near Bari, The Italy Violinist performs across Italy for weddings, private celebrations, and corporate affairs, with a willingness to travel to any venue. She performs alongside and manages Sparkle Strings, one of Italy’s most distinguished acoustic and electric string ensembles, reserved exclusively for luxury events. She is regularly engaged for weddings and events at esteemed venues such as Villa Eva on the Amalfi Coast in Ravello, Chiostro dei Domenicani in Lecce, Masseria Casale del Murgese in Savelletri, and Corte dei Messapi in Ostuni, Italy.

The Italy Violinist’s extensive repertoire spans multiple eras and genres, from classical, jazz, and soul to pop, funk, and house—an impeccably refined collection. She frequently collaborates with Italy’s most esteemed DJs, crafting truly unique performances that captivate discerning audiences. The Italy Violinist remains one of Italy’s most celebrated violinists, an impeccable choice for the most sophisticated events.

milan-harpist-weddings-italy.intro_html:
The Milan Harpist – an exquisite, professional wedding harpist based in Milan, Italy, offering an impeccably refined musical experience for the most discerning celebrations.

A distinguished harpist with extensive mastery in the Events and Entertainment sector, she brings unparalleled sophistication to destination weddings. Her artistry is rooted in a formidable education: graduating with distinction from the renowned N. Paganini Conservatory of Genoa and further refining her craft at the Fondazione Scuola di Musica di Fiesole under the esteemed guidance of Prof. Claudia Antonelli. This impeccable training has forged a versatile and accomplished musician of the highest calibre.

Her career is adorned with prestigious accolades, including First Prize at the Moneglia Music Performance Competition and Second Prize at the International Competition of Spotorno, as well as performances with the Orchestre des Jeunes de la Méditerranée—a testament to her exceptional talent.

Her curated repertoire spans classical, pop, and jazz genres, offering bespoke selections that captivate diverse audiences and ensure an unforgettable, luxurious ambiance for every event.

The Milan Harpist is regularly booked to perform for weddings and exclusive events at Villa Silver on Lake Como and Castello di Petrata in Perugia, Italy—venues synonymous with elegance and romance.
milan-harpist-weddings-italy.description_html:
She can also perform as a harpist and violinist duo, adding an extra layer of refinement to any occasion.

Ceremony: She arrives one hour before the ceremony to set up and provide a soft, enchanting musical backdrop as guests take their seats. The ceremony repertoire is fully customizable to your preferences, and she is delighted to learn pieces beyond her usual repertoire—a service she frequently offers to ensure a perfectly personal touch.

Cocktail Hour: Following the ceremony, she transitions seamlessly to the cocktail area, providing music while guests enjoy curated beverages. Her modern selections and flexible timing ensure the melody continues without interruption until guests move to the dining area, never prematurely ceasing.

First Dance: Should you wish her to remain for the first dance, overnight accommodations for two are required. Please account for this additional expense to include her performance for this cherished moment.

She plays a Camac Grand Blue Harp, an instrument renowned for its exceptional sound quality and visual allure, embodying the pinnacle of acoustic artistry. Performances may be enhanced with amplification using her own equipment or an external service, offering bespoke flexibility for each event’s unique acoustic needs. She is fluent in English and French, ensuring seamless, refined communication with an international clientele.

Career Highlights

  • Numerous awards and scholarships, including a merit-based scholarship from the Fondazione Scuola di Musica di Fiesole.
  • Extensive concert experience in Italy and abroad, performing in prestigious venues such as the Concertgebouw in Amsterdam and the Konzerthaus in Berlin.
  • Collaborations with notable orchestras, including the Sanremo Symphony Orchestra, Savona Symphony Orchestra, and Genoa Philharmonic Orchestra.
  • Performances at significant festivals and events, such as the Ravenna Festival, MiTo SettembreMusica, and the La Milanesiana Festival.
  • Innovative projects, including producing NFTs of original compositions and modern pieces for electroacoustic harp with the use of a loop station.
  • Her recent album, “The Sound of the Soul,” features a selection of classic and contemporary pieces, as well as original works dedicated to her by composer Michele Gentilini.

The Milan Harpist is currently available for bookings across a curated selection of event types in Italy, including weddings, corporate events, private parties, and concerts—each experience crafted with exquisite attention to detail.

italian-wedding-guitarist.intro_html:
The Italian Wedding Guitarist – An Exquisite Presence for Your Celebrations

Based in the heart of Tuscany, The Italian Wedding Guitarist is a highly sought-after presence at distinguished events and celebrations across Italy and beyond. Francesco's refined classical repertoire encompasses an impeccably curated selection of the most beloved wedding compositions, from timeless classics to contemporary treasures.

For those who seek the finest guitarist Italy has to offer for their most cherished occasion, an enquiry is warmly welcomed. Regular engagements include weddings and events at some of Italy's most prestigious venues, including Castelnuovo di Garfagnana in Lucca, La Terrazza del Chiostro Corso il Rossellino in Pienza, and Villa d'Elsa in Florence.

night-shift-wedding-band-rome-italy.intro_html:
The Night Shift – an exquisite, curated wedding and party band based in the timeless city of Rome, Italy. Their refined artistry and impeccable versatility have earned them a distinguished reputation among the most sought-after wedding bands in Rome.

Couples consistently laud The Night Shift for their exceptional talent and versatility, seamless communication and meticulous planning, live music that accompanies every moment from ceremony to reception, gracious flexibility with special requests, and the ability to fill the dance floor with an irresistible, celebratory atmosphere.

The Night Shift is the quintessential choice for your wedding festivities. Their curated repertoire features an exquisite selection of lounge, bossa nova, and jazz tunes, performed in both vocal and instrumental renditions. The ensemble also traverses the golden eras of 1960s Soul, Motown, and R&B, through to the disco, dance, and funk anthems of the 1970s and 1980s. The Night Shift is regularly engaged to perform at prestigious weddings and events at Tenuta Mocajo in Pisa, Italy.

Beyond these classic genres, the band masterfully interprets contemporary Pop dance hits, alongside a handpicked selection of timeless pop and rock classics. Their performance seamlessly accompanies every phase of your wedding reception – from the refined, mellow jazz ambiance during cocktail hour to an irresistible groove that ensures a magnificently packed dance floor.

Celestial Funk – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Band, Based in Rome, Italy

Hailing from the eternal city of Rome, Celestial Funk assembles a curated ensemble of exceptional musicians, each possessing a distinguished foundation in both national and international show business. Their meticulously crafted repertoire—an energetic, refined, and effortlessly cool selection of beloved songs—traverses the genres of Soul, Funk, Rock, and Dance. Formed exclusively to provide impeccable entertainment for weddings, galas, corporate events, and private soirées, the band guarantees a performance of the highest caliber within an elegantly appointed setting.

The musicians of Celestial Funk have graced the stage alongside some of the most celebrated names in the music industry. Esteemed collaborations include Queen, Brian May, Anastacia, Planet Funk, BBC, Dolce & Gabbana, Fendi, Trussardi, Bulgari, Harmont & Blaine, Colmar, David Zard, Giuliano Peparini, Dave Foster, Bobby Kymbal, Snap, Alex Britti, Max Gazzè, Ted Neely, Riccardo Cocciante, George Fenton, Pascal Obispo, and numerous other prestigious partnerships. nostalgia-big-band-verona-bologna-italy.intro_html:
Nostalgia Big Band – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Curated for Discerning Celebrations in Verona & Bologna, Italy

Presenting Nostalgia, an impeccably refined Big Band devoted to the art of Jazz & Swing. Our repertoire is a bespoke tribute to the timeless classics of Sinatra, Bublé, and Martin.

View the complete range of wedding bands in Italy

Comprising eleven extraordinary musicians, the ensemble conjures the luminous charm of big band jazz and swing, performing the songs that have defined an era. With a rich, brassy sound of unparalleled quality, we orchestrate an unforgettable atmosphere for your most cherished occasion. We are regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at Podere Casellaccia in Tuscany.

Offering a refined repertoire, we bring the magic of swing and the enduring nostalgia of jazz to every event. The power of our horn section, the finesse of our rhythm section, and the charisma of our vocalist transform any celebration into an exquisite, unforgettable experience.

Line-Up:

  • Male Vocalist – A charismatic performer embodying the style and allure of Frank Sinatra, Michael Bublé, and Dean Martin.
  • Rhythm Section:
    • Drums
    • Double Bass
    • Piano
    • Guitar
  • Horn Section:
    • 3 Saxophones
    • 2 Trumpets
    • 2 Trombones

nostalgia-big-band-verona-bologna-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 2h, we can split the show in any format. 

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Only backline instruments are included in the price. We need an external sound and light system equipment

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- We only provide background music from laptop

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 3h our before the performance starts for setup and soundcheck

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- We are not able to as all our music is pre arranged for the Big Band.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- We need 6x7 meters more or less

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, no problem.</details>

About Playback Theory – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble Based in Bari, Italy

Since 2011, Playback Theory has graced events with an impeccable, high-energy live performance, transforming every celebration into an unforgettable affair. Renowned across Puglia and throughout Italy, this refined band offers a sound that is both distinctive and universally captivating.

Their curated setlist spans pop, soul, and early 2000s nostalgia, with a signature focus on euphoric 1990s dance anthems—an explosive fusion of international chart-toppers and iconic Italian melodies.
playback-theory-bari-italy.description_html:
Each event becomes a bespoke musical journey, seamlessly weaving moments of heartfelt emotion with exuberant energy, ensuring guests remain enchanted from the first note until the last.

Playback Theory comprises four consummate professional musicians, united by a shared devotion to live performance, delivering a tight groove and a polished, refined sound that elevates every occasion.

Over the years, this distinguished ensemble has shared the stage with luminaries such as Patty Pravo, Ronnie Jones, and Benny Benassi.

With extensive experience and an authentic passion for their craft, they breathe life into every event—leaving a lasting, positive impression upon you and your distinguished guests.

cosmic-noon-showband-florence-italy.intro_html:
Cosmic Noon Showband — An Exquisite Ensemble for Weddings & Celebrations, Based in Florence, Italy

Cosmic Noon Showband is a refined international showband, curated exclusively for the most prestigious venues across Europe. Their impeccable artistry has graced the halls of Hôtel de Paris in Monte-Carlo, the Mandarin Oriental on Lake Como, Villa Miani in Rome, and Villa Cora in Florence. Each performance is a masterful fusion of live musicianship and bespoke DJ energy, delivered by virtuoso artists who have shared the stage with luminaries such as Andrea Bocelli. The result is an unforgettable, immersive experience—elegant, dynamic, and utterly exclusive.

From delicate acoustic sets that accompany afternoon aperitifs, to a luminous ambiance for a refined dinner, or an exhilarating celebration that extends into the night, Cosmic Noon adapts seamlessly to every moment of your occasion. Available as a 4 to 10-piece ensemble, the band offers the flexibility to match the scale of your event while upholding an unwavering standard of sophistication and style.

savvies-dj-live-venice-italy.intro_html:
The Savvies – An Exquisite DJ Live Band, Based in Venice, Italy

Prepare for an evening of impeccable revelry as The Savvies orchestrate an unforgettable dance experience.

Live musicians and curated dance troupes beckon every guest to the floor with irresistible rhythms and captivating soundscapes.

Bespoke to its core, each DJ is also a refined instrumentalist—so do not be surprised when they effortlessly trade the console for a saxophone or drumsticks, joining you in the celebration.

Far more than a live DJ—a truly refined entertainment journey.
savvies-dj-live-venice-italy.description_html:
Founded by Chiara, a globally celebrated vocalist and entertainer devoted to opulent experiences, the ensemble benefits from her managerial acumen. Behind the scenes, she serves as project director and artistic curator for large-scale international events, ensuring every detail is executed with precision.

Chiara has graced major Italian television networks—Mediaset, Rai, and Sky—as a featured performer on multiple national shows.

She collaborates intimately with esteemed global event and wedding planning firms, touring the world’s most prestigious venues across Florida, Indonesia, Qatar, Cyprus, Scotland, Israel, Slovakia, Morocco, Pakistan, Turkey, and beyond.

The ensemble offers a curated selection of configurations to suit any discerning need, crafting a uniquely memorable ambience for your occasion—every element handled with meticulous, artisanal care.

They present the formation that best complements your tastes, both in number of performers and the atmosphere you wish to evoke.

What formation do you seek? The foundational ensemble begins with a refined four-piece setup: DJ, vocalist, saxophone, and percussion. Additional instruments may be added at your request.

The Savvies command a vast repertoire of formations and entertainment proposals, drawing upon an entertainment company that includes acrobats, dancers, performers, magicians, and more—each curated for your exclusive event.

Their standard quotations for events within Italy encompass:

  • Travel expenses
  • Accommodation
  • The opportunity to select bespoke attire from their catalogue
  • Insurance
  • Management of unforeseen circumstances and substitutions
  • An online briefing with clients or planners for direction, lineup details, and event customisation

lombardy-harpist-milan-italy.intro_html:
The Lombardy Harpist – An Exquisite Milanese Virtuoso

Since the age of thirteen, the enchanting resonance of the harp has captivated my soul. My journey began within the hallowed halls of the conservatorium during my high school years, where I refined my artistry and cultivated a profound reverence for this most refined of instruments.

Now based in the luminous city of Milan, my purpose is to bestow the harp’s ethereal melodies upon weddings, private soirées, corporate gatherings, and other distinguished occasions. I am regularly commissioned to perform at the esteemed Villa e Fattoria di Radi in Siena and the impeccable Villa Catignano in Castelnuovo Berardenga, Italy.
lombardy-harpist-milan-italy.description_html:
My curated repertoire spans popular, modern, and classical compositions, ensuring every audience is both enchanted and enthralled. Each performance is an exquisite fusion of emotional depth and technical mastery — a bespoke experience shaped by the heart.

I am most frequently engaged for wedding ceremonies and cocktail receptions, yet I remain entirely flexible to realise each client’s unique vision.

Ensemble Configurations:

  • Solo Harp
  • Harp & Voice
  • Harp & Violin
  • Harp & Flute
  • Harp & Violin & Voice
  • Harp & Flute & Voice

velvet-riviera-bologna-florence-italy.intro_html:
Velvet Riviera – An Exquisite Luxury Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Bologna & Florence, Italy

We are an impeccably curated live band, devoted exclusively to luxury celebrations and high-end weddings. Every performance is a bespoke auditory journey, crafted for the most discerning clientele. Our refined artistry has graced events for prestigious maisons such as Dior, underscoring our commitment to unparalleled excellence.

Our musicians are not merely session players; each is a dedicated virtuoso who believes wholeheartedly in the project—rehearsing with relentless precision to ensure every note radiates energy, elegance, and perfection.
velvet-riviera-bologna-florence-italy.description_html:
Our vocalists are internationally recognised talents, recipients of major accolades across the globe. One of our lead singers is the winner of Factor Romania, while another is the official voice of Italy’s foremost Queen tribute ensemble. This level of artistry guarantees a performance that is both powerfully stirring and profoundly emotive.

We also take exceptional pride in our in-house costume atelier. Every garment is meticulously designed, tailored, and finished by our team—an ode to refined visual storytelling that complements the musical narrative. The result is a stage presence of breathtaking sophistication.

With a seamless fusion of musical mastery, timeless elegance, and flawless professionalism, we create tailor-made experiences that elevate every occasion into something truly extraordinary.

Curated Line-up Options:

  • 6 PIECES: 2 vocalists, 1 guitarist, 1 saxophonist, 1 drummer, 1 DJ
  • 7 PIECES: 3 vocalists, 1 guitarist, 1 saxophonist, 1 drummer, 1 DJ
  • 8 PIECES: 3 vocalists, 1 guitarist, 1 bassist, 1 saxophonist, 1 drummer, 1 DJ
  • 9 PIECES: 3 vocalists, 1 guitarist, 1 bassist, 1 brass, 1 saxophonist, 1 drummer, 1 DJ
  • 10 PIECES: 4 vocalists, 1 guitarist, 1 bassist, 1 brass, 1 saxophonist, 1 drummer, 1 DJ

  • 12 PIECES: 4 vocalists, 1 guitarist, 1 bassist, 2 brass, 1 saxophonist, 1 drummer, 1 percussionist, 1 DJ
  • 13 PIECES: 4 vocalists, 1 electric violinist, 1 guitarist, 1 bassist, 2 brass, 1 saxophonist, 1 drummer, 1 percussionist, 1 DJ
  • 14 PIECES: 5 vocalists, 1 electric violinist, 1 guitarist, 1 bassist, 2 brass, 1 saxophonist, 1 drummer, 1 percussionist, 1 DJ

glamour-bari-italy.intro_html:
The Glamour – An Exquisite Luxury Showband from Bari, Italy

The Glamour represents the pinnacle of Italian sophistication, seamlessly merging refined elegance with electrifying energy. Conceived in Bari and curated by some of Puglia’s most accomplished musicians, this ensemble delivers a bespoke fusion of impeccable style, precision, and captivating entertainment for weddings and events throughout Italy and beyond.

Forged from over fifteen years of performing at distinguished venues and opulent celebrations, The Glamour elevates the classic party band concept into a full-scale, immersive spectacle. With stunning vocals, a powerful rhythm section, and a sleek stage presence, their performances are crafted to enchant international audiences and ignite dance floors from the first exquisite note to the final crescendo.

Whether your vision is an intimate sunset soirée or a grand, glamorous reception, the band adapts with effortless grace. Configurations range from a refined duo or an acoustic trio to a magnificent six-piece showband featuring male vocals, DJ, drums, guitar, bass, and keyboards—each arrangement curated to create an unforgettable experience. The Glamour also provides tailored sound and lighting solutions, with optional playlist or DJ services between sets. Special requests, such as a bespoke first dance, are prepared with meticulous care. Setup timing varies according to the chosen production design, with arrival scheduled hours in advance—or even the day prior for more elaborate presentations.

From elegant villas and seaside terraces to the stages of luxury hotels, The Glamour performs with supreme confidence in both indoor and outdoor settings, always upholding the highest safety standards for performers and guests. For those who desire a celebration that is stylish, exhilarating, and effortlessly refined, The Glamour delivers a show that lingers in the memory long after the music fades.

Line‑Up Options:

  • 2 members: male vocalist and DJ
  • Acoustic trio: male vocalist, guitar, percussion, and keyboards
  • From 6 members: male vocalist, drums, guitar, bass, keyboards, and DJ
  • Up to 15 members: 3 male vocalists, 3 female vocalists, drums, percussion, bass, guitar, keyboards, saxophone, trumpet, trombone, and DJ

yonder-showband-verona-italy.intro_html:
Yonder Showband – The Epitome of Refined Live Entertainment, Based in Verona, Italy

Yonder Showband is an exquisite live entertainment project conceived for the most distinguished occasions, where music transcends mere ambience to become an integral, unforgettable element of the experience.

Comprising impeccably trained musicians with an illustrious pedigree in live performance, the ensemble orchestrates a refined balance of elegance, rhythm, and energy—each bespoke performance meticulously shaped by the setting, the discerning guests, and the natural cadence of the day.

Their curated sound glides seamlessly through pop, soul, and dance, offering a sophisticated selection of iconic and contemporary compositions, each reimagined with a modern, luminous sensibility.

The musical journey unfolds in perfect harmony with the event’s key moments: from an inviting, stylish backdrop during the aperitif and dinner to a vibrant, high-energy crescendo that elevates the evening into an unforgettable celebration.
yonder-showband-verona-italy.description_html:
Every performance is a singular creation, with setlists crafted in real time to reflect the mood of the guests and the unique atmosphere of the venue.

Yonder Showband is built upon a flexible, modular configuration designed to grace destination weddings, private soirées, and corporate galas throughout Italy and beyond.

The core ensemble features eight professional musicians, including three luminous female lead vocalists, complemented by piano, guitar, saxophone, bass, and drums.

From this impeccable foundation, the band can be expanded with additional artists—male vocalists, a horn section, or other instruments—to perfectly suit the scale and style of any occasion.

A dedicated DJ is also an integral part of the team, ensuring an effortlessly seamless transition from the live performance into an enchanting after-party.

The band collaborates closely with wedding planners, international production houses, and event teams, offering a reliably bespoke service that integrates flawlessly into the most elegant and contemporary settings.

Music is distributed across the distinct phases of the day rather than confined to rigid set times, allowing the performance to evolve naturally from the first exquisite welcome through to the final, lingering note of the night.

Yonder Showband typically arrives two to three hours before the event begins for a meticulous setup and soundcheck, a process that generally requires around two hours depending on the venue and technical specifications.

Audio and lighting are orchestrated in concert with the location and production team to ensure an impeccable result of the highest quality.

The band is always delighted to prepare special song requests for pivotal moments—a first dance, entrances, or cake cutting—infusing every celebration with a deeply personal and memorable refinement.

tango-guitarist-brisighella-italy.intro_html:
About Tango Guitarist – an exclusive wedding guitarist based in Brisighella, Italy

Having honed his artistry through numerous engagements across Spain and beyond, performing with a refined selection of groups, bands, and acoustic ensembles, he is now entirely devoted to the Plays Piazzolla project.

This bespoke endeavour presents the music of Astor Piazzolla—master of Tango Nuevo—through a distinctly personal and contemporary interpretation, rendered with impeccable elegance.

He is regularly curated for weddings and distinguished events at Ristorante Neccio in Pisa, as well as the exquisite regions of Lago di Como, Lago di Garda, and Umbria.
tango-guitarist-brisighella-italy.description_html:
Piazzolla’s Nuevo Tango diverges from traditional tango by embracing elements of jazz and employing dissonances and other innovative techniques. Renowned compositions such as "Oblivion," "Libertango," "Milonga del Angel," "Night Club," "Café 1930," "Tango Final Tema di Maria," and "Tangata del Alba" are interpreted exclusively on the Spanish guitar, infused with the flamenco flair that defines his signature style.

This singular approach renders each piece both original and captivating—whether presented as a concert performance or as an evening of ambient sophistication.

He specialises in solo concerts at the most prestigious resorts and hotels, as well as venues that cherish music of exceptional artistic quality and originality.

The challenge of reimagining Astor Piazzolla’s oeuvre in a manner that is both personal and contemporary, while preserving the flamenco essence that characterises his playing, has brought him profound satisfaction and acclaim in every setting he graces.

diamond-live-singer-milan-italy.intro_html:
Diamond Live – An Exquisite Vocal Artisan Based in Milan, Italy

Diamond Live is a soulful vocalist and refined songwriter residing in Milan, celebrated for her impeccably smooth tone and warm, expressive delivery. Performing with equal mastery in Italian and English, she weaves influences from R&B, pop, and soul into a sound that is at once intimate, elegant, and deeply emotive.

After graduating in Modern Singing in Milan, she devoted herself to perfecting her craft, honing her voice, songwriting, and stage presence through years of performances across the most distinguished venues of Italy and Switzerland.

She began collaborating with esteemed professional musicians at weddings, corporate galas, and luxury celebrations, building a reputation for authenticity and sensitivity in every curated performance.
diamond-live-singer-milan-italy.description_html:
This journey inspired the creation of her own bespoke musical project: a refined live ensemble designed to bring sophisticated pop, soul, funk, and Latin music to life in an elegantly engaging manner. Every performance is tailored to the atmosphere of the occasion, always enhancing the unique character of her voice and forging an unforgettable connection with the audience.

Diamond Live offers flexible lineups ranging from an intimate duo to a full band, with exquisite options such as saxophone, violin, or cello, chosen to evoke the desired mood. Each repertoire is meticulously built around the style of the event, the preferences of the couple or client, and the sentiment they wish to convey.

She works with a professional team capable of providing impeccable sound and lighting, and can also incorporate a seamless DJ set when requested. Owing to her extensive experience, she understands how to support high-level events with serene professionalism, extraordinary attention to detail, and genuine passion.

Performing in exclusive venues and for notable clientele throughout Italy and beyond, she continues to cultivate a reputation for elegance, artistry, and heartfelt performance—bringing a touch of Milanese sophistication to weddings and events of every scale.

Curated Line-up Options:

  • 2 = Voice + Guitar or Piano
  • 3 = Duo + Sax or Cello or Drums
  • 4 = Duo + Sax and Drums + our sound engineer
  • 5 = Quartet + Bass + our sound engineer
  • 7 = Quintet + Cello and Violin + our sound engineer
  • Additional DJ option available on request.

<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 2 hours total

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- The minimum is 6 mq, maximum 24 mq.</details>

mariachi-band-florence-italy.intro_html:
Mariachi In Florence – a distinguished, Florence-based ensemble offering an impeccable traditional Latin Mariachi experience.

Nestled in the heart of Tuscany, Mariachi In Florence curates an authentic sonic journey for the most refined celebrations. This fully roaming, acoustic ensemble is equally suited to intimate gatherings and grand affairs, indoors or al fresco, delivering an atmosphere of unparalleled elegance and joy.

Clad in exquisite traditional attire, the band transports guests to the soul of Mexico with their bespoke Latin American repertoire. Their impeccable musicianship and radiant positivity ensure every event is an extraordinary success.

Mariachi In Florence is frequently engaged for weddings and exclusive events at distinguished venues including Grotta Giusti Spa Resort in Pistoia, Villa Il Poggiale in San Casciano, and The International School of Florence.

Based in Florence, the ensemble performs across Italy and Europe for weddings, private parties, and corporate occasions of the highest order. Their customisable line-up of three to eight musicians can be tailored to your vision, and for larger ‘plugged-in’ events, they provide a full PA system accommodating up to 100 guests.

milan-harpist-sofi.intro_html:
About Sofi Harpist – An Exquisite Wedding Harpist Based in Milan, Italy

Sofi Harpist is an exceptional performer who dedicates her artistry to providing impeccably refined musical accompaniment for the most distinguished occasions. The harp, a truly exquisite instrument, bestows an enchanting and romantic ambience upon any gathering, rendering it the definitive choice for those who seek a spellbinding atmosphere.

With years of experience gracing weddings, private celebrations, and corporate events across Italy, Sofi brings both charisma and consummate professionalism to every performance. Her artistry transforms each event with the magical resonance of the harp, creating an unforgettable sonic tapestry. She is regularly engaged for ceremonies and receptions at the illustrious Villa Serbelloni on Lake Como and the elegant Villa Monastero in Lecco, Italy.

As a seasoned professional, Sofi is eminently adaptable and has collaborated with a refined ensemble of musicians, routinely performing alongside singers, violinists, flautists, and saxophonists. She regularly performs across Milan and throughout Italy and is delighted to travel to your chosen venue.

Among the distinguished locations where she has been engaged for weddings and events are:

  • Villa Serbelloni, Lake Como
  • Villa Cimbrone, Ravello, Italy
  • Villa Monastero, Varenna
  • La Torre di San Marco
  • Hotel la Palma, Lake Maggiore
  • Zoagli, Genoa, Italy

If you seek to engage one of Milan's most refined harpists, your search concludes here with Sofi Harpist.

In Italiano

La scelta dell'arpa come strumento per accompagnare la cerimonia renderà il vostro matrimonio un evento esclusivo, elegante e di successo. Le particolari sonorità dello strumento vi offriranno un viaggio sonoro che renderà indimenticabile il giorno più magico e incredibile della vostra vita.

Sofi Harpist è un'arpista professionista che, per l'atteso giorno delle nozze, vi propone un accompagnamento musicale raffinato, dolce e personalizzabile in base ai vostri desideri. Con le melodie del suo prezioso strumento, farà da sottofondo ai momenti principali del rito, religioso o civile, e durante il ricevimento, rimanendo per sempre nei ricordi di voi sposi e dei vostri ospiti.

Disponibile in tutta Italia per il vostro matrimonio.

Oltre che come solista, ha la possibilità di suonare con altri strumentisti:

  • arpa e canto;
  • arpa e violino;
  • arpa, violino e canto;
  • arpa e flauto;
  • arpa, flauto e canto;
  • arpa e sax.

Sofi si è diplomata all'ISSM Conservatorio "G. Cantelli" di Novara in Arpa, sotto la guida della M° Maria Luisa Bona. Attualmente si dedica a concerti, eventi culturali e matrimoni in tutta Italia. Ha suonato nell'orchestra giovanile del Conservatorio di Novara sotto la guida del M° Giorgio Tagliabue.

Ha collaborato con l'Orchestra Sinfonica delle Terre Verdiane e con il coro Gregorio Magno diretti dal Maestro Mauro Trombetta. Ha partecipato a concorsi e masterclass con Anna Maria Restani, Melinda Felletàr, Isabelle Moretti, Irina Zingg, Mario Falcao, Fabrice Pierre e Park Stickney.

Vanta un ricco curriculum di concorsi, concerti, masterclass, matrimoni ed eventi culturali, esibendosi come solista, in duo e in orchestra. Spinta da una grande passione, sta approfondendo i suoi studi avvicinandosi sempre più alla musicoterapia per accompagnare sedute meditative e sedute di yoga. Collabora con alcuni centri olistici nel nord Italia.

slender-symphony-florence-italy.intro_html:
Slender Symphony – An Ensemble of Unparalleled Elegance, Based in Florence, Italy

Slender Symphony is an exquisitely refined Italian musical experience—a luminous union of classical strings, voice, and acoustic guitar, presented entirely by candlelight within settings of profound intimacy and visual wonder. Born from the artistic vision of vocalist Simone, this bespoke project offers impeccably curated performances for weddings and private celebrations, often staged in the heart of Tuscany or beneath the stars in the breathtaking Italian countryside. The concept is one of pure aesthetic charm, blending musical excellence with atmospheric sophistication, delivering both acoustic purity and refined amplified sets.

The repertoire is a meticulously curated collection of rearranged Italian and international masterpieces. Based in Tuscany, the ensemble is available for discerning events throughout Italy and abroad—perfectly suited for ceremonies, elegant aperitifs, and exclusive pre-wedding evenings. Among these is the signature "Promise Under the Stars" experience, an exquisitely intimate offering designed for destination couples arriving the evening before their wedding. Standard set timings include two sixty-minute sets or three forty-minute sets, all of which can be seamlessly customized to the rhythm of your celebration. Amplification for voice and guitar is included in the arrangement, while amplification for the strings can be discreetly provided at an additional cost. A refined laptop DJ service is included during breaks and after the live performance, ensuring an uninterrupted and immersive atmosphere. For flawless execution, the ensemble arrives two to three hours before the performance. The vocalist and guitarist can master a requested song for a first dance or special moment; if a bespoke string arrangement is desired, this can be composed and performed at an additional cost. Occasional collaborations with DJs or rhythmic elements are welcomed, but exclusively when they enhance the immersive and refined character of the event.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • An intimate solo performance (voice and guitar)
  • A magnificent string quartet with voice and guitar
  • A tailored selection of voice, guitar, and strings, harmonized to perfection

wedding-band-verona-soul-italy.intro_html:
Verona Soul – A Bespoke Wedding & Event Ensemble, Based in Verona, Italy

An exquisite, high-end wedding and party band: Verona Soul. Based in Italy and performing throughout the world, this curated ensemble was conceived and crafted to deliver impeccable music entertainment for weddings and events across Italy and beyond. Ideally suited for refined aperitifs, luxury weddings, and every other type of distinguished occasion.
wedding-band-verona-soul-italy.description_html:
Verona Soul effortlessly traverses the full spectrum of musical genres—from soul and funk to dance, pop, and the latest chart-topping hits. Fronted by some of the industry’s most remarkable female and male vocalists, the band is impeccably prepared to captivate audiences of every disposition and style. A professional rhythm section forms the backbone of this ensemble, ensuring an evening of uninhibited movement, where every guest is invited to groove, dance, and boogie from day into night.

To guarantee the most refined entertainment, Verona Soul does not supply its own sound and lighting equipment; instead, they are pleased to assist in sourcing an external audiovisual company. This arrangement allows the band to focus entirely on enchanting guests, while the AV specialists ensure every note is delivered with flawless clarity. During their breaks, they provide seamless musical continuity via laptop or iPad, sustaining the atmosphere and keeping the dance floor alive.

With a commitment to meticulous preparation, the band arrives at least three hours before the performance begins, allocating approximately one and a half hours for soundcheck. For each event, they are delighted to learn two or three bespoke song requests—such as ceremony and dinner entrance pieces, and a first dance. To perform at their most accomplished, they require a performance space of at least six metres by four metres, whether indoors or outdoors, as they are equally at home in any setting.

Curated Line-Up:

  • Two female lead vocalists
  • Male vocalist
  • Guitarist
  • Bassist
  • Drummer
  • Saxophonist
  • Keyboardist

impressionists-trio-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
The Impressionists – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Trio, Curated from Birmingham, UK & Tuscany, Italy

Presenting The Impressionists, a supremely refined ensemble devoted exclusively to weddings and private celebrations, whose pedigree is forged by decades of impeccable artistry within the music industry.

Fronted by Thomas, a luminary ascending the UK’s Blues, Funk and Soul firmament, this virtuoso has undertaken extensive tours across both the United Kingdom and the United States, supported by Birmingham’s most distinguished session musicians who animate his irresistibly grooving backing band with supreme finesse.

With this calibre of experience, The Impressionists are among the most sought-after ensembles for bespoke wedding receptions in Tuscany.

Also gracing the stage is Ben, an award-winning singer‑songwriter, host of the UK’s longest‑standing open‑mic evening, and a session musician who has opened for icons such as Prince, Red Hot Chili Peppers, John Mayer, Simply Red, and Gregory Porter – a testament to their unparalleled pedigree.

italian-swing-tap-catania-italy.intro_html:
Italian Swing Tap – An Exquisite Fusion of Swing & Tap, Based in Catania, Italy

Italian Swing Tap is a Sicily-based ensemble of exceptional refinement, uniting elegant jazz melodies, spirited swing rhythms, and the magnetic energy of professional tap dance for weddings and private celebrations of the highest calibre.

Conceived as a singular artistic project in Sicily, this curated group seamlessly blends live music and entertainment into an experience that is at once polished, captivating, and richly personal.

Headquartered in Catania, the band comprises seasoned musicians and performers devoted to crafting indelible moments through impeccably live sound.

A defining highlight of their performance is the professional tap dancer, whose dynamic visual artistry infuses each set with an interactive, luminous vitality.

Their repertoire is a refined journey through swing jazz and bossa nova, while classic Italian and international pop songs are reimagined with a fresh, jazz-inspired sensibility. Guests are welcomed into a world where timeless swing favourites and contemporary classics are rendered anew—warm, rhythmic, and imbued with character.

Every performance is entirely live, without pre-recorded tracks, allowing an authentic, intimate connection between the musicians and the audience to flourish. The music is meticulously adapted to each phase of the celebration—from a relaxed aperitivo set to an exuberant evening performance that sustains an atmosphere of effortless sophistication until the final note.

Italian Swing Tap offers a selection of bespoke configurations: an acoustic band, a larger big band, or a full orchestral arrangement, with the option to add a DJ set for the after-party. The wedding package also includes live saxophone during the aperitivo, delicate background music between key moments, and the signature tap dance performance.

With an unwavering dedication to detail and a passion for crafting personalised experiences, Italian Swing Tap collaborates intimately with each couple to compose the perfect soundtrack for their wedding day—ensuring every celebration is one of unique, memorable, and vibrant distinction.

tizi-dj-sax-rome-italy.intro_html:
Tizi DJ Sax — An Exquisite Fusion of Live Saxophone and Curated DJ Artistry, Based in Rome, Italy

With over two decades of refined performance experience, Tizi DJ Sax has graced weddings and exclusive celebrations across the globe. From the most opulent luxury galas to the most intimate of gatherings, he presents a singular one-man spectacle: a seamless interplay of live saxophone and impeccably curated DJ sets. His formal training in classical and jazz, acquired at prestigious conservatories, has led him to perform at high-end events in Geneva, Dubai, Paris, Milan, and the rolling hills of Tuscany.

His distinguished clientele includes such illustrious luxury houses as Prada, Versace, Bulgari, and Moschino. Whether orchestrating an entire day of wedding festivities or crafting the soundtrack for an intimate affair, Tizi DJ Sax delivers a bespoke blend of live instrumentation and disc-jockey mastery.

Bespoke Performance Configurations & Technical Excellence

Flexibility is the hallmark of his offering: from a solo saxophone and DJ set to expanded ensembles enriched by string quartets, vocalists, or dancers.

Signature Package (Single Performer):

  • Live Saxophone & DJ Performance

Curated Audio & Illumination (Optional Enhancements):

Audio

  • 2× RCF ART 912 (for dinner and gala soundscapes)
  • 2× Bose S1 Pro+ (for ceremony and wedding cake moments)
  • 2× Bose L1 Pro 16 (for DJ and saxophone projection)
  • Wireless microphones for speeches

Lighting & Atmospheric FX

  • 1× Chauvet Gig Bar Move
  • 4× Smart Bat (synchronised to the music)
  • 1× LED Bar | 4× PAR LEDs (supplementary illumination)

tuscany-funk-band-arezzo-italy.intro_html:
Tuscany Funk – An Exquisite Ensemble for Weddings & Celebrations, Based in Arezzo, Italy

Experience the refined artistry of Tuscany Funk, a bespoke wedding and party ensemble curated for the most discerning celebrations across Arezzo and beyond. From the very first note, our aperitif sets an impeccable mood with a carefully selected repertoire of Motown, Soul, Funk, R&B, and timeless Jazz/Bossa Nova standards. As the evening unfolds, our live performance elevates the atmosphere with a seamless fusion of dance classics and contemporary hits, ensuring every guest is drawn to the dance floor. We are privileged to be among the distinguished wedding bands in Tuscany.

For your ceremony, we offer an array of refined configurations, from an intimate solo performer to a full quartet, each tailored to your vision. Our spirited marching band provides an original and vibrant accompaniment as guests transition from the cocktail hour to dinner. To sustain the revelry, a curated DJ set delivers a flawless blend of melodies. Our ensemble of nine exceptional musicians—featuring male and female vocals, guitars, keyboards, saxophones, trumpet, trombone, bass, and drums—unites in perfect harmony, crafting an electric ambiance that lingers long after the final dance.

dj-capa-rome-italy.intro_html:
DJ Capa — An Artisan of Sound for Weddings & Exclusive Events, Based in Rome, Italy

DJ Capa is an internationally celebrated DJ and producer whose refined career has traversed the most opulent private soirées to the world’s most illustrious stages. Selected as the official UEFA DJ for EURO 2020 and curator of the sonic atmosphere for the Ryder Cup 2023, he brings an impeccable blend of energy, style, and musical mastery to every bespoke performance.

His signature sound has captivated audiences across the global club circuit, with curated appearances at premier destinations including ADE Amsterdam, WMC during Miami Music Week, New York, Ibiza, London, Düsseldorf, Istanbul, Liverpool, Paris, Kristiansand, Nice, Monaco, Ljubljana, St. Moritz, and Rhodes.

DJ Capa has been entrusted with crafting the auditory landscape for an extraordinary array of global events, luxury brands, and corporate clients—among them Ryder Cup 2023, FIFA EURO 2020, Bulgari, Endemol, Meta, Porsche, Pfizer, Mediaset, Trussardi, BMW, Santander, Ferrari, Avon, Mercedes, BNL Group BNP Paribas, Unicredit, Huawei, British American Tobacco Italia, Camel, Philip Morris, Samsung, Corona, Zoetis by Pfizer, Abbott, and American Express.

For weddings, private celebrations, and exclusive gatherings, DJ Capa delivers an impeccably polished and fluid entertainment experience—curating the perfect auditory journey from refined background melodies to an exuberant dancefloor crescendo. His bespoke lineup options encompass solo DJ, DJ & Sax, DJ & Violin, DJ & Singer, DJ with Sax and Violin, DJ with Sax and Singer, and further configurations, each tailored to the desired ambience and stylistic vision of the client.

He provides his own professional sound and lighting rig, with choices that include up to three audio stations, disco lighting, moving heads, LED PARs, LED bars, smart bats, smoke machines, and lasers. Additionally, DJ Capa seamlessly integrates instrumental interludes between live sets, learns special song requests such as the first dance, and performs with equal elegance in outdoor or unconventional settings—from rustic barns to coastal beaches.

Set durations and performance formats are harmonized directly with each client, ensuring every celebration feels intimately personal, effortlessly seamless, and utterly unforgettable. He typically arrives approximately two hours before the event, allowing one hour for meticulous setup and soundcheck.

Professional, stylish, and brimming with refined energy, DJ Capa is the quintessential choice for couples and clientele seeking a premium, internationally oriented DJ experience.

golden-ticket-bologna-italy.intro_html:
The Golden Ticket — An Exquisite Musical Ensemble for Weddings & Celebrations, Based in Bologna, Italy

The Golden Ticket is a refined musical project conceived with the singular purpose of elevating private events — from the most intimate weddings to distinguished corporate functions and every occasion that calls for impeccable music, whether performed live or through a curated DJ set.

Comprising a collective of consummate professional musicians and entertainment connoisseurs, the ensemble dedicates itself to crafting the perfect atmosphere, tailoring every note of background music, every live performance, and every DJ setlist to the unique tastes and vision of the client.

An array of bespoke configurations is available, from a solo DJ or a DJ accompanied by saxophone, to an intimate piano and voice duo, a five or six-piece band, and culminating in the grand Big Party band — a twelve-piece ensemble delivering a breathtaking and high-energy spectacle.

Throughout the celebration, the band ensures that every moment is accompanied by the most appropriate music, with playlists meticulously curated to harmonise with the mood, the setting, and the precise volume befitting each phase of the affair.

Services:

  • Custom soundtrack for your ceremony (if held on-site)
  • Tailored playlists for background music interludes
  • Personalised tracks for special dedications
  • 60-minute acoustic or aperitif live set
  • 90-minute full live dance performance
  • Table entertainment, upon request
  • 90-minute customisable DJ set
  • Entertainment and support for speeches, games, sketches, or videos orchestrated by your guests
  • Full-day event management

verona-jazz-bossa-band-italy.intro_html:
About Verona Jazz – an exquisite Jazz, Bossa & Swing ensemble based in Verona, Italy

Verona Jazz is a refined jazz and bossa nova collective composed of impeccably trained musicians whose craft is driven by an authentic devotion to their art. Their global performances at celebrated festivals and distinguished events have only deepened their passion for creating bespoke, intimate musical moments—whether upon a grand stage or within a candlelit courtyard, the experience remains profoundly curated.

The ensemble adapts with effortless grace to the distinct atmosphere of each occasion, frequently performing as a trio—either with piano, double bass, and drums, or with guitar elegantly substituting the piano.

When accompanied by their female vocalist, the sonic palette acquires an even warmer, more expressive nuance. The group may also expand into a quartet or quintet for those desiring a fuller, more opulent sound, and they welcome the opportunity to discuss tailored configurations.

Their setlist is a carefully selected anthology of jazz standards, classic bossa nova treasures, and contemporary songs transformed through their signature, unhurried jazz sensibility. The result is a smooth, luxurious sound that cultivates a relaxed yet supremely refined ambiance—ideal for weddings, exclusive dinners, private soirées, or sophisticated corporate gatherings.

Should the event require it, Verona Jazz brings its own premier sound and lighting equipment at an additional cost, arriving approximately two hours before guests to ensure a flawless setup and impeccable acoustics. For a special moment—such as a first dance—they are delighted to consider bespoke requests, assessing each with careful artistry.

Whether indoors or outdoors, in classic ballrooms or distinctive settings like barns, gardens, or seaside terraces, the band is devoted to creating a beautiful musical backdrop—provided the space and conditions are suitably arranged. Performances typically span an hour and a half per set, with a recommended performance area of around five by four meters to accommodate their refined instrumentation comfortably.

At the heart of every performance lies a singular desire: to envelop guests in music that is timeless, smooth, and infused with soul—an experience of pure, elevated emotion.

naples-rhythms-percussionist-italy.intro_html: Naples Rhythms – An Exquisite Percussionist & DJ, Based in Naples & Capri, Italy
naples-rhythms-percussionist-italy.description_html:
Born on the 10th of October 1985 in Benevento and now residing in the refined enclave of Airola, Naples Rhythms is a percussionist of impeccable pedigree, whose artistry has graced a curated selection of international events and high-profile performances. His passion for music was cultivated from an early age within a family steeped in musical tradition—a lineage that would inform every gesture of his refined craft.

At just fourteen, he embarked upon his professional journey, joining the tour of Eugenio Bennato and Taranta Power. This formative experience saw him perform across Italy and beyond, including a truly memorable appearance on the iconic Ariston stage in Sanremo. His career has since been characterised by collaborations with some of Italy’s most distinguished artists, among them Claudio Baglioni, Tony Esposito, Mariella Nava, and Pietra Montecorvino. He is a regular choice for weddings and exclusive events at the esteemed Castello Monaci in Lecce.

These collaborations have allowed him to refine his style and technique, bestowing upon him a breadth of musical perspective that renders him an exquisite fit for any occasion—from the most intimate of ceremonies to grand-scale productions. His artistic journey is further elevated by theatrical collaborations with the legendary Dario Fo, an opportunity that enabled him to explore new expressive languages, using music as a medium to tell stories and evoke profound emotion.

In 2005, he commenced a long-standing partnership with Monica Sarnelli, cementing his reputation as one of the leading percussionists and drummers on the Italian scene. By 2012, he had founded the MEV Trio, recording the album Contromano—for which he served as both arranger and musician. His compositional gift and passion for sonic exploration have yielded a distinctive, engaging sound, ideal for events that demand an original and remarkably bespoke musical signature.

Naples Rhythms is also a core member of Enzo Gragnaniello’s ensemble, where, alongside drummer Vittorio Riva and guitarist Carlo Fimiani, he delivers performances of exceptional emotional resonance. With vast experience across diverse musical fields and an extraordinary ability to adapt to any style or atmosphere, Naples Rhythms is the perfect partner for those seeking a supremely talented percussionist—whether for an elegant wedding, an intimate ceremony, or a grand concert.

Line-up Options:

  • Solo Percussionist
  • Percussion & DJ
  • Percussion, DJ & Sax
  • Percussion, DJ, Sax & Violin
  • Percussion, DJ, Sax, Violin & Singers
  • Band – Singer, Guitar, Keyboard, Sax, Percussion & Drums

italy-choir.intro_html:
The Italy Choir – An Exquisite Pop & Gospel Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

An impeccably curated vocal ensemble of thirty distinguished vocalists and musicians, The Italy Choir was founded and is directed by Alessandro Gerini, an Italian-Polish vocalist, vocal coach, and arranger of exceptional renown. This refined collective seamlessly marries the rich traditions of gospel and polyphonic choral music with the sophisticated textures of electronic, soul, and pop—creating a truly bespoke sonic experience.

The ensemble has earned international acclaim through prestigious collaborations with revered Italian artists—including pop phenomenon Ultimo, the late actor and presenter Gigi Proietti, and the rock group Modà—as well as with international talents such as American soul vocalist Sergio Sylvestre and British vocal coach Paul Phoenix, former member of the Grammy-winning a cappella ensemble the King’s Singers. The Italy Choir is regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at Convento Viandante del Cielo in Perugia, Italy.

Renowned for their electrifying performances, the group has graced stages throughout Italy, Europe, and Asia, appearing at the most discerning festivals: the Choral Events’ International Choir Festival in Provence, France; the Lucca International Choir Festival; the Wien International Festival for Choirs and Orchestras; the Prague Advent Choral Meeting; the Jeju International Choir & Symposium 2018 in South Korea; the Pantheon Gala Concert in Rome; and the Chorus Inside’s festival Moscow Sounds 2019, where they received the prestigious prize for “Best Overall Performance”—the first time a foreign choir has ever been awarded this honour.

The Italy Choir continues to deliver unforgettable private events in a variety of formations, collaborating with international wedding agencies at the most exclusive locations throughout Italy and Europe. In 2022, the group released its eponymous debut album, available on all digital platforms, and recently launched its fifth official music video and single—a refined cover of Drake’s “Hotline Bling.”

Curated Line-Up Options

  • INTRO PACKAGE: 6 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction, and sound system/backline
  • PRO PACKAGE: 8 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction, and sound system/backline
  • BRONZE PACKAGE: 10 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction, and sound system/backline
  • SILVER PACKAGE: 15 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction, and sound system/backline
  • SAPPHIRE PACKAGE: 18–20 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction, and sound system/backline
  • GOLD PACKAGE: 22–25 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction, and sound system/backline
  • PLATINUM PACKAGE: Full choir of 25 vocalists, Musical Direction, and sound system/backline
  • Smaller ensembles—duo or trio—are available for pre-party cocktail receptions or after-party celebrations; pricing is determined upon specific request.

milan-party-band-italy.intro_html:
The Milan Party Band — A Refined Ensemble Based in Milan, Italy

Conceived in 2013 from the inspired vision of Giulio (vocals) and Enrico (guitar), this exquisite ensemble has since become a hallmark of sophistication for weddings and celebrations throughout Northern Italy.

Discover their curated 2025 Set List, an impeccable selection of songs designed to captivate.

Masters of audience engagement, they ensure every guest is drawn to the dance floor and remains immersed in the rhythm of the evening.
milan-party-band-italy.description_html:
The band’s instrumentation is meticulously composed of drums, bass, guitar, keyboard, and lead vocals, complemented by acoustic guitar and a small percussion set.

Refined and sophisticated arrangements, elevated by the impeccable vocal performances of each member, define the distinctive allure of The Milan Party Band.

Their approach embraces the “American” style of performance — eschewing rigid song structures in favour of spontaneous energy and dynamic interaction with the audience, allowing the moment itself to shape each performance and, consequently, the entire event.

This creates an exquisite exchange of energy between the ensemble and the guests, seamlessly transforming the atmosphere into an unforgettable experience.

The repertoire of The Milan Party Band is vast, yet bespoke and adaptable to the distinct character of every occasion. Genres include pop, rock, R&B, blues, soul, disco, and revival — each arranged with an unmistakable elegance.

The Duo — An Acoustic Masterpiece

This talented acoustic duo, an integral facet of The Milan Party Band, first connected during a memorable 2011 jam session at Barrio’s Café in Milan, where a shared passion for delivering quality music was discovered.

With seamless harmonies and the warm blend of two guitars, their curated repertoire spans timeless icons — The Beatles, Cat Stevens, Bob Marley — alongside modern luminaries such as Bruno Mars, Avicii, and Justin Timberlake.

Adaptable and profoundly engaging, they craft the perfect soundtrack for life’s most cherished occasions: weddings, receptions, private soirées, and corporate gatherings.

The duo may be effortlessly expanded into a trio with the addition of a stunning female vocalist, enhancing the performance with further layers of harmony and depth. Equipped with their own audio and lighting, they tailor the atmosphere to each venue, ensuring an immersive and bespoke live experience.

They also collaborate with professional DJs and nationwide audio-visual providers, adding a touch of distinction to every performance and rendering each event truly unforgettable.
