milan-party-band-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Consulenza sulla parte artistica Impianto audio professionale Formazione componibile dal duo acustico alla band completa, voce maschile e/o femminile Cura del sottofondo Mp3 Repertorio personalizzato.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Anche last minute se siamo lberi, molto meglio con preavviso.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti), media (4-6 musicisti), grande (più di 6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>The Beatles, M. Jackson, Alicia Keys, Ben Harper, Bryan Adams, Lucio Battisti, Bruno Mars, Cat Stevens, Foo Fighters, M. Bublè, Ed Sheeran, Justin Timberlake, John Mayer... Repertorio adattabile.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Assolutamente no, la scaletta del ricevimento viene decisa insieme parlando con voi sposi. Quello che non si può suonare dal vivo lo si può cantare su base o mandare in originale.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Molti matrimoni ed un sacco di date dal vivo, alle quali vi invito e in cui potremmo conoscerci: faccio questo lavoro da oltre 10 anni, mosso da pura passione per la musica.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, ovunque! Italia, Europa, Mondo!



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, le spese di viaggio.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Dipende, a seconda del servizio richiesto, ma di certo abbiamo batterie Duracell che ci fanno "durare di più"!



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Circa un'ora, ma mi piace fare le cose con calma quindi arrivo sempre per tempo. Se invece il senso è capire quanto tempo occorra per studiare i pezzi a richiesta, 20 giorni bastano.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

golden-aura-collective-rome-italy.intro_html:
Golden Aura Collective – An Exquisite Bespoke Musical Experience, Based in Rome, Italy

Golden Aura Collective is an impeccably curated, exclusively female ensemble that delivers refined musical entertainment for the most discerning occasions—from weddings and galas to private celebrations and exclusive corporate events. Comprising a distinguished roster of vocalists and instrumentalists drawn from premier domestic and international stages, this collective offers a truly bespoke performance. Their highly adaptable line-up is tailored with precision, ensuring that every event receives an entirely personalised, flawless execution. Warm, gracious, and utterly professional, Golden Aura Collective guides you through the curation of an unforgettable day, whether an intimate gathering or a grand affair.
golden-aura-collective-rome-italy.description_html:
The journey begins months in advance, with meticulous attention to every detail: the architecture of the venue’s spaces, the seamless choreography of all providers, the expectations of guests and the couple, and the individual demands that distinguish each celebration. Every wedding is a singular masterpiece—from the selection of music to the orchestration of the entire event. A private consultation with the agency’s manager and stylist ensures that each artist’s costumes and stage presence are harmonised with the evening’s aesthetic.

Integration is the hallmark that sets Golden Aura Collective apart. The breadth of musical repertoire and performance styles envelops every guest in a 360-degree sensory experience. The journey commences with the most revered classical masterpieces and celebrated film scores, glides through the golden eras of swing, pop, and rock, and culminates in the finest contemporary selections. Any bespoke request is accommodated with effortless grace.

The signature all-in-one formula permits complete event management—from the ceremony through to the celebratory finale. A dedicated DJ remains present throughout, seamlessly blending backing tracks for the live band, curating dynamic DJ sets to ignite the dance floor, and providing refined ambient soundscapes for every moment. Violinists and cellists perform the most beloved classical works and cinematic soundtracks, both live and with accompaniment, presiding over every facet of the festivities. The saxophone and congas—veritable queens of the aperitif—set an exquisite tone. Dinner unfolds with a delicate interplay of background music and select live performances, followed by a grand stage presentation with elevated platforms and curated costumes. The evening concludes with an impeccable two-hour DJ performance after the cutting of the cake.

Packages are available from a minimum of four to a maximum of eight musicians. In addition to vocals and DJ, the ensemble may include violin, cello, saxophone, and congas—each element chosen to create a sublime, unforgettable orchestration.

florence-rhythms-italy.intro_html:
Florence Rhythms – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

A refined, vibrant, and impeccably professional live band rooted in the heart of Florence; Florence Rhythms curate the perfect equilibrium of sophistication, elegance, and spirited energy for every occasion. With two lead vocalists, guitar, bass, drums, and keyboards, this versatile ensemble possesses an innate ability to craft the ideal atmosphere—whether you desire an intimate, understated elegance or a bold, exuberant celebration.

Ideal for:
– Weddings
– Private Receptions
– Corporate Affairs
– Luxury Celebrations

The Quintessential Soundtrack for Your Celebration

Florence Rhythms transform every event into an unforgettable experience—refined, soulful, and meticulously tailored to your vision. With years of live performance expertise and an unwavering passion for music, the ensemble delivers a complete, bespoke performance designed to accompany every chapter of your day.

The Ceremony – Pure Emotion in Every Note

Imagine your entrance, the exchange of vows, your first kiss as husband and wife—each moment underscored by a melody that stirs every soul present. Florence Rhythms can orchestrate the perfect musical setting, from elegant acoustic interpretations of your most cherished songs to timeless classics or soaring gospel harmonies. Whether you prefer a delicate duo or a fuller ensemble, the sound remains heartfelt, smooth, and exquisitely beautiful.

The Aperitif – Style & Sophistication

As your guests savour their first cocktails and engage in conversation, the band sets the tone with effortless grace. Their aperitif set features light jazz, lounge, and iconic pop classics—creating a relaxed yet stylish ambience that invites connection without overwhelming the moment. A sublime prelude to an evening of celebration.

The Party Band – Energy. Groove. Joy.

When the dance floor beckons, Florence Rhythms ignite the night. Their party set is a masterful fusion of high energy and impeccable vibes—a curated blend of contemporary hits and enduring favourites that inspires every generation to move. With their magnetic stage presence and contagious enthusiasm, they guarantee an evening filled with delight, movement, and indelible memories.

Why Choose Florence Rhythms?

Experience & Professionalism: From the first note of setup to the final encore, every detail unfolds flawlessly.
High-End Sound: Only premium audio equipment ensures a crystal-clear, powerful acoustic experience.
Energy & Interaction: Every performance is designed to connect authentically with your guests.

Florence Rhythms stand ready to compose the perfect musical journey for your event—elegant, exhilarating, and utterly unforgettable.

Line-up Options:

  • 5 to 9-piece live band | DJ set
florence-rhythms-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 2 hours of live music

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- From 5 to 10 piece band

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes with a professional service company

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, DJ set too

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 2.5 hours before our performance starts

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 1.5 hours

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes, up to 2 songs

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- at least 5m x 8m (always depending on the band size booked)

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, but we require stage and cover for shadow</details>

vintique-duo-florence-italy.intro_html:
Vintique Duo – an impeccably refined musical ensemble based in Florence, Italy, offering a bespoke sonic experience for the most discerning celebrations.

This exquisite duo, comprising a vocalist and guitarist, specialises in curating an atmosphere of unparalleled elegance for weddings, exclusive events, and luxury hotels in Florence and its enchanting surroundings.
vintique-duo-florence-italy.description_html:
Their repertoire is a masterful fusion of classic Italian and international pop, interwoven with romantic, refined pieces—each selection chosen to elevate the ambience of any occasion. The profound harmony between voice and guitar creates an intimate yet sophisticated soundscape, perfectly suited to the most treasured moments.

For a truly personalised experience, Vintique Duo can be expanded with additional musicians—such as a pianist, violinist, or percussionist—offering bespoke formations that align seamlessly with your vision. With a blend of seasoned expertise and a refreshingly contemporary approach, they have performed at some of Tuscany’s most iconic venues.

They are frequently engaged for the following milestones:

  • Ceremony
  • Aperitif
  • Dinner

Each set is thoughtfully orchestrated to complement the unique flow of your event, typically lasting approximately ninety minutes with a brief intermission if desired.

What is included:

  • Live, fully acoustic performance (no amplification required, if preferred)
  • Professional-grade instruments and equipment
  • Seamless travel and logistical coordination
  • A curated Italian and international repertoire
  • Personalised song selection tailored to your preferences
  • A discreet, impeccable presence that harmonises with the atmosphere of every event

Line-up options:
- Duo: Female vocalist & guitarist
- Trio: Female vocalist, guitarist & bassist or percussionist

party-band-milan-late-nights.intro_html:
The Late Nights – an ensemble of exceptional refinement, based in Milan, Italy.

Presenting an exquisite fusion of bespoke artistry and sophisticated energy, The Late Nights are a luminary ensemble specializing in impeccable musical entertainment for the most discerning events. Based in the cultural heart of Milan, this distinguished collective is available for exclusive engagements worldwide, curating unforgettable ambiances for weddings, private soirées, and corporate galas. Their impeccably curated repertoire, spanning an expansive tapestry of eras and genres, ensures an exquisite resonance with every distinguished guest. The Late Nights are a perennial presence at Italy’s most esteemed estates, including the revered Relais Castel Bigozzi in Siena and Borgo Sant'Ambrogio in Pienza.

A hallmark of their bespoke service is a fully customizable configuration, meticulously tailored to the scale and ambiance of the occasion.

The Late Nights offer an array of distinguished line-ups:

  • Trio: Piano/Keyboards & Singer, Drums, Bass
  • Quartet: Piano/Keyboards, Female Singer, Drums, Bass
  • Quintet: Piano/Keyboards, Female Singer, Guitar, Bass, Drums
  • Sextet: Piano/Keyboards, Female Singer, Male Singer, Bass, Guitar, Drums

The ensemble’s refined artistry is available for travel, with frequent performances spanning Italy, Spain, France, and beyond. They have graced a curated selection of exquisite venues, including:

  • Relais Castel Bigozzi, Monteriggioni
  • Bersi Serlini Franciacorta
  • La Villa Hotel, Mombaruzzo
  • SPAO Borgo San Pietro Aquaeortus
  • Borgo Iesolana, Bucine
  • Borgo Sant'Ambrogio, Pienza
  • Castelfalfi, Montaione
  • Castello di Grazzano Visconti
  • Masseria Baroni Nuovi, Brindisi
  • Villa Boscarello, Trequanda
  • Greve in Chianti, Florence

For those seeking the pinnacle of polished entertainment and an unforgettable sonic atmosphere, The Late Nights offer an unparalleled experience.

Please note: The Late Nights comprise an exclusive family of uncompromising musicians, each at the zenith of their craft. The composition of the ensemble for a given event may vary from promotional materials, and the set list is indicative, designed to be a bespoke soundtrack to your celebration.

groove-syndicate-jewish-florence-italy.intro_html:
The Groove Syndicate – An Exquisite Wedding & Jewish Party Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

The Groove Syndicate convenes a curated selection of musicians from Florence’s refined underground scene, each poised to craft a synthesis of vibrant energy and impeccable quality for your most cherished celebration. Born in 2021 from the convergence of young professionals, the ensemble cultivates a bespoke repertoire that begins with a sparkling instrumental jazz welcome, then ascends into an exhilarating journey through an expertly curated selection of international pop and rock hits—a sonic voyage from the 1970s to the present day.

The band performs with effortless sophistication in English, Italian, Spanish, Hebrew, and French, alongside a carefully chosen collection of Russian melodies. Their project also offers an exquisite setlist of Jewish traditional chants, dances, and Israeli pop, infusing every Jewish wedding with profound expressiveness. The repertoire includes a sweeping medley of traditional Hora dances, from Ava Nagila to Mazal Tov, Kol Sason Ve Kol Simcha.

Their Jewish wedding configuration is an impeccably balanced 6-piece line-up: guitar/lead voice, keys, sax, bass, drums, and violin. Years of refined musical activity across Tuscany and Rome—home to Italy’s most magnificent villas—along with performances in foreign destinations such as Cyprus, have forged a cohesive sound that bestows upon the Bride and Groom a band defined by positive achievement, conscious performance, and joyous amusement.

An openness to the audience and a harmonious blend of genres, culminating in the option of a DJ set with live saxophone, complete The Groove Syndicate’s polished and unforgettable show.

Line-up Options:

  • 4 to 7 piece Band (lead singer, guitarist/singer, female lead singer, keyboard, saxophone, drums, bass)
  • DJ Set
  • Acoustic trio (piano, voice/guitar, percussion)

swing-band-milan-french.intro_html:
French Swing Band – An Exquisite Swing & Jazz Ensemble, Based in Milan, Italy

Established in 2013, this impeccably refined Riviera-inspired ensemble specialises in transporting discerning audiences to a bygone era through their superlative musical arrangements. French Swing Band curates an auditory voyage from the Promenade des Anglais in Nice to the Boulevard de la Croisette in Cannes, and onward to the enchanting Place de la Valbonne.

The band’s artistic pursuit is as much about style as it is about sound: their performances feature exclusively acoustic instruments, harmoniously intertwined with captivating female vocals. Their bespoke repertoire includes classic French café-chantant, timeless international standards, and reimagined interpretations of cherished traditional pieces.

The band’s extensive combined industry experience renders them an impeccable choice for any distinguished event or occasion. They travel with grace, performing regularly across Italy and Europe, and devote every effort to tailoring each performance to the client’s exact desires. Their professionalism, consummate skill, and innate talent make French Swing Band the ideal choice for connoisseurs of swing music. For those seeking one of Italy’s most refined swing bands, the search concludes here.

swing-band-milan-french.faq_html:
<details><summary>Can I ask for tracks not included in the repertoire?</summary>Yes, we can learn new songs but this works best if the requests are still in a swing / Riviera style. 



</details><details><summary>What is your experience?</summary>We have worked together since 2013 in Europe and Italy. We have performed at events in Montecarlo, Nice, Cape D'antibes, Milan, Brescia, Riva Del Garda, Portofino, Como, Cremona, Mantua to name a few. 



</details><details><summary>Do you have your own equipment?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Are you happy to travel for an event?</summary>Yes, we are very happy to travel.



</details><details><summary>Is there a surcharge for travel?</summary>Yes, it depends on the distance. In general, we ask for travel expenses when we have to travel over 100km for the event. 



</details><details><summary>Do you work for more than one wedding per day?</summary> Yes 



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>Between 2 and 3 hours of live music. But we guarantee widespread music for the entire duration of the event, even with customized playlists and DJ service.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to prepare for the performance?</summary>45 minutes approx. 



</details><details><summary>Do you perform outdoor performances?</summary>Yes. 



</details><details><summary>What other types of services do you offer?</summary>DJ for after dinner, music during the ceremony that can accompany other elements, such as organ, harp, string quartet, violin, flute, sax. 



</details><details><summary>You charge per hour or per event?</summary>We charge per event. 



</details><details><summary>If necessary, would you be willing to work extra hours?</summary>Yes, at a cost.</details>

singer-guitarist-tuscan-troubadour-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscan Troubadour – an exquisite solo artist, based in the heart of Tuscany, Italy.

This refined one-man ensemble commands guitar, vocals, and a sophisticated loop station to craft a richly layered, full-bodied sound in real time. Each performance is a bespoke auditory experience—perfectly curated for intimate acoustic ceremonies, sublime cocktail hours, and seamlessly flowing open-format DJ sets. His repertoire weaves together beloved Italian classics, international anthems, and his own original compositions, offering an impeccably versatile elegance.
singer-guitarist-tuscan-troubadour-italy.description_html: With over fourteen years of mastery and more than one thousand performances across Europe, the United States, and Japan, he has graced occasions ranging from discreet private gatherings to the world’s most prestigious stages. His artistry has been featured on Netflix, Harper’s Bazaar, and acclaimed television productions including X Factor, Sky, and Rai 1. He has also performed for Fortune 500 corporations and at a selection of the globe’s most iconic venues—each engagement an exclusive, unforgettable affair.

roaming-divas-bologna-florence-italy.intro_html:
About Roaming Divas – An Exquisite All-Female Roaming Ensemble from Bologna & Florence, Italy

Roaming Divas is an impeccably curated all-female roaming band, based in Bologna and Florence, Italy, offering an unparalleled fusion of elegance, vitality, and immersive live artistry for weddings, corporate affairs, and private celebrations.

With a refined stage presence and a modern, sophisticated edge, they glide effortlessly through the crowd, transforming every moment into something bespoke, vibrant, and profoundly alive.

For discerning couples planning a destination wedding, they represent one of the most sought-after roaming bands in Italy: their sound knows no boundaries—blending Italian classics, international hits, and iconic songs, all delivered live with a fresh, contemporary allure.
roaming-divas-bologna-florence-italy.description_html:
Every performance is meticulously adapted to the natural rhythm of the event, shifting seamlessly from an atmosphere of refined elegance to more spirited, interactive intervals—never once sacrificing an ounce of class.

The ensemble comprises a vocalist, guitarist, saxophonist, double bassist, and drummer, each virtuoso bringing exceptional musicality and distinctive personality to the experience.

With every performer lending their voice, the result is a rich, dynamic tapestry of harmonies that forges an intimate, powerful connection with guests.

Perpetually in motion, Roaming Divas do not merely perform—they engage, surprise, and delight up close, rendering each affair an exclusive, unforgettable journey imbued with character and sophistication.

amalfi-strings-pompei-italy.intro_html:
The Amalfi Strings – An Exquisite String Ensemble, Based in Pompei, Italy

The Amalfi Strings presents a refined, bespoke musical journey, artfully weaving the timeless elegance of classical tradition with the vibrant energy of contemporary sound. Composed of impeccably trained classical virtuosi, each with a distinguished background spanning both classical and popular repertoire, the ensemble reinterprets iconic Pop and Dance masterpieces from the 1970s to the present day. Their signature allure lies in the seamless fusion of classical compositions and the captivating Venetian rondò style, performed through the dynamic synergy of electric string instruments—a truly curated, sophisticated experience.

The ensemble, comprising two violinists and one cellist, shares not only a profound friendship but an impeccable artistic and musical kinship. With extensive experience at prestigious national and international events, collaborating with a variety of musical formations, The Amalfi Strings brings a wealth of refined expertise to their innovative explorations. United by a passion for transcending musical boundaries, they employ their classical foundation to experiment with new, exquisite soundscapes. Their journey extends to the incorporation of cutting-edge musical technologies, yielding a sound that is both timeless and impeccably modern. The Amalfi Strings is not merely an ensemble; it is a curated odyssey through genres, a celebration of fusion, and an exploration of the infinite possibilities when classical refinement and contemporary vitality converge. Prepare to be captivated as The Amalfi Strings escorts you on a musical voyage, weaving together threads of classical elegance and modern exuberance. This is not simply a band; it is an experience, an evolution of sound—this is The Amalfi Strings.

amalfi-strings-pompei-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Usually 2 x 45-minute sets or 3 x 40-minute sets, depending on the event requirements.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes, we offer different line-up options including solo violin, duo, trio and full live ensemble configurations depending on the event.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- We can provide our own sound and lighting equipment depending on the distance from our base in Pompeii and the event requirements.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, we can provide a laptop playlist service between and after our live sets if requested.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We normally arrive 1.5 to 2 hours before the performance time, depending on the venue and technical requirements.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Our setup and soundcheck usually take between 15 and 30 minutes, depending on the venue and technical requirements

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes, we are happy to learn special song requests such as first dances or meaningful songs for your event.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- We are very flexible and can adapt to most venues, but we normally require a performance area of approximately 3x2 metres.

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- We currently do not have Public Liability Insurance or PAT-tested equipment.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, we are comfortable performing both outdoors and in unique venues such as beaches, villas, barns and other special event locations.</details>

lucente-visual-performers-modena-italy.intro_html:
Lucente – An Exquisite Collective of Visual Performers, Based in Modena, Italy

Lucente is a refined assembly of visual performers, anchored in Modena, Italy, and conceived to welcome guests with impeccable elegance and an unforgettable sense of occasion.

Bespoke for events that demand a distinctly unique ambiance, Lucente transforms arrivals and transitional moments into curated interludes of wonder and quiet opulence.

The ensemble comprises exquisitely attired mime-style artists, including performers on stilts, card artisans, soft light installations, lantern bearers, and choreographed movement.
lucente-visual-performers-modena-italy.description_html:
Through a delicate fusion of dance, music, and light acrobatics, Lucente cultivates an atmosphere that is at once immersive, sophisticated, and effortlessly captivating.

Each performance is conceived as a flexible artistic framework, allowing the experience to be meticulously tailored to the venue, the occasion, and the client’s vision.

Whether greeting guests at the entrance, animating pivotal moments, or adding a poetic visual presence throughout the evening, Lucente adapts its style and rhythm to grace weddings, luxury galas, corporate receptions, and private celebrations.

Elegant, discreet, and visually striking, Lucente is the perfect choice for hosts who wish to impress without overwhelming.

Their artistry does not distract from the event but rather enhances it, leaving guests with a lasting impression of beauty, refinement, and an unwavering attention to detail.

golden-hour-jazz-band-florence-italy.intro_html:
Golden Hour – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

Golden Hour is a refined Jazz & Swing ensemble, rooted in the cultural heart of Florence, Italy. Renowned for their impeccable blend of sophistication and cultural diversity, they represent the epitome of elegance for weddings and exclusive celebrations.

Led by a distinguished jazz vocalist and composer—a graduate of Siena Jazz University in Vocal Jazz Performance—the band delivers impeccably polished performances, each note steeped in profound musical mastery and a truly global perspective.
golden-hour-jazz-band-florence-italy.description_html:
Their curated portfolio includes engagements of the highest prestige: Italian National Day celebrations, the European Union Day Reception, and exclusive performances at luxury destinations such as The Peninsula Hong Kong and The Ritz-Carlton. What distinguishes Golden Hour is their extraordinary linguistic versatility, performing pop, jazz, and folk songs in over ten languages—including Cantonese, English, Italian, and Mandarin—crafting bespoke multilingual set lists that celebrate cultural richness and resonate with discerning international audiences.

Whether you envision a romantic jazz serenade, sophisticated love songs, or vibrant multilingual medleys, Golden Hour tailors each performance with artistry, elegance, and a personal touch, transforming your most cherished moments into an unforgettable golden experience.

tuscan-strollers-brass-roaming-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscan Strollers — an exquisite roaming brass ensemble, based in the heart of Tuscany, Italy.

The Tuscan Strollers evoke the golden “Dolce Vita” era, offering a bespoke musical journey that infuses weddings, private soirées, and celebrations with an air of refined elegance and effortless charm.
tuscan-strollers-brass-roaming-italy.description_html:
Their curated repertoire draws from the impeccably styled sounds of the 1950s and 1960s, weaving swing, jazz, and classic Italian songs into a warm, captivating performance. Beloved melodies from the Italian songbook are reimagined with playful, sophisticated arrangements and a fluid, ambulatory energy — the perfect soundtrack for an exclusive gathering.

The ensemble’s flexible configuration of five to eight musicians allows for seamless adaptation to any refined setting. Performing entirely acoustically, they move gracefully through historic villas, manicured gardens, and sun-drenched terraces, interacting with guests and cultivating a relaxed yet polished atmosphere without the need for amplification.

Their live performances typically span 70 to 75 minutes, extendable to approximately 90 minutes upon request. The group is equally at ease indoors or outdoors, adapting effortlessly to nearly any available space. For an added layer of personalisation, they are delighted to learn special song requests, ensuring each event is truly bespoke.

With their impeccable style, authentic Italian repertoire, and engaging presence, The Tuscan Strollers offer an exquisite musical passage into the romance and charm of Italy’s most iconic era.

wildcards-wedding-band-bologna-italy.intro_html:
The Wildcards – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble from Bologna, Italy

Since 2002, The Wildcards have curated over six hundred weddings across Italy, establishing themselves as one of the most distinguished ensembles in the realm of nuptial celebrations. Their refined repertoire and bespoke format for destination weddings ensure that every betrothed couple benefits from an impeccable depth of experience.

As a live show-band of exceptional artistry, they attend to the bride and groom throughout the entire wedding day, gracefully and comprehensively managing every nuance that arises with sophisticated precision.

The ensemble comprises five musicians: Andrea, an extraordinary bassist; Paolo and Chiara, both exceptional vocalists; Massimo, a remarkably talented and handsome guitarist; and Valerio, whose masterful drumming is matched only by his stewardship of this impeccable band since its inception. Paolo also commands the piano and acoustic guitar with refinement, while Valerio is a superb DJ, offering a seamless fusion of live music and curated soundscapes.

Over the years, an abundance of glowing reviews and compelling videos offer a glimpse into the artistry we discuss. Our repertoire is extraordinarily vast, spanning beloved Italian classics, the rock 'n' roll anthems of the 1960s, the iconic hits of the 1970s and 1980s, and the memorable melodies of the 1990s and 2000s. Our acoustic aperitivo set is a highly sought-after experience, allowing guests to savour the twilight in exquisite ambiance. Entertainment is an essential and refined component of the programme – Paolo and Chiara will artfully compel you to sing and dance until the celebration reaches its unforgettable crescendo.

We also orchestrate those moments that define a truly memorable wedding – the couple's slow dance, the bouquet toss – always handled with impeccable taste. Additional bespoke services, such as lighting, audio, DJing, and additional vocalists, are available at a premium.

What renders The Wildcards the most discerning choice? Viewing our curated images and films reveals a palette of colour, joy, passion, laughter, tears, and heartfelt effort – every wedding tells a unique narrative, and we await yours with anticipation. To fully realise every exquisite detail of a wedding celebration, one must rely on true professionals who recognise pivotal moments and collaborate seamlessly with venue staff, wedding planners, and photographers. We do not merely perform a show on your wedding day; we ensure that you and your guests remain the luminous focal point of the celebration.

We invite you to reach out and learn more.

wildcards-wedding-band-bologna-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Acoustic set 60min and Live Show 90min

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Our price includes equipment and stage lights. In case of special requests (strobe, sparkular, moving heads)

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, we are equipped to cover up to 3 stations with mp3 music and dj set after live set

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- Morning wedding (we arrive the day before) 
- Evening wedding (we arrive the same day of the event up to 3 hours travel time)

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 2-3 hours

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Of course. We are happy to be able to play songs that we don't know. If the songs are too difficult, we immediately inform the customer and use the mp3 (Latin, Opera, Prog and similar)

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- Aperitif (small stage 3x4), Live Show (medium stage 4x5- 4x6)

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)</summary>- Yes, we only require a small platform/stage/floor so as not to damage the equipment.</details>

dj-capri-grooves-wedding-italy.intro_html:
About DJ Capri Grooves – Professional DJ & Saxophonist Based in Capri, Italy

Presenting DJ Capri Grooves: an artisan of melody whose refined artistry transcends eras and cultures, captivating discerning audiences with impeccably curated soundscapes.

With a sun-drenched essence drawn from the exquisite island of Capri, Italy in the summer, and a luminous warmth carried to the shores of Phuket, Thailand in the winter, DJ Capri Grooves is a globetrotting maestro of bespoke musical journeys.

His distinguished résumé, enriched by years of performances on prestigious international stages, reflects a craft honed to the highest standard of sophistication.

His expertise lies in orchestrating unforgettable aural experiences for weddings and luxury events—where timeless classics and contemporary beats fuse into a seamless, elegant tapestry.

Drawing inspiration from the exuberance of disco-house rhythms, the nostalgia of 70s, 80s, and 90s iconic hits, and the quintessential Italian Dolce Vita aura, his musical palette is boundless and exquisitely refined.

Imagine your celebration bathed in a symphony of melodies as DJ Capri Grooves commands the stage. With an innate sensibility to read his audience and tailor each set to the moment, he crafts transitions that transport guests through decades of luminous musical excellence.

Whether igniting a vibrant dance floor with infectious energy, accompanying cherished moments with soul‑stirring melodies, or providing an elegant backdrop for a soirée, DJ Capri Grooves sets the tone for memories of unparalleled distinction.

A connoisseur of ambiance and a true aficionado of sonic fusion, DJ Capri Grooves invites you to experience the union of cultures, the marriage of eras, and the celebration of life through his impeccably curated sound.

His performances stand as a testament to dedication, passion, and the pure joy derived from weaving an exquisite sonic tapestry.

As the golden sun sets over Capri or the tropical breezes sway through Phuket, the artistry of DJ Capri Grooves continues to create magic—forging connections that resonate long after the final note fades.

prestige-jazz-bologna-florence-italy.intro_html:
Prestige Jazz – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble from Bologna & Florence, Italy

Prestige Jazz Band is a supremely refined swing and jazz ensemble, based between the cultural capitals of Florence and Bologna. They bestow an air of timeless elegance and unmistakable Italian allure upon weddings, private soirées, and the most exclusive of celebrations.

Inspired by the enchanting ritual of the classic Italian aperitivo, the band orchestrates a sophisticated musical backdrop that is both stylish and utterly captivating.
prestige-jazz-bologna-florence-italy.description_html:
Every performance is a masterful fusion of live musicianship and impeccably curated musical stems, yielding a rich, polished sound that captures the warmth of traditional jazz and swing while achieving a modern clarity and depth. The result is an experience that feels authentically vintage yet refreshingly contemporary, effortlessly drawing guests into a relaxed yet vibrant ambience.

A hallmark of Prestige Jazz Band is their striking visual identity. The musicians perform in exclusive stage costumes—designed and produced in-house—adding an extra layer of elegance and bespoke character to every appearance. For clients seeking something truly personal, the band can craft tailored solutions that perfectly align with the event’s style, theme, and mood.

Typically, Prestige Jazz Band delivers performances of up to ninety minutes, elegantly divided into thirty-minute sets, with flexible scheduling to harmonise with the event’s flow. They arrive several hours in advance to ensure a seamless setup and soundcheck, and can provide professional sound equipment as required. A curated playlist service is also available between live sets, maintaining a flawless musical atmosphere throughout the celebration.

Equally at home in indoor and outdoor settings, and fully insured with professional-grade equipment, Prestige Jazz Band offers a polished and unforgettable musical journey. Their blend of classic swing, refined presentation, and Italian style renders them an impeccable choice for events that demand music of true sophistication and personality.

Line-up Options:

  • Duo with double-bass and singer (both mixed duo or female duo)
  • Jazz quartet with singer, pianist, double-bassist and drummer
  • Jazz quintet with two singers, pianist, double-bassist and drummer
  • Jazz 6-piece band with two singers, pianist, double-bassist, drummer and guitarist
  • Jazz 6-piece band with one singer, violinist, pianist, double-bassist, drummer and guitarist
  • Jazz 7-piece band with two singers, pianist, violinist, double-bassist, drummer and guitarist
  • A custom-made experience with a true jazz orchestra can also be arranged
  • DJ available

dandeluxe-duo-milan-italy.intro_html: Dandeluxe Duo – a Milan-based acoustic project of impeccable refinement, born from a serendipitous encounter in 2023 that swiftly blossomed into a profound musical kinship. What began as a singular collaboration evolved into a bespoke duo devoted to delivering exquisitely curated live music, suffused with relaxed elegance and an unwavering commitment to quality—perfectly suited for weddings, private soirées, and the most discerning gatherings.
dandeluxe-duo-milan-italy.description_html:
The duo’s sound is built upon expressive vocals and the warm resonance of acoustic guitar, elevated by layered backing vocals and live loop-station artistry—every note crafted in real time. This approach preserves the intimate allure of an acoustic performance while weaving in rhythm and depth, creating a full, immersive experience that remains effortlessly refined, never overpowering.

Their repertoire is a carefully curated tapestry of familiar melodies, gracefully traversing pop, soul, romantic ballads, reggae, and rock—a masterful blend of beloved Italian and international favourites. Dandeluxe Duo performs regularly at weddings, corporate affairs, private parties, and exclusive house concerts, adapting each set with impeccable sensitivity to the atmosphere and the client’s vision. Song requests are warmly welcomed, including those cherished first-dance moments, and the performance can shift from serene background ambiance to lively, uplifting celebration with seamless artistry.

Beyond the duo configuration, the ensemble can expand into a trio or a full band when a more majestic sound is desired. They bring their own professional sound equipment, can orchestrate a DJ-style playlist if requested, and are equally at ease in any setting—whether indoors or beneath the open sky. With a gracious demeanour and an unwavering focus on musical excellence, Dandeluxe Duo curates a feel-good soundtrack that elevates every occasion into an unforgettable luxury experience.

plush-echoes-sorrento-italy.intro_html:
The Plush Echoes — An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble from Sorrento, Italy

The Plush Echoes presents an energetically refined presence as a wedding and celebration band, based in Sorrento, Italy, and available for engagements across the nation.

Established in March 2025, this ensemble was conceived from a devotion to crafting original arrangements, infused with the vibrant and timeless spirit of the 1970s.
plush-echoes-sorrento-italy.description_html:
Their impeccably curated lineup comprises seven distinguished musicians: two saxophonists, a vocalist, a drummer, a bassist, a guitarist, and a pianist.

Each performance features two bespoke sixty-minute sets, separated by a brief interlude during which the ensemble provides refined background music.

The comprehensive fee includes a premium PA system and lighting upon request; for more expansive events, the band can arrange an enhanced rental service or utilise the venue’s own equipment, provided it meets their exacting standards.

Arrival at the venue occurs approximately two hours prior to the commencement of the event, allowing ample time for the meticulous setup of their instrumentation and a thorough soundcheck.

Two exclusive song requests—such as a ceremony piece, the first dance, or the cake-cutting moment—may be performed live, while additional selections can be delivered via their laptop.

An additional offering is a refined roaming or strolling ensemble, composed of three members from the band, designed for areas without power outlets; the band can supply a pair of compact, battery-powered amplifiers as needed.

The result is a lively and deeply engaging performance, distinguished by a signature, retro-inspired groove of exceptional quality.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • 7-Piece Ensemble
  • 6-Piece Ensemble
  • 5-Piece Ensemble
  • Duo
  • DJ Service
  • Roaming Ensemble

amalfi-coast-dj-positano-italy.intro_html:
Amalfi Coast DJ – an exquisite purveyor of bespoke musical experiences for weddings and exclusive celebrations, based in the enchanting enclave of Positano, Italy.

Residing in the picturesque town of Positano along the stunning Amalfi Coast, this refined artist has been a distinguished presence in the world of weddings and high-end events for over two decades.

With an impeccable history of delivering exceptional performances, he has graced the most luxurious hotels and villas nestled in Positano, Ravello, Amalfi, and Sorrento, curating an ambiance of understated elegance.

Beyond the realm of private celebrations, Amalfi Coast DJ has also left an indelible mark on the vibrant nightlife of the Amalfi Coast, Sorrento, Napoli, and Salerno, captivating discerning audiences with his diverse musical mastery.
amalfi-coast-dj-positano-italy.description_html:
His repertoire is a seamless fusion of genres—Dance, House Music, R&B, and a nostalgic touch with meticulously selected Revival tracks from the iconic 70s, 80s, and 90s.

For those seeking a seasoned professional to curate the perfect musical ambiance for their event, Amalfi Coast DJ stands ready to elevate the experience to new heights of sophistication.

Transform your occasion into an unforgettable celebration with the musical artistry of Amalfi Coast DJ.

dj-oro-florence-italy.intro_html:
DJ Oro – An Exquisite Curator of Wedding & Event Soundscapes, Based in Florence, Italy

DJ Oro is an arbiter of refined musical experiences, based in the cultural heart of Florence. He specializes in the orchestration of impeccable destination weddings and private celebrations throughout Italy, transforming each event into a masterpiece of auditory elegance. With over a decade of mastery in sonic curation and multimedia production, he conceives flawlessly bespoke journeys that artfully reflect the couple's unique narrative, the architectural spirit of the venue, and the sophisticated energy of a distinguished international clientele. He is a recurring maestro at the prestigious Villa Lena in Pisa.
dj-oro-florence-italy.description_html: Each celebration is an original composition, built from a foundation of artistic intuition rather than pre-determined playlists or conventional formulas. The sonic narrative unfolds with effortless grace—from the tender romance of the ceremony and the refined hum of the aperitif, through an impeccably curated dinner selection, to an elegantly dynamic dance floor. By masterfully weaving timeless classics, contemporary anthems, and worldly influences, he brings an intuitive command to the room, ensuring the evening's energy ascends organically while maintaining the refined composure synonymous with luxury. Beyond the music, he provides complete audio-visual direction—encompassing bespoke sound systems, architectural lighting designs, immersive videomixing with LED or projection installations, dramatic cold spark effects, and discreet wireless solutions for flawless toasts and ambient refinement. Working in exquisite synchrony with planners, venues, and creative teams, he assures a masterful and uninterrupted experience from the first note to the final flourish, delivering a celebration that is unequivocally polished, deeply personal, and utterly unforgettable.
dj-oro-florence-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 4hrs

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Solo DJ - DJ&Sax - VideoDjShow

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- At least 2/3hrs before start time

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- At least 1/2 hours

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- We have 2x2 meter and 4x3 meter setups, depending on your needs. We can provide minimal setups if space is limited, but we can also set up larger booths.

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- All the material I use is regularly purchased with an invoice and CE marking

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes no problem.</details>

four-the-club-rome-italy.intro_html:
About Four the Club – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble Based in Rome, Italy

Four the Club is a refined four-piece ensemble, curated in Rome, Italy, and featuring impeccable instrumentation—drums, bass, keyboards—complemented by both a gentleman and a lady vocalist. Their exceptional versatility allows them to adapt seamlessly to the most distinguished event settings.

The performance is elegantly divided into two bespoke movements. The first portion offers a selection of soft, ambient melodies, ideally suited for sophisticated occasions such as aperitifs. The second part elevates the atmosphere with spirited dance numbers, including curated medleys and iconic hits from the 2000s onward. Whether you desire a luxurious background ambiance or vibrant entertainment to ignite the celebration, Four the Club delivers an impeccable musical experience, tailored exclusively to your event’s every nuance.

juliets-jam-verona-italy.intro_html:
Juliet’s Jam – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble, Based in Verona, Italy

Juliet’s Jam is a refined Italian pop‑rock trio, possessing over a decade of impeccable live experience across Italy and abroad.

Founded in Verona and honed through national and international tours, record releases, and hundreds of performances, the ensemble has cultivated an esteemed reputation among the most sought‑after wedding bands in Italy for corporate gatherings and prestigious public events.

The trio comprises lead vocals, guitar, and keys, alongside bass and double bass with backing vocals, and drums with percussion—delivering a powerful yet sophisticated sound that seamlessly adapts to intimate, elegant celebrations as well as grand‑scale stages.

Curated Line‑Up Options:
- Duo: guitar + vocals & bass/double bass
- Trio + Drum
- Additional members: Female Voice, Saxophone & Lead Guitar

Their bespoke repertoire spans international pop‑rock classics from artists such as Kings Of Leon, Foo Fighters, Oasis, and The Police, through to reggae influences inspired by Bob Marley, and contemporary folk‑indie and alternative artists including Mumford & Sons, The Lumineers, James Bay, Nothing But Thieves, and YUNGBLUD.

The result is an energetic, widely appealing performance that retains a distinctly authentic live identity.

Juliet’s Jam has released original music—including the EP 4 in 2013 and the album Via in 2015—and has appeared on national television during the Sanremo Festival, as well as reaching the national final of a major Italian music contest at Teatro Ariston.

Over the years, they have performed for international luxury brands such as Coca‑Cola and Brunello Cucinelli, alongside numerous high‑profile corporate clients across Italy and Europe.

Every performance is conceived as a true live concert—no backing tracks, only genuine musicianship, tight interplay, and space for spontaneity and improvisation, ensuring each event is uniquely unforgettable.

Professional, experienced, and musically authentic, Juliet’s Jam delivers a vibrant concert experience tailored exclusively to refined events and discerning public audiences.
juliets-jam-verona-italy.faq_html:

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes from Duo to a 6-piece band

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes 2 fBTs CS1000, t bar lights, battery speaker, wireless mics for speeches

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 2/3 hours before depending on the event

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 30 minutes

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes</details>

vivo-collective-milan-italy.intro_html:
About Vivo Collective – bespoke wedding & entertainment artistry, based in Brescia, Italy

Vivo Collective is an exquisite one-man show act that also curates a refined spectrum of band and DJ live services, each dedicated to rendering every occasion utterly unforgettable.

This versatile entertainer delivers impeccably crafted live music, sophisticated DJ sets, compelling vocal performances, and elegant wedding officiating—ensuring a seamless fusion of emotion, joy, grace, and originality.
vivo-collective-milan-italy.description_html:
With a profound passion for music and years of impeccable experience, Vivo Collective captivates discerning audiences by interpreting the atmosphere of any event with exquisite precision.

Whether it be an opulent wedding, an exclusive private party, a prestigious corporate affair, or a chic nightclub evening, Vivo Collective assists in curating the entire celebration from dawn until dusk.

As a one-man show, he transitions effortlessly from live instrumentation to curated DJ sets, and may collaborate with an extended network of handpicked musicians and artists to create custom formations tailored precisely to the client’s desires.

Selecting Vivo Collective guarantees high-calibre entertainment that leaves a lasting impression—bringing genuine emotions and moments of pure joy to life with a touch of class that sets the experience apart.

Curated Line‑Up Options:

  • One Man Show
  • Live Duo Show: Vocal + saxophone performer
  • 4 to 8‑Piece Band
  • Vocal + DJ

vivo-collective-milan-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Set lengths are fully adaptable depending on the nature of the event. As a general reference, I often perform:

- 2 x 60-minute live music sets, or

- 3 x 40-minute sets for more dynamic formats.

- For weddings, I frequently alternate between live sets and DJ sessions throughout the day or evening.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Absolutely — I offer a wide range of line-up combinations to suit the mood and style of each event. Options include:

- Solo vocal + DJ set (my signature format)

- Duo (vocals + sax or piano)

- Live band (3 to 5 musicians, including sax, guitar, piano, percussion)

- Custom ensembles for ceremonies, such as violin + piano, or harp + voice

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes, I can provide full sound and lighting upon request. In some cases, it’s included in the price 

- Depending on the scope of the event and the venue’s setup. I always coordinate directly with planners or couples to ensure everything is tailored and smooth.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, I always offer a curated DJ set or background playlist between and after live performances. This keeps the flow seamless and the atmosphere continuous.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- I typically arrive at the venue at least 3 hours before the event starts — to ensure soundcheck, setup, and coordination with the team on-site.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Depending on the setup, I usually need between 1 and 2 hours for full setup and soundcheck.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Absolutely! I love learning special songs, especially first dances or meaningful tracks, as long as I receive the request with enough notice to prepare it properly.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- The space I require varies based on the lineup:

- From 2 meters for a solo setup

- Up to 10 meters for a full band or show-style performance

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes, I have full Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment, available on request for venues that require certification.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, I’m comfortable and experienced performing in a wide variety of locations: from beaches and barns to castles, gardens, rooftops, boats, and more!</details>

silk-soul-duo-florence-italy.intro_html:
Silk & Soul – An Exquisite Soul & Jazz Duo Based in Florence, Italy

Silk & Soul is the very definition of refined elegance meeting rhythmic allure. Born in the heart of Florence’s most distinguished soul and jazz scene, this curated project fuses impeccable musicianship with a warm, magnetic stage presence to deliver live music that feels both impeccably classy and vibrantly alive.

Originally conceived as an intimate piano and vocal duo, Silk & Soul has evolved into a bespoke collective that expands effortlessly into a trio or a full band when the occasion demands a grander expression. Whether gracing a romantic wedding ceremony, a sophisticated cocktail hour, or a spirited evening celebration, every performance is tailored to the atmosphere of the event and the discerning guests in attendance.

Their sonic repertoire glides seamlessly through soul and jazz standards, international pop, Italian classics, bossa nova, and tasteful pop rock. The unifying thread remains emotion, quality, and connection—they do not merely play songs; they craft an exquisite mood. Refined when required, playful as energy rises, and always engaging without ever overwhelming the moment.

Lineups range from a piano solo to a vocal and piano duo, expanding to a trio with saxophone, and culminating in a full band featuring piano, voice, sax, drums, and upright bass. Performances can extend up to three hours, with bespoke special requests—such as a first dance—happily prepared. An optional DJ service may be added to ensure the ambience continues seamlessly beyond the live sets.

Silk & Soul provides professional sound and lighting, guaranteeing a polished, impeccable experience from the first note to the last. Setup time varies according to the formation, and the ensemble performs with equal grace indoors and outdoors. Effortlessly placed in intimate spaces for duo and trio configurations, yet adaptable to grander setups, they bring style, soul, and just the right measure of sparkle to every event.

Lake Party – An Exquisite Saxophonist & DJ, Based in Verona, Italy

Lake Party presents a bespoke musical experience for your most refined celebration. As an internationally acclaimed saxophonist and DJ, he crafts an atmosphere of unparalleled elegance, where every note is impeccably curated to elevate your wedding.

His seamless fusion of live saxophone and DJ artistry brings a distinguished touch to any event, captivating your guests and etching exquisite memories that endure.

milan-duo-italy.intro_html:
The Milan Duo — An Exquisite Acoustic Duo Based in Milan, Italy

The Milan Duo delivers an atmosphere of refined energy, authentic chemistry, and music that feels impeccably personal. Their serendipitous encounter on stage during a Milanese jam session sparked an instant connection, blossoming into a collaboration that has graced an array of distinguished venues and events across Lombardy and Emilia Romagna.

At the heart of this bespoke offering are two guitars and two voices, weaving intimate, stripped-back arrangements infused with warmth and character. Their curated repertoire glides effortlessly from timeless classics by The Beatles and Cat Stevens to the evocative sounds of Oasis, The Verve, and Bob Marley, complemented by a carefully selected collection of Italian favourites—making them an impeccable choice for weddings and international celebrations.

Contact The Milan Duo

Their style is relaxed yet engaging, perfectly suited for everything from elegant ceremonies and refined cocktail receptions to lively evening interludes. A standout feature is the option to perform as a roaming duo, moving gracefully among guests and tables to create an immersive, up-close experience that enchants every attendee.

For those seeking a grander statement, The Milan Duo can expand into a full ensemble with additional musicians—drums, bass, keyboards, and female vocals—or seamlessly integrate their live performance with a DJ set to sustain the soirée into the night. Their live sets typically extend to two and a half hours, with the capacity to cover up to eight hours of music, including curated background playlists and DJ service.

Fully self-contained, they provide their own professional sound and lighting setup, arriving well in advance to ensure every detail unfolds with flawless ease. Adaptable and effortlessly collaborative, they are equally at home in elegant indoor venues and open-air celebrations.

Fun, flexible, and genuinely engaging, The Milan Duo curates a feel-good soundtrack for every occasion, crafting moments that feel natural, memorable, and brimming with life.

revival-jazz-band-florence-italy.intro_html:
Revival – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Wedding Ensemble Based in Florence, Italy

Revival is an impeccably curated ensemble born from the friendship of five refined elements: Vocals, Piano, Sax, Double Bass/Electric Bass, and Drums. These five extraordinary musicians, based in Florence, Italy, are prepared to elevate any event across Europe and beyond. Their sound is a bespoke tapestry of jazz, swing, pop, and soul—each note chosen with precision for an unforgettable experience.

Over the years, Revival has graced countless prestigious venues and concerts, including the Four Seasons Hotel in Florence and Hotel Danieli Venezia. They have also performed internationally at distinguished locations such as Le Bar American in Monte Carlo, Sporting Club in Monte Carlo, Hotel Belles Rives in Antibes, France, and Hotel Hermitage & Casino in Monte Carlo.
revival-jazz-band-florence-italy.description_html:
Their vast, ever-evolving repertoire encompasses exquisite ballads, timeless classics, jazz standards, and sophisticated swing numbers for refined lounge entertainment. As the evening progresses and a more spirited atmosphere is desired, Revival seamlessly transitions to a curated selection of 1970s, 1980s, and contemporary pop hits—all while preserving the elegant identity that distinguishes them. Their programming ranges from jazz and swing to international classics with a touch of Italian charm during the aperitif, followed by an upbeat repertoire after dinner to ignite the celebration.

Performance durations (customised upon request):

  • 90 minutes during the aperitif
  • 120 minutes for the dance party after dinner

Logistics & Equipment:

Upon request, the band provides a sound system and lighting suitable for medium to small venues, adaptable for both outdoor and indoor settings. For larger events, a more extensive sound system, lighting setup, and stage can be arranged at an additional fee.

DJ Sax Grooves – an exquisitely curated trio of virtuoso musicians, based in Rome, Italy, dedicated to the refined art of wedding and celebration entertainment.

This exclusive ensemble delivers an impeccable performance, crafted to offer you and your guests an unforgettable, bespoke experience of the highest caliber.
dj-sax-grooves.description_html: Guests are invited to experience an intimate, up-close performance, where the musicians seamlessly blend into the crowd, ensuring every individual is drawn into the rhythm and revelry. The trio comprises an expert DJ, a master saxophonist, and a percussionist, weaving a seductive live soundscape that is equally sublime for an elegant welcome aperitif or a sophisticated finale to the evening’s festivities.

blue-zone-wedding-perugia-italy.intro_html:
About Blue Zone – A Refined Wedding & Party Ensemble Based in Perugia, Italy

An impeccable choice for discerning couples celebrating their nuptials in Italy, Blue Zone delivers an exquisite musical experience, meticulously curated for life’s most cherished occasion. The core ensemble is a sophisticated four-piece formation, fronted by a captivating lead vocalist and supported by a resonant bassist, a soulful guitarist, and a masterful drummer whose precision underpins every performance. Renowned for crafting moments of pure enchantment, Blue Zone elevates every wedding and celebration into a bespoke affair.
blue-zone-wedding-perugia-italy.description_html:
Our repertoire is a curated collection of international pop, rock, soul, and dance classics—each selection refined to delight every guest with elegance and verve. We are equipped with a state-of-the-art sound system that ensures pristine, crystal-clear audio, flawlessly adapted to venues of any scale—from intimate courtyards to grand halls. To enhance the visual narrative, our lighting design is entirely customizable, offering everything from subtle, refined ambiance to spectacular illuminations that transform the dance floor into a vibrant tableau. Once the live performance concludes, we offer an exclusive DJ set to sustain the evening’s energy, ensuring the celebration continues seamlessly into the night.

Beyond the festivities, we present comprehensive wedding packages that accompany your entire day. From live or ambient melodies during the ceremony, to acoustic arrangements for the aperitif, and a high-energy show for the evening—we collaborate intimately with each couple to compose a musical journey that mirrors their distinct style and vision. Our mission is to orchestrate a flawless experience that delights both you and your guests, leaving indelible memories of joy and love. With an unwavering dedication to excellence, Blue Zone ensures your wedding is as magical as the stunning Italian setting you have chosen. Should you desire, we happily infuse our performances with the best of Italian classics, allowing our roots to add a touch of authentic charm.

Line-up Options:

  • Full Party Band
  • Guitar & Singer Duo
  • DJ Service
  • Cello and/or Violin for ceremony

jazzin-rome-italy.intro_html:
Jazzin Rome – An Exquisite Jazz Ensemble Based in Rome, Italy

Jazzin Rome embodies the essence of Italian romance and timeless elegance, weaving the spirit of la dolce vita into every occasion. The ensemble artfully blends Italian and Chilean musical heritage, presenting a curated repertoire that spans smooth bossa nova, Latin jazz, classic swing, heartfelt boleros, and soulful pop. Each performance cultivates an atmosphere that is at once sophisticated and effortlessly warm—an impeccable choice for weddings, corporate galas, and intimate celebrations throughout Italy.
jazzin-rome-italy.description_html:
The core formation is a refined jazz trio, featuring guitar, double bass, and voice. For a more opulent sound, the ensemble can be expanded to a bespoke four‑, five‑, or six‑piece configuration, adding trumpet, saxophone, and drums. Sets are typically forty‑five minutes of uninterrupted musical artistry, and the band arrives with its own premium sound equipment, allowing for a seamless setup and soundcheck that requires approximately one hour.

Jazzin Rome is delighted to accommodate special requests with advance notice, and may offer a curated laptop playlist between sets to maintain the evening’s ambiance. The ensemble requires a minimal footprint of just three by three metres and performs with equal grace indoors or outdoors—whether in an opulent ballroom, a rustic barn, or along a pristine coastline. Their versatile style and polished delivery ensure every event becomes an unforgettable, luxurious experience.

seraphic-swing-lucca-italy.intro_html:
Seraphic Swing – an exquisite Jazz & Swing ensemble based in the captivating city of Lucca, Italy.

Presenting Seraphic Swing: a curated musical experience that exudes timeless elegance, seamless grooves, and an uplifting vitality, meticulously crafted for weddings and distinguished celebrations throughout Lucca and its surrounds.

This refined ensemble artfully weaves elegant Jazz standards with an international Pop repertoire, reimagining beloved classics through a sophisticated Swing-inspired lens. From iconic Italian melodies to contemporary English-language favourites, every performance is imbued with warmth, personality, and an irresistible rhythmic allure.

Founded in 2019, yet built upon nearly a decade of shared artistry, the musicians of Seraphic Swing possess an extraordinary synergy—forged through countless live performances, studio collaborations, and an abiding passion for enchanting audiences.
seraphic-swing-lucca-italy.description_html:
Drawing from a rich tapestry of Jazz, Blues, Rock, Fusion, and Pop, the group delivers both remarkable versatility and impeccable musicianship to every event. Their most coveted configuration is the classic Trio—featuring vocals, jazz guitar, and double bass—creating an intimate yet vibrant atmosphere ideal for aperitivos, dinners, and elegant soirées. For grander occasions, Seraphic Swing offers Duo, Quartet, and Quintet formations, adding further rhythm and flair to the dancefloor as needed.

Renowned for their flexible and professional approach, the ensemble performs seamlessly in distinctive venues—from villas and beaches to barns and open-air settings—always adapting with effortless grace. They provide their own professional sound equipment, vintage-inspired stage touches, and a curated selection of playlist music between live sets to sustain an impeccable ambiance throughout the affair.

With over fifteen years of live music experience and a shared devotion to Swing culture and performance, Seraphic Swing crafts unforgettable moments suffused with sophistication, romance, and joyful energy. The perfect soundtrack for weddings, intimate private parties, and refined celebrations.

Line-Up Options:

  • Duo / voice – guitar
  • Trio / voice – guitar – double bass
  • Quartet / voice – guitar – double bass/electric bass – drums
  • Quintet / voice – guitar – double bass/electric bass – piano – drums
  • Duo (instrumental) / guitar – double bass
  • Trio (instrumental) / guitar – double bass – drums

empires-end-rock-roll-band-italy.intro_html:
Empire’s End — An Exquisite Rock ‘n’ Roll Ensemble Based in Rome, Italy

Empire’s End is a distinguished rock ‘n’ roll ensemble, proudly based in Rome, Italy. Their refined musical philosophy is to revive the timeless energy of classic rock with impeccable artistry. Founded in 2010, this exceptional group has performed over 260 curated live shows, bringing their bespoke sound to exclusive clubs, private soirées, and elegant weddings throughout Italy. With a meticulously crafted repertoire of hits from the golden age of rock, Empire’s End invites discerning audiences to relive the thrill of the 1950s and 1960s, evoking the spirit of legends such as Elvis Presley, the Beatles, Chuck Berry, the Beach Boys, and more.
empires-end-rock-roll-band-italy.description_html: Each performance by Empire’s End artfully blends the rebellious energy of rock ‘n’ roll with a refined, modern sensibility. Their profound passion for the genre resonates with listeners of all generations, transforming every affair into a celebration of the music that shaped an era. Renowned for their authentic sound and commanding stage presence, Empire’s End offers more than a tribute to rock’s greatest icons — they orchestrate an immersive journey to a musical golden age that continues to inspire.

internal-voices-jazz-naples-italy.intro_html: Internal Voices — an exquisitely refined Jazz & Swing ensemble, based in the cultural heart of Naples, Italy. Renowned as one of the city’s most cherished musical collectives, the band operates under the bespoke motto “One band, two sounds.” The project was born as an impeccably curated acoustic experience and has since evolved to incorporate a sophisticated electronic dimension, earning the distinction of being the only ensemble capable of seamlessly transforming both its sound and visual aesthetic within a single event.
internal-voices-jazz-naples-italy.description_html:
The repertoire of Internal Voices comprises over one hundred meticulously selected songs — a curated journey through world music, spanning Jazz, Pop, Bossanova, timeless Neapolitan classics, reimagined house arrangements, and Italian masterpieces from the 1960s. New compositions are regularly added to this ever‑refined collection. The band has performed at Italy’s most prestigious national and international clubs and events, delivering an atmosphere of unparalleled exclusivity. Performances may be presented as three exquisite 40‑minute sets or a single, uninterrupted 90‑minute set. During brief intermissions, an unmanned playlist provides a seamless backdrop of ambient sophistication. Premium sound and lighting equipment is included in the price, along with all travel expenses as agreed upon during the quotation process. With a remarkably swift 60‑minute setup time, the team arrives at the venue approximately three hours before the performance to ensure every detail is impeccably prepared, requiring a space of around nine square metres for optimal comfort. The ensemble is delighted to perform either outdoors or indoors, adapting effortlessly to the refined atmosphere of any occasion.

Line-up Options:

  • Trio — Voice, Guitar & Double Bass
  • Quartet — Voice, Guitar, Double Bass & Sax / Trumpet
  • Quartet — Voice, Guitar, Double Bass & Sax, Trumpet / Trombone
  • DJ Set & Sax

ila-rea-duo-rome-italy.intro_html:
Ila & Rea – An Exquisite Wedding Duo Based in Rome, Italy

Ila & Rea are an exquisitely curated acoustic soul pop duo, exuding refined elegance. Recognised among Italy’s most accomplished musicians, they have graced thousands of exclusive stages across the globe. Each performance is a bespoke creation, meticulously tailored to the client’s every desire.
ila-rea-duo-rome-italy.description_html:
Browse their curated video portfolio to witness performances enhanced by violin, saxophone, or an additional vocalist – and select the atmosphere that resonates most with your vision. The ambiance is one of warm, acoustic intimacy, weaving emotional melodies that traverse soul jazz and timeless pop. Ila & Rea are frequently engaged for ceremonies – both religious and civil – as well as during cocktail hour and aperitivo, adding a touch of sophistication to every moment.

For engagements throughout Italy, the duo arrives with their own impeccable equipment, including all instruments and a premium sound system. During brief intermissions, they ensure the atmosphere remains uninterrupted, seamlessly providing refined background music through their sound system. With a one-hour setup and soundcheck, Ila & Rea grant ample time for perfection, typically arriving at least two hours before their performance – unless an alternative arrangement has been discussed. Should you desire a song not yet in their repertoire, Ila & Rea will graciously learn it exclusively for your celebration.

Line-up Options:

  • Duo
  • Trio
  • Quartet
  • 5-piece band
  • 6-piece band
  • DJ

sardinia-violinist-cagliari-italy.intro_html:
Sardinia Violinist – A refined instrumentalist based in Cagliari, Sardinia, offering an impeccably curated musical experience for the most discerning clientele.

As a consummate professional violinist, I dedicate my artistry exclusively to luxury events where refinement is paramount. From intimate celebrations and grand weddings to exclusive corporate soirées, my performances infuse every gathering with an undeniable elegance. Based in the enchanting city of Cagliari, Sardinia, my services extend across Italy and Europe to ensure your occasion is imbued with the highest standard of musical sophistication.
sardinia-violinist-cagliari-italy.description_html:
For me, the violin transcends profession—it is an expression of my deepest passion. I take profound satisfaction in curating a sublime auditory atmosphere, meticulously tailored to the nuances of your occasion. My creative vision allows for the design of wholly bespoke performances, transforming your event into an unforgettable spectacle. I take immense pride in my ability to adapt and personalize the repertoire, crafting ‘ad hoc’ musical narratives that leave an indelible impression. Whether your vision leans towards timeless classical compositions or sophisticated contemporary arrangements, I am committed to delivering a performance of impeccable quality and heartfelt resonance. Allow me to grace your event with the timeless, enchanting charm of the violin.

Curated Ensemble Configurations:

  • SOLO: An intimate solo performance, offering a choice between electric or classical violin for a singularly refined presence.
  • DUO: A harmonious duo, pairing the violin with a DJ, a saxophonist, or an acrobat for a uniquely captivating dynamic.
  • TRIO: An exquisite trio, blending violin, DJ, and saxophone for a fuller, richly textured auditory experience.
  • QUARTET: A magnificent quartet, combining violin, DJ, saxophone, and acrobat for a truly spectacular and immersive performance.

beat-brigade-wedding-milan-italy.intro_html:
The Beat Brigade – An Exquisite Ensemble for Unforgettable Celebrations, Based in Milan, Italy

The Beat Brigade is a symphony of refined mastery, where impeccable musicianship converges with moments of pure enchantment. Comprising a curated collective of seasoned professionals, we orchestrate a bespoke soundscape that transcends eras. Our diverse repertoire journeys elegantly through timeless classics and the most sophisticated contemporary hits in both Italian and international music, weaving seamlessly through pop, rock, jazz, and soul—each note chosen with impeccable discernment. Yet we are not merely a band; we are architects of ambiance, offering an exclusive spectrum of sonic solutions to elevate every event’s tone—from tranquil, atmospheric melodies to dynamic, high-impact performances, each experience bespoke to your celebration.

Every note we play is an expression of unwavering dedication to infusing each occasion with a refined musical backdrop. Our passion for music is the driving force behind The Beat Brigade. With every chord we strike and every rhythm we weave, we pour our hearts into creating an experience that resonates deeply with both us and our audience. Allow us to immerse your event in the enchanting world of melodies, where The Beat Brigade transforms moments into memories that linger in the air.

They are pleased to travel extensively, regularly performing throughout Italy for a spectrum of esteemed events. The band collaborates exclusively with the finest agencies, event organisers, wedding planners, promoters, and venues across the nation. For those seeking one of Tuscany’s most distinguished wedding and party bands, The Energy awaits your enquiry.
