wedding-roma-sax-dj-rome-italy.intro_html:
About Roma Sax & DJ – professional Saxophonist & DJ duo based in Latina, Italy

Roma Sax & DJ presents an exquisite union of masterful instrumentalists and curated soundscapes. Hailing from the distinguished locale of Latina, Lazio, this exclusive duo—a virtuoso saxophonist and an impeccable DJ—has graced the most prestigious events across Italy and the international stage for several illustrious years.

Established in the early 2010s, the ensemble swiftly ascended to prominence for their bespoke fusion of live saxophone melodies and seamlessly woven DJ sets. Their refined performances, initially gracing exclusive weddings, corporate galas, and private soirées throughout Italy, soon captivated a discerning clientele worldwide.
wedding-roma-sax-dj-rome-italy.description_html:
The group's saxophonist, Italian-born, cultivated his extraordinary artistry from a young age. Immersing himself in the rich traditions of jazz, he delivered captivating performances in distinguished local clubs and festivals. His innate talent and refined technique swiftly garnered the admiration of fellow musicians, leading to collaborations with elite ensembles.

The duo's DJ, equally accomplished and also a native of Italy, discovered his profound calling for music in his youth, mastering the art of the turntables during his formative years. Through performances at prestigious local venues, he honed a signature, refined style characterized by an impeccable ability to blend diverse genres with fluid grace and sophistication.

Their curated repertoire spans an exquisite spectrum of genres, from the timeless elegance of jazz and swing to the vibrant energy of pop, chill-out, and disco. Renowned for their impeccable intuition for discerning the unique ambiance of an exclusive gathering, they skillfully adapt their performance to create the perfect atmosphere. For a truly bespoke experience, the duo can elevate their distinguished ensemble with additional refined musicians, featuring:

  • Electric violin
  • Electric cello
  • Percussion
  • Vocalists

Over the years, Roma Sax & DJ has cultivated a devoted following, solidifying their esteemed status as one of Italy's most coveted saxophone and DJ duos. Their unwavering dedication to their craft and their commitment to delivering unparalleled entertainment continues to define their distinguished presence at the world's most elegant celebrations.

melodic-waves-duo-verona-italy.intro_html:
About Melodic Waves – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble from Verona, Italy

Melodic Waves, the Verona-based jazz duo and ensemble, was conceived as an impeccable homage to the legendary crooners of a bygone era—including the incomparable Frank Sinatra and Tony Bennett.

Drawing from the most refined selections of the American and Italian songbooks, this ensemble radiates a timeless charm that transcends generations.

We are regularly curated to perform for weddings and exclusive events at The St. Regis in Florence.
melodic-waves-duo-verona-italy.description_html:
Melodic Waves is not merely an ode to the musical giants of the past; it is a refined and versatile spectacle that traverses an array of musical landscapes with effortless grace—encompassing the realms of swing, Latin rhythms, and the gentle sway of bossa nova.

Bespoke Lineups

  • Duo: Guitar & Double Bass + Vocals.
  • Trio: Guitar, Double Bass + Vocals & Drums.
  • Quartet: Guitar, Double Bass + Vocals, Drums & Trumpet or Saxophone.

midnight-flowers-florence-italy.intro_html:
About The Midnight Flowers – An Exquisite Acoustic Duo from Florence, Italy

The Midnight Flowers is a refined acoustic duo, comprising the exceptionally talented Roberta on vocals and Giacomo on guitar & vocals. Nestled in the heart of Tuscany, yet available for bespoke performances throughout Italy, this ensemble presents the quintessential curation for your most distinguished celebration. With an impeccable history of many years within the event industry, they possess the refined intuition to select the ideal musical accompaniment for each fleeting moment. They are regularly engaged to perform at weddings and exclusive events at the prestigious Villa Scorzi in Pisa, Italy.
midnight-flowers-florence-italy.description_html:
Their curated repertoire gracefully spans R&B, Soul, Funky, Blues, and Pop, while also offering their own sophisticated interpretation of Jazz and Bossa Nova—from timeless international and Italian classics to the most coveted modern hits. Should you seek an intimate, elegant ceremony or polished live entertainment for your aperitif or dinner, they shall be delighted to provide every exquisite detail bespoke to your vision.

Line-up Options:

  • Duo: Singer & Guitarist
  • Trio: Singer, Guitarist & Sax or Piano

dj-mary-rome-italy.intro_html:
DJ Mary – An Exquisite Roman Female DJ

Presenting DJ Mary, an impeccably curated musical artisan based in Rome. Born of a distinguished lineage—her parents both revered opera singers—Mary possesses a profound, inherited musical heritage. Raised amidst timeless melodies, she cultivated an innate passion for sound that now defines her refined craft. Fluent in Italian, English, Spanish, and conversational German, she bestows a sophisticated multicultural grace upon every bespoke event.
dj-mary-rome-italy.description_html: A distinguished graduate of the Rome Conservatory’s prestigious electronic music program, DJ Mary seamlessly marries her classical training with an actress’s intuitive stage presence. With over three years of experience curating soundscapes for weddings and exclusive private celebrations, she has collaborated with a select circle of singers, musicians, and dancers. Renowned for her eclectic yet discerning style, she masterfully blends genres to captivate the most discerning audiences. Her sets are engaging, effortlessly elegant, and irresistibly dance-worthy—ensuring that guests of every age and provenance remain enchanted until the final note.
dj-mary-rome-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 3 hours (they can be divided into 1 + 2 for example). There is an extra cost if I need to play more than 180 minutes.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- I can also provide and add two singers, a saxophone, a violin and a percussionist if needed.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Sound & lighting equipment is not included in my price, but it's an extra service I can provide If required. 

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- I have pre-recorded mixes by me and playlists that can be used when needed. I can also provide my laptop for that.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- Once I've done the soundcheck (when/if the logistic allows it), I'll arrive 30 minutes before my performance. Of course every event has its necessities, so it really depends on that too.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- I need 15 minutes to soundcheck if it's just me, one hour if I perform with other artists (singer+sax+percussionist)

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>-  I accept requests (specific songs for specific moments or a playlist) within a week of the event.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- I can perform in unusual settings, I only need the table to be high enough for the DJ equipments (not below 120cm).</details>

sitar-fusion-bari-italy.intro_html:
Sitar Fusion – An Exquisite Sitar & Handpan Duo, Based in Bari, Italy

Mantra is far more than a musician; he is an alchemist of sound, meticulously weaving a bespoke tapestry of sonic exploration that transcends both borders and genres.

Through a refined fusion of instruments—the sitar, handpan, African percussion, theremin, oud, and synthesisers—he invites discerning audiences on a mesmerising voyage through the rich tapestry of global musical traditions.

Every note, every rhythm becomes a masterful brushstroke upon his canvas, painting an impeccable portrait of unity within diversity.
sitar-fusion-bari-italy.description_html:
From the ethereal melodies of the sitar to the pulsating, primal beats of African percussion, his compositions bear witness to the profound interconnectedness of humanity.

In his curated works, one discovers echoes of ancient traditions mingling effortlessly with futuristic soundscapes—creating a sonic landscape that is at once timeless and avant‑garde.

His performances are not mere concerts; they are transformative, exclusive experiences, transporting listeners to realms both familiar and uncharted.

Through this musical odyssey, he invites us to listen with open hearts and refined minds, embracing the exquisite beauty of diversity and the transcendent power of music to dissolve boundaries.

In a world often divided by differences, his artistry as a professional sitarist stands as an elegant reminder of our shared humanity and the universal language that connects us all.

He is available to perform as a sitar player at weddings, private events, and public concerts throughout Italy and across Europe.

midnight-bloom-cortona-italy.intro_html:
Midnight Bloom – An Exquisite Jazz & Soul Ensemble from Cortona, Italy

Since 2015, Midnight Bloom has graced the most distinguished stages, weaving the warmth of Italian pop with the timeless refinement of swing. Their sound is impeccably smooth yet vibrantly alive—a curated experience that captivates every audience with effortless grace.

At the heart of this ensemble lies a vocalist whose artistry moves seamlessly from tender ballads to spirited swing, each note delivered with bespoke precision.

Backed by a pianist of profound jazz and blues sensibility, a multi-instrumentalist lending depth on guitar and bass, and a drummer whose command of pop, rock, and funk is executed with flawless accuracy, the band crafts a sound that is both richly dynamic and utterly distinctive.

Compact yet commanding, they perform with equal poise in intimate settings, employing high-end audio technology and electronic drums to ensure pristine acoustics and a refined visual aesthetic. Midnight Bloom offers a curated selection of line-ups—from an elegant piano-and-voice duo to a full quartet complemented by a live DJ set—each tailored to the exclusivity of your event.

Their performances typically span up to three hours of live music, followed by an hour of bespoke DJ ambience, though every detail is effortlessly adapted to the occasion. Whether for an intimate dinner, a nuptial celebration beneath the stars, or a sophisticated affair abroad, Midnight Bloom curates an atmosphere of enduring elegance—one that lingers long after the final note.

aurora-harp-treviso-italy.intro_html:
About Aurora Harp – an exquisite professional wedding harpist, based in Treviso, Italy

At the tender age of eight, a profound enchantment with the harp began, culminating in a distinguished diploma from the Conservatory of Music. This rigorous academic journey refined technique, musicality, and an impeccably scholarly approach to the art.

Driven by a deeply romantic and aesthetic sensibility, I resolved to elevate my studies to the highest echelon—performing at weddings and private events, where the harp finds its most sublime expression.
aurora-harp-treviso-italy.description_html:
I curate a selection of refined musical experiences, each designed to bestow elegance and exclusivity upon your occasion. The solo harp offers a delicate, intimate presence; the duo of harp and violin embodies timeless classicism; while the harp paired with a singer introduces a graceful movement, always maintaining impeccable sophistication. This last configuration is exceptionally rare, meticulously studied and transcribed for this bespoke pairing.

My repertoire spans from classical masterworks to the most contemporary melodies. I delight in offering a highly personalised service, listening intently to the atmosphere and musical tapestry you envision for your event.

I am available to perform for ceremonies, receptions, and first dances, as well as for corporate gatherings and other exclusive private celebrations.

Ultimately, I believe that music should not only be exquisite to hear but also a visual delight. For this reason, I always inquire about your event’s colour palette, so I may adorn myself in a gown that harmonises with your curated vision.

Line-up Options:

  • Harp Solo
  • Harp & Violin
  • Harp & Singer
  • Harp, Singer & Violin

stano-sax-florence-italy.intro_html:
Stano Sax – An Exquisite Wedding Saxophonist, Based in Florence, Italy

Born in Prato on December 16, 1982, Stano Sax’s musical journey began at the age of five, studying piano at the esteemed “Cianchi” Music School in Prato. Simultaneously, he discovered a profound affinity for the stage and theatre, performing monologues and short comedies with an entertainment company that embarked on summer tours throughout Tuscany.

Revealed as a dramatic baritone, he refined his vocal artistry through opera singing with the lyric baritone Giovanni Mazzei—a student of the legendary Rolando Panerai—and later with Maestro Valerio Del Piccolo, a lyric bass, scholar of sacred music, and orchestra conductor based in Florence.

Inspired by models of operatic versatility, he began writing lyrics and performing as a countertenor in an A.O.R. (Adult Oriented Rock) ensemble, and also as lead vocalist in a Progressive Hard Rock tribute band dedicated to Queensrÿche. Concurrently, he enrolled at the “G. Verdi” Music School in Prato, studying music theory and piano to deepen his intonation and grasp of musical intervals.

A lifelong devotee of wind instruments, he ultimately discovered his true musical synergy with the saxophone, which became his preferred and principal instrument. Through his curated repertoire, he expresses himself impeccably across Chicago Blues, Jazz, Smooth Jazz, Funk, Bossa Nova, Latin, Classic Rock, and Deep House.

Currently immersed in the study of Jazz and Harmony, he has collaborated with a Japanese digital label, composing original tracks that he weaves into select live performances. He now graces rooftops, hotel conference rooms, banquet halls, and fashion shows across Tuscany, Umbria, Lazio, and Switzerland, partnering with luxury brands for conferences, fashion events, bespoke weddings, and corporate occasions. He is available to travel throughout Italy and abroad.

Upon request, he enriches his performances with his voice and diatonic harmonica, alongside the saxophone. A broad and ever-expanding musical culture allows him to adapt both his voice and instrument to any musical language, while never losing his distinctive stylistic identity.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 2.5 hours before performance time

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, no problem</details>

Mario DJ – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Based in Rome, Italy

Mario DJ stands as an exceptional open-format DJ, curating top-tier entertainment for the most refined events. Based in the capital, he graces occasions both grand and intimate across the country—from corporate galas and private soirées to the most bespoke weddings.

With years of impeccable performance experience, Mario DJ possesses the refined talent and sophisticated skill to orchestrate an unforgettable show.

Mario DJ frequently collaborates with other distinguished performers, including some of Italy’s finest saxophonists, offering a curated synergy of sound for your exclusive celebration. Ever willing to travel, he has performed across Italy and beyond, enchanting audiences at some of Europe’s most illustrious venues.

For those seeking one of Rome’s most sought-after DJs, Mario DJ delivers an unparalleled, luxurious experience.

piano-duo-lake-como.intro_html:
The Lake Como Duo — An Exquisite Piano & Vocal Ensemble Based in Lombardy, Italy

The Lake Como Duo represents the pinnacle of refined entertainment for weddings and celebrations. This impeccably curated duo specialises in delivering an unparalleled musical experience, ensuring every event unfolds with seamless grace.

With years of seasoned expertise, these artists possess a vast and meticulously crafted repertoire spanning multiple eras and genres, promising to captivate every discerning guest with a bespoke selection of melodies.
piano-duo-lake-como.description_html:
Nestled in the enchanting region of Lake Como, this duo is the quintessential choice for those planning a destination wedding in this breathtaking locale. The artists are delighted to travel and perform extensively across the region, gracing weddings, private soirées, and corporate events with their refined artistry.

For those seeking one of Lombardy's most distinguished piano and vocal duos, The Lake Como Duo awaits your inquiry — an invitation to elevate your occasion into an unforgettable luxury experience.

two-in-turin-duo-italy.intro_html:
About Two in Turin – An Exquisite Acoustic Duo from Turin, Italy

Two in Turin present a refined, soulful acoustic sound that flows seamlessly through the most distinguished weddings and bespoke celebrations. Their impeccably curated repertoire—spanning folk, jazz, R&B, and Britpop—is tailored to each exquisite moment, whether accompanying a graceful aisle walk, an elegant dinner reception, or an evening of dancing beneath the stars.

Performances typically span two hours, with flexible line-up configurations designed to harmonise perfectly with the atmosphere of your event. The duo is frequently engaged for nuptials and private occasions at esteemed venues such as Borgo Casa Scaparone in Alba and Villa Muggia in Verbano-Cusio-Ossola, Italy.

Fully equipped with their own refined sound and lighting system, they also provide bespoke playlists between and after sets to maintain an immersive, elegant ambiance. Arriving well in advance, they oversee every detail of setup and soundcheck with effortless precision and are always delighted to learn special requests—such as a first dance song. Requiring only a few square metres to perform, they are equally at home in grand reception halls, enchanting outdoor settings, rustic barns, or serene coastal locations.

Curated Line-up Options:

  • Duo: Guitar & Vocals
  • Trio: Guitar, Vocals & Sax

The Rome Magician stands among Italy’s most sought-after illusionists, curating impeccably sophisticated entertainment that captivates every guest with an air of bespoke enchantment. From intimate children’s gatherings to grand-scale galas, his repertoire spans every avenue of performance, delivering a mesmerising experience tailored to each unique setting. He is regularly engaged for weddings and private celebrations at illustrious estates such as Casa Cornacchi in Arezzo, Italy.

His portfolio of previous clientele is nothing short of impressive, establishing him as one of the most coveted illusion masters Italy has to offer. Discerning hosts will find him equally at ease performing across the peninsula and beyond, always travelling with an unwavering commitment to excellence.

Notably, he appeared as a finalist on Italy’s Got Talent, where his professionalism, charisma, and unparalleled artistry earned him a place among the nation’s finest. For those seeking an unforgettable, curated moment of wonder, The Rome Magician represents the pinnacle of luxury entertainment.

ragazzo-sax-florence-italy.intro_html: Ragazzo on Sax – an exquisite saxophonist and refined DJ, based in the heart of Florence, Italy. A graduate of the illustrious Giovanni Battista Martini Conservatory of Bologna, his artistry is a testament to impeccable training and a lifelong dedication to musical excellence.
ragazzo-sax-florence-italy.description_html:
Specialising in alto, soprano, and tenor saxophone, he transforms every event into an unforgettable sensory journey. With a bespoke repertoire spanning pop, soul, bossa nova, dance, jazz, and trendsetting sax covers, he curates an atmosphere of sophisticated elegance. His services are regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive celebrations at the enchanting Castello Di Ristonchi in Florence and the historic Convento di Montepozzali in Grosseto.

His standard offering includes a seamless blend of live DJ and saxophone throughout the entire day, complemented by state-of-the-art audio and lighting systems tailored for each moment—from the aperitif to the dinner and the dance. Every note is carefully chosen in collaboration with you, ensuring the soundtrack of your day is as unique as your love story. Whether for a civil ceremony, a church wedding, or an alternative celebration, he elevates the occasion with extraordinary grace. He oversees your entire wedding journey: from the pre-arrival drinks to the emotional dinner, the cake-cutting, and the jubilant party that follows.

For those seeking even greater refinement, he can be booked alongside resident or guest DJs, or with a curated ensemble that includes a percussionist, guitarist, bassist, pianist, or a captivating female vocalist. Each arrangement is crafted to create an evening of pure joy and laughter, leaving your guests entranced.

golden-strings-violinist-salerno-italy.intro_html:
About Golden Strings – Professional Wedding Violinist Based in Salerno, Italy

Golden Strings is an exquisite professional violinist based in Salerno, Italy, bringing impeccable elegance and refined warmth to weddings and special events.

Originally from Costa Rica, she discovered her passion for the violin in childhood and pursued a rigorous musical education at university, earning degrees in Violin Performance and Psychology. She is also a certified violin and viola teacher.

Her illustrious career has graced stages across Europe, the Americas, and beyond, sharing her profound love of music with discerning audiences from diverse cultures.

With impeccable fluency in Spanish, English, Portuguese, and a growing command of Italian, she effortlessly connects with clientele from across the globe.

Her passion for live performance infuses each moment with exquisite emotion and bespoke beauty—whether during a wedding ceremony, cocktail hour, or private celebration.

Golden Strings offers an exclusive performance lasting up to two hours, with a curated selection of line-up configurations tailored to the event's unique ambience. She performs with impeccable grace both indoors and outdoors, including enchanting beachfronts and rustic barns.

Sound and lighting arrangements are to be provided by the venue or planner; however, she can artfully curate a playlist or ambient background music to accompany interludes between sets.

She arrives a minimum of ninety minutes prior to the performance, requiring thirty to forty-five minutes for an elegant setup. Bespoke song requests—such as the first dance—are always accommodated with meticulous attention. Her flexibility extends to spatial requirements, ensuring a seamless integration into any event's unique setting.

wedding-harpist-italy-maria.intro_html:
Maria Harpist — an exquisitely refined presence for the world’s most discerning celebrations, based in Italy.

Born in France and now residing in Italy, Maria embodies a rare synthesis of cultural depth and artistic mastery. Her musical journey is a bespoke tapestry, woven from a lifelong pursuit of personal expression and impeccable craftsmanship, offering an auditory experience that is entirely her own.

Her artistry graces the most prestigious international stages and exclusive private events across Italy, France, Portugal, Ireland, Belgium, Switzerland, Sweden, Holland, Spain, Mexico, Brazil, the USA, Dubai, China, India, and Egypt. Her curated repertoire traverses traditional, Celtic, and early music with effortless grace, creating an atmosphere of refined elegance for every occasion.

For clients seeking the ultimate in luxurious musical accompaniment, Maria is regularly engaged by the finest estates, including the esteemed Locanda in Tuscany, the Castelfranco Veneto in Treviso, and the Conti di San Bonifacio Wine Resort in Gavorrano.

A prolific and visionary artist, Maria has contributed to over ten distinct early music projects. Her solo albums, Ankaa and Believe, are exquisite compilations of her original compositions, while her duet albums with the Harp & Hang duo, Menhir and Nyanga, showcase a sophisticated collaborative spirit. Her published scores with Stella Mattutina and three acclaimed Ebooks on the Celtic harp with Area 51 further cement her status as a leading authority in her field.

Since 2008, Maria has served as the visionary director of the Harp School at the "Arpeggi" Cultural Association in Bologna, an institution she personally founded. She is the Artistic Director of the Bologna Harp Festival and a distinguished member of the artistic committee of the Italian Harp Association. Her leadership extends globally as the Director of the International Harp Therapy Programme Italy, overseeing a holistic approach to the instrument that is both profound and unique.

Maria’s artistry is frequently sought after for exclusive events at the world’s most refined destinations, including:

  • Locanda in Tuscany, Val d'Orcia, Italy
  • Castelfranco Veneto, Treviso, Italy
  • Conti di San Bonifacio Wine Resort, Gavorrano, Italy
  • St. Moritz, Switzerland

A distinguished lecturer and clinician, Maria regularly presides over masterclasses and conferences on improvisation, composition, harp therapy, and early harps at esteemed institutions worldwide. Her illustrious engagements include the Nobber Harp Festival (Ireland), Harp on Wight (UK), the Conservatory of Pesaro, the University of Bologna, the University of Colorado, and the Virtual Harp Summit (USA). A sought-after speaker, she has been invited to deliver a TEDx Conference and has collaborated with the International Museum and Library of Music in Bologna since 2004.

Her journey of mastery began in Brittany, France, where she devoted herself to the Celtic harp under the tutelage of Anne Le Signor, earning her Diploma from the Conservatory of Lannion in 1997. She specialized further in ancient Celtic harp with metal strings under the guidance of Violaine Mayor and Katrien Delavier, embarking on her first tour of Celtic music in 1996. Her study of early harps continued at the Centre de Musique Medievale in Paris, culminating in a Diploma in Ancient Harp from the Tours Conservatory and a Diplôme d'Études Approfondies in Musicology from the University of Tours in 2002. She refined her craft under the legendary Myrdhin, Grainne Hambly, and Christina Tourin, earning her Certificate in Harp Therapy (CHTP) in 2017.

Her global prestige is reflected in a calendar that features the world's most illustrious festivals. Whether performing solo, in duo, or with esteemed ensembles such as Doulce Mémoire, Francesca Caccini, and Celic Dream, she has captivated audiences at the Wonder Festival (USA), the World Harp Congress (China, Hong Kong), the Stockholm Early Music Festival (Sweden), the Wight Harp Festival (UK), the Brussels Harp Festival (Belgium), the Rio Harp Festival (Brazil), and the Rencontres Internationales de Harpes Celtiques de Dinan (France).

Within Italy, her presence elevates the Ravenna Festival, Festival Taggia in Arpa, Bologna Festival, and the Grandezze e Meraviglie series, among many others.

She has commanded the stages of the world's most revered venues, including the Royal Opera House Mumbai, the Concert Hall of Hong Kong, the Theatre of Boulogne-Billancourt in Paris, the Carlo San Felice Theatre in Genova, La Chapelle Royale in Versailles, the Sforza Castle in Milano, and the Fondation Querini Stampalia in Venice.

bologna-wedding-singer-italy.intro_html:
About The Bologna Wedding Singer – an exquisite vocalist based in Bologna, Italy

For several seasons, The Bologna Wedding Singer has graced the most refined weddings, galas, and private celebrations throughout Italy. Her curated repertoire weaves together impeccable pop covers, classical treasures, jazz and swing standards, and evocative selections from film and television—each piece delivered with bespoke artistry.

To engage the finest wedding singer Italy has to offer, an invitation to begin a conversation is extended.

rhythm-fusion-rome-italy.description_html:
Comprising young virtuosos, each member brings a distinctive artistic sensibility to the stage, resulting in an impeccably curated and dynamic performance. Having performed internationally, this ensemble is celebrated for its electrifying energy and flawless musicianship, setting a new standard for live entertainment.

Their carefully crafted repertoire spans pop, dance, and jazz, ensuring every musical preference is met with sophistication. Every performance is designed to elevate your event into an unforgettable, curated affair.

Whether enchanting guests at an exclusive wedding or a distinguished corporate soirée, Rhythm Fusion promises an immersive experience that inspires movement and delight. Their remarkable versatility allows seamless transitions across genres and configurations, delivering bespoke performances that leave an indelible impression.

rhythm-fusion-rome-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- We typically perform one set of up to 1.5 hours of soft, elegant music, followed by a 1-hour non-stop dance set without breaks.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- We can provide a basic sound system or a full premium setup, which includes risers and a minimal lighting setup.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- We offer both a DJ service and a laptop playlist option for after the live performance.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- Our sound team arrives at least 3.5 hours before the start of the event. The band itself arrives 2 hours before.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- It usually takes us about 90 minutes to set up and soundcheck, depending on the venue.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- We can learn up to 3 custom song requests, to be discussed and agreed upon in advance.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- We’ll adapt to the available space, but we appreciate having enough room to move and perform comfortably, especially for larger line-ups.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, we’re happy to perform outdoors or in non-traditional venues such as barns, beaches, etc.</details>

singer-pianist-italy-max-sings.intro_html:
Max Sings – An Exquisite Pianist & Vocalist for Unforgettable Celebrations

Based in the refined enclave of Samarate, in the enchanting province of Varese near Lake Como, Max Sings stands as a paragon of musical artistry. This impeccably accomplished male vocalist and pianist has curated a distinguished career, performing at the most exclusive weddings, receptions, and bespoke events across Italy and beyond. His vast, meticulously refined repertoire spans genres with effortless grace, ensuring every occasion is transformed into an indelible, luxurious experience.

Max is regularly engaged to perform for the most discerning clientele at celebrated venues such as the Abadía de San Galgano in Chiusdino and the illustrious Villa Geno on Lake Como, Italy.
singer-pianist-italy-max-sings.description_html: His exceptional mastery of piano and voice has earned him a reputation as one of the most dynamic and versatile performers in the industry. Whether interpreting a tender romantic ballad or an exuberant pop melody, Max's performance leaves an enduring impression—an exquisite auditory jewel for every guest. He is the impeccable addition to any celebration, offering a curated spectrum of musical genres to satisfy the most refined tastes.

blues-brothers-tribute-band-milan.intro_html:
The Italy Blues Brothers Band – An Exquisite Tribute Ensemble, Based in Milan, Italy

The Italy Blues Brothers Band presents an impeccably curated tribute to the legendary Blues Brothers, delivering a refined repertoire of powerful Rhythm and Blues classics. Composed of nine exceptional musicians, the ensemble performs a bespoke two-hour set of live music, drawing from the iconic soundtrack of the film. Their meticulously selected repertoire also celebrates the finest voices in Soul and Rhythm and Blues—including James Brown, Sam & Dave, Aretha Franklin, and Wilson Pickett—offering an unforgettable, sophisticated experience.
blues-brothers-tribute-band-milan.description_html: Founded several years ago, the band has steadily ascended to prominence, now recognised as one of Italy’s most distinguished tribute acts. Discerning clients will appreciate their willingness to travel across Italy and beyond, tailoring every performance to the unique musical desires of your event. The ensemble’s artistry is deeply inspired by the cinematic masterpiece, and they invite guests to immerse themselves in the film before witnessing their exquisite live interpretation. For those seeking an unparalleled, refined tribute to the Blues Brothers legacy, the Italy Blues Brothers Band represents the pinnacle of quality and exclusivity.

pianist-milan-sonia.intro_html:
Sonia Pianist – An Exquisite Wedding Pianist, Based in Milan, Italy

Sonia Pianist is a refined performer of exceptional calibre, dedicated to delivering impeccably curated entertainment for the most distinguished occasions.

From her atelier in Milan, Sonia brings her artistry across Italy, gracing weddings, private soirées, and corporate galas with her presence—and is delighted to travel to your chosen destination.

Her repertoire is as versatile as it is sophisticated: from timeless classical compositions to the elegant rhythms of jazz and the most beloved pop melodies, every piece is rendered with breathtaking precision.
pianist-milan-sonia.description_html:
With years of performance experience, Sonia embodies the very essence of a true professional—effortlessly elevating each event with her impeccable talent.

Her swift, unobtrusive setup allows her to perform in a vast array of exquisite venues, ensuring the performance of your dreams is realised with seamless grace.

If you seek one of Italy’s most distinguished wedding pianists, your search concludes here. Enquire with Sonia Pianist to begin composing your bespoke musical experience.

1 Verified Review

“We used Sonia for a wedding proposal. The original plan had canceled so I reached out to Sonia at very short notice. In the end, it turned much better than the original plan. She responded to our emails very quickly. I asked if she could play a few specific songs for us, which she indulged. She played for us all kind of songs that matched our styles and requests, for an hour and it was fantastic! She is a very talented piano player! She gave us an excellent service and I highly recommend her!”
– Pierre-Marc Deschenes, 11 December 2022, wedding proposal in Milan, UK

tuscany-pianist-wedding-florence-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscany Pianist – An Exquisite Choice for Weddings & Events, Based in Florence, Italy

The Tuscany Pianist is a refined professional pianist and performer, residing in the heart of Florence, Italy. Her artistry spans a meticulously curated repertoire, blending classical precision with contemporary allure, cultivated through extensive training across diverse musical genres. She offers impeccably elegant performances for weddings, private soirées, and corporate gatherings throughout Italy.
tuscany-pianist-wedding-florence-italy.description_html:
For her solo engagements, The Tuscany Pianist provides a high-quality digital piano encased in a stylish upright design, adding an extra touch of sophistication to any setting—no need for an acoustic instrument. Her vast, bespoke repertoire renders her ideal for wedding ceremonies, aperitifs, or dinner interludes. She is also available for intimate private dinners with small, exclusive groups. Every performance is fully self-contained, ensuring clients need not worry about equipment. Begin the journey of infusing your event with exquisite piano music.

Curated Line-up Options:

  • Solo Pianist
  • Duo (option to add violin, cello, or vocalist)
  • Trio (option to add violin & cello, or vocalist)

wedding-saxophonist-rome.intro_html:
The Rome Saxophonist – An Exquisite Wedding Saxophonist, Based in Rome, Italy

The Rome Saxophonist is a refined and impeccably skilled wedding saxophonist, curated exclusively for discerning clientele. Based in the heart of Rome, he is available for hire across an exquisite array of events and functions—from the most intimate weddings and private soirées to distinguished corporate galas and concert performances. His artistry commands the stage, captivating every audience with an unparalleled elegance.

Though his residence is Rome, this accomplished musician performs regularly throughout Italy at both public and private occasions. He is delighted to travel to your chosen venue, ensuring that your event is graced with a truly bespoke musical presence.
wedding-saxophonist-rome.description_html:
Specialising in classical renditions, this talented saxophonist weaves a spellbinding journey through history’s finest compositions, enchanting you and your guests with every note. Yet his repertoire is far from singular—he also performs a refined selection of other genres and welcomes bespoke requests, tailoring his performance to the precise atmosphere you envision for your celebration.

His sets typically span from fifty to one hundred minutes, and his roaming style renders him the consummate performer for every setting—whether grand or intimate, indoors or al fresco. To engage one of Italy’s most distinguished saxophonists, an experience of impeccable quality awaits with The Rome Saxophonist.

The acoustic arrangements, meticulously crafted by The Honey Crew, present an exquisite blend of background ambience and dance-worthy rhythms, infused with subtle undertones of blues, swing, folk, and pop.

Performing fluently in both English and Italian, and driven by a profound love for music, The Honey Crew is the quintessential choice for destination weddings and exclusive parties.

For those seeking one of Italy’s most distinguished folk wedding and party bands, an encounter with The Honey Crew promises an unforgettable, luxurious experience.

Alberto On Drums – An Exquisite Percussionist for Rome’s Most Refined Celebrations

Based in the heart of Rome, Alberto On Drums stands as an impeccably skilled percussionist and drummer, curating bespoke musical experiences for the most discerning events. His artistry delivers an unparalleled depth of rhythm, transforming each occasion into a sublime sensory journey.

With years of refined industry expertise, Alberto is the definitive choice for those who seek a truly extraordinary drum performance—an aural statement of elegance and sophistication.

Alberto performs as part of Sax 'N' Pulse, one of Italy’s most distinguished saxophone, DJ, and percussion ensembles, where his rhythms weave seamlessly with refined melodies. His repertoire is exquisitely versatile, encompassing traditional and electric drum kits, bongos, and intimate collaborations with saxophonists, violinists, and DJs—each arrangement bespoke to the occasion.
percussionist-rome-alberto-drums.description_html:
A seasoned maestro, Alberto regularly graces the most exclusive weddings, private parties, and corporate events across Italy. As a performer, Alberto possesses an impeccable ability to cross genres with effortless grace—seamlessly blending rock with soul, reggae with pop, and every note in between. For those seeking one of Italy’s most distinguished club percussionists to elevate their celebration, Alberto On Drums offers an experience of pure, curated luxury.

balkan-klezmer-band-milan.intro_html:
The Italian Klezmer Band – An Exquisite Balkan & Klezmer Ensemble, Based in Milan, Italy

Presenting The Italian Klezmer Band: a refined and spirited folk ensemble that curates an impeccable repertoire of traditional melodies, infused with the evocative essence of Balkan fanfares and Jewish Klezmer traditions. Though recently formed, this bespoke collective offers an atmosphere of joyous sophistication, making it an exceptional choice for discerning celebrations.

The ensemble’s line-up is artfully variable, ranging from an intimate nine musicians to a grand orchestral presence of twenty, ensuring an experience tailored to the scale and elegance of any occasion. Particularly revered at Jewish weddings throughout Italy, the band brings an air of timeless festivity and cultural richness.

A Legacy of Impeccable Performance

With years of combined industry expertise, The Italian Klezmer Band delivers a flawless performance—whether indoors or al fresco, as a full orchestra or a more select chamber group. Their professionalism is matched only by their spirited charm. They have graced venues across Italy, from the Street Artists Festival in Costa di Mezzate, Mozzo, Sarnico, and other Lombard locales, to celebrated cities including Parma, Milan, Brescia, Florence, Bologna, Cuneo, Treviso, Udine, Trieste, and Lucca.

Roaming, exuberant, and sonorous, the band produces an atmosphere unlike any other—a truly enchanting spectacle that captivates every guest. They are the quintessential choice for bringing the evocative Balkan and Klezmer ambiance to your wedding, crafting an evening of unparalleled refinement and joy.

Their curated repertoire spans over three hours of exquisite selections, including Hava Naguila, Ale Brider, Bubamara, Mesecina, Galizianer Tanz, Djelem djelem, and many more—from time-honored traditional pieces to compositions by Bregovic and original works. For a wedding, the ensemble typically performs as follows:

  • An elegant aperitivo set to warmly welcome guests
  • Refined musical interludes during dinner (one or two brief performances)
  • A celebratory after-cake performance, when the atmosphere is at its most joyous, inviting free movement and dance for a truly unforgettable party

The band is wholly receptive to bespoke discussions, adapting their artistry to align seamlessly with your wishes and the unique character of your venue.

Among the exclusive locations where they have been engaged for weddings and events:

  • Caprino Veronese, Italy

For those seeking one of Italy’s most distinguished Klezmer and Balkan ensembles, The Italian Klezmer Band awaits the opportunity to create an exquisite, bespoke celebration.

female-dancer-italy-hire.intro_html:
The Italian Dancer – An Exquisite Female Dance Artisan, Based in Milan, Italy

Born in the illustrious city of Milan, Ema commenced her career as a performer at an exceptionally young age, gracing the stages of Italy’s most prestigious venues. Her devotion to dance and music has always been an unwavering passion, refined through years of immersive study and practice.

Having traveled extensively and resided in distinguished destinations—including Venezuela, Germany, Great Britain, and the United States—she has perpetually drawn closer to the realms of art and music, cultivating a truly curated and worldly artistry.

The Italian Dancer is available for an exclusive engagement at weddings, corporate events, and private celebrations throughout Italy and across the globe.
female-dancer-italy-hire.description_html:
Nata a Milano, Ema ha intrapreso fin dalla più tenera età una carriera di performer nei locali notturni più esclusivi d’Italia. La danza e la musica rappresentano da sempre la sua più raffinata passione, coltivata anche attraverso gli studi presso il prestigioso M.A.S di Milano.

Dopo aver viaggiato e vissuto in paesi quali Venezuela, Germania, Gran Bretagna e Stati Uniti, si è avvicinata sempre più al mondo dell’arte e della musica. Nel 2008 ha conseguito con lode la laurea in Music, Arts and Entertainment Management presso la Buckinghamshire New University in Inghilterra. È proprio a Londra che Ema ha scoperto e iniziato a studiare le danze orientali presso il Sahara Nights, sotto la guida dell’insegnante Anne White.

Da molti anni si esibisce come performer e danzatrice del ventre nei locali più prestigiosi d’Italia e all’estero, e ha partecipato a numerose trasmissioni televisive su reti nazionali e locali. La sua scuola è concepita come uno spazio sereno e protetto, dove l’arte viene appresa in un ambiente energicamente positivo; le allieve sono accolte con impeccabile cura per favorire un apprendimento ottimale.

Nel gennaio 2014 ha conquistato tre medaglie d’oro ai Campionati Italiani Assoluti classe Master a Rimini, classificandosi prima in tutte le discipline: Oriental, Show e Folk. Nel maggio 2014 ha ottenuto due ori e un argento ai Campionati del Mondo a Mosca, primeggiando in Oriental e Show e ottenendo il secondo posto nel Folk. I successi sono proseguiti agli Europei disputatisi a Sochi nel 2015, dove si è classificata terza nella danza orientale, prima nello Show e seconda nel Folk. Anche i Campionati Italiani del 2016 hanno rappresentato un trionfo, con un primo posto nello Show e due secondi posti nell’Oriental Dance e nel Folk.

wedding-band-italy-amore-acoustic.intro_html:
Amore Acoustic – An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble Based in Genoa, Italy

Amore Acoustic curates refined acoustic renditions of contemporary pop hits for distinguished events across Italy. This impeccably crafted band brings together five exceptionally talented musicians, each delivering bespoke interpretations of modern chart-topping songs. Their sound is both effortless and captivating—perfectly suited for boho-chic celebrations as well as luxurious yet youthful weddings and exclusive corporate gatherings.

With two outstanding vocalists who sing in flawless English, the ensemble cultivates an atmosphere of warmth and welcome. Guests are treated to delightful acoustic covers of internationally renowned songs, each performance a testament to the band’s artistry and elegance.
wedding-band-italy-amore-acoustic.description_html:
Their meticulously curated repertoire includes works by artists such as Morcheeba, James Arthur, Leona Lewis, Adele, Christina Perri, as well as timeless legends like Sting, Otis Redding, and Aretha Franklin—a seamless blend of modern pop and soulful classics.

The band offers a refined flexibility: for civil and religious ceremonies, they perform as an intimate duo of vocals and guitar—delivering emotional renditions of your most cherished romantic songs that are certain to move every guest. For cocktail hours and receptions, they elevate the experience with the full ensemble, including drums and bass, infusing the atmosphere with an irresistible groove.

If you seek to engage one of Italy’s most distinguished wedding and party bands, look no further than Amore Acoustic—a truly polished choice for your most exquisite celebration.

folk-florence-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
Folk in Florence — An Exquisite Italian Folk Roaming Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

Folk in Florence is a refined and authentically Italian wedding folk trio, offering a bespoke musical experience that captures the warmth, charm, and spirit of la dolce vita for destination weddings and exclusive private events. Based in the heart of Tuscany, this impeccable ensemble has performed for discerning couples from across the globe, curating an atmosphere that is at once welcoming, engaging, and filled with unforgettable moments.

Comprising exquisite vocals, tambourine, guitar, and violin, the trio delivers an interactive live performance that seamlessly blends traditional Italian folk melodies and spirited tarantella rhythms with swing classics and internationally beloved songs—each selection curated to elevate every celebration.

Their performances naturally inspire guests to clap, sing, and join in, creating joyful, spontaneous moments that evolve into dancing and cherished memories. From iconic Italian favourites to timeless international repertoire, every piece is chosen to connect with guests of all ages and backgrounds.

Whether setting an elegant tone during the ceremony, infusing energy into an aperitivo, or animating a welcome party or pizza night, the band adapts effortlessly to every facet of the celebration. Folk in Florence offers a complete wedding experience—live music woven throughout the day, with the option to extend into the evening via a refined DJ setup or a DJ and saxophone arrangement for the after-dinner festivities.

Between live performances, meticulously curated background playlists maintain a seamless flow and impeccable atmosphere, from the arrival of guests to the final dance. With extensive experience orchestrating destination weddings, the band collaborates closely with couples, planners, and venues, ensuring a planning process that is effortless and serene.

Equally at home in villas, along beaches, in rustic barns, and amidst unique outdoor settings, they combine refined professionalism with a relaxed, gracious approach—bringing an unmistakable taste of Italian celebration to every event.

Milan Wedding Music Collective – an ensemble of consummate professionals, based in the heart of Milan, Italy.

Esteemed as the first authentic British-style wedding band to grace Italy, this refined collective was founded in 2010 and has since been curated exclusively for discerning couples from across Europe, the United Kingdom, Australia, and the United States.

The signature 5th Avenue configuration is an impeccably balanced quintet: bass, guitar, drums, keyboards, and a captivating female vocalist.

For those seeking the most exquisite wedding band Milan has to offer, a bespoke experience awaits. Additional virtuosos—from harpists and string quartets to saxophonists and wedding singers—may be arranged upon request.

Perfectly suited for ceremonies and receptions, the 5th Avenue repertoire is a meticulously curated journey: background elegance during dinner and aperitifs, then spirited dancing and celebration. Their repertory spans jazz, ballads, funk, soul, rock, disco, pop, and reggae standards, alongside the finest contemporary hits—Adele, Norah Jones, Alicia Keys, The Police, Jamiroquai, Bob Marley, Stevie Wonder, Bruno Mars, Bon Jovi, Journey, Maroon 5, Kings of Leon, The Killers, and many more.

wedding-dj-capri-italy-dee.intro_html:

Hailing from the sun-drenched shores of Capri, DJ Dee is a master of bespoke sonic experiences, crafting impeccably refined performances for the most exclusive events across Europe. His artistry is defined by an exquisite versatility that transforms every occasion into an unforgettable journey.

Since 1997, DJ Dee has captivated discerning audiences worldwide—from intimate celebrations to lavish galas and prestigious corporate affairs—earning a reputation as one of Italy's most sought-after musical talents. His curated style draws seamlessly from a refined spectrum of eras and genres, ensuring a soundtrack of unparalleled sophistication:

  • Funk
  • Soul
  • House
  • Pop
  • Lounge
  • Disco

With decades of impeccable experience, DJ Dee possesses the artistry and intuition to orchestrate a performance that is nothing short of extraordinary. His sets are meticulously woven to delight every guest, keeping the dance floor vibrant and the atmosphere elevated throughout the night. For those who seek nothing less than perfection, DJ Dee stands as the definitive choice—an exquisite talent reserved for those who appreciate the finest details.

house-of-amore-dj-grosseto-italy.intro_html:
House of Amore DJ – An esteemed purveyor of refined musical experiences for weddings and celebrations, based in the heart of Grosseto, Italy

Graduated in Art, Music and Entertainment, House of Amore has graced the most glamorous clubs along the southern Tuscan coast since 2004. He has opened and closed extraordinary events for an illustrious roster of special guests, including Kenny Carpenter (Studio 54), Gigi D’Agostino, Gabry Ponte, Eiffel 65, DJ Antoine, DJ From Mars, Cristian Marchi, Francesco Farfa, Federico Scavo. He has also closed major live concerts with his exquisite DJ sets for artists such as Elisa, Manu Chao, Terence Trent D’Arby, Sizzla, Franco Micalizzi, Montefiori Cocktail, Tonino Carotone, and Tullio De Piscopo.
house-of-amore-dj-grosseto-italy.description_html:
An Impeccable Suite of Services
House of Amore DJ curates a bespoke experience for your most important day. Your wedding package may include:

  • An immersive DJ set for your soirée, accompanied by a state-of-the-art professional sound system and a cutting-edge lighting design.
  • A curated ensemble of instrumentalists – saxophonist, violinist, percussionist, and a female vocalist – available upon request.
  • Additional audio systems for pivotal moments: the ceremony, the aperitif, dinner, and the cake cutting, ensuring impeccable acoustics at every turn.
  • A meticulously crafted repertoire spanning international chart-toppers and cherished Italian classics, with the flexibility to embrace any genre you desire.
  • Personalised musical selections for your most cherished moments – the bridal entrance, the first dance, and beyond.

Entrust your celebration to two decades of unparalleled expertise. House of Amore DJ curates the perfect soundtrack for an unforgettable day and a magical evening. From the arrival of the newlyweds through the aperitif, dinner, first dance, and cake cutting – every fleeting moment is transformed into pure enchantment with the right notes.

Having performed in the most exclusive clubs and venues along the southern Tuscan coast, the evening’s finale consistently evolves into an exquisitely energetic and surprising affair. Share the soundtrack of your dreams with your guests, and personalise every sublime detail of a celebration they will cherish forever.

Indulge in the gift you truly deserve – choose a master of the craft for your wedding.

Refined Line-up Options:

  • DJ
  • Violin
  • Saxophone
  • Percussion
  • Female Singer
